----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: # 050. Ledger and Auto-Charge
    2: 
    3: Версия: 0.1
    4: Статус: draft
    5: Язык: русский
    6: Проект: `github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway`
    7: 
    8: ---
    9: 
   10: # 1. Назначение документа
   11: 
   12: Этот документ описывает local ledger и auto-charge механизм Tokenio Gateway.
   13: 
   14: Документ фиксирует:
   15: 
   16: ```text
   17: usage lifecycle
   18: local request reserve
   19: billable usage
   20: pending amount
   21: effective user balance
   22: auto-charge threshold
   23: billing charge batching
   24: partial charge
   25: idempotency
   26: billing failure behavior
   27: reseller cost reconciliation boundary
   28: ```
   29: 
   30: Документ не описывает:
   31: 
   32: ```text
   33: public HTTP API
   34: API key validation
   35: route selection
   36: usage extraction formula
   37: pricing formula
   38: admin API endpoint details
   39: database migrations
   40: ```
   41: 
   42: Эти темы описываются в отдельных спецификациях.
   43: 
   44: ---
   45: 
   46: # 2. Главный ledger invariant
   47: 
   48: Tokenio Gateway должен иметь локальный ledger как source of truth для всех LLM usage events.
   49: 
   50: Каждый LLM request должен быть представлен в ledger через стабильный:
   51: 
   52: ```text
   53: local_request_id
   54: ```
   55: 
   56: Ledger нужен для:
   57: 
   58: ```text
   59: preflight reserve
   60: idempotency
   61: pending balance calculation
   62: billing charge batching
   63: retries after billing failure
   64: admin/debug visibility
   65: auditability
   66: ```
   67: 
   68: Запрещено:
   69: 
   70: ```text
   71: списывать деньги без локальной usage записи
   72: терять successful upstream usage из-за billing failure
   73: делать публичный /billing/flush
   74: считать user balance только по remote billing balance без pending ledger
   75: создавать второй billable usage для того же idempotency scope
   76: ```
   77: 
   78: ---
   79: 
   80: # 3. Ledger states
   81: 
   82: ## 3.1. Usage statuses
   83: 
   84: Минимальные статусы usage record:
   85: 
   86: ```text
   87: reserved
   88: released
   89: billable
   90: partially_charged
   91: charged
   92: failed
   93: pricing_failed
   94: ```
   95: 
   96: ## 3.2. reserved
   97: 
   98: `reserved` означает:
   99: 
  100: ```text
  101: request принят gateway
  102: user/auth/routing/preflight прошли
  103: local usage reserve создан
  104: upstream request ещё не завершён
  105: ```
  106: 
  107: Reserved record содержит:
  108: 
  109: ```text
  110: local_request_id
  111: idempotency_key
  112: user_id
  113: api_key_id
  114: api_family
  115: endpoint_kind
  116: client_model
  117: billing_model
  118: selected_route_id
  119: selected_reseller_id
  120: provider_type
  121: provider_model
  122: estimated_usage
  123: estimated_client_amount_cents
  124: estimated_upstream_cost_cents
  125: currency
  126: status = reserved
  127: created_at
  128: ```
  129: 
  130: ## 3.3. released
  131: 
  132: `released` означает:
  133: 
  134: ```text
  135: request не стал billable
  136: upstream не был safely processed
  137: reserve освобождён
  138: ```
  139: 
  140: Примеры:
  141: 
  142: ```text
  143: route selection failed after reserve
  144: connection failed before upstream accepted request
  145: timeout before response headers
  146: client request rejected before upstream
  147: ```
  148: 
  149: Released record не участвует в pending billing.
  150: 
  151: ## 3.4. billable
  152: 
  153: `billable` означает:
  154: 
  155: ```text
  156: upstream request successful
  157: usage рассчитан
  158: client amount рассчитан
  159: usage ожидает списания через billing service
  160: ```
  161: 
  162: Billable record участвует в:
  163: 
  164: ```text
  165: pending amount
  166: effective user balance
  167: auto-charge batch selection
  168: ```
  169: 
  170: ## 3.5. partially_charged
  171: 
  172: `partially_charged` означает:
  173: 
  174: ```text
  175: record был списан частично
  176: remaining_amount_cents > 0
  177: ```
  178: 
  179: Partial charge допустим, если billing balance меньше total pending amount, но больше нуля.
  180: 
  181: ## 3.6. charged
  182: 
  183: `charged` означает:
  184: 
  185: ```text
  186: usage полностью списан через billing service
  187: remaining_amount_cents = 0
  188: ```
  189: 
  190: Charged record больше не участвует в pending amount.
  191: 
  192: ## 3.7. failed
  193: 
  194: `failed` означает:
  195: 
  196: ```text
  197: request завершился ошибкой и не должен быть списан
  198: ```
  199: 
  200: Failed record нужен для audit/debug, но не участвует в pending billing.
  201: 
  202: ## 3.8. pricing_failed
  203: 
  204: `pricing_failed` означает:
  205: 
  206: ```text
  207: upstream request successful
  208: response клиенту мог быть возвращён
  209: usage/pricing не удалось безопасно рассчитать
  210: ```
  211: 
  212: `pricing_failed` не должен автоматически списываться.
  213: 
  214: Он должен быть виден через admin API для manual resolution.
  215: 
  216: До resolution gateway должен учитывать такой record как unresolved billing risk согласно policy.
  217: 
  218: Policy первой версии:
  219: 
  220: ```text
  221: pricing_failed блокирует новые LLM requests пользователя,
  222: если admin не пометил record как resolved/free/charged/failed.
  223: ```
  224: 
  225: ---
  226: 
  227: # 4. State transitions
  228: 
  229: ## 4.1. Allowed transitions
  230: 
  231: Разрешённые переходы:
  232: 
  233: ```text
  234: reserved -> released
  235: reserved -> billable
  236: reserved -> failed
  237: reserved -> pricing_failed
  238: 
  239: billable -> charged
  240: billable -> partially_charged
  241: billable -> failed
  242: 
  243: partially_charged -> charged
  244: partially_charged -> partially_charged
  245: partially_charged -> failed
  246: 
  247: pricing_failed -> billable
  248: pricing_failed -> charged
  249: pricing_failed -> failed
  250: 
  251: released -> terminal
  252: charged -> terminal
  253: failed -> terminal
  254: ```
  255: 
  256: ## 4.2. Forbidden transitions
  257: 
  258: Запрещено:
  259: 
  260: ```text
  261: charged -> billable
  262: charged -> reserved
  263: released -> billable
  264: failed -> charged без admin/manual resolution
  265: создать новый billable record вместо обновления existing idempotent record
  266: ```
  267: 
  268: ## 4.3. Terminal states
  269: 
  270: Terminal states:
  271: 
  272: ```text
  273: released
  274: charged
  275: failed
  276: ```
  277: 
  278: ---
  279: 
  280: # 5. Local request reserve
  281: 
  282: ## 5.1. When reserve is created
  283: 
  284: Reserve создаётся после:
  285: 
  286: ```text
  287: auth success
  288: request body parsed enough for routing
  289: client_model extracted
  290: route selected
  291: preflight estimate calculated
  292: user effective balance check passed
  293: reseller reserve created
  294: ```
  295: 
  296: Reserve создаётся до upstream request.
  297: 
  298: ## 5.2. Reserve amount
  299: 
  300: Reserve amount для user ledger:
  301: 
  302: ```text
  303: estimated_client_amount_cents
  304: ```
  305: 
  306: Reserve amount для reseller accounting:
  307: 
  308: ```text
  309: estimated_upstream_cost_cents
  310: ```
  311: 
  312: Эти значения нельзя смешивать.
  313: 
  314: ## 5.3. Reserve purpose
  315: 
  316: User reserve нужен для:
  317: 
  318: ```text
  319: не принять слишком много параллельных запросов
  320: учесть pending в effective balance
  321: поддержать idempotency
  322: ```
  323: 
  324: Reseller reserve нужен для:
  325: 
  326: ```text
  327: не превысить расчётный баланс reseller
  328: ```
  329: 
  330: ## 5.4. Reserve release
  331: 
  332: Если request safely failed before upstream processing:
  333: 
  334: ```text
  335: usage.status = released
  336: released_at = now
  337: failure_reason = <reason>
  338: ```
  339: 
  340: User pending reserve освобождается.
  341: 
  342: Reseller reserve освобождается в routing/reseller accounting layer.
  343: 
  344: ---
  345: 
  346: # 6. User balance
  347: 
  348: ## 6.1. Remote balance
  349: 
  350: Remote balance — баланс пользователя в billing service:
  351: 
  352: ```text
  353: remote_balance_cents
  354: ```
  355: 
  356: Он получается через:
  357: 
  358: ```http
  359: GET /api/v1/wallet/balance
  360: Authorization: Bearer <billing_jwt>
  361: ```
  362: 
  363: ## 6.2. Local pending amount
  364: 
  365: Local pending amount считается из ledger:
  366: 
  367: ```text
  368: pending_amount_cents =
  369:   sum(reserved.estimated_client_amount_cents)
  370: + sum(billable.remaining_amount_cents OR billable.client_amount_cents)
  371: + sum(partially_charged.remaining_amount_cents)
  372: ```
  373: 
  374: `charged`, `released`, `failed` не участвуют в pending.
  375: 
  376: `pricing_failed` учитывается отдельно как unresolved risk.
  377: 
  378: ## 6.3. Effective balance
  379: 
  380: Effective balance:
  381: 
  382: ```text
  383: effective_balance_cents =
  384:   remote_balance_cents - pending_amount_cents
  385: ```
  386: 
  387: Preflight request можно принять только если:
  388: 
  389: ```text
  390: effective_balance_cents >= estimated_client_amount_cents
  391: AND effective_balance_cents >= TOKENIO_MIN_REQUEST_BALANCE_CENTS
  392: ```
  393: 
  394: ## 6.4. Cached billing session
  395: 
  396: Gateway может хранить local billing session:
  397: 
  398: ```text
  399: user_id
  400: remote_balance_cents
  401: currency
  402: fetched_at
  403: updated_at
  404: ```
  405: 
  406: Cached session не заменяет ledger.
  407: 
  408: Cached session используется вместе с pending amount.
  409: 
  410: ## 6.5. Balance refresh
  411: 
  412: Если cached effective balance недостаточен, gateway должен попытаться refresh remote balance через billing service.
  413: 
  414: Если после refresh effective balance всё равно недостаточен:
  415: 
  416: ```text
  417: HTTP 402
  418: error.code = insufficient_funds
  419: ```
  420: 
  421: Если billing service недоступен, но cached balance есть, gateway может принять решение по cached effective balance.
  422: 
  423: Если cached balance отсутствует и billing service недоступен:
  424: 
  425: ```text
  426: HTTP 502
  427: error.code = billing_unavailable
  428: ```
  429: 
  430: ---
  431: 
  432: # 7. Preflight request flow
  433: 
  434: Перед upstream request gateway должен выполнить:
  435: 
  436: ```text
  437: 1. Validate user API key.
  438: 2. Extract api_family, endpoint_kind, client_model.
  439: 3. Detect requested capabilities.
  440: 4. Estimate usage.
  441: 5. Select route.
  442: 6. Estimate client amount.
  443: 7. Estimate upstream cost.
  444: 8. Load cached user billing session.
  445: 9. Calculate pending amount.
  446: 10. Refresh remote balance if needed.
  447: 11. Check effective balance.
  448: 12. Create reseller reserve.
  449: 13. Create local usage reserve.
  450: 14. Forward request upstream.
  451: ```
  452: 
  453: Если любой шаг до upstream request падает, billable usage не создаётся.
  454: 
  455: ---
  456: 
  457: # 8. Successful upstream flow
  458: 
  459: После successful upstream response gateway должен:
  460: 
  461: ```text
  462: 1. Extract actual usage or estimate conservatively.
  463: 2. Calculate actual upstream cost.
  464: 3. Calculate actual client amount.
  465: 4. Reconcile reseller reserve.
  466: 5. Update usage record:
  467:    reserved -> billable
  468: 6. Add billing headers.
  469: 7. Try auto-charge if threshold reached.
  470: 8. Return original upstream response body.
  471: ```
  472: 
  473: Если auto-charge failed, response body всё равно возвращается клиенту.
  474: 
  475: Usage остаётся pending.
  476: 
  477: ---
  478: 
  479: # 9. Billing failure after successful upstream
  480: 
  481: ## 9.1. Main rule
  482: 
  483: Если LLM upstream request успешен, а billing service недоступен при auto-charge:
  484: 
  485: ```text
  486: response клиенту возвращается
  487: usage остаётся billable или partially_charged
  488: future requests учитывают pending
  489: ```
  490: 
  491: Gateway не должен терять usage.
  492: 
  493: Gateway не должен повторно отправлять upstream request только из-за billing failure.
  494: 
  495: ## 9.2. Future requests after billing failure
  496: 
  497: Будущие request пользователя разрешены только если:
  498: 
  499: ```text
  500: remote_or_cached_balance_cents - pending_amount_cents
  501: >= estimated_client_amount_cents
  502: ```
  503: 
  504: Если pending съел effective balance:
  505: 
  506: ```text
  507: HTTP 402
  508: error.code = insufficient_funds
  509: ```
  510: 
  511: Если нужно refresh balance, а billing service недоступен:
  512: 
  513: ```text
  514: HTTP 502
  515: error.code = billing_unavailable
  516: ```
  517: 
  518: ---
  519: 
  520: # 10. Auto-charge
  521: 
  522: ## 10.1. Public flush forbidden
  523: 
  524: Публичный endpoint `/billing/flush` запрещён.
  525: 
  526: Списание выполняется внутри gateway автоматически.
  527: 
  528: ## 10.2. Auto-charge trigger
  529: 
  530: Auto-charge запускается после successful billable commit, если:
  531: 
  532: ```text
  533: pending_billable_amount_cents >= TOKENIO_AUTO_CHARGE_THRESHOLD_CENTS
  534: ```
  535: 
  536: Config:
  537: 
  538: ```text
  539: TOKENIO_AUTO_CHARGE_THRESHOLD_CENTS
  540: ```
  541: 
  542: Threshold берётся из environment.
  543: 
  544: ## 10.3. Minimum charge amount
  545: 
  546: Если pending amount меньше:
  547: 
  548: ```text
  549: TOKENIO_MIN_CHARGE_AMOUNT_CENTS
  550: ```
  551: 
  552: gateway может отложить charge.
  553: 
  554: Default первой версии:
  555: 
  556: ```text
  557: TOKENIO_MIN_CHARGE_AMOUNT_CENTS=100
  558: ```
  559: 
  560: ## 10.4. Charge candidates
  561: 
  562: Auto-charge выбирает records пользователя со статусами:
  563: 
  564: ```text
  565: billable
  566: partially_charged
  567: ```
  568: 
  569: Порядок:
  570: 
  571: ```text
  572: created_at ASC
  573: local_request_id ASC
  574: ```
  575: 
  576: ## 10.5. Charge batch
  577: 
  578: Gateway формирует stable billing charge request id:
  579: 
  580: ```text
  581: billing_charge_request_id
  582: ```
  583: 
  584: Он deterministic для canonical financial command и используется как:
  585: 
  586: ```http
  587: Idempotency-Key: <billing_charge_request_id>
  588: ```
  589: 
  590: `StableBatchID` идентифицирует immutable financial command. Runtime-generated timestamps и mutable batch result state не являются частью stable ID.
  591: 
  592: ## 10.5A. Charge batch preparation and usage claim
  593: 
  594: До внешнего Billing-вызова gateway обязан transactionally подготовить durable charge command.
  595: 
  596: `ports.UsageChargeBatchPlan.ExpectedRecords` содержит exact `pre-claim` состояния usage records.
  597: 
  598: `UsageLedger.PrepareChargeBatch` в одной transaction обязан:
  599: 
  600: ```text
  601: 1. Lock allocated usage records в canonical order.
  602: 2. Сравнить каждую строку с соответствующим pre-claim ExpectedRecord.
  603: 3. Проверить отсутствие другого active pending/failed batch claim.
  604: 4. Создать pending billing batch.
  605: 5. Сохранить ordered allocations.
  606: 6. Установить для каждого allocated usage record:
  607:    billing_charge_request_id = batch.id.
  608: 7. Создать immutable ordered post-claim expected-record snapshots.
  609: 8. Commit.
  610: ```
  611: 
  612: Post-claim expected record равен pre-claim record, кроме:
  613: 
  614: ```text
  615: BillingChargeRequestID = batch.ID
  616: ```
  617: 
  618: Claim не изменяет:
  619: 
  620: ```text
  621: usage status
  622: charged_amount_cents
  623: remaining_amount_cents
  624: usage timestamps
  625: ```
  626: 
  627: Claim не является ledger status transition.
  628: 
  629: `ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot.ExpectedRecords` всегда содержит post-claim records.
  630: 
  631: Allocation с `charged_amount_cents <= 0` является invalid charge plan и не сохраняется.
  632: 
  633: Billing Service вызывается только после successful commit `PrepareChargeBatch`.
  634: 
  635: ## 10.5B. Existing batch replay
  636: 
  637: Если batch с `plan.Batch.ID` уже существует, adapter не сравнивает incoming pre-claim records напрямую с persisted post-claim snapshots.
  638: 
  639: Для каждого incoming record строится canonical comparison form:
  640: 
  641: ```text
  642: comparison_record[i] =
  643:     plan.ExpectedRecords[i]
  644:     with BillingChargeRequestID = plan.Batch.ID
  645: ```
  646: 
  647: Transformation меняет только `BillingChargeRequestID`.
  648: 
  649: ### Canonical batch replay identity
  650: 
  651: Exact immutable batch comparison включает только:
  652: 
  653: ```text
  654: ID
  655: UserID
  656: BillingSubjectUserID
  657: ProviderType
  658: ClientModel
  659: BillingModel
  660: InputTokens
  661: OutputTokens
  662: AmountCents
  663: Currency
  664: ```
  665: 
  666: Каждый incoming `plan.Batch` до create/replay branching обязан иметь:
  667: 
  668: ```text
  669: Status = pending
  670: CreatedAt = UpdatedAt
  671: CreatedAt и UpdatedAt являются valid UTC timestamps
  672: ```
  673: 
  674: Следующие поля не входят в existing-command equality:
  675: 
  676: ```text
  677: Status
  678: BillingResponseBalanceCents
  679: BillingErrorCode
  680: ChargedAt
  681: FailedAt
  682: CreatedAt
  683: UpdatedAt
  684: ```
  685: 
  686: Причины:
  687: 
  688: ```text
  689: Status и result fields являются mutable lifecycle state.
  690: CreatedAt и UpdatedAt создаются текущим clock,
  691: не входят в StableBatchID и отличаются у legitimate replay,
  692: построенного в другое время.
  693: ```
  694: 
  695: Persisted batch timestamps первой successful preparation являются authoritative и возвращаются replay caller без изменения.
  696: 
  697: ### Canonical allocation replay identity
  698: 
  699: Allocations сравниваются по persisted `position` и полям:
  700: 
  701: ```text
  702: ID
  703: BatchID
  704: LocalRequestID
  705: ChargedAmountCents
  706: RemainingAmountCents
  707: ```
  708: 
  709: Каждая incoming allocation до create/replay branching обязана иметь:
  710: 
  711: ```text
  712: CreatedAt = plan.Batch.CreatedAt
  713: CreatedAt является valid UTC timestamp
  714: ```
  715: 
  716: `BillingChargeAllocation.CreatedAt`:
  717: 
  718: ```text
  719: валидируется при initial create
  720: не входит в StableBatchID
  721: не входит в existing-command equality
  722: не заменяет persisted CreatedAt при replay
  723: ```
  724: 
  725: Incoming slice index задаёт canonical position. Persisted allocation timestamps первой successful preparation являются authoritative.
  726: 
  727: ### Canonical expected-record replay identity
  728: 
  729: `comparison_record[i]` exact-сравнивается с persisted post-claim expected record на той же position по всем canonical `UsageRecord` fields, включая usage timestamps.
  730: 
  731: Exact replay требует совпадения:
  732: 
  733: ```text
  734: canonical immutable batch identity
  735: canonical ordered allocation identity
  736: comparison records с persisted post-claim snapshots
  737: record/allocation local_request_id correspondence по position
  738: ```
  739: 
  740: Exact match:
  741: 
  742: ```text
  743: idempotent success
  744: return exact persisted BillingChargeBatchSnapshot
  745: ```
  746: 
  747: Если exact persisted snapshot имеет:
  748: 
  749: ```text
  750: Status = succeeded
  751: ```
  752: 
  753: это legitimate concurrent replay уже reconciled financial command, а не store corruption.
  754: 
  755: `PrepareChargeBatch` возвращает exact persisted succeeded snapshot. Application caller обязан:
  756: 
  757: ```text
  758: не вызывать BillingChargeClient.Charge повторно
  759: не вызывать MarkChargeBatchFailed
  760: не вызывать ApplyChargeSuccess
  761: вернуть idempotent processed result из persisted batch
  762: использовать persisted BillingResponseBalanceCents, если он присутствует
  763: ```
  764: 
  765: `AutoChargeService.processPreparedBatch` принимает `pending`, `failed` и `succeeded` snapshots. Для `succeeded` он завершает operation до любого внешнего Billing side effect или ledger mutation.
  766: 
  767: Если persisted `succeeded` snapshot не содержит:
  768: 
  769: ```text
  770: BillingResponseBalanceCents
  771: ```
  772: 
  773: application не имеет права вычитать `batch.AmountCents` из ранее загруженного remote balance. Ранее загруженный balance мог быть получен как до, так и после concurrent successful charge, поэтому локальное вычитание неоднозначно и может повторно применить уже совершённый financial effect.
  774: 
  775: Перед подготовкой следующей provider/model group application обязана:
  776: 
  777: ```text
  778: 1. Повторно вызвать BillingBalanceClient.GetBalance.
  779: 2. Валидировать currency и non-negative balance.
  780: 3. Использовать refreshed balance как remaining remote balance.
  781: ```
  782: 
  783: Если refresh недоступен или возвращает invalid balance:
  784: 
  785: ```text
  786: ErrBillingUnavailable
  787: ```
  788: 
  789: Новые Billing charge calls и новые ledger mutations после такого replay не выполняются до successful refresh.
  790: 
  791: После последней provider/model group refresh не выполняется. Если следующей group нет, `succeeded` replay завершается успешно даже при недоступном Billing balance endpoint: пересчитанный `remainingRemote` больше не используется для нового financial decision.
  792: 
  793: Для `pending`/`failed` snapshot, который был реально списан текущим вызовом и получил successful Billing response без balance, application вычитает `batch.AmountCents` ровно один раз из balance, загруженного до этого charge, только если значение требуется для решения по следующей group.
  794: 
  795: Любое отличие:
  796: 
  797: ```text
  798: state/contract conflict
  799: ```
  800: 
  801: При existing batch replay usage claims повторно не обновляются, child rows повторно не вставляются и persisted timestamps не изменяются.
  802: 
  803: ## 10.5C. Active and historical claims
  804: 
  805: Для usage record:
  806: 
  807: ```text
  808: billing_charge_request_id referencing pending batch
  809:     -> active claim
  810: 
  811: billing_charge_request_id referencing failed batch
  812:     -> active claim retained for exact retry
  813: 
  814: billing_charge_request_id referencing succeeded batch
  815:     -> historical charge reference
  816: ```
  817: 
  818: Record с active claim нельзя включить в другой batch.
  819: 
  820: `partially_charged` record с historical succeeded batch reference может участвовать в следующем charge.
  821: 
  822: При подготовке следующего batch его historical ID заменяется ID нового pending batch, а immutable expected snapshot сохраняет новое post-claim состояние.
  823: 
  824: ## 10.6. Charge amount
  825: 
  826: Charge amount:
  827: 
  828: ```text
  829: charge_amount_cents = min(pending_chargeable_amount_cents, remote_balance_cents)
  830: ```
  831: 
  832: Если `charge_amount_cents <= 0`:
  833: 
  834: ```text
  835: batch не создаётся
  836: auto-charge deferred
  837: records остаются billable/partially_charged
  838: ```
  839: 
  840: ## 10.7. Partial charge
  841: 
  842: Если billing balance меньше pending amount, но больше нуля:
  843: 
  844: ```text
  845: часть records помечается charged
  846: последний record может стать partially_charged
  847: remaining_amount_cents сохраняется
  848: ```
  849: 
  850: ## 10.8. Successful charge
  851: 
  852: После successful Billing response gateway transactionally:
  853: 
  854: ```text
  855: 1. Загружает persisted immutable batch command.
  856: 2. Проверяет caller metadata против persisted command.
  857: 3. Проверяет current usage rows против persisted post-claim expected snapshots.
  858: 4. Применяет allocations ровно один раз.
  859: 5. Обновляет charged_amount_cents и remaining_amount_cents.
  860: 6. Устанавливает status charged или partially_charged.
  861: 7. Устанавливает charged_at.
  862: 8. Сохраняет billing_charge_request_id текущего batch.
  863: 9. Переводит batch в succeeded.
  864: 10. Сохраняет Billing response balance, если он присутствует.
  865: ```
  866: 
  867: `billing_charge_request_id` уже установлен на preparation stage; successful reconciliation сохраняет его как historical succeeded batch reference.
  868: 
  869: Identical succeeded replay является no-op: usage rows, immutable command и batch timestamps не изменяются.
  870: 
  871: ## 10.9. Failed charge
  872: 
  873: Если Billing charge failed:
  874: 
  875: ```text
  876: batch pending -> failed
  877: usage records остаются billable/partially_charged
  878: charged и remaining amounts не изменяются
  879: active billing_charge_request_id claim сохраняется
  880: future retry использует тот же batch ID и тот же persisted command
  881: ```
  882: 
  883: Новый batch для этих records не создаётся, пока failed batch не reconciled либо не разрешён отдельной explicit recovery operation.
  884: 
  885: Gateway не удаляет pending usage и не сохраняет raw Billing response body.
  886: 
  887: ## 10.10. MarkChargeBatchFailed CAS
  888: 
  889: Этот контракт относится к:
  890: 
  891: ```text
  892: UsageLedger.MarkChargeBatchFailed
  893: ```
  894: 
  895: и описывает initial automatic charge failure либо idempotent replay той же automatic failure operation.
  896: 
  897: Первый переход:
  898: 
  899: ```text
  900: persisted status = pending
  901: expectedStatus = pending
  902: -> pending -> failed
  903: ```
  904: 
  905: Сохраняются:
  906: 
  907: ```text
  908: billing_error_code
  909: failed_at
  910: updated_at = failed_at
  911: ```
  912: 
  913: Если persisted status уже `failed`, idempotent replay разрешён только когда:
  914: 
  915: ```text
  916: expectedStatus = failed
  917: billingErrorCode точно совпадает с persisted billing_error_code
  918: ```
  919: 
  920: Caller `failedAt` при already-failed replay:
  921: 
  922: ```text
  923: не участвует в equality
  924: не сохраняется
  925: не изменяет failed_at
  926: не изменяет updated_at
  927: ```
  928: 
  929: Другой error code или другой expected status возвращает:
  930: 
  931: ```text
  932: state conflict
  933: ```
  934: 
  935: `succeeded -> failed` запрещён.
  936: 
  937: `MarkChargeBatchFailed` не создаёт admin retry outcome audit и не моделирует новую явную попытку retry.
  938: 
  939: ## 10.11. Explicit failed-batch retry and audit
  940: 
  941: Явный admin retry failed batch является новой operation, а не idempotent replay `MarkChargeBatchFailed`.
  942: 
  943: До внешнего Billing-вызова:
  944: 
  945: ```text
  946: AdminUsageLedger.RecordChargeRetryAttemptWithAudit
  947: ```
  948: 
  949: атомарно:
  950: 
  951: ```text
  952: 1. Проверяет, что exact persisted failed snapshot всё ещё current.
  953: 2. Не изменяет BillingChargeBatch.
  954: 3. Сохраняет attempt audit:
  955:    before_state = exact current batch
  956:    after_state = exact current batch.
  957: 4. Commit до внешнего financial side effect.
  958: ```
  959: 
  960: Если явный retry снова завершился Billing error, вызывается:
  961: 
  962: ```text
  963: AdminUsageLedger.MarkChargeRetryFailedWithAudit
  964: ```
  965: 
  966: с:
  967: 
  968: ```text
  969: expectedStatus = failed
  970: billingErrorCode = normalized retry error code
  971: retryFailedAt = valid UTC operation time
  972: outcome audit before_state = exact pre-operation batch
  973: outcome audit after_state = exact requested post-operation batch
  974: ```
  975: 
  976: Одна transaction обязана:
  977: 
  978: ```text
  979: 1. Lock current batch.
  980: 2. Проверить current status = expectedStatus = failed.
  981: 3. Построить committed next batch:
  982:    Status = failed
  983:    BillingErrorCode = billingErrorCode
  984:    FailedAt = retryFailedAt
  985:    UpdatedAt = retryFailedAt.
  986: 4. Не изменять immutable command, ChargedAt или BillingResponseBalanceCents.
  987: 5. Exact-сравнить audit before_state с current batch.
  988: 6. Exact-сравнить audit after_state с next batch.
  989: 7. Сохранить next batch и outcome audit атомарно.
  990: 8. Commit.
  991: ```
  992: 
  993: Это допустимый audited transition:
  994: 
  995: ```text
  996: failed -> failed
  997: ```
  998: 
  999: который фиксирует outcome новой внешней retry attempt.
 1000: 
 1001: Инвариант audit:
 1002: 
 1003: ```text
 1004: persisted audit before_state = exact pre-transaction entity
 1005: persisted audit after_state = exact committed entity
 1006: returned failed entity = exact committed entity
 1007: ```
 1008: 
 1009: Idempotency определяется outcome audit ID:
 1010: 
 1011: ```text
 1012: same outcome audit ID + exact same operation payload
 1013:     -> idempotent no-op returning the already committed state
 1014: 
 1015: same outcome audit ID + different payload
 1016:     -> state/contract conflict
 1017: ```
 1018: 
 1019: Новая retry attempt имеет новые deterministic phase audit IDs и может обновить `failed_at`/`updated_at`.
 1020: 
 1021: Если current batch уже `succeeded`, retry failure outcome возвращает state conflict и не создаёт ложный audit.
 1022: 
 1023: ---
 1024: 
 1025: # 11. Billing charge request
 1026: 
 1027: Gateway вызывает:
 1028: 
 1029: ```http
 1030: POST /api/v1/usage/charge
 1031: X-Service-Token: <TOKENIO_BILLING_SERVICE_TOKEN>
 1032: Idempotency-Key: <billing_charge_request_id>
 1033: Content-Type: application/json
 1034: ```
 1035: 
 1036: Body:
 1037: 
 1038: ```json
 1039: {
 1040:   "request_id": "<billing_charge_request_id>",
 1041:   "user_id": "<billing_subject_user_id>",
 1042:   "model": "openrouter:gpt-4.1-mini",
 1043:   "input_tokens": 1000,
 1044:   "output_tokens": 500,
 1045:   "amount_cents": 123,
 1046:   "currency": "RUB"
 1047: }
 1048: ```
 1049: 
 1050: Если batch содержит несколько provider/model groups, gateway должен группировать charge по:
 1051: 
 1052: ```text
 1053: provider_type + client_model
 1054: ```
 1055: 
 1056: Billing model string:
 1057: 
 1058: ```text
 1059: provider_type:client_model
 1060: ```
 1061: 
 1062: Для каждого group формируется отдельный charge request.
 1063: 
 1064: ---
 1065: 
 1066: # 12. Grouping
 1067: 
 1068: ## 12.1. Charge grouping key
 1069: 
 1070: Charge grouping key:
 1071: 
 1072: ```text
 1073: user_id + provider_type + client_model + currency
 1074: ```
 1075: 
 1076: Billing service получает `model`:
 1077: 
 1078: ```text
 1079: provider_type:client_model
 1080: ```
 1081: 
 1082: ## 12.2. Why grouping is required
 1083: 
 1084: Grouping нужен, потому что billing service contract содержит одно поле:
 1085: 
 1086: ```text
 1087: model
 1088: ```
 1089: 
 1090: Если смешать разные models в один charge, billing service потеряет model-level accounting.
 1091: 
 1092: ## 12.3. Mixed pending records
 1093: 
 1094: Если pending records содержат несколько groups, gateway должен:
 1095: 
 1096: ```text
 1097: 1. split records by group
 1098: 2. charge each group separately
 1099: 3. preserve idempotency per group
 1100: 4. update records independently
 1101: ```
 1102: 
 1103: ---
 1104: 
 1105: # 13. Idempotency
 1106: 
 1107: ## 13.1. Client idempotency
 1108: 
 1109: Если client передал:
 1110: 
 1111: ```http
 1112: Idempotency-Key: <value>
 1113: ```
 1114: 
 1115: scope:
 1116: 
 1117: ```text
 1118: user_id + endpoint_kind + idempotency_key
 1119: ```
 1120: 
 1121: ## 13.2. Existing reserved request
 1122: 
 1123: Если повторный запрос пришёл с тем же idempotency scope и existing record в статусе `reserved`:
 1124: 
 1125: ```text
 1126: HTTP 409
 1127: error.code = request_in_progress
 1128: ```
 1129: 
 1130: ## 13.3. Existing billable/charged request
 1131: 
 1132: Если existing record уже `billable`, `partially_charged` или `charged`, gateway не должен создавать второй billable usage.
 1133: 
 1134: Response replay policy первой версии:
 1135: 
 1136: ```text
 1137: HTTP 409
 1138: error.code = idempotency_replay_not_available
 1139: ```
 1140: 
 1141: Причина:
 1142: 
 1143: ```text
 1144: gateway не хранит full upstream response body в ledger первой версии
 1145: ```
 1146: 
 1147: Будущая версия может хранить response body hash/body для replay.
 1148: 
 1149: ## 13.4. Existing failed/released request
 1150: 
 1151: Если existing record `failed` или `released`, повторный запрос с тем же idempotency key может быть разрешён только если это явно описано policy.
 1152: 
 1153: Policy первой версии:
 1154: 
 1155: ```text
 1156: возвращать HTTP 409 idempotency_key_reused
 1157: ```
 1158: 
 1159: ---
 1160: 
 1161: # 14. Pricing failed state
 1162: 
 1163: ## 14.1. Upstream success but pricing failed
 1164: 
 1165: Если upstream successful, но usage/pricing failed:
 1166: 
 1167: ```text
 1168: usage.status = pricing_failed
 1169: response body клиенту возвращается
 1170: X-Billing-Status: pricing_failed
 1171: auto-charge не запускается
 1172: ```
 1173: 
 1174: ## 14.2. Blocking policy
 1175: 
 1176: Пока у пользователя есть unresolved `pricing_failed` records:
 1177: 
 1178: ```text
 1179: новые LLM requests блокируются
 1180: ```
 1181: 
 1182: Ответ:
 1183: 
 1184: ```text
 1185: HTTP 409
 1186: error.code = unresolved_usage
 1187: ```
 1188: 
 1189: Admin должен вручную resolve record.
 1190: 
 1191: ## 14.3. Manual resolution
 1192: 
 1193: Admin может перевести `pricing_failed` в:
 1194: 
 1195: ```text
 1196: billable
 1197: charged
 1198: failed
 1199: ```
 1200: 
 1201: Manual resolution должен быть audit logged.
 1202: 
 1203: ---
 1204: 
 1205: # 15. Response headers
 1206: 
 1207: После successful billable commit gateway добавляет:
 1208: 
 1209: ```http
 1210: X-Local-Request-ID: llmreq_...
 1211: X-Billing-Provider-Type: openrouter
 1212: X-Billing-Client-Model: gpt-4.1-mini
 1213: X-Billing-Model: openrouter:gpt-4.1-mini
 1214: X-Billing-Amount-Cents: 123
 1215: X-Billing-Currency: RUB
 1216: X-Wallet-Balance-Cents: 10000
 1217: X-Wallet-Effective-Balance-Cents: 9877
 1218: X-Billing-Pending-Cents: 123
 1219: ```
 1220: 
 1221: Если auto-charge success happened before response:
 1222: 
 1223: ```text
 1224: X-Billing-Pending-Cents может быть 0 или reduced
 1225: X-Wallet-Balance-Cents отражает актуальный balance после charge, если billing response его вернул
 1226: ```
 1227: 
 1228: Если auto-charge failed:
 1229: 
 1230: ```http
 1231: X-Billing-Auto-Charge-Status: failed
 1232: ```
 1233: 
 1234: Если auto-charge deferred:
 1235: 
 1236: ```http
 1237: X-Billing-Auto-Charge-Status: deferred
 1238: ```
 1239: 
 1240: ---
 1241: 
 1242: # 16. Ledger records
 1243: 
 1244: Минимальная canonical usage record model:
 1245: 
 1246: ```text
 1247: local_request_id
 1248: idempotency_key
 1249: user_id
 1250: api_key_id
 1251: api_family
 1252: endpoint_kind
 1253: client_model
 1254: billing_model
 1255: selected_reseller_id
 1256: selected_route_id
 1257: provider_type
 1258: provider_model
 1259: provider_request_id
 1260: provider_response_model
 1261: 
 1262: estimated_input_tokens
 1263: estimated_cached_input_tokens
 1264: estimated_output_tokens
 1265: estimated_reasoning_tokens
 1266: estimated_image_input_tokens
 1267: estimated_audio_input_tokens
 1268: estimated_audio_output_tokens
 1269: estimated_file_input_tokens
 1270: estimated_video_input_tokens
 1271: estimated_image_generation_units
 1272: estimated_client_amount_cents
 1273: estimated_upstream_cost_cents
 1274: 
 1275: input_tokens
 1276: cached_input_tokens
 1277: output_tokens
 1278: reasoning_tokens
 1279: image_input_tokens
 1280: audio_input_tokens
 1281: audio_output_tokens
 1282: file_input_tokens
 1283: video_input_tokens
 1284: image_generation_units
 1285: usage_completeness
 1286: 
 1287: client_amount_cents
 1288: charged_amount_cents
 1289: remaining_amount_cents
 1290: actual_upstream_cost_cents
 1291: currency
 1292: 
 1293: status
 1294: failure_reason
 1295: billing_charge_request_id
 1296: 
 1297: created_at
 1298: reserved_at
 1299: released_at
 1300: billable_at
 1301: charged_at
 1302: failed_at
 1303: updated_at
 1304: ```
 1305: 
 1306: Все десять dimensions `EstimatedUsage` и `Usage` являются частью exact persistence round-trip.
 1307: 
 1308: ---
 1309: 
 1310: # 17. Billing session records
 1311: 
 1312: Минимальная billing session model:
 1313: 
 1314: ```text
 1315: user_id
 1316: billing_subject_user_id
 1317: remote_balance_cents
 1318: pending_amount_cents_cached
 1319: currency
 1320: fetched_at
 1321: created_at
 1322: updated_at
 1323: ```
 1324: 
 1325: `pending_amount_cents_cached` может быть denormalized optimization.
 1326: 
 1327: Source of truth для pending всё равно ledger.
 1328: 
 1329: ---
 1330: 
 1331: # 18. Consistency
 1332: 
 1333: ## 18.1. Transaction boundaries
 1334: 
 1335: Операции ledger должны быть transactional.
 1336: 
 1337: Минимально transaction required для:
 1338: 
 1339: ```text
 1340: create usage reserve
 1341: commit reserved to billable
 1342: mark charged allocations
 1343: mark pricing_failed
 1344: manual resolution
 1345: ```
 1346: 
 1347: ## 18.2. Idempotent writes
 1348: 
 1349: Writes должны быть idempotent по:
 1350: 
 1351: ```text
 1352: local_request_id
 1353: idempotency scope
 1354: billing_charge_request_id
 1355: ```
 1356: 
 1357: ## 18.3. Clock
 1358: 
 1359: Все timestamps хранятся в UTC.
 1360: 
 1361: ---
 1362: 
 1363: # 19. One instance assumption
 1364: 
 1365: Первая версия работает как:
 1366: 
 1367: ```text
 1368: single instance
 1369: ```
 1370: 
 1371: Но ledger хранится в Postgres.
 1372: 
 1373: Даже при single instance нельзя хранить usage только in-memory.
 1374: 
 1375: ---
 1376: 
 1377: # 20. Admin visibility
 1378: 
 1379: Admin API должен позволять смотреть:
 1380: 
 1381: ```text
 1382: usage records
 1383: pending amount by user
 1384: pricing_failed records
 1385: billable records
 1386: partially_charged records
 1387: billing charge batches
 1388: failed auto-charge attempts
 1389: ```
 1390: 
 1391: Admin API должен позволять manual resolution для:
 1392: 
 1393: ```text
 1394: pricing_failed
 1395: stuck reserved
 1396: failed charge diagnostics
 1397: ```
 1398: 
 1399: Детальный admin contract описан в:
 1400: 
 1401: ```text
 1402: docs/spec/060-admin-api.ru.md
 1403: ```
 1404: 
 1405: ---
 1406: 
 1407: # 21. Error mapping
 1408: 
 1409: Ledger-related errors:
 1410: 
 1411: ```text
 1412: insufficient_funds
 1413: billing_unavailable
 1414: request_in_progress
 1415: idempotency_replay_not_available
 1416: idempotency_key_reused
 1417: unresolved_usage
 1418: usage_store_error
 1419: auto_charge_failed
 1420: ```
 1421: 
 1422: Подробный response mapping описан в:
 1423: 
 1424: ```text
 1425: docs/spec/080-error-model.ru.md
 1426: ```
 1427: 
 1428: ---
 1429: 
 1430: # 22. Logging
 1431: 
 1432: Разрешено логировать:
 1433: 
 1434: ```text
 1435: local_request_id
 1436: user_id
 1437: api_key_id
 1438: endpoint_kind
 1439: client_model
 1440: billing_model
 1441: status
 1442: client_amount_cents
 1443: pending_amount_cents
 1444: billing_charge_request_id
 1445: auto_charge_status
 1446: error_code
 1447: ```
 1448: 
 1449: Запрещено логировать:
 1450: 
 1451: ```text
 1452: raw user API key
 1453: billing JWT
 1454: billing service token
 1455: reseller API key
 1456: Authorization header
 1457: full request body by default
 1458: ```
 1459: 
 1460: ---
 1461: 
 1462: # 23. Tests
 1463: 
 1464: Ledger layer должен иметь tests для:
 1465: 
 1466: ```text
 1467: create reserved usage
 1468: reserved -> released
 1469: reserved -> billable
 1470: billable -> charged
 1471: billable -> partially_charged
 1472: partially_charged -> charged
 1473: pricing_failed blocks future requests
 1474: pending amount calculation
 1475: effective balance calculation
 1476: billing unavailable after successful upstream
 1477: auto-charge threshold trigger
 1478: auto-charge deferred below threshold
 1479: partial charge allocation
 1480: grouping by provider_type + client_model
 1481: stable billing_charge_request_id
 1482: client Idempotency-Key duplicate reserved
 1483: client Idempotency-Key duplicate charged
 1484: ```
 1485: 
 1486: ---
 1487: 
 1488: # 24. Acceptance criteria
 1489: 
 1490: Ledger and auto-charge layer считается реализованным, если:
 1491: 
 1492: ```text
 1493: 1. Каждый LLM request получает local_request_id.
 1494: 2. До upstream создаётся reserved usage.
 1495: 3. Safe failure переводит reserved -> released.
 1496: 4. Successful upstream переводит reserved -> billable.
 1497: 5. Pending amount считается из reserved/billable/partially_charged.
 1498: 6. Effective balance = remote balance - pending.
 1499: 7. Future requests учитывают pending.
 1500: 8. Public /billing/flush отсутствует.
 1501: 9. Auto-charge запускается по TOKENIO_AUTO_CHARGE_THRESHOLD_CENTS.
 1502: 10. Billing charge использует X-Service-Token.
 1503: 11. Billing charge использует stable Idempotency-Key.
 1504: 12. Charge группируется по provider_type + client_model.
 1505: 13. Billing failure после successful upstream не ломает response клиенту.
 1506: 14. Billing failure оставляет usage pending.
 1507: 15. pricing_failed не теряется и блокирует будущие requests до resolution.
 1508: 16. Client Idempotency-Key не создаёт двойное списание.
 1509: 17. Partial charge корректно обновляет remaining_amount_cents.
 1510: 18. Ledger writes выполняются transactional.
 1511: 19. Tests покрывают state transitions, pending/effective balance, auto-charge и idempotency.
 1512: ```

====================================================================================================
FILE: docs/spec/060-admin-api.ru.md
GIT_BLOB_SHA: d077ddea701a82f831b5a3d131a4e9fe9f862231
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: # 060. Admin API
    2: 
    3: Версия: 0.1
    4: Статус: draft
    5: Язык: русский
    6: Проект: `github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway`
    7: 
    8: ---
    9: 
   10: # 1. Назначение документа
   11: 
   12: Этот документ описывает Admin API Tokenio Gateway.
   13: 
   14: Admin API нужен для управления:
   15: 
   16: ```text
   17: users
   18: user API keys
   19: resellers
   20: reseller balances
   21: routes
   22: route prices
   23: route cooldowns
   24: usage records
   25: billing charge batches
   26: manual resolution
   27: audit log
   28: ```
   29: 
   30: Документ не описывает:
   31: 
   32: ```text
   33: public LLM API
   34: runtime route selection internals
   35: pricing formula internals
   36: ledger state machine details
   37: SQL schema details
   38: provider adapter implementation
   39: ```
   40: 
   41: Эти темы описываются в отдельных спецификациях.
   42: 
   43: ---
   44: 
   45: # 2. Главный admin invariant
   46: 
   47: Admin API — это control plane.
   48: 
   49: Public `/v1/*` endpoints — это data plane.
   50: 
   51: Control plane не должен смешиваться с data plane.
   52: 
   53: Запрещено:
   54: 
   55: ```text
   56: делать admin операции через public /v1 endpoints
   57: использовать user API key как admin credential
   58: изменять reseller balance без audit log
   59: изменять route price без audit log
   60: resolve pricing_failed без audit log
   61: возвращать raw secrets через admin API
   62: ```
   63: 
   64: ---
   65: 
   66: # 3. Admin auth
   67: 
   68: ## 3.1. Первая версия
   69: 
   70: Минимальная auth-модель первой версии:
   71: 
   72: ```http
   73: Authorization: Bearer <TOKENIO_ADMIN_TOKEN>
   74: ```
   75: 
   76: Config key:
   77: 
   78: ```text
   79: TOKENIO_ADMIN_TOKEN
   80: ```
   81: 
   82: Если header отсутствует:
   83: 
   84: ```text
   85: HTTP 401
   86: error.code = admin_unauthorized
   87: ```
   88: 
   89: Если token неверный:
   90: 
   91: ```text
   92: HTTP 403
   93: error.code = admin_forbidden
   94: ```
   95: 
   96: ## 3.2. Production direction
   97: 
   98: Production-рекомендация:
   99: 
  100: ```text
  101: admin API keys
  102: admin roles
  103: admin subjects
  104: audit per admin subject
  105: ```
  106: 
  107: Но первая версия может использовать один admin token.
  108: 
  109: ## 3.3. Admin subject
  110: 
  111: Даже если используется один static token, gateway должен формировать `admin_subject`.
  112: 
  113: Первая версия:
  114: 
  115: ```text
  116: admin_subject = "admin_token"
  117: ```
  118: 
  119: Будущая версия:
  120: 
  121: ```text
  122: admin_subject = admin_api_key_id OR admin_user_id
  123: ```
  124: 
  125: `admin_subject` записывается в audit log.
  126: 
  127: ---
  128: 
  129: # 4. Admin base path
  130: 
  131: Все admin endpoints находятся под:
  132: 
  133: ```text
  134: /admin/v1
  135: ```
  136: 
  137: Примеры:
  138: 
  139: ```text
  140: GET  /admin/v1/users
  141: POST /admin/v1/users
  142: GET  /admin/v1/resellers
  143: POST /admin/v1/resellers
  144: GET  /admin/v1/routes
  145: POST /admin/v1/routes
  146: ```
  147: 
  148: Public LLM endpoints не должны находиться под `/admin`.
  149: 
  150: ---
  151: 
  152: # 5. Response format
  153: 
  154: ## 5.1. Success response
  155: 
  156: Admin API возвращает JSON.
  157: 
  158: Пример:
  159: 
  160: ```json
  161: {
  162:   "data": {
  163:     "id": "reseller_openrouter_primary"
  164:   }
  165: }
  166: ```
  167: 
  168: Для списков:
  169: 
  170: ```json
  171: {
  172:   "data": [],
  173:   "pagination": {
  174:     "limit": 50,
  175:     "offset": 0,
  176:     "total": 100
  177:   }
  178: }
  179: ```
  180: 
  181: ## 5.2. Error response
  182: 
  183: Admin-owned errors используют общий error envelope:
  184: 
  185: ```json
  186: {
  187:   "error": {
  188:     "code": "admin_forbidden",
  189:     "message": "Admin access denied",
  190:     "request_id": "admreq_..."
  191:   }
  192: }
  193: ```
  194: 
  195: ---
  196: 
  197: # 6. Admin request id
  198: 
  199: Каждый admin request получает:
  200: 
  201: ```text
  202: admin_request_id
  203: ```
  204: 
  205: Формат:
  206: 
  207: ```text
  208: admreq_<random>
  209: ```
  210: 
  211: Он используется в:
  212: 
  213: ```text
  214: response error envelope
  215: audit log
  216: logs
  217: debugging
  218: ```
  219: 
  220: ---
  221: 
  222: # 7. Users
  223: 
  224: ## 7.1. List users
  225: 
  226: ```http
  227: GET /admin/v1/users
  228: ```
  229: 
  230: Query params:
  231: 
  232: ```text
  233: enabled
  234: email
  235: limit
  236: offset
  237: ```
  238: 
  239: Response item:
  240: 
  241: ```json
  242: {
  243:   "id": "usr_...",
  244:   "external_billing_user_id": "billing_usr_...",
  245:   "email": "user@example.com",
  246:   "name": "User",
  247:   "enabled": true,
  248:   "created_at": "...",
  249:   "updated_at": "...",
  250:   "disabled_at": null
  251: }
  252: ```
  253: 
  254: ## 7.2. Create user
  255: 
  256: ```http
  257: POST /admin/v1/users
  258: ```
  259: 
  260: Request:
  261: 
  262: ```json
  263: {
  264:   "id": "usr_...",
  265:   "external_billing_user_id": "billing_usr_...",
  266:   "email": "user@example.com",
  267:   "name": "User"
  268: }
  269: ```
  270: 
  271: Rules:
  272: 
  273: ```text
  274: id может быть передан явно или создан gateway
  275: external_billing_user_id обязателен
  276: enabled по умолчанию true
  277: ```
  278: 
  279: Audit action:
  280: 
  281: ```text
  282: user.create
  283: ```
  284: 
  285: ## 7.3. Disable user
  286: 
  287: ```http
  288: POST /admin/v1/users/{user_id}/disable
  289: ```
  290: 
  291: Effect:
  292: 
  293: ```text
  294: tokenio_users.enabled = false
  295: tokenio_users.disabled_at = now()
  296: ```
  297: 
  298: Disabled user не может использовать existing API keys.
  299: 
  300: Audit action:
  301: 
  302: ```text
  303: user.disable
  304: ```
  305: 
  306: ## 7.4. Enable user
  307: 
  308: ```http
  309: POST /admin/v1/users/{user_id}/enable
  310: ```
  311: 
  312: Effect:
  313: 
  314: ```text
  315: tokenio_users.enabled = true
  316: tokenio_users.disabled_at = NULL
  317: ```
  318: 
  319: Audit action:
  320: 
  321: ```text
  322: user.enable
  323: ```
  324: 
  325: ---
  326: 
  327: # 8. User API keys
  328: 
  329: ## 8.1. List API keys
  330: 
  331: ```http
  332: GET /admin/v1/users/{user_id}/api-keys
  333: ```
  334: 
  335: Response item:
  336: 
  337: ```json
  338: {
  339:   "id": "ak_...",
  340:   "user_id": "usr_...",
  341:   "name": "Laptop key",
  342:   "key_prefix": "sk_live_abcd...",
  343:   "enabled": true,
  344:   "created_at": "...",
  345:   "last_used_at": "...",
  346:   "revoked_at": null,
  347:   "expires_at": null
  348: }
  349: ```
  350: 
  351: Forbidden response fields:
  352: 
  353: ```text
  354: raw_api_key
  355: key_hash
  356: ```
  357: 
  358: ## 8.2. Create API key
  359: 
  360: ```http
  361: POST /admin/v1/users/{user_id}/api-keys
  362: ```
  363: 
  364: Request:
  365: 
  366: ```json
  367: {
  368:   "name": "Laptop key",
  369:   "expires_at": null
  370: }
  371: ```
  372: 
  373: Response:
  374: 
  375: ```json
  376: {
  377:   "data": {
  378:     "id": "ak_...",
  379:     "user_id": "usr_...",
  380:     "name": "Laptop key",
  381:     "api_key": "sk_live_...",
  382:     "key_prefix": "sk_live_abcd...",
  383:     "created_at": "..."
  384:   }
  385: }
  386: ```
  387: 
  388: Rules:
  389: 
  390: ```text
  391: raw api_key возвращается только один раз
  392: raw api_key не хранится
  393: key_hash сохраняется в БД
  394: key_prefix сохраняется для display
  395: ```
  396: 
  397: Audit action:
  398: 
  399: ```text
  400: api_key.create
  401: ```
  402: 
  403: ## 8.3. Revoke API key
  404: 
  405: ```http
  406: POST /admin/v1/api-keys/{api_key_id}/revoke
  407: ```
  408: 
  409: Effect:
  410: 
  411: ```text
  412: enabled = false
  413: revoked_at = now()
  414: ```
  415: 
  416: Audit action:
  417: 
  418: ```text
  419: api_key.revoke
  420: ```
  421: 
  422: ---
  423: 
  424: ## 8.4. Provisioning records
  425: 
  426: Provisioning endpoints не являются Admin API и находятся под:
  427: 
  428: ```text
  429: /internal/v1/api-key-provisionings
  430: ```
  431: 
  432: Admin API предоставляет только безопасную visibility:
  433: 
  434: ```http
  435: GET /admin/v1/api-key-provisionings
  436: GET /admin/v1/api-key-provisionings/{provisioning_id}
  437: ```
  438: 
  439: Query params списка:
  440: 
  441: ```text
  442: external_billing_user_id
  443: user_id
  444: api_key_id
  445: status
  446: result_type
  447: created_from
  448: created_to
  449: limit
  450: offset
  451: ```
  452: 
  453: Response может содержать:
  454: 
  455: ```text
  456: provisioning_id
  457: external_billing_user_id
  458: user_id
  459: api_key_id
  460: key_prefix
  461: result_type
  462: status
  463: source_reference_hash
  464: created_at
  465: expires_at
  466: delivered_at
  467: expired_at
  468: ```
  469: 
  470: Response никогда не содержит:
  471: 
  472: ```text
  473: raw API key
  474: encrypted_raw_key
  475: encryption_nonce
  476: provisioning encryption key
  477: provisioning service token
  478: ```
  479: 
  480: Detailed provisioning contract:
  481: 
  482: ```text
  483: docs/spec/021-api-key-provisioning.ru.md
  484: ```
  485: 
  486: # 9. Resellers
  487: 
  488: ## 9.1. List resellers
  489: 
  490: ```http
  491: GET /admin/v1/resellers
  492: ```
  493: 
  494: Query params:
  495: 
  496: ```text
  497: provider_type
  498: enabled
  499: limit
  500: offset
  501: ```
  502: 
  503: Response item:
  504: 
  505: ```json
  506: {
  507:   "id": "reseller_openrouter_primary",
  508:   "name": "OpenRouter Primary",
  509:   "provider_type": "openrouter",
  510:   "base_url": "https://...",
  511:   "api_key_env": "OPENROUTER_PRIMARY_API_KEY",
  512:   "api_key_env_present": true,
  513:   "enabled": true,
  514:   "balance_cents": 100000,
  515:   "reserved_cents": 0,
  516:   "minimum_balance_cents": 10000,
  517:   "created_at": "...",
  518:   "updated_at": "..."
  519: }
  520: ```
  521: 
  522: Forbidden response fields:
  523: 
  524: ```text
  525: raw reseller API key
  526: os.Getenv(api_key_env) value
  527: ```
  528: 
  529: ## 9.2. Create reseller
  530: 
  531: ```http
  532: POST /admin/v1/resellers
  533: ```
  534: 
  535: Request:
  536: 
  537: ```json
  538: {
  539:   "id": "reseller_openrouter_primary",
  540:   "name": "OpenRouter Primary",
  541:   "provider_type": "openrouter",
  542:   "base_url": "https://openrouter.example.com",
  543:   "api_key_env": "OPENROUTER_PRIMARY_API_KEY",
  544:   "enabled": true,
  545:   "balance_cents": 100000,
  546:   "minimum_balance_cents": 10000
  547: }
  548: ```
  549: 
  550: Rules:
  551: 
  552: ```text
  553: api_key_env is required
  554: api_key_env value is not stored
  555: provider_type must be allowed
  556: balance_cents is manual accounting value
  557: ```
  558: 
  559: Audit action:
  560: 
  561: ```text
  562: reseller.create
  563: ```
  564: 
  565: ## 9.3. Update reseller
  566: 
  567: ```http
  568: PATCH /admin/v1/resellers/{reseller_id}
  569: ```
  570: 
  571: Allowed fields:
  572: 
  573: ```text
  574: name
  575: base_url
  576: api_key_env
  577: enabled
  578: minimum_balance_cents
  579: ```
  580: 
  581: Audit action:
  582: 
  583: ```text
  584: reseller.update
  585: ```
  586: 
  587: ## 9.4. Disable reseller
  588: 
  589: ```http
  590: POST /admin/v1/resellers/{reseller_id}/disable
  591: ```
  592: 
  593: Effect:
  594: 
  595: ```text
  596: enabled = false
  597: disabled_at = now()
  598: all routes of reseller become unavailable
  599: ```
  600: 
  601: Audit action:
  602: 
  603: ```text
  604: reseller.disable
  605: ```
  606: 
  607: ## 9.5. Enable reseller
  608: 
  609: ```http
  610: POST /admin/v1/resellers/{reseller_id}/enable
  611: ```
  612: 
  613: Audit action:
  614: 
  615: ```text
  616: reseller.enable
  617: ```
  618: 
  619: ---
  620: 
  621: # 10. Reseller balance
  622: 
  623: ## 10.1. Get reseller balance
  624: 
  625: ```http
  626: GET /admin/v1/resellers/{reseller_id}/balance
  627: ```
  628: 
  629: Response:
  630: 
  631: ```json
  632: {
  633:   "data": {
  634:     "reseller_id": "reseller_openrouter_primary",
  635:     "balance_cents": 100000,
  636:     "reserved_cents": 500,
  637:     "minimum_balance_cents": 10000,
  638:     "available_balance_cents": 89500,
  639:     "currency": "RUB"
  640:   }
  641: }
  642: ```
  643: 
  644: ## 10.2. Adjust reseller balance
  645: 
  646: ```http
  647: POST /admin/v1/resellers/{reseller_id}/balance/adjust
  648: ```
  649: 
  650: Request:
  651: 
  652: ```json
  653: {
  654:   "delta_cents": 50000,
  655:   "reason": "manual top-up after reseller payment"
  656: }
  657: ```
  658: 
  659: Rules:
  660: 
  661: ```text
  662: delta_cents can be positive or negative
  663: reason is required
  664: operation must be transactional
  665: operation must be audit logged
  666: ```
  667: 
  668: Audit action:
  669: 
  670: ```text
  671: reseller_balance.adjust
  672: ```
  673: 
  674: ## 10.3. Set reseller balance
  675: 
  676: ```http
  677: POST /admin/v1/resellers/{reseller_id}/balance/set
  678: ```
  679: 
  680: Request:
  681: 
  682: ```json
  683: {
  684:   "balance_cents": 150000,
  685:   "reason": "manual reconciliation"
  686: }
  687: ```
  688: 
  689: Rules:
  690: 
  691: ```text
  692: reason is required
  693: operation must be audit logged
  694: ```
  695: 
  696: Audit action:
  697: 
  698: ```text
  699: reseller_balance.set
  700: ```
  701: 
  702: ---
  703: 
  704: # 11. Routes
  705: 
  706: ## 11.1. List routes
  707: 
  708: ```http
  709: GET /admin/v1/routes
  710: ```
  711: 
  712: Query params:
  713: 
  714: ```text
  715: reseller_id
  716: provider_type
  717: api_family
  718: endpoint_kind
  719: client_model
  720: enabled
  721: limit
  722: offset
  723: ```
  724: 
  725: Response item:
  726: 
  727: ```json
  728: {
  729:   "id": "route_openrouter_gpt41mini_chat",
  730:   "reseller_id": "reseller_openrouter_primary",
  731:   "provider_type": "openrouter",
  732:   "api_family": "openai_compatible",
  733:   "endpoint_kind": "chat",
  734:   "client_model": "gpt-4.1-mini",
  735:   "provider_model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  736:   "model_rewrite_policy": "provider_model",
  737:   "enabled": true,
  738:   "priority": 100,
  739:   "requests_per_minute": 0,
  740:   "tokens_per_minute": 0,
  741:   "concurrent_requests": 0,
  742:   "default_max_output_tokens": 4096,
  743:   "capabilities": {
  744:     "chat": true,
  745:     "tools": true,
  746:     "image_input": true
  747:   },
  748:   "cooldown_until": null,
  749:   "cooldown_reason": null
  750: }
  751: ```
  752: 
  753: ## 11.2. Create route
  754: 
  755: ```http
  756: POST /admin/v1/routes
  757: ```
  758: 
  759: Request:
  760: 
  761: ```json
  762: {
  763:   "id": "route_openrouter_gpt41mini_chat",
  764:   "reseller_id": "reseller_openrouter_primary",
  765:   "provider_type": "openrouter",
  766:   "api_family": "openai_compatible",
  767:   "endpoint_kind": "chat",
  768:   "client_model": "gpt-4.1-mini",
  769:   "provider_model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  770:   "model_rewrite_policy": "provider_model",
  771:   "enabled": true,
  772:   "priority": 100,
  773:   "requests_per_minute": 0,
  774:   "tokens_per_minute": 0,
  775:   "concurrent_requests": 0,
  776:   "default_max_output_tokens": 4096,
  777:   "capabilities": {
  778:     "chat": true,
  779:     "embeddings": false,
  780:     "images_generation": false,
  781:     "tools": true,
  782:     "tool_choice": true,
  783:     "response_format": true,
  784:     "json_schema": true,
  785:     "image_input": true,
  786:     "audio_input": false,
  787:     "file_input": false,
  788:     "video_input": false,
  789:     "reasoning": false
  790:   }
  791: }
  792: ```
  793: 
  794: Validation:
  795: 
  796: ```text
  797: reseller_id must exist
  798: provider_type must match reseller.provider_type
  799: api_family must be allowed
  800: endpoint_kind must be allowed
  801: client_model must be non-empty
  802: provider_model must be non-empty
  803: model_rewrite_policy must be one of: none, provider_model
  804: if provider_model != client_model, model_rewrite_policy must be provider_model
  805: default_max_output_tokens required for chat routes
  806: capabilities must be JSON object
  807: ```
  808: 
  809: Audit action:
  810: 
  811: ```text
  812: route.create
  813: ```
  814: 
  815: ## 11.3. Update route
  816: 
  817: ```http
  818: PATCH /admin/v1/routes/{route_id}
  819: ```
  820: 
  821: Allowed fields:
  822: 
  823: ```text
  824: provider_model
  825: model_rewrite_policy
  826: enabled
  827: priority
  828: requests_per_minute
  829: tokens_per_minute
  830: concurrent_requests
  831: default_max_output_tokens
  832: capabilities
  833: ```
  834: 
  835: Audit action:
  836: 
  837: ```text
  838: route.update
  839: ```
  840: 
  841: ## 11.4. Disable route
  842: 
  843: ```http
  844: POST /admin/v1/routes/{route_id}/disable
  845: ```
  846: 
  847: Audit action:
  848: 
  849: ```text
  850: route.disable
  851: ```
  852: 
  853: ## 11.5. Enable route
  854: 
  855: ```http
  856: POST /admin/v1/routes/{route_id}/enable
  857: ```
  858: 
  859: Audit action:
  860: 
  861: ```text
  862: route.enable
  863: ```
  864: 
  865: ---
  866: 
  867: # 12. Route cooldowns
  868: 
  869: ## 12.1. Get route cooldown
  870: 
  871: ```http
  872: GET /admin/v1/routes/{route_id}/cooldown
  873: ```
  874: 
  875: Response:
  876: 
  877: ```json
  878: {
  879:   "data": {
  880:     "route_id": "route_openrouter_gpt41mini_chat",
  881:     "cooldown_until": "2026-06-11T12:00:00Z",
  882:     "cooldown_reason": "rate_limit",
  883:     "last_error_code": "upstream_rate_limit",
  884:     "last_error_at": "2026-06-11T11:59:00Z"
  885:   }
  886: }
  887: ```
  888: 
  889: ## 12.2. Set cooldown
  890: 
  891: ```http
  892: POST /admin/v1/routes/{route_id}/cooldown
  893: ```
  894: 
  895: Request:
  896: 
  897: ```json
  898: {
  899:   "cooldown_until": "2026-06-11T12:00:00Z",
  900:   "cooldown_reason": "manual_disabled"
  901: }
  902: ```
  903: 
  904: Audit action:
  905: 
  906: ```text
  907: route_cooldown.set
  908: ```
  909: 
  910: ## 12.3. Clear cooldown
  911: 
  912: ```http
  913: DELETE /admin/v1/routes/{route_id}/cooldown
  914: ```
  915: 
  916: Effect:
  917: 
  918: ```text
  919: cooldown_until = NULL
  920: cooldown_reason = NULL
  921: ```
  922: 
  923: Audit action:
  924: 
  925: ```text
  926: route_cooldown.clear
  927: ```
  928: 
  929: ---
  930: 
  931: # 13. Route prices
  932: 
  933: ## 13.1. Get route price
  934: 
  935: ```http
  936: GET /admin/v1/routes/{route_id}/price
  937: ```
  938: 
  939: Response:
  940: 
  941: ```json
  942: {
  943:   "data": {
  944:     "route_id": "route_openrouter_gpt41mini_chat",
  945:     "currency": "RUB",
  946:     "input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents": 1000,
  947:     "cached_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents": 500,
  948:     "output_price_per_1m_tokens_cents": 4000,
  949:     "reasoning_output_price_per_1m_tokens_cents": 8000,
  950:     "image_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents": 3000,
  951:     "audio_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents": 3000,
  952:     "audio_output_price_per_1m_tokens_cents": 6000,
  953:     "file_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents": 3000,
  954:     "video_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents": 10000,
  955:     "image_generation_price_per_unit_cents": 150,
  956:     "image_generation_unit_kind": "generated_image",
  957:     "markup_coefficient": 1.3,
  958:     "enabled": true
  959:   }
  960: }
  961: ```
  962: 
  963: ## 13.2. Upsert route price
  964: 
  965: ```http
  966: PUT /admin/v1/routes/{route_id}/price
  967: ```
  968: 
  969: Request:
  970: 
  971: ```json
  972: {
  973:   "currency": "RUB",
  974:   "input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents": 1000,
  975:   "cached_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents": 500,
  976:   "output_price_per_1m_tokens_cents": 4000,
  977:   "reasoning_output_price_per_1m_tokens_cents": 8000,
  978:   "image_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents": 3000,
  979:   "audio_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents": 3000,
  980:   "audio_output_price_per_1m_tokens_cents": 6000,
  981:   "file_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents": 3000,
  982:   "video_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents": 10000,
  983:   "image_generation_price_per_unit_cents": 150,
  984:   "image_generation_unit_kind": "generated_image",
  985:   "markup_coefficient": 1.3,
  986:   "enabled": true
  987: }
  988: ```
  989: 
  990: Validation:
  991: 
  992: ```text
  993: currency must be RUB
  994: all price fields must be >= 0
  995: image_generation_price_per_unit_cents must be >= 0
  996: image_generation_unit_kind must be one of: none, generated_image
  997: markup_coefficient must be > 0
  998: route_id must exist
  999: ```
 1000: 
 1001: Audit action:
 1002: 
 1003: ```text
 1004: route_price.upsert
 1005: ```
 1006: 
 1007: ---
 1008: 
 1009: # 14. Usage records
 1010: 
 1011: ## 14.1. List usage records
 1012: 
 1013: ```http
 1014: GET /admin/v1/usage-records
 1015: ```
 1016: 
 1017: Query params:
 1018: 
 1019: ```text
 1020: user_id
 1021: status
 1022: provider_type
 1023: client_model
 1024: selected_route_id
 1025: selected_reseller_id
 1026: created_from
 1027: created_to
 1028: limit
 1029: offset
 1030: ```
 1031: 
 1032: Response item:
 1033: 
 1034: ```json
 1035: {
 1036:   "local_request_id": "llmreq_...",
 1037:   "user_id": "usr_...",
 1038:   "api_family": "openai_compatible",
 1039:   "endpoint_kind": "chat",
 1040:   "client_model": "gpt-4.1-mini",
 1041:   "billing_model": "openrouter:gpt-4.1-mini",
 1042:   "selected_reseller_id": "reseller_openrouter_primary",
 1043:   "selected_route_id": "route_openrouter_gpt41mini_chat",
 1044:   "provider_type": "openrouter",
 1045:   "status": "billable",
 1046:   "client_amount_cents": 123,
 1047:   "charged_amount_cents": 0,
 1048:   "remaining_amount_cents": 123,
 1049:   "currency": "RUB",
 1050:   "created_at": "..."
 1051: }
 1052: ```
 1053: 
 1054: ## 14.2. Get usage record
 1055: 
 1056: ```http
 1057: GET /admin/v1/usage-records/{local_request_id}
 1058: ```
 1059: 
 1060: Response должен включать полную ledger запись без secrets.
 1061: 
 1062: ---
 1063: 
 1064: # 15. Manual resolution
 1065: 
 1066: ## 15.1. Resolve pricing_failed as billable
 1067: 
 1068: ```http
 1069: POST /admin/v1/usage-records/{local_request_id}/resolve/billable
 1070: ```
 1071: 
 1072: Request:
 1073: 
 1074: ```json
 1075: {
 1076:   "input_tokens": 1000,
 1077:   "output_tokens": 500,
 1078:   "client_amount_cents": 123,
 1079:   "actual_upstream_cost_cents": 80,
 1080:   "reason": "manual usage reconstruction"
 1081: }
 1082: ```
 1083: 
 1084: Rules:
 1085: 
 1086: ```text
 1087: current status must be pricing_failed
 1088: reason is required
 1089: operation must be transactional
 1090: operation must be audit logged
 1091: ```
 1092: 
 1093: Audit action:
 1094: 
 1095: ```text
 1096: usage.resolve_billable
 1097: ```
 1098: 
 1099: ## 15.2. Resolve pricing_failed as failed
 1100: 
 1101: ```http
 1102: POST /admin/v1/usage-records/{local_request_id}/resolve/failed
 1103: ```
 1104: 
 1105: Request:
 1106: 
 1107: ```json
 1108: {
 1109:   "reason": "manual write-off"
 1110: }
 1111: ```
 1112: 
 1113: Effect:
 1114: 
 1115: ```text
 1116: status = failed
 1117: remaining_amount_cents = 0
 1118: ```
 1119: 
 1120: Audit action:
 1121: 
 1122: ```text
 1123: usage.resolve_failed
 1124: ```
 1125: 
 1126: ## 15.3. Resolve pricing_failed as charged
 1127: 
 1128: ```http
 1129: POST /admin/v1/usage-records/{local_request_id}/resolve/charged
 1130: ```
 1131: 
 1132: Request:
 1133: 
 1134: ```json
 1135: {
 1136:   "charged_amount_cents": 123,
 1137:   "billing_charge_request_id": "charge_...",
 1138:   "reason": "manual external charge confirmed"
 1139: }
 1140: ```
 1141: 
 1142: Effect:
 1143: 
 1144: ```text
 1145: status = charged
 1146: charged_amount_cents = request.charged_amount_cents
 1147: remaining_amount_cents = 0
 1148: charged_at = now()
 1149: ```
 1150: 
 1151: Audit action:
 1152: 
 1153: ```text
 1154: usage.resolve_charged
 1155: ```
 1156: 
 1157: ---
 1158: 
 1159: # 16. Billing charge batches
 1160: 
 1161: ## 16.1. List charge batches
 1162: 
 1163: ```http
 1164: GET /admin/v1/billing-charge-batches
 1165: ```
 1166: 
 1167: Query params:
 1168: 
 1169: ```text
 1170: user_id
 1171: provider_type
 1172: client_model
 1173: billing_status
 1174: created_from
 1175: created_to
 1176: limit
 1177: offset
 1178: ```
 1179: 
 1180: ## 16.2. Get charge batch
 1181: 
 1182: ```http
 1183: GET /admin/v1/billing-charge-batches/{batch_id}
 1184: ```
 1185: 
 1186: Response includes:
 1187: 
 1188: ```text
 1189: batch metadata
 1190: billing status
 1191: billing error
 1192: allocations
 1193: related usage records
 1194: ```
 1195: 
 1196: ## 16.3. Retry failed charge batch
 1197: 
 1198: ```http
 1199: POST /admin/v1/billing-charge-batches/{batch_id}/retry
 1200: ```
 1201: 
 1202: Allowed only if:
 1203: 
 1204: ```text
 1205: billing_status = failed
 1206: ```
 1207: 
 1208: Rules:
 1209: 
 1210: ```text
 1211: must reuse stable idempotency semantics
 1212: must not double-charge already charged usage records
 1213: must audit log retry
 1214: ```
 1215: 
 1216: Audit action:
 1217: 
 1218: ```text
 1219: billing_charge.retry
 1220: ```
 1221: 
 1222: ---
 1223: 
 1224: # 17. Route events
 1225: 
 1226: ## 17.1. List route events
 1227: 
 1228: ```http
 1229: GET /admin/v1/route-events
 1230: ```
 1231: 
 1232: Query params:
 1233: 
 1234: ```text
 1235: route_id
 1236: reseller_id
 1237: event_type
 1238: local_request_id
 1239: created_from
 1240: created_to
 1241: limit
 1242: offset
 1243: ```
 1244: 
 1245: Used for debugging:
 1246: 
 1247: ```text
 1248: route skipped
 1249: cooldown set
 1250: retry
 1251: provider error
 1252: balance low
 1253: healthcheck failed
 1254: ```
 1255:
