 1292: # 19. Audit log
 1293: 
 1294: ## 19.1. List audit log
 1295: 
 1296: ```http
 1297: GET /admin/v1/audit-log
 1298: ```
 1299: 
 1300: Query params:
 1301: 
 1302: ```text
 1303: admin_subject
 1304: action
 1305: entity_type
 1306: entity_id
 1307: created_from
 1308: created_to
 1309: limit
 1310: offset
 1311: ```
 1312: 
 1313: ## 19.2. Audit entry
 1314: 
 1315: Response item:
 1316: 
 1317: ```json
 1318: {
 1319:   "id": "audit_...",
 1320:   "admin_subject": "admin_token",
 1321:   "action": "route_price.upsert",
 1322:   "entity_type": "route_price",
 1323:   "entity_id": "route_openrouter_gpt41mini_chat",
 1324:   "before_state": {},
 1325:   "after_state": {},
 1326:   "request_id": "admreq_...",
 1327:   "created_at": "..."
 1328: }
 1329: ```
 1330: 
 1331: Audit log should be append-only.
 1332: 
 1333: ---
 1334: 
 1335: # 20. Validation rules
 1336: 
 1337: Admin API должен валидировать:
 1338: 
 1339: ```text
 1340: provider_type allowed values
 1341: api_family allowed values
 1342: endpoint_kind allowed values
 1343: model_rewrite_policy allowed values
 1344: currency = RUB
 1345: price fields >= 0
 1346: markup_coefficient > 0
 1347: balance fields valid
 1348: route reseller exists
 1349: route provider_type matches reseller provider_type
 1350: client_model non-empty
 1351: provider_model non-empty
 1352: api_key_env non-empty
 1353: manual resolution reason non-empty
 1354: ```
 1355: 
 1356: ---
 1357: 
 1358: # 21. Secrets policy
 1359: 
 1360: Admin API никогда не возвращает:
 1361: 
 1362: ```text
 1363: raw user API key, except one-time admin key creation response
 1364: raw provisioning API key
 1365: encrypted_raw_key
 1366: encryption_nonce
 1367: key_hash
 1368: raw reseller API key
 1369: billing JWT
 1370: billing signing key
 1371: billing service token
 1372: admin token
 1373: Authorization header
 1374: ```
 1375: 
 1376: Admin API может возвращать:
 1377: 
 1378: ```text
 1379: key_prefix
 1380: api_key_env
 1381: api_key_env_present
 1382: ```
 1383: 
 1384: `api_key_env_present` — boolean, показывающий, существует ли env-переменная в runtime.
 1385: 
 1386: ---
 1387: 
 1388: # 22. Audit policy
 1389: 
 1390: Audit log обязателен для:
 1391: 
 1392: ```text
 1393: user.create
 1394: user.enable
 1395: user.disable
 1396: api_key.create
 1397: api_key.revoke
 1398: reseller.create
 1399: reseller.update
 1400: reseller.enable
 1401: reseller.disable
 1402: reseller_balance.adjust
 1403: reseller_balance.set
 1404: route.create
 1405: route.update
 1406: route.enable
 1407: route.disable
 1408: route_cooldown.set
 1409: route_cooldown.clear
 1410: route_price.upsert
 1411: usage.resolve_billable
 1412: usage.resolve_failed
 1413: usage.resolve_charged
 1414: billing_charge.retry
 1415: telegram_alert.retry
 1416: ```
 1417: 
 1418: Audit entry должен включать:
 1419: 
 1420: ```text
 1421: admin_subject
 1422: action
 1423: entity_type
 1424: entity_id
 1425: before_state
 1426: after_state
 1427: request_id
 1428: created_at
 1429: ```
 1430: 
 1431: ---
 1432: 
 1433: # 23. Pagination
 1434: 
 1435: List endpoints должны поддерживать:
 1436: 
 1437: ```text
 1438: limit
 1439: offset
 1440: ```
 1441: 
 1442: Defaults:
 1443: 
 1444: ```text
 1445: limit = 50
 1446: offset = 0
 1447: ```
 1448: 
 1449: Maximum:
 1450: 
 1451: ```text
 1452: limit = 500
 1453: ```
 1454: 
 1455: ---
 1456: 
 1457: # 24. Error codes
 1458: 
 1459: Admin-specific errors:
 1460: 
 1461: ```text
 1462: admin_unauthorized
 1463: admin_forbidden
 1464: admin_validation_error
 1465: admin_not_found
 1466: admin_conflict
 1467: admin_state_conflict
 1468: admin_secret_not_available
 1469: ```
 1470: 
 1471: Shared errors:
 1472: 
 1473: ```text
 1474: invalid_json
 1475: method_not_allowed
 1476: not_found
 1477: internal_error
 1478: ```
 1479: 
 1480: Подробный mapping описывается в:
 1481: 
 1482: ```text
 1483: docs/spec/080-error-model.ru.md
 1484: ```
 1485: 
 1486: ---
 1487: 
 1488: # 25. Acceptance criteria
 1489: 
 1490: Admin API считается реализованным, если:
 1491: 
 1492: ```text
 1493: 1. Все endpoints находятся под /admin/v1.
 1494: 2. Admin API требует отдельный admin credential.
 1495: 3. User API key не даёт admin access.
 1496: 4. Raw secrets не возвращаются.
 1497: 5. Raw user API key возвращается только один раз при создании.
 1498: 6. Reseller API key хранится только через api_key_env.
 1499: 7. Admin может управлять users, API keys, resellers, routes, prices и balances.
 1500: 8. Admin может ставить и очищать route cooldown.
 1501: 9. Admin может смотреть usage records и charge batches.
 1502: 10. Admin может resolve pricing_failed records.
 1503: 11. Все опасные изменения пишутся в audit log.
 1504: 12. Manual balance changes требуют reason.
 1505: 13. Manual usage resolution требует reason.
 1506: 14. Pagination есть на list endpoints.
 1507: 15. Validation запрещает inconsistent provider_type/api_family/price/currency.
 1508: 16. Tests покрывают auth, validation, secrets policy, audit log и manual resolution.
 1509: 17. Admin может смотреть provisioning metadata без raw/encrypted key material.
 1510: ```

====================================================================================================
FILE: docs/spec/070-database-schema.ru.md
GIT_BLOB_SHA: bfaac1c4fed78c7241cc81d5a8f40578bd507212
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: # 070. Database Schema
    2: 
    3: Версия: 0.1
    4: Статус: draft
    5: Язык: русский
    6: Проект: `github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway`
    7: 
    8: ---
    9: 
   10: # 1. Назначение документа
   11: 
   12: Этот документ описывает database schema Tokenio Gateway.
   13: 
   14: Документ фиксирует:
   15: 
   16: ```text
   17: users
   18: api_keys
   19: resellers
   20: routes
   21: route_prices
   22: usage_records
   23: billing_sessions
   24: billing_charge_batches
   25: billing_charge_allocations
   26: billing_charge_expected_records
   27: route_events
   28: telegram_alerts
   29: admin_audit_log
   30: indexes
   31: constraints
   32: migration policy
   33: ```
   34: 
   35: Документ не описывает:
   36: 
   37: ```text
   38: public HTTP API
   39: admin HTTP endpoints
   40: route selection algorithm details
   41: pricing formula details
   42: provider adapter implementation
   43: ```
   44: 
   45: Эти темы описываются в отдельных спецификациях.
   46: 
   47: ---
   48: 
   49: # 2. Главный database invariant
   50: 
   51: Postgres является source of truth для:
   52: 
   53: ```text
   54: user identity
   55: API key records
   56: API key provisioning delivery state
   57: reseller registry
   58: route registry
   59: route prices
   60: reseller balance
   61: usage ledger
   62: billing charge history
   63: admin changes
   64: ```
   65: 
   66: Запрещено:
   67: 
   68: ```text
   69: хранить raw user API key
   70: хранить raw reseller API key
   71: хранить billing JWT
   72: хранить billing service token
   73: хранить admin token
   74: полагаться только на in-memory ledger
   75: делать public billing state без локальной usage записи
   76: ```
   77: 
   78: ---
   79: 
   80: # 3. Migration policy
   81: 
   82: ## 3.1. Explicit SQL migrations
   83: 
   84: Schema должна управляться явными SQL migrations.
   85: 
   86: Рекомендуемая папка:
   87: 
   88: ```text
   89: db/migrations/
   90: ```
   91: 
   92: Формат:
   93: 
   94: ```text
   95: 000001_init.up.sql
   96: 000001_init.down.sql
   97: 000002_add_route_events.up.sql
   98: 000002_add_route_events.down.sql
   99: ```
  100: 
  101: ## 3.2. AutoMigrate forbidden
  102: 
  103: `AutoMigrate` не должен быть production source of truth.
  104: 
  105: Разрешено использовать Go structs для mapping, но не для неявного изменения production schema.
  106: 
  107: ## 3.3. Prefix
  108: 
  109: Все таблицы Tokenio используют prefix:
  110: 
  111: ```text
  112: tokenio_
  113: ```
  114: 
  115: ---
  116: 
  117: # 4. IDs and timestamps
  118: 
  119: ## 4.1. IDs
  120: 
  121: Рекомендуемый тип ID:
  122: 
  123: ```text
  124: TEXT
  125: ```
  126: 
  127: Причина:
  128: 
  129: ```text
  130: id должен быть стабильным, читаемым в admin/debug и удобным для external correlation.
  131: ```
  132: 
  133: Примеры:
  134: 
  135: ```text
  136: usr_...
  137: ak_...
  138: reseller_openrouter_primary
  139: route_...
  140: llmreq_...
  141: charge_...
  142: ```
  143: 
  144: ## 4.2. Timestamps
  145: 
  146: Все timestamps хранятся в UTC.
  147: 
  148: Каждая основная таблица должна иметь:
  149: 
  150: ```text
  151: created_at
  152: updated_at
  153: ```
  154: 
  155: Для terminal state timestamps используются отдельные поля:
  156: 
  157: ```text
  158: revoked_at
  159: disabled_at
  160: released_at
  161: billable_at
  162: charged_at
  163: failed_at
  164: cooldown_until
  165: ```
  166: 
  167: ---
  168: 
  169: # 5. Table: tokenio_users
  170: 
  171: ## 5.1. Purpose
  172: 
  173: `tokenio_users` хранит локальную identity пользователя Tokenio.
  174: 
  175: ## 5.2. Columns
  176: 
  177: ```sql
  178: CREATE TABLE tokenio_users (
  179:     id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  180:     external_billing_user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  181:     email TEXT,
  182:     name TEXT,
  183:     enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  184:     created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  185:     updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  186:     disabled_at TIMESTAMPTZ
  187: );
  188: ```
  189: 
  190: ## 5.3. Constraints
  191: 
  192: ```sql
  193: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX tokenio_users_external_billing_user_id_uq
  194:     ON tokenio_users (external_billing_user_id);
  195: 
  196: CREATE INDEX tokenio_users_enabled_idx
  197:     ON tokenio_users (enabled);
  198: ```
  199: 
  200: ## 5.4. Rules
  201: 
  202: Если `enabled = false`, все API keys пользователя считаются недействительными.
  203: 
  204: `external_billing_user_id` используется для billing JWT subject.
  205: 
  206: ---
  207: 
  208: # 6. Table: tokenio_api_keys
  209: 
  210: ## 6.1. Purpose
  211: 
  212: `tokenio_api_keys` хранит hashed user API keys.
  213: 
  214: Raw API key не хранится.
  215: 
  216: ## 6.2. Columns
  217: 
  218: ```sql
  219: CREATE TABLE tokenio_api_keys (
  220:     id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  221:     user_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tokenio_users(id),
  222:     name TEXT NOT NULL,
  223:     key_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
  224:     key_prefix TEXT NOT NULL,
  225:     enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  226:     created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  227:     updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  228:     last_used_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  229:     revoked_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  230:     expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ
  231: );
  232: ```
  233: 
  234: ## 6.3. Constraints and indexes
  235: 
  236: ```sql
  237: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX tokenio_api_keys_key_hash_uq
  238:     ON tokenio_api_keys (key_hash);
  239: 
  240: CREATE INDEX tokenio_api_keys_user_id_idx
  241:     ON tokenio_api_keys (user_id);
  242: 
  243: CREATE INDEX tokenio_api_keys_enabled_idx
  244:     ON tokenio_api_keys (enabled);
  245: 
  246: CREATE INDEX tokenio_api_keys_key_prefix_idx
  247:     ON tokenio_api_keys (key_prefix);
  248: ```
  249: 
  250: ## 6.4. Rules
  251: 
  252: API key valid only if:
  253: 
  254: ```text
  255: enabled = true
  256: revoked_at IS NULL
  257: expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > now()
  258: user.enabled = true
  259: ```
  260: 
  261: `key_prefix` нужен только для admin display.
  262: ## 6.5. API key hash rule
  263: 
  264: `key_hash` stores only:
  265: 
  266: ```text
  267: HMAC-SHA256(TOKENIO_API_KEY_HASH_SECRET, raw_api_key)
  268: ```
  269: 
  270: Forbidden values inside `tokenio_api_keys`:
  271: 
  272: ```text
  273: raw API key
  274: unsalted SHA-256(raw_api_key)
  275: any reversible encrypted API key
  276: ```
  277: 
  278: Reason:
  279: 
  280: ```text
  281: database compromise must not allow offline API key matching without TOKENIO_API_KEY_HASH_SECRET.
  282: ```
  283: 
  284: Retry-safe initial delivery uses a separate temporary table:
  285: 
  286: ```text
  287: tokenio_api_key_provisionings
  288: ```
  289: 
  290: That table may contain only AEAD-encrypted raw key material while status is `pending_delivery`.
  291: 
  292: It is not an authentication source of truth, and encrypted fields must be cleared on `delivered` or `expired`.
  293: 
  294: The database schema stores `key_hash` as TEXT, but the hashing algorithm is a runtime invariant from `docs/spec/020-auth-and-billing-identity.ru.md`.
  295: 
  296: 
  297: ---
  298: 
  299: # 7. Table: tokenio_resellers
  300: 
  301: ## 7.1. Purpose
  302: 
  303: `tokenio_resellers` хранит конкретные upstream accounts/base URLs/balances.
  304: 
  305: ## 7.2. Columns
  306: 
  307: ```sql
  308: CREATE TABLE tokenio_resellers (
  309:     id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  310:     name TEXT NOT NULL,
  311:     provider_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  312:     base_url TEXT NOT NULL,
  313:     api_key_env TEXT NOT NULL,
  314:     enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  315: 
  316:     balance_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  317:     reserved_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  318:     minimum_balance_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  319: 
  320:     last_balance_alert_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  321:     last_healthcheck_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  322:     last_healthcheck_status TEXT,
  323: 
  324:     created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  325:     updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  326:     disabled_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  327: 
  328:     CHECK (reserved_cents >= 0),
  329:     CHECK (minimum_balance_cents >= 0)
  330: );
  331: ```
  332: 
  333: `balance_cents` допускает отрицательное значение после actual cost reconciliation, если actual оказался выше estimate.
  334: 
  335: ## 7.3. Provider type constraint
  336: 
  337: Allowed values:
  338: 
  339: ```text
  340: openai
  341: openrouter
  342: together
  343: groq
  344: ollama
  345: lmstudio
  346: vllm
  347: gemini
  348: anthropic
  349: hydra
  350: ```
  351: 
  352: SQL check:
  353: 
  354: ```sql
  355: ALTER TABLE tokenio_resellers
  356: ADD CONSTRAINT tokenio_resellers_provider_type_chk
  357: CHECK (
  358:     provider_type IN (
  359:         'openai',
  360:         'openrouter',
  361:         'together',
  362:         'groq',
  363:         'ollama',
  364:         'lmstudio',
  365:         'vllm',
  366:         'gemini',
  367:         'anthropic',
  368:         'hydra'
  369:     )
  370: );
  371: ```
  372: 
  373: ## 7.4. Indexes
  374: 
  375: ```sql
  376: CREATE INDEX tokenio_resellers_provider_type_idx
  377:     ON tokenio_resellers (provider_type);
  378: 
  379: CREATE INDEX tokenio_resellers_enabled_idx
  380:     ON tokenio_resellers (enabled);
  381: ```
  382: 
  383: ## 7.5. Secret rule
  384: 
  385: `api_key_env` хранит имя environment variable.
  386: 
  387: Запрещено хранить actual API key value в этой таблице.
  388: 
  389: ---
  390: 
  391: # 8. Table: tokenio_routes
  392: 
  393: ## 8.1. Purpose
  394: 
  395: `tokenio_routes` хранит routes: возможность обслужить конкретный `client_model` у конкретного reseller через конкретный API family и endpoint kind.
  396: 
  397: ## 8.2. Columns
  398: 
  399: ```sql
  400: CREATE TABLE tokenio_routes (
  401:     id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  402:     reseller_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tokenio_resellers(id),
  403: 
  404:     provider_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  405:     api_family TEXT NOT NULL,
  406:     endpoint_kind TEXT NOT NULL,
  407: 
  408:     client_model TEXT NOT NULL,
  409:     provider_model TEXT NOT NULL,
  410:     model_rewrite_policy TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
  411: 
  412:     enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  413:     priority INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
  414: 
  415:     requests_per_minute INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  416:     tokens_per_minute INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  417:     concurrent_requests INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  418: 
  419:     default_max_output_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  420: 
  421:     capabilities JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  422: 
  423:     cooldown_until TIMESTAMPTZ,
  424:     cooldown_reason TEXT,
  425: 
  426:     last_error_code TEXT,
  427:     last_error_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  428: 
  429:     created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  430:     updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  431:     disabled_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  432: 
  433:     CHECK (priority >= 0),
  434:     CHECK (requests_per_minute >= 0),
  435:     CHECK (tokens_per_minute >= 0),
  436:     CHECK (concurrent_requests >= 0),
  437:     CHECK (default_max_output_tokens >= 0)
  438: );
  439: ```
  440: 
  441: ## 8.3. API family constraint
  442: 
  443: Allowed values:
  444: 
  445: ```text
  446: openai_compatible
  447: gemini_native
  448: anthropic_native
  449: ollama_native
  450: ```
  451: 
  452: ```sql
  453: ALTER TABLE tokenio_routes
  454: ADD CONSTRAINT tokenio_routes_api_family_chk
  455: CHECK (
  456:     api_family IN (
  457:         'openai_compatible',
  458:         'gemini_native',
  459:         'anthropic_native',
  460:         'ollama_native'
  461:     )
  462: );
  463: ```
  464: 
  465: ## 8.4. Endpoint kind constraint
  466: 
  467: Allowed values:
  468: 
  469: ```text
  470: chat
  471: embeddings
  472: images_generation
  473: ```
  474: 
  475: ```sql
  476: ALTER TABLE tokenio_routes
  477: ADD CONSTRAINT tokenio_routes_endpoint_kind_chk
  478: CHECK (
  479:     endpoint_kind IN (
  480:         'chat',
  481:         'embeddings',
  482:         'images_generation'
  483:     )
  484: );
  485: ```
  486: 
  487: ## 8.5. Model rewrite policy constraint
  488: 
  489: Allowed values:
  490: 
  491: ```text
  492: none
  493: provider_model
  494: ```
  495: 
  496: ```sql
  497: ALTER TABLE tokenio_routes
  498: ADD CONSTRAINT tokenio_routes_model_rewrite_policy_chk
  499: CHECK (
  500:     model_rewrite_policy IN (
  501:         'none',
  502:         'provider_model'
  503:     )
  504: );
  505: ```
  506: 
  507: Route validation in application layer must enforce:
  508: 
  509: ```text
  510: if provider_model != client_model, model_rewrite_policy = provider_model
  511: ```
  512: 
  513: 
  514: 
  515: ## 8.6. Unique route identity
  516: 
  517: ```sql
  518: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX tokenio_routes_unique_provider_model_route_uq
  519:     ON tokenio_routes (
  520:         reseller_id,
  521:         api_family,
  522:         endpoint_kind,
  523:         client_model,
  524:         provider_model
  525:     );
  526: ```
  527: 
  528: ## 8.7. Lookup index
  529: 
  530: Route selector lookup:
  531: 
  532: ```sql
  533: CREATE INDEX tokenio_routes_lookup_idx
  534:     ON tokenio_routes (
  535:         api_family,
  536:         endpoint_kind,
  537:         client_model,
  538:         enabled
  539:     );
  540: ```
  541: 
  542: ## 8.8. Cooldown index
  543: 
  544: ```sql
  545: CREATE INDEX tokenio_routes_cooldown_idx
  546:     ON tokenio_routes (cooldown_until);
  547: ```
  548: 
  549: ## 8.9. Capabilities JSON
  550: 
  551: Minimal JSON shape:
  552: 
  553: ```json
  554: {
  555:   "chat": true,
  556:   "embeddings": false,
  557:   "images_generation": false,
  558:   "tools": true,
  559:   "tool_choice": true,
  560:   "response_format": true,
  561:   "json_schema": true,
  562:   "image_input": true,
  563:   "audio_input": false,
  564:   "file_input": false,
  565:   "video_input": false,
  566:   "reasoning": false
  567: }
  568: ```
  569: 
  570: Capability validation в application layer.
  571: 
  572: ---
  573: 
  574: # 9. Table: tokenio_route_prices
  575: 
  576: ## 9.1. Purpose
  577: 
  578: `tokenio_route_prices` хранит pricing catalog на уровне route.
  579: 
  580: ## 9.2. Columns
  581: 
  582: ```sql
  583: CREATE TABLE tokenio_route_prices (
  584:     route_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES tokenio_routes(id),
  585: 
  586:     currency TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'RUB',
  587: 
  588:     input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  589:     cached_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  590:     output_price_per_1m_tokens_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  591:     reasoning_output_price_per_1m_tokens_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  592: 
  593:     image_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  594:     audio_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  595:     audio_output_price_per_1m_tokens_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  596:     file_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  597:     video_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  598: 
  599:     image_generation_price_per_unit_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  600:     image_generation_unit_kind TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
  601: 
  602:     markup_coefficient DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 1.0,
  603: 
  604:     enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  605: 
  606:     created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  607:     updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  608: 
  609:     CHECK (currency = 'RUB'),
  610:     CHECK (input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents >= 0),
  611:     CHECK (cached_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents >= 0),
  612:     CHECK (output_price_per_1m_tokens_cents >= 0),
  613:     CHECK (reasoning_output_price_per_1m_tokens_cents >= 0),
  614:     CHECK (image_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents >= 0),
  615:     CHECK (audio_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents >= 0),
  616:     CHECK (audio_output_price_per_1m_tokens_cents >= 0),
  617:     CHECK (file_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents >= 0),
  618:     CHECK (video_input_price_per_1m_tokens_cents >= 0),
  619:     CHECK (image_generation_price_per_unit_cents >= 0),
  620:     CHECK (image_generation_unit_kind IN ('none', 'generated_image')),
  621:     CHECK (
  622:         markup_coefficient > 0
  623:         AND markup_coefficient < 'Infinity'::double precision
  624:     )
  625: );
  626: ```
  627: 
  628: ## 9.3. Rules
  629: 
  630: Prices are:
  631: 
  632: ```text
  633: RUB cents per 1,000,000 tokens
  634: ```
  635: 
  636: `markup_coefficient` применяется к client amount, но не меняет upstream cost.
  637: 
  638: ## 9.4. Canonical float64 persistence
  639: 
  640: Canonical application type:
  641: 
  642: ```text
  643: domain.RoutePrice.MarkupCoefficient = Go float64
  644: ```
  645: 
  646: Application validation принимает любой finite positive `float64`.
  647: 
  648: Поэтому physical type обязан быть:
  649: 
  650: ```sql
  651: DOUBLE PRECISION
  652: ```
  653: 
  654: а не fixed-scale `NUMERIC(p, s)`.
  655: 
  656: `NUMERIC(12, 6)` запрещён, потому что округляет valid values с более чем шестью fractional digits и ограничивает допустимый finite `float64` range.
  657: 
  658: Constraint:
  659: 
  660: ```sql
  661: CHECK (
  662:     markup_coefficient > 0
  663:     AND markup_coefficient < 'Infinity'::double precision
  664: )
  665: ```
  666: 
  667: отклоняет:
  668: 
  669: ```text
  670: 0
  671: negative values
  672: -Infinity
  673: Infinity
  674: NaN
  675: ```
  676: 
  677: PostgreSQL adapter обязан bind/scan значение как binary64-compatible `double precision` без decimal quantization.
  678: 
  679: Round-trip invariant:
  680: 
  681: ```text
  682: persisted MarkupCoefficient
  683:     == canonical input float64
  684: 
  685: returned RoutePrice
  686:     == exact committed RoutePrice
  687: 
  688: audit after_state
  689:     == exact committed RoutePrice
  690: ```
  691: 
  692: CAS и audit comparison используют decoded canonical `float64`, а не округлённую decimal representation.
  693: 
  694: ---
  695: 
  696: # 10. Table: tokenio_usage_records
  697: 
  698: ## 10.1. Purpose
  699: 
  700: `tokenio_usage_records` — основной local ledger.
  701: 
  702: Каждый LLM request должен иметь запись в этой таблице.
  703: 
  704: ## 10.2. Columns
  705: 
  706: ```sql
  707: CREATE TABLE tokenio_usage_records (
  708:     local_request_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  709: 
  710:     idempotency_key TEXT,
  711:     user_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tokenio_users(id),
  712:     api_key_id TEXT REFERENCES tokenio_api_keys(id),
  713: 
  714:     api_family TEXT NOT NULL,
  715:     endpoint_kind TEXT NOT NULL,
  716:     client_model TEXT NOT NULL,
  717:     billing_model TEXT NOT NULL,
  718: 
  719:     selected_reseller_id TEXT REFERENCES tokenio_resellers(id),
  720:     selected_route_id TEXT REFERENCES tokenio_routes(id),
  721: 
  722:     provider_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  723:     provider_model TEXT NOT NULL,
  724: 
  725:     provider_request_id TEXT,
  726:     provider_response_model TEXT,
  727: 
  728:     estimated_input_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  729:     estimated_cached_input_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  730:     estimated_output_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  731:     estimated_reasoning_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  732:     estimated_image_input_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  733:     estimated_audio_input_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  734:     estimated_audio_output_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  735:     estimated_file_input_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  736:     estimated_video_input_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  737:     estimated_image_generation_units BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  738:     estimated_client_amount_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  739:     estimated_upstream_cost_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  740: 
  741:     input_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  742:     cached_input_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  743:     output_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  744:     reasoning_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  745:     image_input_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  746:     audio_input_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  747:     audio_output_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  748:     file_input_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  749:     video_input_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  750:     image_generation_units BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  751: 
  752:     client_amount_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  753:     charged_amount_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  754:     remaining_amount_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  755: 
  756:     actual_upstream_cost_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  757: 
  758:     currency TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'RUB',
  759: 
  760:     usage_completeness TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'missing',
  761:     status TEXT NOT NULL,
  762: 
  763:     failure_reason TEXT,
  764:     billing_charge_request_id TEXT,
  765: 
  766:     created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  767:     reserved_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  768:     released_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  769:     billable_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  770:     charged_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  771:     failed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  772:     updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  773: 
  774:     CHECK (currency = 'RUB'),
  775: 
  776:     CHECK (estimated_input_tokens >= 0),
  777:     CHECK (estimated_cached_input_tokens >= 0),
  778:     CHECK (estimated_output_tokens >= 0),
  779:     CHECK (estimated_reasoning_tokens >= 0),
  780:     CHECK (estimated_image_input_tokens >= 0),
  781:     CHECK (estimated_audio_input_tokens >= 0),
  782:     CHECK (estimated_audio_output_tokens >= 0),
  783:     CHECK (estimated_file_input_tokens >= 0),
  784:     CHECK (estimated_video_input_tokens >= 0),
  785:     CHECK (estimated_image_generation_units >= 0),
  786:     CHECK (estimated_client_amount_cents >= 0),
  787:     CHECK (estimated_upstream_cost_cents >= 0),
  788: 
  789:     CHECK (input_tokens >= 0),
  790:     CHECK (cached_input_tokens >= 0),
  791:     CHECK (output_tokens >= 0),
  792:     CHECK (reasoning_tokens >= 0),
  793:     CHECK (image_input_tokens >= 0),
  794:     CHECK (audio_input_tokens >= 0),
  795:     CHECK (audio_output_tokens >= 0),
  796:     CHECK (file_input_tokens >= 0),
  797:     CHECK (video_input_tokens >= 0),
  798:     CHECK (image_generation_units >= 0),
  799: 
  800:     CHECK (client_amount_cents >= 0),
  801:     CHECK (charged_amount_cents >= 0),
  802:     CHECK (remaining_amount_cents >= 0),
  803:     CHECK (actual_upstream_cost_cents >= 0)
  804: );
  805: ```
  806: 
  807: ## 10.2A. Complete EstimatedUsage mapping
  808: 
  809: Все десять dimensions `domain.UsageRecord.EstimatedUsage` сохраняются без потерь:
  810: 
  811: ```text
  812: EstimatedUsage.InputTokens
  813:     -> estimated_input_tokens
  814: EstimatedUsage.CachedInputTokens
  815:     -> estimated_cached_input_tokens
  816: EstimatedUsage.OutputTokens
  817:     -> estimated_output_tokens
  818: EstimatedUsage.ReasoningTokens
  819:     -> estimated_reasoning_tokens
  820: EstimatedUsage.ImageInputTokens
  821:     -> estimated_image_input_tokens
  822: EstimatedUsage.AudioInputTokens
  823:     -> estimated_audio_input_tokens
  824: EstimatedUsage.AudioOutputTokens
  825:     -> estimated_audio_output_tokens
  826: EstimatedUsage.FileInputTokens
  827:     -> estimated_file_input_tokens
  828: EstimatedUsage.VideoInputTokens
  829:     -> estimated_video_input_tokens
  830: EstimatedUsage.ImageGenerationUnits
  831:     -> estimated_image_generation_units
  832: ```
  833: 
  834: Synthetic zero reconstruction для отсутствующей dimension запрещён.
  835: 
  836: ## 10.3. Status constraint
  837: 
  838: Allowed statuses:
  839: 
  840: ```text
  841: reserved
  842: released
  843: billable
  844: partially_charged
  845: charged
  846: failed
  847: pricing_failed
  848: ```
  849: 
  850: ```sql
  851: ALTER TABLE tokenio_usage_records
  852: ADD CONSTRAINT tokenio_usage_records_status_chk
  853: CHECK (
  854:     status IN (
  855:         'reserved',
  856:         'released',
  857:         'billable',
  858:         'partially_charged',
  859:         'charged',
  860:         'failed',
  861:         'pricing_failed'
  862:     )
  863: );
  864: ```
  865: 
  866: ## 10.4. Usage completeness constraint
  867: 
  868: Allowed values:
  869: 
  870: ```text
  871: detailed
  872: aggregate
  873: estimated
  874: missing
  875: failed
  876: ```
  877: 
  878: ```sql
  879: ALTER TABLE tokenio_usage_records
  880: ADD CONSTRAINT tokenio_usage_records_usage_completeness_chk
  881: CHECK (
  882:     usage_completeness IN (
  883:         'detailed',
  884:         'aggregate',
  885:         'estimated',
  886:         'missing',
  887:         'failed'
  888:     )
  889: );
  890: ```
  891: 
  892: ## 10.5. Idempotency unique index
  893: 
  894: ```sql
  895: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX tokenio_usage_records_idempotency_uq
  896:     ON tokenio_usage_records (user_id, endpoint_kind, idempotency_key)
  897:     WHERE idempotency_key IS NOT NULL;
  898: ```
  899: 
  900: ## 10.6. Pending lookup index
  901: 
  902: ```sql
  903: CREATE INDEX tokenio_usage_records_pending_idx
  904:     ON tokenio_usage_records (user_id, status, created_at)
  905:     WHERE status IN ('reserved', 'billable', 'partially_charged', 'pricing_failed');
  906: ```
  907: 
  908: ## 10.7. Chargeable lookup index
  909: 
  910: ```sql
  911: CREATE INDEX tokenio_usage_records_chargeable_idx
  912:     ON tokenio_usage_records (user_id, status, created_at)
  913:     WHERE status IN ('billable', 'partially_charged');
  914: ```
  915: 
  916: ## 10.8. Route usage index
  917: 
  918: ```sql
  919: CREATE INDEX tokenio_usage_records_route_idx
  920:     ON tokenio_usage_records (selected_route_id, created_at);
  921: ```
  922: 
  923: ## 10.9. Billing group index
  924: 
  925: ```sql
  926: CREATE INDEX tokenio_usage_records_billing_group_idx
  927:     ON tokenio_usage_records (user_id, provider_type, client_model, currency, status);
  928: ```
  929: 
  930: ---
  931: 
  932: # 11. Table: tokenio_billing_sessions
  933: 
  934: ## 11.1. Purpose
  935: 
  936: `tokenio_billing_sessions` хранит cached remote billing balance.
  937: 
  938: Source of truth для pending — `tokenio_usage_records`, а не эта таблица.
  939: 
  940: ## 11.2. Columns
  941: 
  942: ```sql
  943: CREATE TABLE tokenio_billing_sessions (
  944:     user_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES tokenio_users(id),
  945:     billing_subject_user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  946: 
  947:     remote_balance_cents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  948:     pending_amount_cents_cached BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  949: 
  950:     currency TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'RUB',
  951: 
  952:     fetched_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
  953:     created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  954:     updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  955: 
  956:     CHECK (currency = 'RUB'),
  957:     CHECK (remote_balance_cents >= 0),
  958:     CHECK (pending_amount_cents_cached >= 0)
  959: );
  960: ```
  961: 
  962: ## 11.3. Rules
  963: 
  964: `pending_amount_cents_cached` is optimization only.
  965: 
  966: Effective balance must be computed from:
  967: 
  968: ```text
  969: remote_balance_cents - pending amount from usage ledger
  970: ```
  971: 
  972: ---
  973: 
  974: # 12. Table: tokenio_billing_charge_batches
  975: 
  976: ## 12.1. Purpose
  977: 
  978: `tokenio_billing_charge_batches` хранит durable billing charge command state и результат reconciliation.
  979: 
  980: Raw Billing response body не хранится.
  981: 
  982: ## 12.2. Columns
  983: 
  984: ```sql
  985: CREATE TABLE tokenio_billing_charge_batches (
  986:     id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  987: 
  988:     user_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tokenio_users(id),
  989:     billing_subject_user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  990: 
  991:     provider_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  992:     client_model TEXT NOT NULL,
  993:     billing_model TEXT NOT NULL,
  994: 
  995:     input_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  996:     output_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  997: 
  998:     amount_cents BIGINT NOT NULL,
  999:     currency TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'RUB',
 1000: 
 1001:     billing_status TEXT NOT NULL,
 1002: 
 1003:     billing_response_balance_cents BIGINT,
 1004:     billing_error_code TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
 1005: 
 1006:     created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
 1007:     charged_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
 1008:     failed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
 1009:     updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
 1010: 
 1011:     CHECK (currency = 'RUB'),
 1012:     CHECK (input_tokens >= 0),
 1013:     CHECK (output_tokens >= 0),
 1014:     CHECK (amount_cents > 0),
 1015:     CHECK (
 1016:         billing_response_balance_cents IS NULL
 1017:         OR billing_response_balance_cents >= 0
 1018:     ),
 1019:     CHECK (
 1020:         (
 1021:             billing_status = 'pending'
 1022:             AND charged_at IS NULL
 1023:             AND failed_at IS NULL
 1024:             AND billing_error_code = ''
 1025:         )
 1026:         OR
 1027:         (
 1028:             billing_status = 'failed'
 1029:             AND charged_at IS NULL
 1030:             AND failed_at IS NOT NULL
 1031:             AND billing_error_code <> ''
 1032:         )
 1033:         OR
 1034:         (
 1035:             billing_status = 'succeeded'
 1036:             AND charged_at IS NOT NULL
 1037:             AND failed_at IS NULL
 1038:             AND billing_error_code = ''
 1039:         )
 1040:     )
 1041: );
 1042: ```
 1043: 
 1044: Column `billing_error_body` запрещён. Adapter сохраняет только normalized `billing_error_code`, необходимый canonical contract.
 1045: 
 1046: ## 12.3. Billing status constraint
 1047: 
 1048: Allowed values:
 1049: 
 1050: ```text
 1051: pending
 1052: succeeded
 1053: failed
 1054: ```
 1055: 
 1056: ```sql
 1057: ALTER TABLE tokenio_billing_charge_batches
 1058: ADD CONSTRAINT tokenio_billing_charge_batches_status_chk
 1059: CHECK (billing_status IN ('pending', 'succeeded', 'failed'));
 1060: ```
 1061: 
 1062: ## 12.4. Indexes
 1063: 
 1064: ```sql
 1065: CREATE INDEX tokenio_billing_charge_batches_user_idx
 1066:     ON tokenio_billing_charge_batches (user_id, created_at);
 1067: 
 1068: CREATE INDEX tokenio_billing_charge_batches_model_idx
 1069:     ON tokenio_billing_charge_batches (provider_type, client_model, created_at);
 1070: ```
 1071: 
 1072: ## 12.5. UpdatedAt persistence
 1073: 
 1074: `updated_at` хранит exact `domain.BillingChargeBatch.UpdatedAt` и не вычисляется при чтении из `created_at`, `charged_at` или `failed_at`.
 1075: 
 1076: Rules определены ledger semantics из `docs/spec/050-ledger-and-auto-charge.ru.md`:
 1077: 
 1078: ```text
 1079: create:
 1080:     updated_at = created_at
 1081: 
 1082: automatic pending -> failed:
 1083:     updated_at = failed_at
 1084: 
 1085: automatic identical failed replay через MarkChargeBatchFailed:
 1086:     failed_at unchanged
 1087:     updated_at unchanged
 1088: 
 1089: explicit failed retry outcome через MarkChargeRetryFailedWithAudit:
 1090:     failed_at = retry_failed_at
 1091:     updated_at = retry_failed_at
 1092: 
 1093: pending|failed -> succeeded:
 1094:     updated_at = charged_at
 1095: 
 1096: succeeded identical replay:
 1097:     updated_at unchanged
 1098: ```
 1099: 
 1100: ## 12.6. Initial timestamps and existing replay
 1101: 
 1102: Для initial insert:
 1103: 
 1104: ```text
 1105: incoming Status = pending
 1106: incoming CreatedAt = incoming UpdatedAt
 1107: created_at = incoming CreatedAt
 1108: updated_at = incoming UpdatedAt
 1109: ```
 1110: 
 1111: Для existing batch replay incoming `Status`, `CreatedAt` и `UpdatedAt` сначала проходят structural validation из spec 050, но не сравниваются с persisted lifecycle state/timestamps, потому что timestamps создаются текущим clock и не входят в `StableBatchID`.
 1112: 
 1113: Persisted timestamps первой successful preparation:
 1114: 
 1115: ```text
 1116: не заменяются replay command
 1117: являются authoritative
 1118: возвращаются в exact persisted snapshot
 1119: ```
 1120: 
 1121: Mutable status/result fields также не входят в immutable existing-command equality.
 1122: 
 1123: ---
 1124: 
 1125: # 13. Table: tokenio_billing_charge_allocations
 1126: 
 1127: ## 13.1. Purpose
 1128: 
 1129: `tokenio_billing_charge_allocations` хранит immutable ordered allocations durable billing command.
 1130: 
 1131: Таблица нужна для partial charge, exact replay и audit.
 1132: 
 1133: ## 13.2. Columns
 1134: 
 1135: ```sql
 1136: CREATE TABLE tokenio_billing_charge_allocations (
 1137:     id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
 1138: 
 1139:     batch_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tokenio_billing_charge_batches(id),
 1140:     local_request_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tokenio_usage_records(local_request_id),
 1141:     position INTEGER NOT NULL,
 1142: 
 1143:     charged_amount_cents BIGINT NOT NULL,
 1144:     remaining_amount_cents BIGINT NOT NULL,
 1145: 
 1146:     created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
 1147: 
 1148:     CHECK (position >= 0),
 1149:     CHECK (charged_amount_cents > 0),
 1150:     CHECK (remaining_amount_cents >= 0)
 1151: );
 1152: ```
 1153: 
 1154: ## 13.3. Constraints and indexes
 1155: 
 1156: ```sql
 1157: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX tokenio_billing_charge_allocations_batch_usage_uq
 1158:     ON tokenio_billing_charge_allocations (batch_id, local_request_id);
 1159: 
 1160: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX tokenio_billing_charge_allocations_batch_position_uq
 1161:     ON tokenio_billing_charge_allocations (batch_id, position);
 1162: 
 1163: CREATE INDEX tokenio_billing_charge_allocations_usage_idx
 1164:     ON tokenio_billing_charge_allocations (local_request_id);
 1165: ```
 1166: 
 1167: `charged_amount_cents <= 0` является invalid charge plan и не может быть persisted.
 1168: 
 1169: ## 13.4. Initial timestamp and replay equality
 1170: 
 1171: Для initial insert `created_at` сохраняет canonical `BillingChargeAllocation.CreatedAt`.
 1172: 
 1173: Каждая incoming allocation обязана иметь valid UTC `CreatedAt`, равный `plan.Batch.CreatedAt`.
 1174: 
 1175: Для existing batch replay allocation equality включает:
 1176: 
 1177: ```text
 1178: id
 1179: batch_id
 1180: local_request_id
 1181: position
 1182: charged_amount_cents
 1183: remaining_amount_cents
 1184: ```
 1185: 
 1186: `created_at` не входит в replay equality, потому что создаётся текущим clock и не входит в `StableBatchID`.
 1187: 
 1188: Persisted `created_at` первой successful preparation является authoritative, не заменяется incoming replay timestamp и возвращается в loaded snapshot.
 1189: 
 1190: ---
 1191: 
 1192: # 13A. Table: tokenio_billing_charge_expected_records
 1193: 
 1194: ## 13A.1. Purpose
 1195: 
 1196: `tokenio_billing_charge_expected_records` хранит immutable canonical post-claim `domain.UsageRecord` snapshots durable billing command.
 1197: 
 1198: Snapshot:
 1199: 
 1200: ```text
 1201: immutable
 1202: не обновляется при reconciliation
 1203: не удаляется после success
 1204: не пересобирается из mutable tokenio_usage_records
 1205: ```
 1206: 
 1207: Pre-claim records в эту таблицу не сохраняются.
 1208: 
 1209: ## 13A.2. Columns
 1210: 
 1211: ```sql
 1212: CREATE TABLE tokenio_billing_charge_expected_records (
 1213:     batch_id TEXT NOT NULL
 1214:         REFERENCES tokenio_billing_charge_batches(id),
 1215: 
 1216:     local_request_id TEXT NOT NULL
 1217:         REFERENCES tokenio_usage_records(local_request_id),
 1218: 
 1219:     position INTEGER NOT NULL,
 1220: 
 1221:     expected_record JSONB NOT NULL,
 1222: 
 1223:     created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
 1224: 
 1225:     PRIMARY KEY (batch_id, local_request_id),
 1226: 
 1227:     UNIQUE (batch_id, position),
 1228: 
 1229:     CHECK (position >= 0),
 1230:     CHECK (jsonb_typeof(expected_record) = 'object')
 1231: );
 1232: ```
 1233: 
 1234: `ON DELETE CASCADE` не используется.
 1235: 
 1236: ## 13A.3. Index
 1237: 
 1238: ```sql
 1239: CREATE INDEX tokenio_billing_charge_expected_records_request_idx
 1240:     ON tokenio_billing_charge_expected_records (local_request_id);
 1241: ```
 1242: 
 1243: ## 13A.4. Position, order and cardinality
 1244: 
 1245: Для каждого batch:
 1246: 
 1247: ```text
 1248: одна allocation на каждый expected record
 1249: один expected record на каждую allocation
 1250: одинаковый local_request_id на одинаковой position
 1251: positions составляют непрерывный диапазон 0..N-1
 1252: ```
 1253: 
 1254: Allocations и expected records загружаются отдельно:
 1255: 
 1256: ```sql
 1257: ORDER BY position ASC
 1258: ```
 1259: 
 1260: После загрузки adapter обязан проверить:
 1261: 
 1262: ```text
 1263: len(ExpectedRecords) = len(Allocations)
 1264: ExpectedRecords[i].LocalRequestID = Allocations[i].LocalRequestID
 1265: ```
 1266: 
 1267: Нарушение order/cardinality является store contract violation и не исправляется сортировкой, пропуском или synthetic reconstruction.
 1268: 
 1269: ## 13A.5. Explicit expected-record JSON representation
 1270: 
 1271: Database JSON schema не определяется JSON tags или `omitempty` domain struct.
 1272: 
 1273: Будущий PostgreSQL adapter использует отдельный explicit persistence DTO и strict encoder/decoder.
 1274: 
 1275: Каждый `expected_record` всегда содержит keys:
 1276: 
 1277: ```text
 1278: local_request_id
 1279: idempotency_key
 1280: user_id
 1281: api_key_id
 1282: api_family
 1283: endpoint_kind
 1284: client_model
 1285: billing_model
 1286: selected_route_id
 1287: selected_reseller_id
 1288: provider_type
 1289: provider_model
 1290: provider_request_id
 1291: provider_response_model
 1292: estimated_usage
 1293: usage
 1294: usage_completeness
 1295: estimated_client_amount_cents
 1296: estimated_upstream_cost_cents
 1297: client_amount_cents
 1298: charged_amount_cents
 1299: remaining_amount_cents
 1300: actual_upstream_cost_cents
 1301: currency
 1302: status
 1303: failure_reason
 1304: billing_charge_request_id
 1305: created_at
 1306: reserved_at
 1307: released_at
 1308: billable_at
 1309: charged_at
 1310: failed_at
 1311: updated_at
 1312: ```
 1313: 
 1314: Optional strings всегда представлены explicit JSON string. При отсутствии значения используется `""`.
 1315: 
 1316: Это относится как минимум к:
 1317: 
 1318: ```text
 1319: idempotency_key
 1320: provider_request_id
 1321: provider_response_model
 1322: failure_reason
 1323: billing_charge_request_id
 1324: ```
 1325: 
 1326: Optional timestamps всегда представлены:
 1327: 
 1328: ```text
 1329: null
 1330: или RFC3339Nano UTC string
 1331: ```
 1332: 
 1333: Это относится к:
 1334: 
 1335: ```text
 1336: reserved_at
 1337: released_at
 1338: billable_at
 1339: charged_at
 1340: failed_at
 1341: ```
 1342: 
 1343: Required `created_at` и `updated_at` всегда являются непустыми RFC3339Nano UTC strings.
 1344: 
 1345: `estimated_usage` и `usage` всегда являются objects с десятью keys:
 1346: 
 1347: ```text
 1348: input_tokens
 1349: cached_input_tokens
 1350: output_tokens
 1351: reasoning_tokens
 1352: image_input_tokens
 1353: audio_input_tokens
 1354: audio_output_tokens
 1355: file_input_tokens
 1356: video_input_tokens
 1357: image_generation_units
 1358: ```
 1359: 
 1360: Все десять keys присутствуют даже при значении `0`.
 1361: 
 1362: Strict decoder обязан отклонять:
 1363: 
 1364: ```text
 1365: unknown keys
 1366: missing required keys
 1367: invalid JSON types
 1368: invalid or non-UTC timestamps
 1369: invalid enum values
 1370: negative token or amount values
 1371: ```
 1372: 
 1373: Любое такое значение является store contract violation. Adapter не default-ит missing values и не выполняет silent repair.
 1374: 
 1375: После strict decode infrastructure adapter возвращает exact `domain.UsageRecord` через canonical port.
 1376: 
 1377: Infrastructure adapter валидирует только persistence representation и structural storage contract:
 1378: 
 1379: ```text
 1380: required JSON keys присутствуют
 1381: unknown JSON keys отсутствуют
 1382: JSON types корректны
 1383: timestamps имеют RFC3339Nano UTC representation
 1384: enum/scalar values могут быть отображены в canonical domain types
 1385: числовые значения помещаются в canonical Go types
 1386: order/cardinality persisted command не нарушены
 1387: ```
 1388: 
 1389: Infrastructure adapter:
 1390: 
 1391: ```text
 1392: не импортирует internal/application/**
 1393: не вызывает ledger.ValidateRecord
 1394: не копирует application validator в infrastructure
 1395: не принимает business/state-transition decisions
 1396: ```
 1397: 
 1398: Canonical business validation выполняется application layer после получения entity через port и до use-case side effects. Для billing charge snapshot application использует `billing.ValidateChargeSnapshot`, который включает canonical validation batch, allocations и expected usage records. Для остальных port reads соответствующий application use case применяет принадлежащий ему canonical validator.
 1399: 
 1400: Если strict decoder не может построить exact canonical entity или обнаруживает structural storage corruption, adapter возвращает normalized store contract error без raw SQL/driver/JSON details. Application layer преобразует такой результат в свой safe contract error.
 1401: 
 1402: Layering source of truth:
 1403: 
 1404: ```text
 1405: infrastructure -> domain + ports
 1406: application -> domain + ports
 1407: infrastructure -/-> application
 1408: ```
 1409: 
 1410: 
 1411: ---
 1412: 
 1413: # 14. Table: tokenio_route_events
 1414: 
 1415: ## 14.1. Purpose
 1416: 
 1417: `tokenio_route_events` хранит routing/cooldown/error events.
 1418: 
 1419: ## 14.2. Columns
 1420: 
 1421: ```sql
 1422: CREATE TABLE tokenio_route_events (
 1423:     id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
 1424: 
 1425:     route_id TEXT REFERENCES tokenio_routes(id),
 1426:     reseller_id TEXT REFERENCES tokenio_resellers(id),
 1427: 
 1428:     provider_type TEXT,
 1429:     api_family TEXT,
 1430:     endpoint_kind TEXT,
 1431:     client_model TEXT,
 1432: 
 1433:     event_type TEXT NOT NULL,
 1434:     reason TEXT,
 1435:     local_request_id TEXT,
 1436: 
 1437:     metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
 1438: 
 1439:     created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
 1440: );
 1441: ```
 1442: 
 1443: ## 14.3. Event types
 1444: 
 1445: Allowed event types:
 1446: 
 1447: ```text
 1448: selected
 1449: skipped
 1450: cooldown_set
 1451: cooldown_expired
 1452: retry
 1453: failure
 1454: success
 1455: healthcheck_failed
 1456: healthcheck_recovered
 1457: balance_low
 1458: ```
 1459: 
 1460: ## 14.4. Indexes
 1461: 
 1462: ```sql
 1463: CREATE INDEX tokenio_route_events_route_idx
 1464:     ON tokenio_route_events (route_id, created_at);
 1465: 
 1466: CREATE INDEX tokenio_route_events_reseller_idx
 1467:     ON tokenio_route_events (reseller_id, created_at);
 1468: 
 1469: CREATE INDEX tokenio_route_events_request_idx
 1470:     ON tokenio_route_events (local_request_id);
 1471: ```

 1521: # 16. Table: tokenio_admin_audit_log
 1522: 
 1523: ## 16.1. Purpose
 1524: 
 1525: `tokenio_admin_audit_log` хранит audit trail admin actions.
 1526: 
 1527: ## 16.2. Columns
 1528: 
 1529: ```sql
 1530: CREATE TABLE tokenio_admin_audit_log (
 1531:     id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
 1532: 
 1533:     admin_subject TEXT NOT NULL,
 1534: 
 1535:     action TEXT NOT NULL,
 1536:     entity_type TEXT NOT NULL,
 1537:     entity_id TEXT NOT NULL,
 1538: 
 1539:     before_state JSONB,
 1540:     after_state JSONB,
 1541: 
 1542:     request_id TEXT,
 1543: 
 1544:     created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
 1545: );
 1546: ```
 1547: 
 1548: ## 16.3. Rules
 1549: 
 1550: Admin actions must be audit logged for:
 1551: 
 1552: ```text
 1553: user enable/disable
 1554: API key create/revoke
 1555: reseller create/update/disable
 1556: reseller balance update
 1557: route create/update/disable
 1558: route price update
 1559: cooldown clear/set
 1560: pricing_failed resolution
 1561: stuck reserved resolution
 1562: ```
 1563: 
 1564: ---
 1565: 
 1566: # 17. Transactions
 1567: 
 1568: ## 17.1. Responsibility boundary
 1569: 
 1570: `docs/spec/050-ledger-and-auto-charge.ru.md` является source of truth для:
 1571: 
 1572: ```text
 1573: pre-claim and post-claim semantics
 1574: existing batch replay
 1575: active, failed and historical claims
 1576: automatic failed replay CAS
 1577: explicit failed retry outcome and audit
 1578: successful reconciliation
 1579: ```
 1580: 
 1581: Эта database specification не переопределяет ledger semantics. Она определяет только physical persistence и transactional enforcement принятых contracts.
 1582: 
 1583: ## 17.2. PrepareChargeBatch persistence boundary
 1584: 
 1585: Одна database transaction обязана атомарно сохранить:
 1586: 
 1587: ```text
 1588: billing batch
 1589: ordered allocations
 1590: ordered post-claim expected snapshots
 1591: usage claims
 1592: ```
 1593: 
 1594: Transaction locks allocated usage rows, выполняет exact pre-claim comparison и проверяет отсутствие другого active pending/failed claim до insert/update.
 1595: 
 1596: При ошибке ни одна часть command или claim не сохраняется.
 1597: 
 1598: ## 17.3. Existing batch load and replay enforcement
 1599: 
 1600: Existing command загружается из:
 1601: 
 1602: ```text
 1603: tokenio_billing_charge_batches
 1604: tokenio_billing_charge_allocations ORDER BY position ASC
 1605: tokenio_billing_charge_expected_records ORDER BY position ASC
 1606: ```
 1607: 
 1608: ### Batch immutable replay comparison
 1609: 
 1610: Exact comparison включает:
 1611: 
 1612: ```text
 1613: id
 1614: user_id
 1615: billing_subject_user_id
 1616: provider_type
 1617: client_model
 1618: billing_model
 1619: input_tokens
 1620: output_tokens
 1621: amount_cents
 1622: currency
 1623: ```
 1624: 
 1625: Не сравниваются как immutable command identity:
 1626: 
 1627: ```text
 1628: billing_status
 1629: billing_response_balance_cents
 1630: billing_error_code
 1631: created_at
 1632: charged_at
 1633: failed_at
 1634: updated_at
 1635: ```
 1636: 
 1637: ### Allocation immutable replay comparison
 1638: 
 1639: Каждая allocation сравнивается по canonical position и полям:
 1640: 
 1641: ```text
 1642: id
 1643: batch_id
 1644: local_request_id
 1645: charged_amount_cents
 1646: remaining_amount_cents
 1647: ```
 1648: 
 1649: Incoming `BillingChargeAllocation.CreatedAt` не сравнивается с persisted `created_at`.
 1650: 
 1651: ### Expected-record replay comparison
 1652: 
 1653: Incoming pre-claim record преобразуется только так:
 1654: 
 1655: ```text
 1656: comparison_record =
 1657:     incoming_record
 1658:     with BillingChargeRequestID = batch.ID
 1659: ```
 1660: 
 1661: `comparison_record` exact-сравнивается с persisted post-claim snapshot на той же position по всем canonical `UsageRecord` fields.
 1662: 
 1663: Persisted batch/allocation timestamps первой successful preparation являются authoritative.
 1664: 
 1665: Exact replay:
 1666: 
 1667: ```text
 1668: не изменяет batch
 1669: не изменяет allocations
 1670: не изменяет expected snapshots
 1671: не обновляет usage claims повторно
 1672: возвращает exact persisted snapshot
 1673: ```
 1674: 
 1675: Persisted lifecycle status также возвращается без подмены. Exact `succeeded` snapshot является допустимым результатом `PrepareChargeBatch` replay.
 1676: 
 1677: Persistence adapter не имеет права:
 1678: 
 1679: ```text
 1680: возвращать synthetic pending/failed status
 1681: скрывать succeeded command как state conflict
 1682: повторно применять claim
 1683: повторно вызывать Billing
 1684: ```
 1685: 
 1686: Application layer распознаёт exact succeeded snapshot как already reconciled idempotent success и не выполняет новый financial side effect.
 1687: 
 1688: Любое отличие canonical identity, position, cardinality или expected record является state/contract conflict.
 1689: 
 1690: ## 17.4. ApplyChargeSuccess persistence boundary
 1691: 
 1692: `ApplyChargeSuccess` использует persisted batch, allocations и expected snapshots как source of truth.
 1693: 
 1694: Одна transaction обязана:
 1695: 
 1696: ```text
 1697: lock batch
 1698: load ordered immutable command
 1699: lock corresponding mutable usage rows
 1700: verify each row against persisted post-claim snapshot
 1701: apply every allocation exactly once
 1702: persist usage results
 1703: persist succeeded batch result
 1704: commit
 1705: ```
 1706: 
 1707: Store contract violation или CAS conflict приводит к rollback без partial reconciliation.
 1708: 
 1709: ## 17.5. Automatic MarkChargeBatchFailed enforcement
 1710: 
 1711: `UsageLedger.MarkChargeBatchFailed` реализует:
 1712: 
 1713: ```text
 1714: pending -> failed
 1715: ```
 1716: 
 1717: и idempotent no-op replay уже failed batch только для exact того же `billing_error_code`.
 1718: 
 1719: При already-failed no-op incoming `failedAt` не изменяет persisted `failed_at` и `updated_at`.
 1720: 
 1721: Эта operation не пишет admin audit.
 1722: 
 1723: ## 17.6. Explicit retry failure audit transaction
 1724: 
 1725: `AdminUsageLedger.MarkChargeRetryFailedWithAudit` является отдельной operation.
 1726: 
 1727: Одна transaction обязана:
 1728: 
 1729: ```text
 1730: 1. Lock batch.
 1731: 2. Require current status = expectedStatus = failed.
 1732: 3. Build next failed batch with:
 1733:    billing_error_code = caller normalized code
 1734:    failed_at = retryFailedAt
 1735:    updated_at = retryFailedAt.
 1736: 4. Preserve immutable command, charged_at and billing_response_balance_cents.
 1737: 5. Verify audit before_state equals exact current batch.
 1738: 6. Verify audit after_state equals exact next batch.
 1739: 7. Persist next batch.
 1740: 8. Persist retry outcome audit.
 1741: 9. Commit atomically.
 1742: ```
 1743: 
 1744: Audit entry не может описывать состояние, отличное от committed batch.
 1745: 
 1746: Idempotency key этой operation — outcome audit ID:
 1747: 
 1748: ```text
 1749: same audit ID and exact same payload
 1750:     -> no-op success with existing committed state
 1751: 
 1752: same audit ID and different payload
 1753:     -> state/contract conflict
 1754: ```
 1755: 
 1756: ## 17.7. RoutePrice float64 enforcement
 1757: 
 1758: `tokenio_route_prices.markup_coefficient` сохраняется как `DOUBLE PRECISION`.
 1759: 
 1760: Adapter обязан:
 1761: 
 1762: ```text
 1763: bind canonical Go float64 без fixed-scale decimal conversion
 1764: scan PostgreSQL float8 обратно в Go float64
 1765: reject any decoded non-finite or non-positive value
 1766: verify exact canonical value for CAS and audit
 1767: ```
 1768: 
 1769: Округление до decimal scale, включая шесть знаков после запятой, запрещено.
 1770: 
 1771: ## 17.8. Generic usage state transitions
 1772: 
 1773: Остальные usage transitions также проверяют expected current state.
 1774: 
 1775: Пример:
 1776: 
 1777: ```sql
 1778: UPDATE tokenio_usage_records
 1779: SET status = 'billable',
 1780:     ...
 1781: WHERE local_request_id = $1
 1782:   AND status = 'reserved';
 1783: ```
 1784: 
 1785: Если affected rows = 0, operation возвращает state conflict.
 1786: 
 1787: ---
 1788: 
 1789: # 18. Denormalization policy
 1790: 
 1791: Allowed denormalized fields in `tokenio_usage_records`:
 1792: 
 1793: ```text
 1794: provider_type
 1795: client_model
 1796: billing_model
 1797: selected_reseller_id
 1798: selected_route_id
 1799: provider_model
 1800: ```
 1801: 
 1802: Reason:
 1803: 
 1804: ```text
 1805: usage record must preserve historical truth even if route/reseller changes later.
 1806: ```
 1807: 
 1808: Historical usage records must not change when route metadata changes.
 1809: 
 1810: ---
 1811: 
 1812: # 19. Secrets policy
 1813: 
 1814: Forbidden columns:
 1815: 
 1816: ```text
 1817: raw_api_key
 1818: reseller_api_key
 1819: billing_jwt
 1820: billing_service_token
 1821: admin_token
 1822: ```
 1823: 
 1824: Allowed references:
 1825: 
 1826: ```text
 1827: key_hash
 1828: key_prefix
 1829: api_key_env
 1830: admin_subject
 1831: ```
 1832: 
 1833: ---
 1834: 
 1835: # 20. Table: tokenio_api_key_provisionings
 1836: 
 1837: ## 20.1. Purpose
 1838: 
 1839: `tokenio_api_key_provisionings` хранит idempotency и temporary encrypted delivery state для initial API key delivery.
 1840: 
 1841: Permanent authentication source of truth остаётся:
 1842: 
 1843: ```text
 1844: tokenio_api_keys.key_hash
 1845: ```
 1846: 
 1847: ## 20.2. Columns
 1848: 
 1849: ```sql
 1850: CREATE TABLE tokenio_api_key_provisionings (
 1851:     id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
 1852: 
 1853:     idempotency_key TEXT NOT NULL,
 1854:     source_reference_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
 1855: 
 1856:     external_billing_user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
 1857:     user_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tokenio_users(id),
 1858:     api_key_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tokenio_api_keys(id),
 1859: 
 1860:     result_type TEXT NOT NULL,
 1861:     status TEXT NOT NULL,
 1862: 
 1863:     encrypted_raw_key BYTEA,
 1864:     encryption_nonce BYTEA,
 1865:     encryption_key_version TEXT,
 1866: 
 1867:     delivery_attempts INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
 1868: 
 1869:     created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
 1870:     updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
 1871:     expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
 1872:     delivered_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
 1873:     expired_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
 1874: 
 1875:     CHECK (result_type IN ('key_created', 'already_provisioned')),
 1876:     CHECK (status IN ('pending_delivery', 'delivered', 'expired')),
 1877:     CHECK (delivery_attempts >= 0),
 1878: 
 1879:     CHECK (
 1880:         (
 1881:             status = 'pending_delivery'
 1882:             AND result_type = 'key_created'
 1883:             AND encrypted_raw_key IS NOT NULL
 1884:             AND encryption_nonce IS NOT NULL
 1885:             AND encryption_key_version IS NOT NULL
 1886:             AND expires_at IS NOT NULL
 1887:         )
 1888:         OR
 1889:         (
 1890:             status IN ('delivered', 'expired')
 1891:             AND encrypted_raw_key IS NULL
 1892:             AND encryption_nonce IS NULL
 1893:         )
 1894:     )
 1895: );
 1896: ```
 1897: 
 1898: `result_type = already_provisioned` создаётся сразу в terminal `delivered` state и не содержит encrypted material.
 1899: 
 1900: ## 20.3. Idempotency constraint
 1901: 
 1902: ```sql
 1903: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX tokenio_api_key_provisionings_idempotency_uq
 1904:     ON tokenio_api_key_provisionings (idempotency_key);
 1905: ```
 1906: 
 1907: Same `Idempotency-Key` не может создать второй record или второй API key.
 1908: 
 1909: ## 20.4. One pending delivery per user
 1910: 
 1911: ```sql
 1912: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX tokenio_api_key_provisionings_user_pending_uq
 1913:     ON tokenio_api_key_provisionings (user_id)
 1914:     WHERE status = 'pending_delivery';
 1915: ```
 1916: 
 1917: Один user не может иметь несколько одновременно replay-able raw keys.
 1918: 
 1919: ## 20.5. Lookup indexes
 1920: 
 1921: ```sql
 1922: CREATE INDEX tokenio_api_key_provisionings_external_billing_user_idx
 1923:     ON tokenio_api_key_provisionings (
 1924:         external_billing_user_id,
 1925:         created_at
 1926:     );
 1927: 
 1928: CREATE INDEX tokenio_api_key_provisionings_api_key_idx
 1929:     ON tokenio_api_key_provisionings (
 1930:         api_key_id
 1931:     );
 1932: 
 1933: CREATE INDEX tokenio_api_key_provisionings_expiry_idx
 1934:     ON tokenio_api_key_provisionings (
 1935:         status,
 1936:         expires_at
 1937:     )
 1938:     WHERE status = 'pending_delivery';
 1939: ```
 1940: 
 1941: ## 20.6. Transaction rules
 1942: 
 1943: First provisioning transaction must atomically:
 1944: 
 1945: ```text
 1946: find/create user
 1947: check active API key
 1948: create API key hash record if required
 1949: create provisioning record
 1950: persist encrypted delivery copy
 1951: ```
 1952: 
 1953: Confirm-delivery transaction must atomically:
 1954: 
 1955: ```text
 1956: pending_delivery -> delivered
 1957: encrypted_raw_key = NULL
 1958: encryption_nonce = NULL
 1959: delivered_at = now()
 1960: ```
 1961: 
 1962: Expiration transaction must atomically:
 1963: 
 1964: ```text
 1965: pending_delivery -> expired
 1966: encrypted_raw_key = NULL
 1967: encryption_nonce = NULL
 1968: associated API key revoked
 1969: expired_at = now()
 1970: ```
 1971: 
 1972: ## 20.7. Encryption rules
 1973: 
 1974: `encrypted_raw_key` contains only AES-256-GCM ciphertext.
 1975: 
 1976: `encryption_nonce` must be unique for the encryption key.
 1977: 
 1978: AEAD associated data includes:
 1979: 
 1980: ```text
 1981: provisioning_id
 1982: api_key_id
 1983: user_id
 1984: ```
 1985: 
 1986: Encryption key is stored only in runtime environment/config, never in Postgres.
 1987: 
 1988: Full contract:
 1989: 
 1990: ```text
 1991: docs/spec/021-api-key-provisioning.ru.md
 1992: ```
 1993: 
 1994: # 21. Data retention
 1995: 
 1996: Default retention:
 1997: 
 1998: ```text
 1999: usage_records: keep indefinitely until explicit retention policy is introduced
 2000: route_events: keep 90 days minimum
 2001: telegram_alerts: keep 90 days minimum
 2002: admin_audit_log: keep indefinitely
 2003: api_key_provisionings: keep metadata for audit; encrypted_raw_key and encryption_nonce must be NULL after terminal state
 2004: ```
 2005: 
 2006: Retention jobs are out of scope for first implementation unless required operationally.
 2007: 
 2008: ---
 2009: 
 2010: # 22. Acceptance criteria
 2011: 
 2012: Database schema считается реализованной, если:
 2013: 
 2014: ```text
 2015: 1. Все таблицы используют prefix tokenio_.
 2016: 2. Raw user API keys не хранятся.
 2017: 3. API key hash stores HMAC-SHA256 digest, not unsalted SHA-256.
 2018: 4. Raw reseller API keys не хранятся.
 2019: 5. Billing JWT не хранится.
 2020: 6. Users and API keys support enabled/revoked/expired states.
 2021: 7. Resellers store api_key_env, balance_cents, reserved_cents.
 2022: 8. Routes are keyed by api_family + endpoint_kind + client_model.
 2023: 9. Route prices support all token categories and image generation unit pricing.
 2024: 10. Usage records support all ledger statuses.
 2025: 11. Usage records support idempotency unique scope.
 2026: 12. Pending/chargeable records have indexes.
 2027: 13. Billing charge batches and allocations support partial charge.
 2028: 14. Route events support cooldown/debug history.
 2029: 15. Admin audit log exists.
 2030: 16. State transitions verify current status.
 2031: 17. Reseller reserve/reconcile can be done transactionally.
 2032: 18. SQL migrations are explicit and reviewable.
 2033: 19. go test or migration tests validate schema creation.
 2034: 20. API key provisioning idempotency имеет unique constraint.
 2035: 21. Terminal provisioning states не содержат encrypted raw key material.
 2036: ```
