    1: # 080. Error Model
    2: 
    3: Версия: 0.1
    4: Статус: draft
    5: Язык: русский
    6: Проект: `github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway`
    7: 
    8: ---
    9: 
   10: # 1. Назначение документа
   11: 
   12: Этот документ описывает error model Tokenio Gateway.
   13: 
   14: Документ фиксирует:
   15: 
   16: ```text
   17: gateway-owned error envelope
   18: HTTP status mapping
   19: public error codes
   20: admin error codes
   21: upstream error passthrough
   22: request id behavior
   23: billing error behavior
   24: routing error behavior
   25: ledger error behavior
   26: secrets policy for errors
   27: logging policy
   28: ```
   29: 
   30: Документ не описывает:
   31: 
   32: ```text
   33: route selection algorithm
   34: pricing formula
   35: ledger state machine
   36: admin endpoint definitions
   37: database schema
   38: provider adapter implementation
   39: ```
   40: 
   41: Эти темы описываются в отдельных спецификациях.
   42: 
   43: ---
   44: 
   45: # 2. Главный error invariant
   46: 
   47: Tokenio Gateway различает два типа upstream results:
   48: 
   49: ```text
   50: 1. Successful upstream responses
   51: 2. Upstream/provider failures
   52: ```
   53: 
   54: Successful upstream responses возвращаются клиенту без изменения response body.
   55: 
   56: Upstream/provider failures не возвращаются клиенту как raw provider response body. Они классифицируются provider adapter layer и возвращаются как gateway-owned errors в едином JSON envelope.
   57: 
   58: Запрещено:
   59: 
   60: ```text id="9wub64"
   61: возвращать raw provider error body клиенту
   62: возвращать raw upstream 4xx body клиенту
   63: возвращать raw upstream 5xx body клиенту
   64: смешивать gateway validation error и provider error без normalized code
   65: переписывать successful upstream response body
   66: возвращать raw Go error клиенту
   67: возвращать secrets в error message
   68: возвращать stack trace клиенту
   69: раскрывать api_key_env обычному клиенту
   70: раскрывать reseller_id обычному клиенту, если это не public/debug contract
   71: ```
   72: 
   73: Разрешено:
   74: 
   75: ```text id="x8o11m"
   76: возвращать successful upstream response body без изменений
   77: добавлять Tokenio billing/debug headers к successful response
   78: использовать provider adapter classifier для выбора gateway-owned error.code
   79: логировать safe classifier metadata без raw provider error body
   80: ```
   81: 
   82: Правило:
   83: 
   84: ```text id="ax8pfl"
   85: success body passthrough applies only to successful upstream responses.
   86: provider/upstream errors are normalized by Tokenio Gateway.
   87: ```
   88: 
   89: ---
   90: 
   91: # 3. Gateway-owned error envelope
   92: 
   93: Все gateway-owned errors возвращаются так:
   94: 
   95: ```json
   96: {
   97:   "error": {
   98:     "code": "unknown_model",
   99:     "message": "Unknown model",
  100:     "request_id": "llmreq_..."
  101:   }
  102: }
  103: ```
  104: 
  105: Поля:
  106: 
  107: ```text
  108: error.code       — стабильный machine-readable код
  109: error.message    — человекочитаемое сообщение
  110: error.request_id — local request id или admin request id, если уже создан
  111: ```
  112: 
  113: ## 3.1. Required fields
  114: 
  115: `code` обязателен.
  116: 
  117: `message` обязателен.
  118: 
  119: `request_id` обязателен, если request id уже создан.
  120: 
  121: ## 3.2. Optional fields
  122: 
  123: Первая версия не добавляет дополнительные поля в public error envelope.
  124: 
  125: Будущие версии могут добавить:
  126: 
  127: ```text
  128: details
  129: param
  130: type
  131: retry_after_seconds
  132: ```
  133: 
  134: Но это должно быть отдельным contract update.
  135: 
  136: ---
  137: 
  138: # 4. Request IDs in errors
  139: 
  140: ## 4.1. Public LLM request id
  141: 
  142: Для LLM endpoints используется:
  143: 
  144: ```text
  145: local_request_id = llmreq_<random>
  146: ```
  147: 
  148: Он должен возвращаться в:
  149: 
  150: ```http
  151: X-Local-Request-ID: llmreq_...
  152: ```
  153: 
  154: И в body:
  155: 
  156: ```json
  157: {
  158:   "error": {
  159:     "request_id": "llmreq_..."
  160:   }
  161: }
  162: ```
  163: 
  164: если request id уже создан.
  165: 
  166: ## 4.2. Admin request id
  167: 
  168: Для admin endpoints используется:
  169: 
  170: ```text
  171: admin_request_id = admreq_<random>
  172: ```
  173: 
  174: Он возвращается в admin error envelope.
  175: 
  176: ## 4.3. Errors before request id
  177: 
  178: Если ошибка произошла до создания request id, `request_id` может отсутствовать.
  179: 
  180: Рекомендуемое поведение:
  181: 
  182: ```text
  183: создавать request id как можно раньше на boundary handler
  184: ```
  185: 
  186: ---
  187: 
  188: # 5. HTTP status classes
  189: 
  190: ## 5.1. 4xx
  191: 
  192: 4xx используется, если проблема вызвана request/client/account state.
  193: 
  194: Примеры:
  195: 
  196: ```text
  197: missing auth
  198: invalid API key
  199: unknown model
  200: unsupported capability
  201: invalid JSON
  202: insufficient funds
  203: idempotency conflict
  204: ```
  205: 
  206: ## 5.2. 5xx
  207: 
  208: 5xx используется, если gateway не может выполнить request из-за runtime/dependency/unavailable state.
  209: 
  210: Примеры:
  211: 
  212: ```text
  213: no available route
  214: billing service unavailable
  215: usage store unavailable
  216: pricing unavailable
  217: upstream unavailable before response
  218: internal error
  219: ```
  220: 
  221: ## 5.3. 502 vs 503
  222: 
  223: `502 Bad Gateway` используется, если конкретная dependency ответила некорректно или недоступна в момент вызова.
  224: 
  225: `503 Service Unavailable` используется, если gateway не может выбрать/использовать подходящий route или временно не готов обслужить request.
  226: 
  227: ---
  228: 
  229: # 6. Auth errors
  230: 
  231: ## 6.1. Missing Authorization
  232: 
  233: ```text
  234: HTTP 401
  235: error.code = unauthorized
  236: error.message = Authorization header is required
  237: ```
  238: 
  239: ## 6.2. Invalid Authorization format
  240: 
  241: ```text
  242: HTTP 401
  243: error.code = unauthorized
  244: error.message = Authorization header format must be Bearer {api_key}
  245: ```
  246: 
  247: ## 6.3. Invalid API key prefix
  248: 
  249: ```text
  250: HTTP 401
  251: error.code = unauthorized
  252: error.message = API key must start with sk_
  253: ```
  254: 
  255: ## 6.4. Unknown/disabled/revoked/expired API key
  256: 
  257: ```text
  258: HTTP 401
  259: error.code = invalid_api_key
  260: error.message = Invalid API key
  261: ```
  262: 
  263: Gateway не должен раскрывать, key:
  264: 
  265: ```text
  266: не найден
  267: отключён
  268: отозван
  269: истёк
  270: ```
  271: 
  272: ## 6.5. Disabled user
  273: 
  274: ```text
  275: HTTP 403
  276: error.code = user_disabled
  277: error.message = User is disabled
  278: ```
  279: 
  280: ---
  281: 
  282: # 7. Request validation errors
  283: 
  284: ## 7.1. Invalid JSON
  285: 
  286: ```text
  287: HTTP 400
  288: error.code = invalid_json
  289: error.message = Invalid JSON request body
  290: ```
  291: 
  292: ## 7.2. Request body too large
  293: 
  294: ```text
  295: HTTP 413
  296: error.code = request_body_too_large
  297: error.message = Request body is too large
  298: ```
  299: 
  300: ## 7.3. Model required
  301: 
  302: ```text
  303: HTTP 400
  304: error.code = model_required
  305: error.message = model is required
  306: ```
  307: 
  308: ## 7.4. Streaming unsupported
  309: 
  310: ```text
  311: HTTP 400
  312: error.code = streaming_unsupported
  313: error.message = Streaming is not supported
  314: ```
  315: 
  316: Gateway не должен silently downgrade streaming request.
  317: 
  318: ## 7.5. Unsupported content type
  319: 
  320: Первая версия может пытаться обработать отсутствующий `Content-Type` как JSON.
  321: 
  322: Если `Content-Type` явно несовместим:
  323: 
  324: ```text
  325: HTTP 415
  326: error.code = unsupported_content_type
  327: error.message = Content-Type must be application/json
  328: ```
  329: 
  330: ---
  331: 
  332: # 8. Routing errors
  333: 
  334: ## 8.1. Unknown model
  335: 
  336: Если route registry не содержит ни одного route для:
  337: 
  338: ```text
  339: api_family + endpoint_kind + client_model
  340: ```
  341: 
  342: ответ:
  343: 
  344: ```text
  345: HTTP 400
  346: error.code = unknown_model
  347: error.message = Unknown model
  348: ```
  349: 
  350: ## 8.2. Unsupported capability
  351: 
  352: Если model существует, но все routes исключены из-за requested capabilities:
  353: 
  354: ```text
  355: HTTP 400
  356: error.code = unsupported_capability
  357: error.message = Requested capability is not supported by this model
  358: ```
  359: 
  360: Public error не должен раскрывать internal route IDs.
  361: 
  362: ## 8.3. No route available
  363: 
  364: Если routes существуют, но все недоступны из-за cooldown, balance, limits, missing reseller API key или disabled state:
  365: 
  366: ```text
  367: HTTP 503
  368: error.code = no_route_available
  369: error.message = No route is currently available for this model
  370: ```
  371: 
  372: Public error не должен раскрывать:
  373: 
  374: ```text
  375: reseller_id
  376: api_key_env
  377: internal balance
  378: cooldown reason
  379: provider API key state
  380: ```
  381: 
  382: Admin/debug API может показывать подробности.
  383: 
  384: ## 8.4. Route unavailable during execution
  385: 
  386: Если выбранный route стал unavailable до upstream request:
  387: 
  388: ```text
  389: HTTP 503
  390: error.code = route_unavailable
  391: error.message = Selected route is unavailable
  392: ```
  393: 
  394: Если есть safe retry candidate, gateway должен попробовать следующий совместимый route вместо немедленного возврата ошибки.
  395: 
  396: ---
  397: 
  398: # 9. Balance and billing errors
  399: 
  400: ## 9.1. Insufficient funds
  401: 
  402: Если user effective balance недостаточен:
  403: 
  404: ```text
  405: HTTP 402
  406: error.code = insufficient_funds
  407: error.message = Insufficient funds
  408: ```
  409: 
  410: ## 9.2. Billing unavailable before upstream
  411: 
  412: Если billing service недоступен до upstream request, и gateway не может принять решение по cached effective balance:
  413: 
  414: ```text
  415: HTTP 502
  416: error.code = billing_unavailable
  417: error.message = Billing service is unavailable
  418: ```
  419: 
  420: Request не должен быть отправлен upstream.
  421: 
  422: ## 9.3. Billing unavailable after successful upstream
  423: 
  424: Если upstream request successful, usage committed as billable, но auto-charge failed:
  425: 
  426: ```text
  427: HTTP response status = upstream successful status
  428: response body = upstream response body unchanged
  429: X-Billing-Auto-Charge-Status: failed
  430: ```
  431: 
  432: Gateway не должен превращать successful upstream response в 502 только из-за failed auto-charge.
  433: 
  434: Usage остаётся pending в ledger.
  435: 
  436: ## 9.4. Auto-charge failed
  437: 
  438: Если auto-charge failed после billable commit:
  439: 
  440: ```text
  441: X-Billing-Auto-Charge-Status: failed
  442: ```
  443: 
  444: Это не gateway-owned response error для клиента, если upstream response successful.
  445: 
  446: Admin API должен показывать failed charge diagnostics.
  447: 
  448: ---
  449: 
  450: # 10. Pricing and usage errors
  451: 
  452: ## 10.1. Pricing unavailable before upstream
  453: 
  454: Если route price или estimator недоступен до upstream request:
  455: 
  456: ```text
  457: HTTP 503
  458: error.code = pricing_unavailable
  459: error.message = Pricing is unavailable for this request
  460: ```
  461: 
  462: Request не должен быть отправлен upstream.
  463: 
  464: ## 10.2. Usage extraction failed after upstream success
  465: 
  466: Если upstream successful, но usage extraction/pricing failed:
  467: 
  468: ```text
  469: HTTP response status = upstream successful status
  470: response body = upstream response body unchanged
  471: X-Billing-Status: pricing_failed
  472: ```
  473: 
  474: Usage record сохраняется в статусе:
  475: 
  476: ```text
  477: pricing_failed
  478: ```
  479: 
  480: Auto-charge не запускается.
  481: 
  482: Новые LLM requests пользователя блокируются до manual resolution согласно ledger policy.
  483: 
  484: ## 10.3. Unresolved usage
  485: 
  486: Если у пользователя есть unresolved `pricing_failed` records:
  487: 
  488: ```text
  489: HTTP 409
  490: error.code = unresolved_usage
  491: error.message = User has unresolved usage records
  492: ```
  493: 
  494: ---
  495: 
  496: # 11. Ledger and idempotency errors
  497: 
  498: ## 11.1. Request in progress
  499: 
  500: Если повторный request с тем же idempotency scope пришёл, когда existing record имеет статус `reserved`:
  501: 
  502: ```text
  503: HTTP 409
  504: error.code = request_in_progress
  505: error.message = Request is already in progress
  506: ```
  507: 
  508: ## 11.2. Idempotency replay not available
  509: 
  510: Если existing record уже `billable`, `partially_charged` или `charged`, но gateway первой версии не хранит full upstream response body:
  511: 
  512: ```text
  513: HTTP 409
  514: error.code = idempotency_replay_not_available
  515: error.message = Idempotency replay is not available
  516: ```
  517: 
  518: Важно:
  519: 
  520: ```text
  521: второй billable usage не создаётся
  522: повторное списание не выполняется
  523: ```
  524: 
  525: ## 11.3. Idempotency key reused
  526: 
  527: Если existing record `failed` или `released`, а policy первой версии запрещает reuse:
  528: 
  529: ```text
  530: HTTP 409
  531: error.code = idempotency_key_reused
  532: error.message = Idempotency key was already used
  533: ```
  534: 
  535: ## 11.4. Usage store error
  536: 
  537: Если Postgres недоступен до upstream request:
  538: 
  539: ```text
  540: HTTP 503
  541: error.code = usage_store_unavailable
  542: error.message = Usage store is unavailable
  543: ```
  544: 
  545: Request не должен быть отправлен upstream, если gateway не может создать local reserve.
  546: 
  547: Если Postgres недоступен после upstream success, gateway должен пытаться сохранить usage; если сохранить невозможно, это critical incident.
  548: 
  549: Policy первой версии:
  550: 
  551: ```text
  552: если ledger commit невозможен после upstream success,
  553: gateway возвращает upstream response body,
  554: добавляет X-Billing-Status: ledger_commit_failed,
  555: логирует critical error,
  556: и блокирует дальнейшую обработку до восстановления storage policy.
  557: ```
  558: 
  559: ---
  560: 
  561: # 12. Upstream/provider failures
  562: 
  563: ## 12.1. Main rule
  564: 
  565: Если upstream вернул successful response и gateway не выполняет retry:
  566: 
  567: ```text id="pu8byn"
  568: HTTP status = upstream successful status
  569: response body = upstream response body unchanged
  570: ```
  571: 
  572: Если upstream вернул error response или произошла upstream failure:
  573: 
  574: ```text id="hj3jhq"
  575: provider adapter classifies the failure
  576: gateway returns gateway-owned error envelope
  577: raw provider error body is not returned to public client
  578: ```
  579: 
  580: Gateway может добавить безопасные Tokenio headers.
  581: 
  582: ## 12.2. Upstream 4xx
  583: 
  584: Если upstream вернул deterministic 4xx, связанный с client request, и retry запрещён:
  585: 
  586: ```text id="lk6twu"
  587: HTTP 400
  588: error.code = upstream_request_error
  589: error.message = Upstream rejected the request
  590: ```
  591: 
  592: Gateway не должен возвращать raw upstream error body клиенту.
  593: 
  594: Gateway не должен превращать upstream request error в собственный validation error вроде `invalid_json` или `unknown_model`, если request уже был отправлен upstream.
  595: 
  596: ## 12.3. Upstream 401/403
  597: 
  598: Если upstream вернул auth-related 401/403 для reseller credential:
  599: 
  600: ```text id="dy54vd"
  601: adapter classifier = auth_error
  602: route cooldown reason = auth_error
  603: ```
  604: 
  605: Если есть compatible retry candidate:
  606: 
  607: ```text id="mpnjns"
  608: try next compatible route
  609: ```
  610: 
  611: Если candidates закончились:
  612: 
  613: ```text id="vtw40i"
  614: HTTP 503
  615: error.code = no_route_available
  616: ```
  617: 
  618: Public response не должен раскрывать reseller credential state, route_id, reseller_id или api_key_env.
  619: 
  620: ## 12.4. Upstream 429
  621: 
  622: Если upstream вернул 429 и есть compatible retry candidate:
  623: 
  624: ```text id="mba61g"
  625: try next compatible route
  626: ```
  627: 
  628: Если candidates закончились:
  629: 
  630: ```text id="ikggb2"
  631: HTTP 503
  632: error.code = no_route_available
  633: ```
  634: 
  635: Gateway не должен возвращать raw upstream 429 body клиенту.
  636: 
  637: ## 12.5. Upstream quota or reseller balance error
  638: 
  639: Если provider adapter классифицировал upstream response как:
  640: 
  641: ```text id="fm03gu"
  642: quota_exceeded
  643: insufficient_reseller_balance
  644: ```
  645: 
  646: gateway должен:
  647: 
  648: ```text id="8sxkut"
  649: 1. mark route cooldown according to classifier
  650: 2. try next compatible route if retry boundary allows
  651: 3. return 503 no_route_available if candidates exhausted
  652: ```
  653: 
  654: Gateway не должен возвращать raw upstream body клиенту.
  655: 
  656: ## 12.6. Upstream 5xx
  657: 
  658: Если upstream 5xx получен до response passthrough и есть compatible retry candidate:
  659: 
  660: ```text id="bd1zgz"
  661: try next compatible route
  662: ```
  663: 
  664: Если candidates закончились:
  665: 
  666: ```text id="vlgs2a"
  667: HTTP 503
  668: error.code = no_route_available
  669: ```
  670: 
  671: Gateway не должен возвращать raw upstream 5xx body клиенту.
  672: 
  673: ## 12.7. Upstream connection error before response
  674: 
  675: Если connection/DNS/TLS/timeout произошёл до response headers:
  676: 
  677: ```text id="cak642"
  678: try next compatible route if available
  679: ```
  680: 
  681: Если compatible route нет:
  682: 
  683: ```text id="12t7rn"
  684: HTTP 502
  685: error.code = upstream_unavailable
  686: error.message = Upstream is unavailable
  687: ```
  688: 
  689: ## 12.8. Unsafe retry boundary
  690: 
  691: Если есть риск, что upstream начал обработку request, retry запрещён.
  692: 
  693: Если при этом upstream failure должна быть возвращена клиенту:
  694: 
  695: ```text id="h5iad0"
  696: gateway returns gateway-owned normalized error
  697: raw provider error body is not returned
  698: ```
  699: 
  700: Если response headers already received:
  701: 
  702: ```text id="ot637u"
  703: retry forbidden
  704: ```
  705: 
  706: Если response was successful:
  707: 
  708: ```text id="c0ohdu"
  709: successful response body passthrough applies
  710: ```
  711: 
  712: Если response was error:
  713: 
  714: ```text id="b65o8s"
  715: provider error normalization applies
  716: ```
  717: 
  718: ---
  719: 
  720: # 13. Method and path errors
  721: 
  722: ## 13.1. Method not allowed
  723: 
  724: Если endpoint существует, но method неверный:
  725: 
  726: ```text
  727: HTTP 405
  728: error.code = method_not_allowed
  729: error.message = Method is not allowed
  730: ```
  731: 
  732: Response должен включать header:
  733: 
  734: ```http
  735: Allow: <allowed_methods>
  736: ```
  737: 
  738: ## 13.2. Not found
  739: 
  740: Если endpoint неизвестен:
  741: 
  742: ```text
  743: HTTP 404
  744: error.code = not_found
  745: error.message = Endpoint not found
  746: ```
  747: 
  748: ---
  749: 
  750: # 14. Admin errors
  751: 
  752: ## 14.1. Admin unauthorized
  753: 
  754: ```text
  755: HTTP 401
  756: error.code = admin_unauthorized
  757: error.message = Admin authorization is required
  758: ```
  759: 
  760: ## 14.2. Admin forbidden
  761: 
  762: ```text
  763: HTTP 403
  764: error.code = admin_forbidden
  765: error.message = Admin access denied
  766: ```
  767: 
  768: ## 14.3. Admin validation error
  769: 
  770: ```text
  771: HTTP 400
  772: error.code = admin_validation_error
  773: error.message = Invalid admin request
  774: ```
  775: 
  776: ## 14.4. Admin not found
  777: 
  778: ```text
  779: HTTP 404
  780: error.code = admin_not_found
  781: error.message = Resource not found
  782: ```
  783: 
  784: ## 14.5. Admin conflict
  785: 
  786: ```text
  787: HTTP 409
  788: error.code = admin_conflict
  789: error.message = Resource conflict
  790: ```
  791: 
  792: ## 14.6. Admin state conflict
  793: 
  794: ```text
  795: HTTP 409
  796: error.code = admin_state_conflict
  797: error.message = Resource is in incompatible state
  798: ```
  799: 
  800: ## 14.7. Admin secret not available
  801: 
  802: Если admin API проверяет env presence для reseller credential:
  803: 
  804: ```text
  805: HTTP 409
  806: error.code = admin_secret_not_available
  807: error.message = Required secret is not available in environment
  808: ```
  809: 
  810: Error не должен раскрывать secret value.
  811: 
  812: ---
  813: 
  814: # 15. Internal errors
  815: 
  816: ## 15.1. Internal error
  817: 
  818: Для непредвиденной ошибки gateway:
  819: 
  820: ```text
  821: HTTP 500
  822: error.code = internal_error
  823: error.message = Internal error
  824: ```
  825: 
  826: Public response не должен содержать:
  827: 
  828: ```text
  829: panic message
  830: stack trace
  831: SQL query with secrets
  832: raw upstream credentials
  833: raw request body
  834: ```
  835: 
  836: ## 15.2. Store unavailable
  837: 
  838: Если Postgres недоступен до upstream request:
  839: 
  840: ```text
  841: HTTP 503
  842: error.code = store_unavailable
  843: error.message = Store is unavailable
  844: ```
  845: 
  846: ## 15.3. Configuration error
  847: 
  848: Runtime configuration errors should fail fast at startup when possible.
  849: 
  850: Если ошибка конфигурации обнаружена во время request:
  851: 
  852: ```text
  853: HTTP 500
  854: error.code = configuration_error
  855: error.message = Gateway configuration error
  856: ```
  857: 
  858: ---
  859: 
  860: # 16. Retry-After
  861: 
  862: Gateway может возвращать:
  863: 
  864: ```http
  865: Retry-After: <seconds>
  866: ```
  867: 
  868: Для:
  869: 
  870: ```text
  871: no_route_available
  872: billing_unavailable
  873: upstream_unavailable
  874: store_unavailable
  875: ```
  876: 
  877: `Retry-After` не обязателен в первой версии.
  878: 
  879: Если retry delay известен из cooldown или upstream header, gateway может использовать safe rounded value.
  880: 
  881: ---
  882: 
  883: # 17. Headers on errors
  884: 
  885: Gateway-owned error response должен включать:
  886: 
  887: ```http
  888: Content-Type: application/json
  889: X-Local-Request-ID: llmreq_...
  890: ```
  891: 
  892: если local request id создан.
  893: 
  894: Admin error response должен включать:
  895: 
  896: ```http
  897: Content-Type: application/json
  898: X-Admin-Request-ID: admreq_...
  899: ```
  900: 
  901: если admin request id создан.
  902: 
  903: ---
  904: 
  905: # 18. Secrets policy
  906: 
  907: Error response никогда не должен содержать:
  908: 
  909: ```text
  910: raw user API key
  911: encrypted provisioning raw key
  912: provisioning encryption nonce
  913: provisioning encryption key
  914: provisioning service token
  915: key_hash
  916: billing JWT
  917: billing signing key
  918: billing service token
  919: reseller API key
  920: admin token
  921: Authorization header
  922: X-Service-Token header
  923: raw env secret value
  924: stack trace
  925: ```
  926: 
  927: Public client error response также не должен содержать:
  928: 
  929: ```text
  930: api_key_env
  931: reseller_id
  932: route_id
  933: internal balance
  934: provider credential state
  935: SQL details
  936: ```
  937: 
  938: Admin API может показывать:
  939: 
  940: ```text
  941: route_id
  942: reseller_id
  943: api_key_env
  944: api_key_env_present
  945: cooldown_reason
  946: last_error_code
  947: ```
  948: 
  949: Но не secret values.
  950: 
  951: ---
  952: 
  953: # 19. Logging
  954: 
  955: ## 19.1. Log allowed fields
  956: 
  957: Gateway может логировать:
  958: 
  959: ```text
  960: request_id
  961: user_id
  962: api_key_id
  963: api_family
  964: endpoint_kind
  965: client_model
  966: provider_type
  967: selected_route_id
  968: selected_reseller_id
  969: error_code
  970: http_status
  971: usage_status
  972: billing_charge_request_id
  973: duration_ms
  974: ```
  975: 
  976: ## 19.2. Log forbidden fields
  977: 
  978: Gateway не должен логировать:
  979: 
  980: ```text
  981: raw API keys
  982: Authorization header
  983: billing JWT
  984: billing service token
  985: reseller API key
  986: admin token
  987: full request body by default
  988: full response body by default
  989: ```
  990: 
  991: ## 19.3. Upstream error body logging
  992: 
  993: Upstream error body может содержать sensitive data.
  994: 
  995: Default policy:
  996: 
  997: ```text
  998: do not log full upstream error body
  999: ```
 1000: 
 1001: Разрешено логировать:
 1002: 
 1003: ```text
 1004: upstream status code
 1005: provider_type
 1006: route_id
 1007: safe error classifier code
 1008: body length
 1009: body hash
 1010: ```
 1011: 
 1012: ---
 1013: 
 1014: # 20. Public error code registry
 1015: 
 1016: Public LLM API error codes первой версии:
 1017: 
 1018: ```text
 1019: unauthorized
 1020: invalid_api_key
 1021: user_disabled
 1022: 
 1023: invalid_json
 1024: request_body_too_large
 1025: unsupported_content_type
 1026: model_required
 1027: streaming_unsupported
 1028: 
 1029: unknown_model
 1030: unsupported_capability
 1031: no_route_available
 1032: route_unavailable
 1033: 
 1034: insufficient_funds
 1035: billing_unavailable
 1036: 
 1037: pricing_unavailable
 1038: unresolved_usage
 1039: 
 1040: request_in_progress
 1041: idempotency_replay_not_available
 1042: idempotency_key_reused
 1043: 
 1044: usage_store_unavailable
 1045: store_unavailable
 1046: upstream_request_error
 1047: upstream_unavailable
 1048: configuration_error
 1049: method_not_allowed
 1050: not_found
 1051: internal_error
 1052: ```
 1053: 
 1054: ---
 1055: 
 1056: # 21. Admin error code registry
 1057: 
 1058: Admin API error codes первой версии:
 1059: 
 1060: ```text
 1061: admin_unauthorized
 1062: admin_forbidden
 1063: admin_validation_error
 1064: admin_not_found
 1065: admin_conflict
 1066: admin_state_conflict
 1067: admin_secret_not_available
 1068: 
 1069: invalid_json
 1070: request_body_too_large
 1071: method_not_allowed
 1072: not_found
 1073: store_unavailable
 1074: internal_error
 1075: ```
 1076: 
 1077: ---
 1078: 
 1079: # 22. Status mapping table
 1080: 
 1081: ```text
 1082: unauthorized                          -> 401
 1083: invalid_api_key                       -> 401
 1084: user_disabled                         -> 403
 1085: 
 1086: invalid_json                          -> 400
 1087: request_body_too_large                -> 413
 1088: unsupported_content_type              -> 415
 1089: model_required                        -> 400
 1090: streaming_unsupported                 -> 400
 1091: 
 1092: unknown_model                         -> 400
 1093: unsupported_capability                -> 400
 1094: no_route_available                    -> 503
 1095: route_unavailable                     -> 503
 1096: 
 1097: insufficient_funds                    -> 402
 1098: billing_unavailable                   -> 502
 1099: 
 1100: pricing_unavailable                   -> 503
 1101: unresolved_usage                      -> 409
 1102: 
 1103: request_in_progress                   -> 409
 1104: idempotency_replay_not_available      -> 409
 1105: idempotency_key_reused                -> 409
 1106: 
 1107: usage_store_unavailable               -> 503
 1108: store_unavailable                     -> 503
 1109: upstream_request_error                -> 400
 1110: upstream_unavailable                  -> 502
 1111: configuration_error                   -> 500
 1112: method_not_allowed                    -> 405
 1113: not_found                             -> 404
 1114: internal_error                        -> 500
 1115: 
 1116: provisioning_unauthorized             -> 401
 1117: provisioning_invalid_request           -> 400
 1118: provisioning_conflict                  -> 409
 1119: provisioning_expired                   -> 410
 1120: provisioning_store_unavailable         -> 503
 1121: provisioning_crypto_unavailable        -> 500
 1122: 
 1123: admin_unauthorized                    -> 401
 1124: admin_forbidden                       -> 403
 1125: admin_validation_error                -> 400
 1126: admin_not_found                       -> 404
 1127: admin_conflict                        -> 409
 1128: admin_state_conflict                  -> 409
 1129: admin_secret_not_available            -> 409
 1130: ```
 1131: 
 1132: ---
 1133: 
 1134: # 23. Internal API key provisioning errors
 1135: 
 1136: Provisioning API является internal service API и использует тот же gateway-owned error envelope.
 1137: 
 1138: ## 23.1. Unauthorized provisioning caller
 1139: 
 1140: ```text
 1141: HTTP 401
 1142: error.code = provisioning_unauthorized
 1143: error.message = Provisioning authorization failed
 1144: ```
 1145: 
 1146: Response не различает missing и invalid service token.
 1147: 
 1148: ## 23.2. Invalid provisioning request
 1149: 
 1150: ```text
 1151: HTTP 400
 1152: error.code = provisioning_invalid_request
 1153: error.message = Invalid provisioning request
 1154: ```
 1155: 
 1156: Используется для missing/invalid:
 1157: 
 1158: ```text
 1159: Idempotency-Key
 1160: external_billing_user_id
 1161: source_reference
 1162: ```
 1163: 
 1164: ## 23.3. Provisioning conflict
 1165: 
 1166: Если same `Idempotency-Key` повторён с другим normalized identity/source input:
 1167: 
 1168: ```text
 1169: HTTP 409
 1170: error.code = provisioning_conflict
 1171: error.message = Provisioning request conflicts with existing state
 1172: ```
 1173: 
 1174: ## 23.4. Provisioning expired
 1175: 
 1176: Если provisioning delivery window expired:
 1177: 
 1178: ```text
 1179: HTTP 410
 1180: error.code = provisioning_expired
 1181: error.message = Provisioning delivery window has expired
 1182: ```
 1183: 
 1184: Raw key не возвращается.
 1185: 
 1186: ## 23.5. Provisioning store unavailable
 1187: 
 1188: Если transaction/state store недоступен:
 1189: 
 1190: ```text
 1191: HTTP 503
 1192: error.code = provisioning_store_unavailable
 1193: error.message = Provisioning store is unavailable
 1194: ```
 1195: 
 1196: Новый raw key не возвращается как successful result без committed state.
 1197: 
 1198: ## 23.6. Provisioning crypto unavailable
 1199: 
 1200: Если encryption key invalid, AEAD initialization failed или encrypted state нельзя безопасно расшифровать:
 1201: 
 1202: ```text
 1203: HTTP 500
 1204: error.code = provisioning_crypto_unavailable
 1205: error.message = Provisioning encryption is unavailable
 1206: ```
 1207: 
 1208: Response не содержит crypto details, ciphertext, nonce или key version secret value.
 1209: 
 1210: ## 23.7. Registry
 1211: 
 1212: ```text
 1213: provisioning_unauthorized
 1214: provisioning_invalid_request
 1215: provisioning_conflict
 1216: provisioning_expired
 1217: provisioning_store_unavailable
 1218: provisioning_crypto_unavailable
 1219: ```
 1220: 
 1221: Detailed flow:
 1222: 
 1223: ```text
 1224: docs/spec/021-api-key-provisioning.ru.md
 1225: ```
 1226: 
 1227: # 24. Provider adapter error classifier
 1228: 
 1229: Provider-specific error parsing живёт в provider adapter layer.
 1230: 
 1231: Adapter возвращает normalized classifier:
 1232: 
 1233: ```text
 1234: rate_limit
 1235: quota_exceeded
 1236: insufficient_reseller_balance
 1237: auth_error
 1238: provider_5xx
 1239: timeout
 1240: connection_error
 1241: client_request_error
 1242: unknown_upstream_error
 1243: ```
 1244: 
 1245: Generic runtime использует classifier для:
 1246: 
 1247: ```text
 1248: retry decision
 1249: cooldown reason
 1250: route event
 1251: public error mapping
 1252: ```
 1253: 
 1254: Generic runtime не должен парсить provider-specific JSON schemas.
 1255: 
 1256: ---
 1257: 
 1258: # 25. Acceptance criteria
 1259: 
 1260: Error model считается реализованным, если:
 1261: 
 1262: ```text
 1263: 1. Все gateway-owned errors используют единый JSON envelope.
 1264: 2. Все gateway-owned errors имеют stable error.code.
 1265: 3. request_id возвращается, если уже создан.
 1266: 4. Auth errors не раскрывают детали key state.
 1267: 5. Routing errors не раскрывают reseller secrets.
 1268: 6. Billing unavailable before upstream возвращает gateway-owned error.
 1269: 7. Billing failure after successful upstream не ломает upstream response.
 1270: 8. Upstream successful response body не изменяется.
 1271: 9. Upstream/provider failures нормализуются в gateway-owned error envelope и не возвращают raw provider body.
 1272: 10. Retryable upstream failures классифицируются adapter layer.
 1273: 11. Provider-specific parsing не находится в generic error writer.
 1274: 12. Public errors не содержат secrets.
 1275: 13. Admin errors используют отдельные admin_* codes.
 1276: 14. Method not allowed возвращает 405 и Allow header.
 1277: 15. Tests покрывают auth, validation, routing, billing, pricing, ledger, upstream passthrough и secrets policy.
 1278: 16. Provisioning errors не раскрывают raw/encrypted API key material.
 1279: ```

====================================================================================================
FILE: docs/spec/090-configuration.ru.md
GIT_BLOB_SHA: 11ae25ef6bd735fba67d45aa7a30085624060b16
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: # 090. Configuration
    2: 
    3: Версия: 0.1
    4: Статус: draft
    5: Язык: русский
    6: Проект: `github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway`
    7: 
    8: ---
    9: 
   10: # 1. Назначение документа
   11: 
   12: Этот документ описывает runtime configuration Tokenio Gateway.
   13: 
   14: Документ фиксирует:
   15: 
   16: ```text
   17: environment variables
   18: required config
   19: optional config
   20: defaults
   21: startup validation
   22: secret handling
   23: timeouts
   24: limits
   25: cooldowns
   26: billing config
   27: pricing config
   28: admin config
   29: API key provisioning config
   30: Telegram alerts config
   31: provider/reseller secret loading policy
   32: ```
   33: 
   34: Документ не описывает:
   35: 
   36: ```text
   37: public HTTP API
   38: admin endpoint contracts
   39: SQL schema
   40: route selection algorithm
   41: pricing formula
   42: ledger state machine
   43: provider adapter implementation
   44: ```
   45: 
   46: Эти темы описываются в отдельных спецификациях.
   47: 
   48: ---
   49: 
   50: # 2. Главный configuration invariant
   51: 
   52: Tokenio Gateway должен загружать и валидировать configuration на старте.
   53: 
   54: Если required config отсутствует или invalid:
   55: 
   56: ```text
   57: process must fail fast at startup
   58: ```
   59: 
   60: Запрещено:
   61: 
   62: ```text
   63: молча использовать пустой DATABASE_DSN
   64: молча использовать пустой billing service token
   65: молча использовать пустой admin token
   66: молча использовать invalid currency
   67: читать env напрямую внутри business logic
   68: читать env напрямую внутри HTTP handlers
   69: хранить raw secrets в Postgres
   70: логировать secret values
   71: ```
   72: 
   73: Разрешено:
   74: 
   75: ```text
   76: читать env только в config/bootstrap layer
   77: передавать typed config в runtime services
   78: читать reseller API key по api_key_env через dedicated secret resolver
   79: ```
   80: 
   81: ---
   82: 
   83: # 3. Config loading boundary
   84: 
   85: ## 3.1. Config package
   86: 
   87: Единая точка загрузки config:
   88: 
   89: ```text
   90: internal/config
   91: ```
   92: 
   93: Config package отвечает за:
   94: 
   95: ```text
   96: чтение env
   97: trim spaces
   98: parsing int/float/duration/bool
   99: defaults
  100: required validation
  101: startup errors
  102: typed Config struct
  103: ```
  104: 
  105: Config package не отвечает за:
  106: 
  107: ```text
  108: route selection
  109: billing calls
  110: pricing calculation
  111: HTTP response writing
  112: provider-specific behavior
  113: ```
  114: 
  115: ## 3.2. Direct os.Getenv policy
  116: 
  117: `os.Getenv` разрешён только в:
  118: 
  119: ```text
  120: 1. config/bootstrap layer
  121: 2. dedicated reseller secret resolver
  122: 3. admin diagnostic check api_key_env_present
  123: ```
  124: 
  125: Запрещено читать env напрямую в:
  126: 
  127: ```text
  128: HTTP handlers
  129: route selector
  130: pricing calculator
  131: ledger service
  132: billing client business logic
  133: provider adapter business logic
  134: ```
  135: 
  136: Provider adapter получает уже resolved credential или explicit error.
  137: 
  138: ---
  139: 
  140: # 4. Required config
  141: 
  142: ## 4.1. Core runtime
  143: 
  144: Обязательные переменные:
  145: 
  146: ```text
  147: TOKENIO_DATABASE_DSN
  148: TOKENIO_BILLING_BASE_URL
  149: TOKENIO_BILLING_SERVICE_TOKEN
  150: TOKENIO_BILLING_JWT_SIGNING_KEY
  151: TOKENIO_ADMIN_TOKEN
  152: ```
  153: 
  154: Если любая из них отсутствует или пустая:
  155: 
  156: ```text
  157: startup error
  158: ```
  159: 
  160: ## 4.2. Required for production
  161: 
  162: Production deployment должен задавать:
  163: 
  164: ```text
  165: TOKENIO_GATEWAY_ADDR
  166: TOKENIO_DATABASE_DSN
  167: TOKENIO_BILLING_BASE_URL
  168: TOKENIO_BILLING_SERVICE_TOKEN
  169: TOKENIO_BILLING_JWT_SIGNING_KEY
  170: TOKENIO_ADMIN_TOKEN
  171: TOKENIO_API_KEY_HASH_SECRET
  172: TOKENIO_PROVISIONING_SERVICE_TOKEN
  173: TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_ENCRYPTION_KEY
  174: ```
  175: 
  176: `TOKENIO_API_KEY_HASH_SECRET` обязателен для API key hashing во всех runtime environments, кроме специально изолированных unit tests без persisted keys.
  177: 
  178: ---
  179: 
  180: # 5. Optional config with defaults
  181: 
  182: ## 5.1. Gateway
  183: 
  184: ```text
  185: TOKENIO_GATEWAY_ADDR
  186: ```
  187: 
  188: Default:
  189: 
  190: ```text
  191: :8880
  192: ```
  193: 
  194: Validation:
  195: 
  196: ```text
  197: must be non-empty
  198: ```
  199: 
  200: ---
  201: 
  202: ## 5.2. Currency
  203: 
  204: ```text
  205: TOKENIO_COST_CURRENCY
  206: ```
  207: 
  208: Default:
  209: 
  210: ```text
  211: RUB
  212: ```
  213: 
  214: Allowed values first version:
  215: 
  216: ```text
  217: RUB
  218: ```
  219: 
  220: If value is not `RUB`:
  221: 
  222: ```text
  223: startup error
  224: ```
  225: 
  226: ---
  227: 
  228: ## 5.3. Request body limit
  229: 
  230: ```text
  231: TOKENIO_REQUEST_BODY_MAX_BYTES
  232: ```
  233: 
  234: Default:
  235: 
  236: ```text
  237: 67108864
  238: ```
  239: 
  240: Meaning:
  241: 
  242: ```text
  243: 64 MiB
  244: ```
  245: 
  246: Validation:
  247: 
  248: ```text
  249: must be positive
  250: ```
  251: 
  252: If request body exceeds limit:
  253: 
  254: ```text
  255: HTTP 413
  256: error.code = request_body_too_large
  257: ```
  258: 
  259: ## 5.4. Upstream response body limit
  260: 
  261: ```text
  262: TOKENIO_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE_BODY_MAX_BYTES
  263: ```
  264: 
  265: Default:
  266: 
  267: ```text
  268: 67108864
  269: ```
  270: 
  271: Meaning:
  272: 
  273: ```text
  274: 64 MiB maximum buffered upstream response body
  275: ```
  276: 
  277: Validation:
  278: 
  279: ```text
  280: must be positive
  281: ```
  282: 
  283: The value is passed as typed configuration to the forwarding
  284: adapter factory. Provider adapters must not read this environment
  285: variable directly.
  286: 
  287: ## 5.5. API-key last-used timeout
  288: 
  289: ```text
  290: TOKENIO_API_KEY_LAST_USED_TIMEOUT
  291: ```
  292: 
  293: Default:
  294: 
  295: ```text
  296: 250ms
  297: ```
  298: 
  299: Meaning:
  300: 
  301: ```text
  302: maximum synchronous best-effort persistence time
  303: for API-key last_used_at after successful authentication
  304: ```
  305: 
  306: Validation:
  307: 
  308: ```text
  309: must be positive duration
  310: ```
  311: 
  312: Этот timeout не является public authentication timeout и не меняет
  313: результат уже успешной authentication. Он ограничивает только
  314: secondary usage-recording mutation.
  315: 
  316: ---
  317: 
  318: # 6. Billing config
  319: 
  320: ## 6.1. Billing base URL
  321: 
  322: ```text
  323: TOKENIO_BILLING_BASE_URL
  324: ```
  325: 
  326: Required.
  327: 
  328: Validation:
  329: 
  330: ```text
  331: must be non-empty
  332: must be valid URL
  333: must not end with whitespace
  334: ```
  335: 
  336: Trailing slash may be trimmed by config loader.
  337: 
  338: ## 6.2. Billing service token
  339: 
  340: ```text
  341: TOKENIO_BILLING_SERVICE_TOKEN
  342: ```
  343: 
  344: Required.
  345: 
  346: Used only for:
  347: 
  348: ```text
  349: POST /api/v1/usage/charge
  350: X-Service-Token: <TOKENIO_BILLING_SERVICE_TOKEN>
  351: ```
  352: 
  353: Forbidden:
  354: 
  355: ```text
  356: returning this value through API
  357: logging this value
  358: storing this value in Postgres
  359: using this as public client auth
  360: ```
  361: 
  362: ## 6.3. Billing JWT signing key
  363: 
  364: ```text
  365: TOKENIO_BILLING_JWT_SIGNING_KEY
  366: ```
  367: 
  368: Required.
  369: 
  370: Used for signing internal billing JWT.
  371: 
  372: Forbidden:
  373: 
  374: ```text
  375: logging value
  376: returning value through admin API
  377: storing value in Postgres
  378: ```
  379: 
  380: ## 6.4. Billing JWT TTL
  381: 
  382: ```text
  383: TOKENIO_BILLING_JWT_TTL
  384: ```
  385: 
  386: Default:
  387: 
  388: ```text
  389: 15m
  390: ```
  391: 
  392: Validation:
  393: 
  394: ```text
  395: must be positive duration
  396: recommended <= 1h
  397: ```
  398: 
  399: ## 6.5. Billing timeout
  400: 
  401: ```text
  402: TOKENIO_BILLING_TIMEOUT
  403: ```
  404: 
  405: Default:
  406: 
  407: ```text
  408: 30s
  409: ```
  410: 
  411: Validation:
  412: 
  413: ```text
  414: must be positive duration
  415: ```
  416: 
  417: ---
  418: 
  419: # 7. Auto-charge config
  420: 
  421: ## 7.1. Auto-charge threshold
  422: 
  423: ```text
  424: TOKENIO_AUTO_CHARGE_THRESHOLD_CENTS
  425: ```
  426: 
  427: Default:
  428: 
  429: ```text
  430: 1000
  431: ```
  432: 
  433: Meaning:
  434: 
  435: ```text
  436: auto-charge starts when pending billable amount >= threshold
  437: ```
  438: 
  439: Validation:
  440: 
  441: ```text
  442: must be positive
  443: ```
  444: 
  445: ## 7.2. Minimum charge amount
  446: 
  447: ```text
  448: TOKENIO_MIN_CHARGE_AMOUNT_CENTS
  449: ```
  450: 
  451: Default:
  452: 
  453: ```text
  454: 100
  455: ```
  456: 
  457: Validation:
  458: 
  459: ```text
  460: must be >= 0
  461: ```
  462: 
  463: If pending amount is below minimum, auto-charge may be deferred.
  464: 
  465: ## 7.3. Minimum request balance
  466: 
  467: ```text
  468: TOKENIO_MIN_REQUEST_BALANCE_CENTS
  469: ```
  470: 
  471: Default:
  472: 
  473: ```text
  474: 500
  475: ```
  476: 
  477: Validation:
  478: 
  479: ```text
  480: must be >= 0
  481: ```
  482: 
  483: A request can pass preflight only if:
  484: 
  485: ```text
  486: effective_balance_cents >= estimated_client_amount_cents
  487: AND effective_balance_cents >= TOKENIO_MIN_REQUEST_BALANCE_CENTS
  488: ```
  489: 
  490: ---
  491: 
  492: # 8. Pricing estimation config
  493: 
  494: ## 8.1. Token estimation safety factor
  495: 
  496: ```text
  497: TOKENIO_TOKEN_ESTIMATION_SAFETY_FACTOR
  498: ```
  499: 
  500: Default:
  501: 
  502: ```text
  503: 1.25
  504: ```
  505: 
  506: Validation:
  507: 
  508: ```text
  509: must be >= 1
  510: ```
  511: 
  512: Used for conservative local token estimation.
  513: 
  514: ## 8.2. Cost estimation safety factor
  515: 
  516: ```text
  517: TOKENIO_COST_ESTIMATION_SAFETY_FACTOR
  518: ```
  519: 
  520: Default:
  521: 
  522: ```text
  523: 1.10
  524: ```
  525: 
  526: Validation:
  527: 
  528: ```text
  529: must be >= 1
  530: ```
  531: 
  532: Used for preflight cost estimation.
  533: 
  534: ## 8.3. Estimation invariant
  535: 
  536: Safety factors are applied only to estimation.
  537: 
  538: Actual committed usage should use actual provider usage when available.
  539: 
  540: Estimator must not mutate request body; forwarding may only apply explicit model identifier rewrite according to route `model_rewrite_policy`.
  541: 
  542: ---
  543: 
  544: # 9. Upstream config
  545: 
  546: ## 9.1. Upstream timeout
  547: 
  548: ```text
  549: TOKENIO_UPSTREAM_TIMEOUT
  550: ```
  551: 
  552: Default:
  553: 
  554: ```text
  555: 90s
  556: ```
  557: 
  558: Validation:
  559: 
  560: ```text
  561: must be positive duration
  562: ```
  563: 
  564: ## 9.2. Upstream retry policy
  565: 
  566: Global defaults may exist, but final retry decision is route/provider aware.
  567: 
  568: Recommended config:
  569: 
  570: ```text
  571: TOKENIO_UPSTREAM_MAX_ATTEMPTS
  572: TOKENIO_UPSTREAM_MAX_BACKOFF
  573: ```
  574: 
  575: Defaults:
  576: 
  577: ```text
  578: TOKENIO_UPSTREAM_MAX_ATTEMPTS=3
  579: TOKENIO_UPSTREAM_MAX_BACKOFF=2s
  580: ```
  581: 
  582: Validation:
  583: 
  584: ```text
  585: max attempts >= 1
  586: max backoff > 0
  587: ```
  588: 
  589: Retry is allowed only if routing/retry boundary permits it.
  590: 
  591: ---
  592: 
  593: # 10. Route cooldown config
  594: 
  595: ## 10.1. Rate limit cooldown
  596: 
  597: ```text
  598: TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_RATE_LIMIT
  599: ```
  600: 
  601: Default:
  602: 
  603: ```text
  604: 60s
  605: ```
  606: 
  607: ## 10.2. Quota exceeded cooldown
  608: 
  609: ```text
  610: TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
  611: ```
  612: 
  613: Default:
  614: 
  615: ```text
  616: 24h
  617: ```
  618: 
  619: ## 10.3. Provider 5xx cooldown
  620: 
  621: ```text
  622: TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_5XX
  623: ```
  624: 
  625: Default:
  626: 
  627: ```text
  628: 30s
  629: ```
  630: 
  631: ## 10.4. Timeout cooldown
  632: 
  633: ```text
  634: TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_TIMEOUT
  635: ```
  636: 
  637: Default:
  638: 
  639: ```text
  640: 30s
  641: ```
  642: 
  643: ## 10.5. Auth error cooldown
  644: 
  645: ```text
  646: TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_AUTH_ERROR
  647: ```
  648: 
  649: Default:
  650: 
  651: ```text
  652: 24h
  653: ```
  654: 
  655: ## 10.6. Validation
  656: 
  657: All cooldown values:
  658: 
  659: ```text
  660: must be positive duration
  661: ```
  662: 
  663: Zero cooldown is forbidden unless explicitly supported by a test/dev mode.
  664: 
  665: ---
  666: 
  667: # 11. Rate limiter config
  668: 
  669: Route-level limits are stored in Postgres:
  670: 
  671: ```text
  672: requests_per_minute
  673: tokens_per_minute
  674: concurrent_requests
  675: ```
  676: 
  677: Global limiter config may define default waiting behavior:
  678: 
  679: ```text
  680: TOKENIO_RATE_LIMIT_MAX_WAIT
  681: ```
  682: 
  683: Default:
  684: 
  685: ```text
  686: 5s
  687: ```
  688: 
  689: Validation:
  690: 
  691: ```text
  692: must be positive duration
  693: ```
  694: 
  695: For first version:
  696: 
  697: ```text
  698: single instance
  699: ```
  700: 
  701: Therefore in-memory route limiter is acceptable.
  702: 
  703: Postgres remains source of truth for route metadata and reseller balance.
  704: 
  705: ---
  706: 
  707: # 12. Admin config
  708: 
  709: ## 12.1. Admin token
  710: 
  711: ```text
  712: TOKENIO_ADMIN_TOKEN
  713: ```
  714: 
  715: Required.
  716: 
  717: Used for:
  718: 
  719: ```http
  720: Authorization: Bearer <TOKENIO_ADMIN_TOKEN>
  721: ```
  722: 
  723: on:
  724: 
  725: ```text
  726: /admin/v1/*
  727: ```
  728: 
  729: Forbidden:
  730: 
  731: ```text
  732: logging value
  733: returning value through API
  734: storing value in Postgres
  735: accepting user API key as admin auth
  736: ```
  737: 
  738: ## 12.2. Admin token minimum length
  739: 
  740: Recommended validation:
  741: 
  742: ```text
  743: length >= 32 characters
  744: ```
  745: 
  746: If shorter in production:
  747: 
  748: ```text
  749: startup error
  750: ```
  751: 
  752: In local dev, short token may be allowed only if explicit dev mode is introduced.
  753: 
  754: No implicit dev fallback.
  755: 
  756: ---
  757: 
  758: # 13. API key hashing config
  759: 
  760: ## 13.1. HMAC secret
  761: 
  762: ```text
  763: TOKENIO_API_KEY_HASH_SECRET
  764: ```
  765: 
  766: Required for runtime API key hashing.
  767: 
  768: API key hash:
  769: 
  770: ```text
  771: HMAC-SHA256(TOKENIO_API_KEY_HASH_SECRET, raw_api_key)
  772: ```
  773: 
  774: SHA-256 without secret is forbidden as runtime fallback.
  775: 
  776: ## 13.2. No silent downgrade
  777: 
  778: Missing `TOKENIO_API_KEY_HASH_SECRET` must be startup error for any runtime mode that validates persisted API keys.
  779: 
  780: Only isolated unit tests may use an explicit test hasher that does not read production env.
  781: 
  782: Environment mode must be explicit if used.
  783: 
  784: ---
  785: 
  786: # 14. Environment mode
  787: 
  788: ## 14.1. Optional env mode
  789: 
  790: Optional config:
  791: 
  792: ```text
  793: TOKENIO_ENV
  794: ```
  795: 
  796: Allowed values:
  797: 
  798: ```text
  799: production
  800: development
  801: test
  802: ```
  803: 
  804: Default:
  805: 
  806: ```text
  807: production
  808: ```
  809: 
  810: ## 14.2. Production behavior
  811: 
  812: In production:
  813: 
  814: ```text
  815: strict startup validation
  816: TOKENIO_API_KEY_HASH_SECRET required
  817: admin token minimum length enforced
  818: no debug response bodies
  819: no full request/response logging
  820: ```
  821: 
  822: ## 14.3. Development behavior
  823: 
  824: Development mode may allow:
  825: 
  826: ```text
  827: shorter admin token
  828: local database DSN
  829: verbose logs without secrets
  830: ```
  831: 
  832: Development mode must not allow:
  833: 
  834: ```text
  835: logging secrets
  836: storing raw API keys
  837: public /billing/flush
  838: fallback between API families
  839: ```
  840: 
  841: ---
  842: 
  843: # 15. Telegram alert config
  844: 
  845: ## 15.1. Telegram bot token
  846: 
  847: ```text
  848: TOKENIO_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
  849: ```
  850: 
  851: Optional.
  852: 
  853: If absent:
  854: 
  855: ```text
  856: Telegram alerts disabled
  857: ```
  858: 
  859: ## 15.2. Telegram chat id
  860: 
  861: ```text
  862: TOKENIO_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID
  863: ```
  864: 
  865: Optional.
  866: 
  867: If bot token is set but chat id is missing:
  868: 
  869: ```text
  870: startup error
  871: ```
  872: 
  873: or:
  874: 
  875: ```text
  876: alerts disabled with explicit warning
  877: ```
  878: 
  879: Decision first version:
  880: 
  881: ```text
  882: if one of TOKENIO_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN or TOKENIO_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID is set, both are required
  883: ```
  884: 
  885: ## 15.3. Reseller balance alert threshold
  886: 
  887: ```text
  888: TOKENIO_RESELLER_BALANCE_ALERT_CENTS
  889: ```
  890: 
  891: Default:
  892: 
  893: ```text
  894: 10000
  895: ```
  896: 
  897: Validation:
  898: 
  899: ```text
  900: must be >= 0
  901: ```
  902: 
  903: ## 15.4. Alert dedup interval
  904: 
  905: ```text
  906: TOKENIO_TELEGRAM_ALERT_DEDUPE_INTERVAL
  907: ```
  908: 
  909: Default:
  910: 
  911: ```text
  912: 1h
  913: ```
  914: 
  915: Validation:
  916: 
  917: ```text
  918: must be positive duration
  919: ```
  920: 
  921: ---
  922: 
  923: # 16. Reseller secret config
  924: 
  925: ## 16.1. Reseller API keys
  926: 
  927: Reseller API keys are not declared as fixed config keys.
  928: 
  929: They are referenced dynamically by:
  930: 
  931: ```text
  932: tokenio_resellers.api_key_env
  933: ```
  934: 
  935: Example:
  936: 
  937: ```text
  938: api_key_env = OPENROUTER_PRIMARY_API_KEY
  939: ```
  940: 
  941: The gateway resolves:
  942: 
  943: ```text
  944: os.Getenv(api_key_env)
  945: ```
  946: 
  947: through a dedicated secret resolver.
  948: 
  949: ## 16.2. Missing reseller secret
  950: 
  951: If `api_key_env` is missing or empty:
  952: 
  953: ```text
  954: routes for that reseller are unavailable
  955: ```
  956: 
  957: Public client error:
  958: 
  959: ```text
  960: HTTP 503
  961: error.code = no_route_available
  962: ```
  963: 
  964: Admin API may show:
  965: 
  966: ```json
  967: {
  968:   "api_key_env": "OPENROUTER_PRIMARY_API_KEY",
  969:   "api_key_env_present": false
  970: }
  971: ```
  972: 
  973: Admin API must not show the secret value.
  974: 
  975: ---
  976: 
  977: # 17. Database config
  978: 
  979: ## 17.1. DSN
  980: 
  981: ```text
  982: TOKENIO_DATABASE_DSN
  983: ```
  984: 
  985: Required.
  986: 
  987: Used for Postgres.
  988: 
  989: Validation:
  990: 
  991: ```text
  992: must be non-empty
  993: must connect successfully at startup, unless migrations-only command explicitly says otherwise
  994: ```
  995: 
  996: ## 17.2. Startup DB check
  997: 
  998: Gateway should fail startup if:
  999: 
 1000: ```text
 1001: database unavailable
 1002: required migrations not applied
 1003: schema version incompatible
 1004: ```
 1005: 
 1006: ## 17.3. Migrations config
 1007: 
 1008: Recommended optional config:
 1009: 
 1010: ```text
 1011: TOKENIO_MIGRATIONS_DIR
 1012: ```
 1013: 
 1014: Default:
 1015: 
 1016: ```text
 1017: db/migrations
 1018: ```
 1019: 
 1020: Gateway runtime should not silently run destructive migrations.
 1021: 
 1022: Migration execution should be explicit command or controlled startup mode.
 1023: 
 1024: ---
 1025: 
 1026: # 18. HTTP server config
 1027: 
 1028: ## 18.1. Read header timeout
 1029: 
 1030: ```text
 1031: TOKENIO_HTTP_READ_HEADER_TIMEOUT
 1032: ```
 1033: 
 1034: Default:
 1035: 
 1036: ```text
 1037: 10s
 1038: ```
 1039: 
 1040: Validation:
 1041: 
 1042: ```text
 1043: must be positive duration
 1044: ```
 1045: 
 1046: ## 18.2. Read timeout
 1047: 
 1048: ```text
 1049: TOKENIO_HTTP_READ_TIMEOUT
 1050: ```
 1051: 
 1052: Default:
 1053: 
 1054: ```text
 1055: 120s
 1056: ```
 1057: 
 1058: ## 18.3. Write timeout
 1059: 
 1060: ```text
 1061: TOKENIO_HTTP_WRITE_TIMEOUT
 1062: ```
 1063: 
 1064: Default:
 1065: 
 1066: ```text
 1067: 120s
 1068: ```
 1069: 
 1070: ## 18.4. Idle timeout
 1071: 
 1072: ```text
 1073: TOKENIO_HTTP_IDLE_TIMEOUT
 1074: ```
 1075: 
 1076: Default:
 1077: 
 1078: ```text
 1079: 60s
 1080: ```
 1081: 
 1082: ---
 1083: 
 1084: # 19. Logging config
 1085: 
 1086: ## 19.1. Log level
 1087: 
 1088: ```text
 1089: TOKENIO_LOG_LEVEL
 1090: ```
 1091: 
 1092: Allowed:
 1093: 
 1094: ```text
 1095: debug
 1096: info
 1097: warn
 1098: error
 1099: ```
 1100: 
 1101: Default:
 1102: 
 1103: ```text
 1104: info
 1105: ```
 1106: 
 1107: ## 19.2. Log format
 1108: 
 1109: ```text
 1110: TOKENIO_LOG_FORMAT
 1111: ```
 1112: 
 1113: Allowed:
 1114: 
 1115: ```text
 1116: text
 1117: json
 1118: ```
 1119: 
 1120: Default:
 1121: 
 1122: ```text
 1123: text
 1124: ```
 1125: 
 1126: ## 19.3. Body logging
 1127: 
 1128: Request/response body logging is disabled by default.
 1129: 
 1130: Optional config:
 1131: 
 1132: ```text
 1133: TOKENIO_LOG_BODIES
 1134: ```
 1135: 
 1136: Default:
 1137: 
 1138: ```text
 1139: false
 1140: ```
 1141: 
 1142: Production rule:
 1143: 
 1144: ```text
 1145: TOKENIO_LOG_BODIES=true is forbidden in production
 1146: ```
 1147: 
 1148: Even in development, body logging must redact secrets and should be bounded.
 1149: 
 1150: ---
 1151: 
 1152: # 20. Secret redaction
 1153: 
 1154: Config loader and logger must redact values for keys containing:
 1155: 
 1156: ```text
 1157: TOKEN
 1158: SECRET
 1159: KEY
 1160: PASSWORD
 1161: DSN
 1162: AUTHORIZATION
 1163: ```
 1164: 
 1165: Allowed to log only:
 1166: 
 1167: ```text
 1168: key name
 1169: whether value is present
 1170: non-secret parsed config values
 1171: ```
 1172: 
 1173: Example allowed log:
 1174: 
 1175: ```text
 1176: TOKENIO_BILLING_SERVICE_TOKEN present=true
 1177: ```
 1178: 
 1179: Forbidden log:
 1180: 
 1181: ```text
 1182: TOKENIO_BILLING_SERVICE_TOKEN=...
 1183: ```
 1184: 
 1185: ---
 1186: 
 1187: # 21. Startup validation
 1188: 
 1189: Startup validation must check:
 1190: 
 1191: ```text
 1192: required env present
 1193: currency = RUB
 1194: numeric values parse
 1195: numeric values within allowed ranges
 1196: duration values parse
 1197: duration values positive
 1198: admin token valid for env mode
 1199: billing JWT signing key present
 1200: billing JWT TTL valid
 1201: database connectivity
 1202: migration version compatible
 1203: Telegram config consistency
 1204: ```
 1205: 
 1206: If validation fails:
 1207: 
 1208: ```text
 1209: process exits non-zero
 1210: clear error is logged without secret values
 1211: ```
 1212: 
 1213: ---
 1214: 
 1215: # 22. Runtime config immutability
 1216: 
 1217: Typed config loaded at startup is immutable.
 1218: 
 1219: Changing env variables after process start does not change runtime behavior.
 1220: 
 1221: Mutable operational state must live in Postgres:
 1222: 
 1223: ```text
 1224: resellers
 1225: routes
 1226: prices
 1227: balances
 1228: cooldowns
 1229: users
 1230: api_keys
 1231: ```
 1232: 
 1233: ---
 1234: 
 1235: # 23. Config table
 1236: 
 1237: ## 23.1. Core
 1238: 
 1239: ```text
 1240: TOKENIO_ENV                              default production
 1241: TOKENIO_GATEWAY_ADDR                     default :8880
 1242: TOKENIO_DATABASE_DSN                     required
 1243: TOKENIO_COST_CURRENCY                    default RUB
 1244: TOKENIO_REQUEST_BODY_MAX_BYTES           default 67108864
 1245: ```
 1246: 
 1247: ## 23.2. Billing
 1248: 
 1249: ```text
 1250: TOKENIO_BILLING_BASE_URL                 required
 1251: TOKENIO_BILLING_SERVICE_TOKEN            required
 1252: TOKENIO_BILLING_JWT_SIGNING_KEY          required
 1253: TOKENIO_BILLING_JWT_TTL                  default 15m
 1254: TOKENIO_BILLING_TIMEOUT                  default 30s
 1255: ```
 1256: 
 1257: ## 23.3. Admin
 1258: 
 1259: ```text
 1260: TOKENIO_ADMIN_TOKEN                      required
 1261: ```
 1262: 
 1263: ## 23.4. API keys and provisioning
 1264: 
 1265: ```text
 1266: TOKENIO_API_KEY_HASH_SECRET                    required
 1267: TOKENIO_PROVISIONING_SERVICE_TOKEN             required
 1268: TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_ENCRYPTION_KEY    required, base64-encoded 32 bytes
 1269: TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_KEY_VERSION             default v1
 1270: TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_TTL                     default 24h
 1271: TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_EXPIRATION_INTERVAL     default 1m
 1272: TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_EXPIRATION_BATCH_SIZE   default 100
 1273: ```
 1274: 
 1275: Provisioning encryption key must differ from API key HMAC secret.
 1276: 
 1277: First-version encryption algorithm:
 1278: 
 1279: ```text
 1280: AES-256-GCM
 1281: ```
 1282: 
 1283: Rotation to a new provisioning encryption key is allowed only when no pending delivery record requires the old key version.
 1284: 
 1285: Provisioning expiration worker contract:
 1286: 
 1287: ```text
 1288: TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_EXPIRATION_INTERVAL must be positive duration
 1289: TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_EXPIRATION_BATCH_SIZE must be >= 1
 1290: worker executes one cycle immediately at startup and then by interval
 1291: worker calls the provisioning application service, not Postgres directly
 1292: ```
 1293: 
 1294: ## 23.5. Pricing and balance
 1295: 
 1296: ```text
 1297: TOKENIO_AUTO_CHARGE_THRESHOLD_CENTS      default 1000
 1298: TOKENIO_MIN_CHARGE_AMOUNT_CENTS          default 100
 1299: TOKENIO_MIN_REQUEST_BALANCE_CENTS        default 500
 1300: TOKENIO_TOKEN_ESTIMATION_SAFETY_FACTOR   default 1.25
 1301: TOKENIO_COST_ESTIMATION_SAFETY_FACTOR    default 1.10
 1302: ```
 1303: 
 1304: ## 23.6. Upstream
 1305: 
 1306: ```text
 1307: TOKENIO_UPSTREAM_TIMEOUT                 default 90s
 1308: TOKENIO_UPSTREAM_MAX_ATTEMPTS            default 3
 1309: TOKENIO_UPSTREAM_MAX_BACKOFF             default 2s
 1310: ```
 1311: 
 1312: ## 23.7. Cooldowns
 1313: 
 1314: ```text
 1315: TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_RATE_LIMIT        default 60s
 1316: TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_QUOTA_EXCEEDED    default 24h
 1317: TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_5XX               default 30s
 1318: TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_TIMEOUT           default 30s
 1319: TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_AUTH_ERROR        default 24h
 1320: ```
 1321: 
 1322: ## 23.8. Telegram
 1323: 
 1324: ```text
 1325: TOKENIO_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN               optional
 1326: TOKENIO_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID                 optional
 1327: TOKENIO_RESELLER_BALANCE_ALERT_CENTS     default 10000
 1328: TOKENIO_TELEGRAM_ALERT_DEDUPE_INTERVAL   default 1h
 1329: ```
 1330: 
 1331: ## 23.9. HTTP
 1332: 
 1333: ```text
 1334: TOKENIO_HTTP_READ_HEADER_TIMEOUT         default 10s
 1335: TOKENIO_HTTP_READ_TIMEOUT                default 120s
 1336: TOKENIO_HTTP_WRITE_TIMEOUT               default 120s
 1337: TOKENIO_HTTP_IDLE_TIMEOUT                default 60s
 1338: ```
 1339: 
 1340: ## 23.10. Logging
 1341: 
 1342: ```text
 1343: TOKENIO_LOG_LEVEL                        default info
 1344: TOKENIO_LOG_FORMAT                       default text
 1345: TOKENIO_LOG_BODIES                       default false
 1346: ```
 1347: 
 1348: ---
 1349: 
 1350: # 24. Example production env
 1351: 
 1352: ```bash
 1353: export TOKENIO_ENV='production'
 1354: export TOKENIO_GATEWAY_ADDR=':8880'
 1355: 
 1356: export TOKENIO_DATABASE_DSN='host=localhost user=tokenio password=... dbname=tokenio_gateway port=5432 sslmode=disable TimeZone=UTC'
 1357: 
 1358: export TOKENIO_BILLING_BASE_URL='https://billing.example.com'
 1359: export TOKENIO_BILLING_SERVICE_TOKEN='...'
 1360: export TOKENIO_BILLING_JWT_SIGNING_KEY='...'
 1361: export TOKENIO_BILLING_JWT_TTL='15m'
 1362: 
 1363: export TOKENIO_ADMIN_TOKEN='...'
 1364: export TOKENIO_API_KEY_HASH_SECRET='...'
 1365: 
 1366: export TOKENIO_PROVISIONING_SERVICE_TOKEN='...'
 1367: export TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_ENCRYPTION_KEY='<base64-encoded-32-byte-key>'
 1368: export TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_KEY_VERSION='v1'
 1369: export TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_TTL='24h'
 1370: export TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_EXPIRATION_INTERVAL='1m'
 1371: export TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_EXPIRATION_BATCH_SIZE='100'
 1372: 
 1373: export TOKENIO_COST_CURRENCY='RUB'
 1374: export TOKENIO_AUTO_CHARGE_THRESHOLD_CENTS='1000'
 1375: export TOKENIO_MIN_CHARGE_AMOUNT_CENTS='100'
 1376: export TOKENIO_MIN_REQUEST_BALANCE_CENTS='500'
 1377: 
 1378: export TOKENIO_TOKEN_ESTIMATION_SAFETY_FACTOR='1.25'
 1379: export TOKENIO_COST_ESTIMATION_SAFETY_FACTOR='1.10'
 1380: export TOKENIO_REQUEST_BODY_MAX_BYTES='67108864'
 1381: 
 1382: export TOKENIO_UPSTREAM_TIMEOUT='90s'
 1383: export TOKENIO_BILLING_TIMEOUT='30s'
 1384: 
 1385: export TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_RATE_LIMIT='60s'
 1386: export TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_QUOTA_EXCEEDED='24h'
 1387: export TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_5XX='30s'
 1388: export TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_TIMEOUT='30s'
 1389: export TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_AUTH_ERROR='24h'
 1390: 
 1391: export TOKENIO_RESELLER_BALANCE_ALERT_CENTS='10000'
 1392: 
 1393: export TOKENIO_LOG_LEVEL='info'
 1394: export TOKENIO_LOG_FORMAT='json'
 1395: export TOKENIO_LOG_BODIES='false'
 1396: ```
 1397: 
 1398: Reseller secrets are declared separately according to DB `api_key_env` values:
 1399: 
 1400: ```bash
 1401: export OPENROUTER_PRIMARY_API_KEY='...'
 1402: export TOGETHER_PRIMARY_API_KEY='...'
 1403: export GEMINI_PRIMARY_API_KEY='...'
 1404: ```
 1405: 
 1406: ---
 1407: 
 1408: # 25. Acceptance criteria
 1409: 
 1410: Configuration layer считается реализованным, если:
 1411: 
 1412: ```text
 1413: 1. Config загружается в одном месте.
 1414: 2. Required env валидируется на старте.
 1415: 3. Invalid config приводит к startup failure.
 1416: 4. Currency первой версии строго RUB.
 1417: 5. Durations and numeric values validate ranges.
 1418: 6. Admin token required.
 1419: 7. Billing service token required.
 1420: 8. Billing JWT signing key required.
 1421: 9. API key HMAC secret required in production.
 1422: 10. Request body max bytes configurable.
 1423: 11. Auto-charge threshold configurable.
 1424: 12. Cooldowns configurable.
 1425: 13. Upstream and billing timeouts configurable.
 1426: 14. Telegram config validates all-or-none token/chat id.
 1427: 15. Reseller API keys resolve only through api_key_env.
 1428: 16. Secret values are never logged.
 1429: 17. Runtime config is immutable after startup.
 1430: 18. Mutable operational state lives in Postgres.
 1431: 19. Tests cover required env, defaults, invalid values, secret redaction and production strictness.
 1432: 20. Provisioning service token is required.
 1433: 21. Provisioning encryption key decodes from base64 to exactly 32 bytes.
 1434: 22. Provisioning encryption key differs from API key HMAC secret.
 1435: 23. Provisioning TTL is a positive duration.
 1436: 24. Provisioning key version is non-empty.
 1437: ```

====================================================================================================
FILE: internal/app/app.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: c64f347a980a9b0ab35629ac529bc016a6e37524
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: package app
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"context"
    5: 	"errors"
    6: 	"fmt"
    7: 	"log"
    8: 	"net/http"
    9: 	"os"
   10: 	"os/signal"
   11: 	"syscall"
   12: 	"time"
   13: 
   14: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/config"
   15: )
   16: 
   17: var ErrRuntimeComponentStopped = errors.New(
   18: 	"runtime component stopped unexpectedly",
   19: )
   20: 
   21: type httpRuntime interface {
   22: 	ListenAndServe() error
   23: 	Shutdown(context.Context) error
   24: 	Close() error
   25: }
   26: 
   27: type workerRuntime interface {
   28: 	Run(context.Context) error
   29: }
   30: 
   31: func NewServer(
   32: 	cfg config.Config,
   33: 	handler http.Handler,
   34: ) *http.Server {
   35: 	if handler == nil {
   36: 		panic("app: nil HTTP handler")
   37: 	}
   38: 	return &http.Server{
   39: 		Addr:              cfg.GatewayAddr,
   40: 		Handler:           handler,
   41: 		ReadHeaderTimeout: cfg.HTTPReadHeaderTimeout,
   42: 		ReadTimeout:       cfg.HTTPReadTimeout,
   43: 		WriteTimeout:      cfg.HTTPWriteTimeout,
   44: 		IdleTimeout:       cfg.HTTPIdleTimeout,
   45: 	}
   46: }
   47: 
   48: func Run() error {
   49: 	cfg, err := config.Load()
   50: 	if err != nil {
   51: 		return err
   52: 	}
   53: 
   54: 	ctx, stop := signal.NotifyContext(
   55: 		context.Background(),
   56: 		os.Interrupt,
   57: 		syscall.SIGTERM,
   58: 	)
   59: 	defer stop()
   60: 
   61: 	return RunWithConfig(ctx, cfg)
   62: }
   63: 
   64: func RunWithConfig(
   65: 	ctx context.Context,
   66: 	cfg config.Config,
   67: ) error {
   68: 	observer, err :=
   69: 		NewProvisioningExpirationLogObserver(
   70: 			log.Default(),
   71: 		)
   72: 	if err != nil {
   73: 		return err
   74: 	}
   75: 
   76: 	runtime, err := NewRuntime(
   77: 		ctx,
   78: 		cfg,
   79: 		observer,
   80: 	)
   81: 	if err != nil {
   82: 		return err
   83: 	}
   84: 	defer runtime.Close()
   85: 
   86: 	server := NewServer(cfg, runtime.Handler)
   87: 	log.Printf(
   88: 		"tokenio-gateway listening on %s",
   89: 		cfg.GatewayAddr,
   90: 	)
   91: 	return serveRuntime(
   92: 		ctx,
   93: 		server,
   94: 		runtime.Workers,
   95: 		cfg.HTTPShutdownTimeout,
   96: 	)
   97: }
   98: 
   99: func serveRuntime(
  100: 	ctx context.Context,
  101: 	server httpRuntime,
  102: 	workers workerRuntime,
  103: 	shutdownTimeout time.Duration,
  104: ) error {
  105: 	if ctx == nil ||
  106: 		server == nil ||
  107: 		workers == nil ||
  108: 		shutdownTimeout <= 0 {
  109: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  110: 			"invalid runtime lifecycle configuration",
  111: 		)
  112: 	}
  113: 
  114: 	runContext, cancel := context.WithCancel(ctx)
  115: 	defer cancel()
  116: 
  117: 	httpErrors := make(chan error, 1)
  118: 	workerErrors := make(chan error, 1)
  119: 
  120: 	go func() {
  121: 		httpErrors <- server.ListenAndServe()
  122: 	}()
  123: 	go func() {
  124: 		workerErrors <- workers.Run(runContext)
  125: 	}()
  126: 
  127: 	select {
  128: 	case httpErr := <-httpErrors:
  129: 		cancel()
  130: 		workerErr := <-workerErrors
  131: 
  132: 		if ctx.Err() == nil &&
  133: 			(httpErr == nil ||
  134: 				errors.Is(
  135: 					httpErr,
  136: 					http.ErrServerClosed,
  137: 				)) {
  138: 			return errors.Join(
  139: 				ErrRuntimeComponentStopped,
  140: 				runtimeWorkerError(workerErr),
  141: 			)
  142: 		}
  143: 		return errors.Join(
  144: 			runtimeHTTPError(httpErr),
  145: 			runtimeWorkerError(workerErr),
  146: 		)
  147: 
  148: 	case workerErr := <-workerErrors:
  149: 		cancel()
  150: 		shutdownErr := shutdownHTTP(
  151: 			server,
  152: 			shutdownTimeout,
  153: 		)
  154: 		httpErr := <-httpErrors
  155: 
  156: 		if ctx.Err() == nil && workerErr == nil {
  157: 			return errors.Join(
  158: 				ErrRuntimeComponentStopped,
  159: 				shutdownErr,
  160: 				runtimeHTTPError(httpErr),
  161: 			)
  162: 		}
  163: 		return errors.Join(
  164: 			runtimeWorkerError(workerErr),
  165: 			shutdownErr,
  166: 			runtimeHTTPError(httpErr),
  167: 		)
  168: 
  169: 	case <-ctx.Done():
  170: 		cancel()
  171: 		shutdownErr := shutdownHTTP(
  172: 			server,
  173: 			shutdownTimeout,
  174: 		)
  175: 		httpErr := <-httpErrors
  176: 		workerErr := <-workerErrors
  177: 
  178: 		return errors.Join(
  179: 			runtimeWorkerError(workerErr),
  180: 			shutdownErr,
  181: 			runtimeHTTPError(httpErr),
  182: 		)
  183: 	}
  184: }
  185: 
  186: func shutdownHTTP(
  187: 	server httpRuntime,
  188: 	shutdownTimeout time.Duration,
  189: ) error {
  190: 	shutdownContext, cancel := context.WithTimeout(
  191: 		context.Background(),
  192: 		shutdownTimeout,
  193: 	)
  194: 	shutdownErr := server.Shutdown(shutdownContext)
  195: 	cancel()
  196: 	if shutdownErr == nil {
  197: 		return nil
  198: 	}
  199: 
  200: 	closeErr := server.Close()
  201: 	return errors.Join(
  202: 		fmt.Errorf(
  203: 			"graceful HTTP shutdown: %w",
  204: 			shutdownErr,
  205: 		),
  206: 		wrapRuntimeError(
  207: 			"force HTTP close",
  208: 			closeErr,
  209: 		),
  210: 	)
  211: }
  212: 
  213: func runtimeHTTPError(err error) error {
  214: 	if err == nil ||
  215: 		errors.Is(err, http.ErrServerClosed) {
  216: 		return nil
  217: 	}
  218: 	return fmt.Errorf("serve HTTP: %w", err)
  219: }
  220: 
  221: func runtimeWorkerError(err error) error {
  222: 	return wrapRuntimeError("run workers", err)
  223: }
  224: 
  225: func wrapRuntimeError(
  226: 	operation string,
  227: 	err error,
  228: ) error {
  229: 	if err == nil {
  230: 		return nil
  231: 	}
  232: 	return fmt.Errorf("%s: %w", operation, err)
  233: }

====================================================================================================

    1: package app

    4: 	"fmt"

    6: 	adminapp "github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/application/admin"
    7: 	authenticateapp "github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/application/authenticate"
    8: 	billingapp "github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/application/billing"

   10: 	llmrequest "github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/application/llmrequest"
