   17: 
   18: type ApplicationGraph struct {
   19: 	PublicAuthentication      *authenticateapp.UseCase
   20: 	ModelCatalog              *modelcatalogapp.Service
   21: 	ProvisioningEnabled       bool
   22: 	Provisioning              *provisioningapp.Service
   23: 	Ledger                    *ledgerapp.Service
   24: 	AutoCharge                *billingapp.AutoChargeService
   25: 	FailedBatchRetry          *billingapp.FailedBatchRetryService
   26: 	UsageResolver             *pricingapp.UsageResolver
   27: 	LLMRequest                *llmrequest.Service
   28: 	ForwardingAttemptRecovery *llmrequest.ForwardingAttemptRecovery
   29: 	Admin                     *adminapp.Service
   30: }
   31: 
   32: func NewApplicationGraph(
   33: 	cfg config.Config,
   34: 	primitives RuntimePrimitives,
   35: 	security SecurityGraph,
   36: 	provisioningInfrastructure ProvisioningInfrastructureGraph,
   37: 	billingInfrastructure BillingInfrastructureGraph,
   38: 	forwardingInfrastructure ForwardingInfrastructureGraph,
   39: 	repositories RepositoryGraph,
   40: ) (ApplicationGraph, error) {
   41: 	if err := primitives.Validate(); err != nil {
   42: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   43: 			"validate runtime primitives: %w",
   44: 			err,
   45: 		)
   46: 	}
   47: 	if err := security.Validate(); err != nil {
   48: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   49: 			"validate security graph: %w",
   50: 			err,
   51: 		)
   52: 	}
   53: 	if err := provisioningInfrastructure.Validate(); err != nil {
   54: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   55: 			"validate provisioning infrastructure graph: %w",
   56: 			err,
   57: 		)
   58: 	}
   59: 	if err := billingInfrastructure.Validate(); err != nil {
   60: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   61: 			"validate billing infrastructure graph: %w",
   62: 			err,
   63: 		)
   64: 	}
   65: 	if err := forwardingInfrastructure.Validate(); err != nil {
   66: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   67: 			"validate forwarding infrastructure graph: %w",
   68: 			err,
   69: 		)
   70: 	}
   71: 	if err := repositories.Validate(); err != nil {
   72: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   73: 			"validate repository graph: %w",
   74: 			err,
   75: 		)
   76: 	}
   77: 
   78: 	publicAuthentication, err := authenticateapp.NewUseCase(
   79: 		security.APIKeyHasher,
   80: 		repositories.APIKeys,
   81: 		repositories.Users,
   82: 		primitives.Clock,
   83: 	)
   84: 	if err != nil {
   85: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   86: 			"construct public authentication use case: %w",
   87: 			err,
   88: 		)
   89: 	}
   90: 
   91: 	pricingCalculator, err := pricingapp.NewCalculator(
   92: 		cfg.TokenEstimationSafetyFactor,
   93: 		cfg.CostEstimationSafetyFactor,
   94: 	)
   95: 	if err != nil {
   96: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   97: 			"construct shared pricing calculator: %w",
   98: 			err,
   99: 		)
  100: 	}
  101: 	modelCatalogPricing, err :=
  102: 		NewModelCatalogPublicPricingCalculator(
  103: 			pricingCalculator,
  104: 		)
  105: 	if err != nil {
  106: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  107: 			"construct model catalog pricing adapter: %w",
  108: 			err,
  109: 		)
  110: 	}
  111: 
  112: 	modelCatalog, err := modelcatalogapp.NewService(
  113: 		modelcatalogapp.Dependencies{
  114: 			Routes:         repositories.ModelCatalogRoutes,
  115: 			Resellers:      repositories.Resellers,
  116: 			Prices:         repositories.RoutePrices,
  117: 			Secrets:        security.SecretPresence,
  118: 			AdapterSupport: forwardingInfrastructure.AdapterSupport,
  119: 			RewriteSupport: forwardingInfrastructure.ModelRewriteSupport,
  120: 			PublicPricing:  modelCatalogPricing,
  121: 			Clock:          primitives.Clock,
  122: 			Currency:       cfg.CostCurrency,
  123: 		},
  124: 	)
  125: 	if err != nil {
  126: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  127: 			"construct model catalog service: %w",
  128: 			err,
  129: 		)
  130: 	}
  131: 
  132: 	var provisioningService *provisioningapp.Service
  133: 	if provisioningInfrastructure.Enabled {
  134: 		provisioningService, err = provisioningapp.NewService(
  135: 			provisioningapp.Dependencies{
  136: 				Store:             repositories.APIKeyProvisioning,
  137: 				MaterialFactory:   provisioningInfrastructure.MaterialFactory,
  138: 				MaterialDecryptor: provisioningInfrastructure.MaterialDecryptor,
  139: 				Clock:             primitives.Clock,
  140: 				TTL:               cfg.APIKeyProvisioningTTL,
  141: 			},
  142: 		)
  143: 		if err != nil {
  144: 			return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  145: 				"construct provisioning service: %w",
  146: 				err,
  147: 			)
  148: 		}
  149: 	}
  150: 
  151: 	ledgerService, err := ledgerapp.NewService(
  152: 		repositories.UsageLedger,
  153: 		primitives.Clock,
  154: 	)
  155: 	if err != nil {
  156: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  157: 			"construct ledger service: %w",
  158: 			err,
  159: 		)
  160: 	}
  161: 
  162: 	autoCharge, err := billingapp.NewAutoChargeService(
  163: 		billingInfrastructure.Identity,
  164: 		billingInfrastructure.Balance,
  165: 		billingInfrastructure.Charge,
  166: 		repositories.UsageLedger,
  167: 		primitives.Clock,
  168: 		billingapp.AutoChargeConfig{
  169: 			ThresholdCents:     cfg.AutoChargeThresholdCents,
  170: 			MinimumChargeCents: cfg.MinChargeAmountCents,
  171: 		},
  172: 	)
  173: 	if err != nil {
  174: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  175: 			"construct auto-charge service: %w",
  176: 			err,
  177: 		)
  178: 	}
  179: 
  180: 	forwardingExecutor, err :=
  181: 		NewLLMRequestForwardingExecutor(
  182: 			security.Secrets,
  183: 			forwardingInfrastructure.AdapterFactory,
  184: 			cfg.UpstreamResponseBodyMaxBytes,
  185: 		)
  186: 	if err != nil {
  187: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  188: 			"construct LLM-request forwarding executor: %w",
  189: 			err,
  190: 		)
  191: 	}
  192: 	llmRequestForwarding, err := llmrequest.NewForwardingStage(
  193: 		primitives.RouteCapacity,
  194: 		repositories.LLMRequestAtomicReservation,
  195: 		repositories.LLMRequestRouteReservationTransfer,
  196: 		repositories.ForwardingAttempts,
  197: 		primitives.Clock,
  198: 		forwardingExecutor,
  199: 	)
  200: 	if err != nil {
  201: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  202: 			"construct LLM-request forwarding stage: %w",
  203: 			err,
  204: 		)
  205: 	}
  206: 
  207: 	forwardingAttemptRecovery, err :=
  208: 		llmrequest.NewForwardingAttemptRecovery(
  209: 			repositories.ForwardingAttempts,
  210: 			primitives.Clock,
  211: 			cfg.ForwardingAttemptRecoveryStaleAfter,
  212: 		)
  213: 	if err != nil {
  214: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  215: 			"construct forwarding attempt recovery service: %w",
  216: 			err,
  217: 		)
  218: 	}
  219: 
  220: 	requestMetadata := requestmetaopenaicompat.NewAdapter()
  221: 	tokenEstimator := requestmetaopenaicompat.NewTokenEstimator()
  222: 	pricingUsageResolver, err := pricingapp.NewUsageResolver(
  223: 		forwardingInfrastructure.UsageExtractor,
  224: 		tokenEstimator,
  225: 		pricingCalculator,
  226: 	)
  227: 	if err != nil {
  228: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  229: 			"construct LLM-request pricing usage resolver: %w",
  230: 			err,
  231: 		)
  232: 	}
  233: 	usageResolver, err := NewLLMRequestUsageResolver(
  234: 		pricingUsageResolver,
  235: 	)
  236: 	if err != nil {
  237: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  238: 			"construct LLM-request usage resolver adapter: %w",
  239: 			err,
  240: 		)
  241: 	}
  242: 	requestFinalizer, err := NewLLMRequestFinalizer(
  243: 		ledgerService,
  244: 	)
  245: 	if err != nil {
  246: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  247: 			"construct LLM-request finalizer: %w",
  248: 			err,
  249: 		)
  250: 	}
  251: 	requestAutoCharger, err := NewLLMRequestAutoCharger(
  252: 		autoCharge,
  253: 	)
  254: 	if err != nil {
  255: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  256: 			"construct LLM-request auto charger: %w",
  257: 			err,
  258: 		)
  259: 	}
  260: 
  261: 	preflightPricer, err := pricingapp.NewPreflightPricer(
  262: 		tokenEstimator,
  263: 		pricingCalculator,
  264: 	)
  265: 	if err != nil {
  266: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  267: 			"construct LLM-request preflight pricer: %w",
  268: 			err,
  269: 		)
  270: 	}
  271: 	routePreflighter, err := NewLLMRequestRoutePreflighter(
  272: 		security.SecretPresence,
  273: 		preflightPricer,
  274: 		primitives.RouteCapacity,
  275: 		forwardingInfrastructure.AdapterSupport,
  276: 		forwardingInfrastructure.ModelRewriteSupport,
  277: 	)
  278: 	if err != nil {
  279: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  280: 			"construct LLM-request route preflighter: %w",
  281: 			err,
  282: 		)
  283: 	}
  284: 	routeSelector, err := NewLLMRequestRouteSelector(
  285: 		primitives.Clock,
  286: 	)
  287: 	if err != nil {
  288: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  289: 			"construct LLM-request route selector: %w",
  290: 			err,
  291: 		)
  292: 	}
  293: 	routePlanner, err := llmrequest.NewRepositoryRoutePlanner(
  294: 		repositories.Routes,
  295: 		repositories.Resellers,
  296: 		repositories.RoutePrices,
  297: 		routePreflighter,
  298: 		routeSelector,
  299: 	)
  300: 	if err != nil {
  301: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  302: 			"construct LLM-request route planner: %w",
  303: 			err,
  304: 		)
  305: 	}
  306: 	requestAuthenticator, err := NewLLMRequestAuthenticator(
  307: 		publicAuthentication,
  308: 	)
  309: 	if err != nil {
  310: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  311: 			"construct LLM-request authenticator: %w",
  312: 			err,
  313: 		)
  314: 	}
  315: 	billingAdmission, err := billingapp.NewAdmissionService(
  316: 		billingInfrastructure.Identity,
  317: 		billingInfrastructure.Balance,
  318: 		repositories.UsageLedger,
  319: 	)
  320: 	if err != nil {
  321: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  322: 			"construct LLM-request billing admission service: %w",
  323: 			err,
  324: 		)
  325: 	}
  326: 	billingAdmitter, err := NewLLMRequestBillingAdmitter(
  327: 		billingAdmission,
  328: 	)
  329: 	if err != nil {
  330: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  331: 			"construct LLM-request billing admitter: %w",
  332: 			err,
  333: 		)
  334: 	}
  335: 	llmRequestService, err := llmrequest.NewService(
  336: 		llmrequest.Dependencies{
  337: 			Authenticator:      requestAuthenticator,
  338: 			RequestParser:      requestMetadata,
  339: 			CapabilityDetector: requestMetadata,
  340: 			RoutePlanner:       routePlanner,
  341: 			BillingAdmitter:    billingAdmitter,
  342: 			Forwarding:         llmRequestForwarding,
  343: 			UsageResolver:      usageResolver,
  344: 			Finalizer:          requestFinalizer,
  345: 			AutoCharger:        requestAutoCharger,
  346: 		},
  347: 	)
  348: 	if err != nil {
  349: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  350: 			"construct LLM-request service: %w",
  351: 			err,
  352: 		)
  353: 	}
  354: 
  355: 	failedBatchRetry, err := billingapp.NewFailedBatchRetryService(
  356: 		billingInfrastructure.Charge,
  357: 		repositories.AdminUsage,
  358: 		primitives.Clock,
  359: 	)
  360: 	if err != nil {
  361: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  362: 			"construct failed billing batch retry service: %w",
  363: 			err,
  364: 		)
  365: 	}
  366: 
  367: 	adminBatchRetrier := newAdminFailedBatchRetrier(
  368: 		failedBatchRetry,
  369: 	)
  370: 
  371: 	adminService, err := adminapp.NewService(adminapp.Dependencies{
  372: 		Users:          repositories.AdminUsers,
  373: 		APIKeys:        repositories.AdminAPIKeys,
  374: 		Provisionings:  repositories.AdminProvisioning,
  375: 		Resellers:      repositories.AdminResellers,
  376: 		Routes:         repositories.AdminRoutes,
  377: 		Prices:         repositories.AdminRoutePrices,
  378: 		PriceValidator: adminRoutePriceValidator{},
  379: 		UsagePolicy:    adminUsagePolicy{},
  380: 		Ledger:         repositories.AdminUsage,
  381: 		Audit:          repositories.AdminAudit,
  382: 		Secrets:        security.SecretPresence,
  383: 		AdapterSupport: forwardingInfrastructure.AdapterSupport,
  384: 		KeyGenerator:   security.APIKeyGenerator,
  385: 		Hasher:         security.APIKeyHasher,
  386: 		Clock:          primitives.Clock,
  387: 		BatchRetrier:   adminBatchRetrier,
  388: 	})
  389: 	if err != nil {
  390: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  391: 			"construct admin service: %w",
  392: 			err,
  393: 		)
  394: 	}
  395: 
  396: 	graph := ApplicationGraph{
  397: 		PublicAuthentication:      publicAuthentication,
  398: 		ModelCatalog:              modelCatalog,
  399: 		ProvisioningEnabled:       provisioningInfrastructure.Enabled,
  400: 		Provisioning:              provisioningService,
  401: 		Ledger:                    ledgerService,
  402: 		AutoCharge:                autoCharge,
  403: 		FailedBatchRetry:          failedBatchRetry,
  404: 		UsageResolver:             pricingUsageResolver,
  405: 		LLMRequest:                llmRequestService,
  406: 		ForwardingAttemptRecovery: forwardingAttemptRecovery,
  407: 		Admin:                     adminService,
  408: 	}
  409: 	if err := graph.Validate(); err != nil {
  410: 		return ApplicationGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  411: 			"validate application graph: %w",
  412: 			err,
  413: 		)
  414: 	}
  415: 	return graph, nil
  416: }
  417: 
  418: func (g ApplicationGraph) Validate() error {
  419: 	switch {
  420: 	case g.PublicAuthentication == nil:
  421: 		return fmt.Errorf("public authentication use case is nil")
  422: 	case g.ModelCatalog == nil:
  423: 		return fmt.Errorf("model catalog service is nil")
  424: 	case g.ProvisioningEnabled && g.Provisioning == nil:
  425: 		return fmt.Errorf("enabled provisioning service is nil")
  426: 	case !g.ProvisioningEnabled && g.Provisioning != nil:
  427: 		return fmt.Errorf("disabled provisioning service is non-nil")
  428: 	case g.Ledger == nil:
  429: 		return fmt.Errorf("ledger service is nil")
  430: 	case g.AutoCharge == nil:
  431: 		return fmt.Errorf("auto-charge service is nil")
  432: 	case g.FailedBatchRetry == nil:
  433: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed billing batch retry service is nil")
  434: 	case g.UsageResolver == nil:
  435: 		return fmt.Errorf("LLM-request usage resolver is nil")
  436: 	case g.LLMRequest == nil:
  437: 		return fmt.Errorf("LLM-request service is nil")
  438: 	case g.ForwardingAttemptRecovery == nil:
  439: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  440: 			"forwarding attempt recovery service is nil",
  441: 		)
  442: 	case g.Admin == nil:
  443: 		return fmt.Errorf("admin service is nil")
  444: 	default:
  445: 		return nil
  446: 	}
  447: }

  190: func TestNewApplicationGraphWiresExistingPorts(t *testing.T) {
  191: 	cfg,
  192: 		primitives,
  193: 		security,
  194: 		provisioningInfrastructure,

  207: 	)

  209: 		t.Fatalf("NewApplicationGraph: %v", err)
  210: 	}

  212: 		t.Fatalf("application graph: %v", err)
  213: 	}
  214: 	if graph.ModelCatalog == nil {
  215: 		t.Fatal("model catalog service is not wired")
  216: 	}
  217: 	if graph.UsageResolver == nil {
  218: 		t.Fatal("LLM-request usage resolver is not wired")
  219: 	}
  220: 	if graph.LLMRequest == nil {
  221: 		t.Fatal("LLM-request service is not wired")
  222: 	}
  223: 	if graph.ForwardingAttemptRecovery == nil {
  224: 		t.Fatal(
  225: 			"forwarding attempt recovery is not wired",
  226: 		)
  227: 	}
  228: 	if !graph.ProvisioningEnabled ||
  229: 		graph.Provisioning == nil {
  230: 		t.Fatal("provisioning service is not wired")
  231: 	}
  232: }

FILE: internal/app/billing_test.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: 03a09d8e568c91e5e0a11f4d28771688b867aa16

    1: package app
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"context"
    5: 	"io"
    6: 	"net/http"
    7: 	"strings"
    8: 	"testing"
    9: 	"time"
   10: 
   11: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/config"
   12: )
   13: 
   14: type billingGraphClock struct {
   15: 	now time.Time
   16: }
   17: 
   18: func (c billingGraphClock) Now() time.Time {
   19: 	return c.now
   20: }
   21: 
   22: type billingGraphRoundTripper struct {
   23: 	requests []*http.Request
   24: }
   25: 
   26: func (r *billingGraphRoundTripper) RoundTrip(
   27: 	request *http.Request,
   28: ) (*http.Response, error) {
   29: 	r.requests = append(r.requests, request)
   30: 	return &http.Response{
   31: 		StatusCode: http.StatusOK,
   32: 		Header:     make(http.Header),
   33: 		Body: io.NopCloser(strings.NewReader(
   34: 			`{"currency":"RUB","balance_cents":1000}`,
   35: 		)),
   36: 	}, nil
   37: }
   38: 
   39: func validBillingGraphConfig() config.Config {
   40: 	return config.Config{
   41: 		BillingBaseURL:       "https://billing.example",
   42: 		BillingServiceToken:  "billing-service-token",
   43: 		BillingJWTSigningKey: "billing-jwt-signing-key",
   44: 		BillingJWTTTL:        15 * time.Minute,
   45: 		BillingTimeout:       30 * time.Second,
   46: 	}
   47: }
   48: 
   49: func TestNewBillingInfrastructureGraphConstructsRequiredCapabilities(
   50: 	t *testing.T,
   51: ) {
   52: 	roundTripper := &billingGraphRoundTripper{}
   53: 	clock := billingGraphClock{
   54: 		now: time.Date(
   55: 			2026,
   56: 			time.June,
   57: 			13,
   58: 			12,
   59: 			0,
   60: 			0,
   61: 			0,
   62: 			time.UTC,
   63: 		),
   64: 	}
   65: 
   66: 	graph, err := newBillingInfrastructureGraph(
   67: 		validBillingGraphConfig(),
   68: 		clock,
   69: 		roundTripper,
   70: 	)
   71: 	if err != nil {
   72: 		t.Fatalf("newBillingInfrastructureGraph: %v", err)
   73: 	}
   74: 	if err := graph.Validate(); err != nil {
   75: 		t.Fatalf("billing infrastructure graph: %v", err)
   76: 	}
   77: 
   78: 	token, err := graph.Identity.TokenForSubject(
   79: 		context.Background(),
   80: 		"billing-user",
   81: 	)
   82: 	if err != nil {
   83: 		t.Fatalf("TokenForSubject: %v", err)
   84: 	}
   85: 	if token == "" {
   86: 		t.Fatal("billing identity token is empty")
   87: 	}
   88: 
   89: 	balance, err := graph.Balance.GetBalance(
   90: 		context.Background(),
   91: 		token,
   92: 	)
   93: 	if err != nil {
   94: 		t.Fatalf("GetBalance: %v", err)
   95: 	}
   96: 	if balance.Currency != "RUB" || balance.BalanceCents != 1000 {
   97: 		t.Fatalf("balance = %+v", balance)
   98: 	}
   99: 	if len(roundTripper.requests) != 1 {
  100: 		t.Fatalf(
  101: 			"billing round trips = %d, want 1",
  102: 			len(roundTripper.requests),
  103: 		)
  104: 	}
  105: }
  106: 
  107: func TestNewBillingInfrastructureGraphFailsFast(
  108: 	t *testing.T,
  109: ) {
  110: 	valid := validBillingGraphConfig()
  111: 	tests := []struct {
  112: 		name   string
  113: 		mutate func(*config.Config)
  114: 	}{
  115: 		{
  116: 			name: "base URL",
  117: 			mutate: func(cfg *config.Config) {
  118: 				cfg.BillingBaseURL = ""
  119: 			},
  120: 		},
  121: 		{
  122: 			name: "service token",
  123: 			mutate: func(cfg *config.Config) {
  124: 				cfg.BillingServiceToken = ""
  125: 			},
  126: 		},
  127: 		{
  128: 			name: "JWT signing key",
  129: 			mutate: func(cfg *config.Config) {
  130: 				cfg.BillingJWTSigningKey = ""
  131: 			},
  132: 		},
  133: 		{
  134: 			name: "JWT TTL",
  135: 			mutate: func(cfg *config.Config) {
  136: 				cfg.BillingJWTTTL = 0
  137: 			},
  138: 		},
  139: 		{
  140: 			name: "HTTP timeout",
  141: 			mutate: func(cfg *config.Config) {
  142: 				cfg.BillingTimeout = 0
  143: 			},
  144: 		},
  145: 	}
  146: 
  147: 	for _, test := range tests {
  148: 		t.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {
  149: 			cfg := valid
  150: 			test.mutate(&cfg)
  151: 
  152: 			graph, err := newBillingInfrastructureGraph(
  153: 				cfg,
  154: 				billingGraphClock{now: time.Now().UTC()},
  155: 				&billingGraphRoundTripper{},
  156: 			)
  157: 			if err == nil {
  158: 				t.Fatal("expected startup construction error")
  159: 			}
  160: 			if err := graph.Validate(); err == nil {
  161: 				t.Fatal("invalid graph unexpectedly validated")
  162: 			}
  163: 		})
  164: 	}
  165: }

  172: 		t.Fatal("expected incomplete graph validation error")
  173: 	}

FILE: internal/app/forwarding_attempt_recovery_observer.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: 2c4d14e4d53f31d892efff0b4968048bffd45fad
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: package app
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"errors"
    5: 	"log"
    6: 
    7: 	forwardingattemptrecovery "github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/worker/forwardingattemptrecovery"
    8: )
    9: 
   10: var ErrInvalidForwardingAttemptRecoveryObserver = errors.New(
   11: 	"invalid forwarding attempt recovery observer",
   12: )
   13: 
   14: type ForwardingAttemptRecoveryLogObserver struct {
   15: 	logger *log.Logger
   16: }
   17: 
   18: func NewForwardingAttemptRecoveryLogObserver(
   19: 	logger *log.Logger,
   20: ) (*ForwardingAttemptRecoveryLogObserver, error) {
   21: 	if logger == nil {
   22: 		return nil,
   23: 			ErrInvalidForwardingAttemptRecoveryObserver
   24: 	}
   25: 	return &ForwardingAttemptRecoveryLogObserver{
   26: 		logger: logger,
   27: 	}, nil
   28: }
   29: 
   30: func (o *ForwardingAttemptRecoveryLogObserver) ObserveForwardingAttemptRecoveryCycle(
   31: 	cycle forwardingattemptrecovery.Cycle,
   32: ) {
   33: 	if o == nil || o.logger == nil {
   34: 		return
   35: 	}
   36: 	if cycle.Err != nil {
   37: 		o.logger.Printf(
   38: 			"forwarding attempt recovery cycle failed loaded=%d completed=%d error_type=%T",
   39: 			cycle.Result.Loaded,
   40: 			cycle.Result.Completed,
   41: 			cycle.Err,
   42: 		)
   43: 		return
   44: 	}
   45: 	o.logger.Printf(
   46: 		"forwarding attempt recovery cycle completed loaded=%d completed=%d",
   47: 		cycle.Result.Loaded,
   48: 		cycle.Result.Completed,
   49: 	)
   50: }
   51: 
   52: var _ forwardingattemptrecovery.Observer = (*ForwardingAttemptRecoveryLogObserver)(nil)

   14: func TestForwardingAttemptRecoveryLogObserverUsesSafeFields(
   15: 	t *testing.T,
   16: ) {
   17: 	var buffer bytes.Buffer
   18: 	observer, err :=
   19: 		NewForwardingAttemptRecoveryLogObserver(
   20: 			log.New(&buffer, "", 0),
   21: 		)
   22: 	if err != nil {
   23: 		t.Fatalf("New observer: %v", err)
   24: 	}
   25: 	raw := "secret upstream payload"
   26: 	observer.ObserveForwardingAttemptRecoveryCycle(
   27: 		forwardingattemptrecovery.Cycle{
   28: 			Result: llmrequest.ForwardingAttemptRecoveryResult{
   29: 				Loaded:    3,
   30: 				Completed: 2,
   31: 			},
   32: 			Err: errors.New(raw),
   33: 		},
   34: 	)
   35: 
   36: 	output := buffer.String()
   37: 	if strings.Contains(output, raw) {
   38: 		t.Fatalf("raw error leaked: %q", output)
   39: 	}
   40: 	for _, expected := range []string{
   41: 		"loaded=3",
   42: 		"completed=2",
   43: 		"error_type=",
   44: 	} {
   45: 		if !strings.Contains(output, expected) {
   46: 			t.Fatalf(
   47: 				"missing %q in %q",
   48: 				expected,
   49: 				output,
   50: 			)
   51: 		}
   52: 	}
   53: }

   60: 		err,
   61: 		ErrInvalidForwardingAttemptRecoveryObserver,
   62: 	) {
   63: 		t.Fatalf("error = %v", err)
   64: 	}
   65: }

   58: 
   59: type coordinatedWorkerRunner struct {
   60: 	started chan struct{}
   61: 	stopped chan struct{}
   62: }
   63: 
   64: func (r *coordinatedWorkerRunner) Run(
   65: 	ctx context.Context,
   66: ) error {
   67: 	close(r.started)
   68: 	<-ctx.Done()
   69: 	close(r.stopped)
   70: 	return nil
   71: }
   72: 
   73: func TestWorkerGraphRunsBothWorkersUnderOneContext(
   74: 	t *testing.T,
   75: ) {
   76: 	first := &coordinatedWorkerRunner{
   77: 		started: make(chan struct{}),
   78: 		stopped: make(chan struct{}),
   79: 	}
   80: 	second := &coordinatedWorkerRunner{
   81: 		started: make(chan struct{}),
   82: 		stopped: make(chan struct{}),
   83: 	}
   84: 	graph := WorkerGraph{
   85: 		ProvisioningExpirationEnabled:    true,
   86: 		ProvisioningExpiration:           first,
   87: 		ForwardingAttemptRecoveryEnabled: true,
   88: 		ForwardingAttemptRecovery:        second,
   89: 	}
   90: 	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(
   91: 		context.Background(),
   92: 	)
   93: 	done := make(chan error, 1)
   94: 	go func() {
   95: 		done <- graph.Run(ctx)
   96: 	}()
   97: 
   98: 	<-first.started
   99: 	<-second.started
  100: 	cancel()
  101: 
  102: 	select {
  103: 	case err := <-done:
  104: 		if err != nil {
  105: 			t.Fatalf("Run: %v", err)
  106: 		}
  107: 	case <-time.After(time.Second):
  108: 		t.Fatal("worker graph did not stop")
  109: 	}
  110: 	<-first.stopped
  111: 	<-second.stopped
  112: }

FILE: internal/app/lifecycle_test.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: f56ed86e4730b3303da5f5b03cc2691fc8f8aa10
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: package app
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"context"
    5: 	"errors"
    6: 	"net/http"
    7: 	"sync"
    8: 	"testing"
    9: 	"time"
   10: )
   11: 
   12: type lifecycleHTTP struct {
   13: 	serveErr    error
   14: 	shutdownErr error
   15: 	closeErr    error
   16: 
   17: 	started chan struct{}
   18: 	stopped chan struct{}
   19: 	once    sync.Once
   20: 
   21: 	mu            sync.Mutex
   22: 	shutdownCalls int
   23: 	closeCalls    int
   24: }
   25: 
   26: func newLifecycleHTTP() *lifecycleHTTP {
   27: 	return &lifecycleHTTP{
   28: 		started: make(chan struct{}),
   29: 		stopped: make(chan struct{}),
   30: 	}
   31: }
   32: 
   33: func (s *lifecycleHTTP) ListenAndServe() error {
   34: 	close(s.started)
   35: 	if s.serveErr != nil {
   36: 		return s.serveErr
   37: 	}
   38: 	<-s.stopped
   39: 	return http.ErrServerClosed
   40: }
   41: 
   42: func (s *lifecycleHTTP) Shutdown(
   43: 	context.Context,
   44: ) error {
   45: 	s.mu.Lock()
   46: 	s.shutdownCalls++
   47: 	s.mu.Unlock()
   48: 
   49: 	if s.shutdownErr == nil {
   50: 		s.once.Do(func() {
   51: 			close(s.stopped)
   52: 		})
   53: 	}
   54: 	return s.shutdownErr
   55: }
   56: 
   57: func (s *lifecycleHTTP) Close() error {
   58: 	s.mu.Lock()
   59: 	s.closeCalls++
   60: 	s.mu.Unlock()
   61: 
   62: 	s.once.Do(func() {
   63: 		close(s.stopped)
   64: 	})
   65: 	return s.closeErr
   66: }
   67: 
   68: type lifecycleWorkers struct {
   69: 	err               error
   70: 	returnImmediately bool
   71: 
   72: 	started chan struct{}
   73: 	stopped chan struct{}
   74: }
   75: 
   76: func newLifecycleWorkers() *lifecycleWorkers {
   77: 	return &lifecycleWorkers{
   78: 		started: make(chan struct{}),
   79: 		stopped: make(chan struct{}),
   80: 	}
   81: }
   82: 
   83: func (w *lifecycleWorkers) Run(
   84: 	ctx context.Context,
   85: ) error {
   86: 	close(w.started)
   87: 	if w.returnImmediately {
   88: 		close(w.stopped)
   89: 		return w.err
   90: 	}
   91: 	<-ctx.Done()
   92: 	close(w.stopped)
   93: 	return w.err
   94: }
   95: 
   96: func TestServeRuntimeCancelsWorkersAndShutsDownHTTP(
   97: 	t *testing.T,
   98: ) {
   99: 	server := newLifecycleHTTP()
  100: 	workers := newLifecycleWorkers()
  101: 	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(
  102: 		context.Background(),
  103: 	)
  104: 
  105: 	done := make(chan error, 1)
  106: 	go func() {
  107: 		done <- serveRuntime(
  108: 			ctx,
  109: 			server,
  110: 			workers,
  111: 			time.Second,
  112: 		)
  113: 	}()
  114: 
  115: 	<-server.started
  116: 	<-workers.started
  117: 	cancel()
  118: 
  119: 	select {
  120: 	case err := <-done:
  121: 		if err != nil {
  122: 			t.Fatalf("serveRuntime: %v", err)
  123: 		}
  124: 	case <-time.After(time.Second):
  125: 		t.Fatal("runtime did not stop")
  126: 	}
  127: 
  128: 	server.mu.Lock()
  129: 	shutdownCalls := server.shutdownCalls
  130: 	closeCalls := server.closeCalls
  131: 	server.mu.Unlock()
  132: 	if shutdownCalls != 1 || closeCalls != 0 {
  133: 		t.Fatalf(
  134: 			"shutdown calls=%d close calls=%d",
  135: 			shutdownCalls,
  136: 			closeCalls,
  137: 		)
  138: 	}
  139: 	select {
  140: 	case <-workers.stopped:
  141: 	default:
  142: 		t.Fatal("workers were not stopped")
  143: 	}
  144: }
  145: 
  146: func TestServeRuntimeWorkerFailureStopsHTTP(
  147: 	t *testing.T,
  148: ) {
  149: 	workerErr := errors.New("worker failed")
  150: 	server := newLifecycleHTTP()
  151: 	workers := newLifecycleWorkers()
  152: 	workers.returnImmediately = true
  153: 	workers.err = workerErr
  154: 
  155: 	err := serveRuntime(
  156: 		context.Background(),
  157: 		server,
  158: 		workers,
  159: 		time.Second,
  160: 	)
  161: 	if !errors.Is(err, workerErr) {
  162: 		t.Fatalf(
  163: 			"error = %v, want worker error",
  164: 			err,
  165: 		)
  166: 	}
  167: 
  168: 	server.mu.Lock()
  169: 	shutdownCalls := server.shutdownCalls
  170: 	server.mu.Unlock()
  171: 	if shutdownCalls != 1 {
  172: 		t.Fatalf(
  173: 			"shutdown calls = %d, want 1",
  174: 			shutdownCalls,
  175: 		)
  176: 	}
  177: }
  178: 
  179: func TestServeRuntimeHTTPFailureCancelsWorkers(
  180: 	t *testing.T,

  182: 	serveErr := errors.New("listen failed")

  184: 	server.serveErr = serveErr

  188: 		context.Background(),

  190: 		workers,
  191: 		time.Second,
  192: 	)

  195: 			"error = %v, want HTTP error",
  196: 			err,
  197: 		)
  198: 	}

  200: 	case <-workers.stopped:

  202: 		t.Fatal(
  203: 			"HTTP failure did not cancel workers",

  206: }

FILE: internal/app/llmrequest_auto_charger.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: df9be7602fd29776d983d8a793520fef5137f118
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: package app
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"context"
    5: 	"errors"
    6: 
    7: 	billingapp "github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/application/billing"
    8: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/application/llmrequest"
    9: )
   10: 
   11: type llmRequestAutoChargeService interface {
   12: 	Run(
   13: 		context.Context,
   14: 		billingapp.AutoChargeInput,
   15: 	) (billingapp.AutoChargeResult, error)
   16: }
   17: 
   18: type LLMRequestAutoCharger struct {
   19: 	service llmRequestAutoChargeService
   20: }
   21: 
   22: var _ llmrequest.AutoCharger = (*LLMRequestAutoCharger)(nil)
   23: 
   24: func NewLLMRequestAutoCharger(
   25: 	service llmRequestAutoChargeService,
   26: ) (*LLMRequestAutoCharger, error) {
   27: 	if service == nil {
   28: 		return nil, llmrequest.ErrDependencyRequired
   29: 	}
   30: 	return &LLMRequestAutoCharger{service: service}, nil
   31: }
   32: 
   33: func (a *LLMRequestAutoCharger) Run(
   34: 	ctx context.Context,
   35: 	input llmrequest.AutoChargeInput,
   36: ) llmrequest.AutoChargeResult {
   37: 	if a == nil || a.service == nil {
   38: 		return llmrequest.AutoChargeResult{
   39: 			Status: llmrequest.AutoChargeStatusFailed,
   40: 		}
   41: 	}
   42: 
   43: 	result, err := a.service.Run(
   44: 		ctx,
   45: 		billingapp.AutoChargeInput{
   46: 			UserID: input.Principal.UserID,
   47: 			BillingSubjectUserID: input.Principal.
   48: 				BillingSubjectUserID,
   49: 			Currency: input.FinalUsageRecord.Currency,
   50: 		},
   51: 	)
   52: 	switch {
   53: 	case errors.Is(err, billingapp.ErrChargeDeferred):
   54: 		return llmrequest.AutoChargeResult{
   55: 			Status: llmrequest.AutoChargeStatusDeferred,
   56: 		}
   57: 	case err != nil:
   58: 		return llmrequest.AutoChargeResult{
   59: 			Status: llmrequest.AutoChargeStatusFailed,
   60: 		}
   61: 	}
   62: 
   63: 	status := llmrequest.AutoChargeStatusProcessed
   64: 	if result.Deferred &&
   65: 		len(result.ProcessedBatchIDs) == 0 {
   66: 		status = llmrequest.AutoChargeStatusDeferred
   67: 	}
   68: 
   69: 	var balance *int64
   70: 	if result.BillingBalanceCents != nil {
   71: 		copied := *result.BillingBalanceCents
   72: 		balance = &copied
   73: 	}
   74: 
   75: 	return llmrequest.AutoChargeResult{
   76: 		Status:              status,
   77: 		ProcessedBatchIDs:   append([]string(nil), result.ProcessedBatchIDs...),
   78: 		ChargedAmountCents:  result.ChargedAmountCents,
   79: 		BillingBalanceCents: balance,
   80: 	}
   81: }

FILE: internal/app/llmrequest_billing_admitter.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: b59da3605919fea40705bc8c99df8e54c3691ed0
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: package app
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"context"
    5: 	"fmt"
    6: 
    7: 	billingapp "github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/application/billing"
    8: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/application/llmrequest"
    9: )
   10: 
   11: type billingAdmissionService interface {
   12: 	Admit(
   13: 		context.Context,
   14: 		billingapp.AdmissionInput,
   15: 	) (billingapp.AdmissionResult, error)
   16: }
   17: 
   18: type LLMRequestBillingAdmitter struct {
   19: 	billing billingAdmissionService
   20: }
   21: 
   22: var _ llmrequest.BillingAdmitter = (*LLMRequestBillingAdmitter)(nil)
   23: 
   24: func NewLLMRequestBillingAdmitter(
   25: 	billing billingAdmissionService,
   26: ) (*LLMRequestBillingAdmitter, error) {
   27: 	if billing == nil {
   28: 		return nil, llmrequest.ErrDependencyRequired
   29: 	}
   30: 	return &LLMRequestBillingAdmitter{billing: billing}, nil
   31: }
   32: 
   33: func (a *LLMRequestBillingAdmitter) Admit(
   34: 	ctx context.Context,
   35: 	input llmrequest.BillingAdmissionInput,
   36: ) (llmrequest.BillingAdmissionResult, error) {
   37: 	if a == nil || a.billing == nil {
   38: 		return llmrequest.BillingAdmissionResult{},
   39: 			llmrequest.ErrDependencyRequired
   40: 	}
   41: 	if ctx == nil {
   42: 		return llmrequest.BillingAdmissionResult{}, fmt.Errorf(
   43: 			"%w: nil billing admission context",
   44: 			llmrequest.ErrInvalidInput,
   45: 		)
   46: 	}
   47: 	if err := ctx.Err(); err != nil {
   48: 		return llmrequest.BillingAdmissionResult{}, err
   49: 	}
   50: 
   51: 	result, err := a.billing.Admit(
   52: 		ctx,
   53: 		billingapp.AdmissionInput{
   54: 			UserID: input.Principal.UserID,
   55: 			BillingSubjectUserID: input.Principal.
   56: 				BillingSubjectUserID,
   57: 			RequiredReserveCents: input.RequiredReserveCents,
   58: 			Currency:             input.Currency,
   59: 		},
   60: 	)
   61: 	if err != nil {
   62: 		return llmrequest.BillingAdmissionResult{}, fmt.Errorf(
   63: 			"admit LLM-request billing reserve: %w",
   64: 			err,
   65: 		)
   66: 	}
   67: 
   68: 	return llmrequest.BillingAdmissionResult{
   69: 		Allowed:               result.Allowed,
   70: 		RemoteBalanceCents:    result.RemoteBalanceCents,
   71: 		PendingAmountCents:    result.PendingAmountCents,
   72: 		EffectiveBalanceCents: result.EffectiveBalanceCents,
   73: 		RequiredReserveCents:  result.RequiredReserveCents,
   74: 		Currency:              result.Currency,
   75: 	}, nil
   76: }

   13: type llmRequestRouteSelectorClock struct {
   14: 	now time.Time
   15: }
   16: 
   17: func (clock llmRequestRouteSelectorClock) Now() time.Time {
   18: 	return clock.now
   19: }
   20: 
   21: func TestLLMRequestRouteSelectorDelegatesDeterministicSelection(
   22: 	t *testing.T,
   23: ) {
   24: 	now := time.Date(
   25: 		2026,
   26: 		time.June,
   27: 		14,
   28: 		12,
   29: 		0,
   30: 		0,
   31: 		0,
   32: 		time.UTC,
   33: 	)
   34: 	selector := mustLLMRequestRouteSelector(t, now)
   35: 	input := validLLMRequestRouteSelectionInput()
   36: 	input.Candidates = []llmrequest.RouteSelectionCandidate{
   37: 		validLLMRequestRouteSelectionCandidate(
   38: 			"route-b",
   39: 			20,
   40: 			1,
   41: 		),
   42: 		validLLMRequestRouteSelectionCandidate(
   43: 			"route-a",
   44: 			10,
   45: 			10,
   46: 		),
   47: 	}
   48: 
   49: 	result, err := selector.Select(context.Background(), input)
   50: 	if err != nil {
   51: 		t.Fatalf("Select: %v", err)
   52: 	}
   53: 	if result.SelectedRouteID != "route-a" {
   54: 		t.Fatalf(
   55: 			"selected route = %q, want route-a",
   56: 			result.SelectedRouteID,
   57: 		)
   58: 	}
   59: 	if len(result.FallbackRouteIDs) != 1 ||
   60: 		result.FallbackRouteIDs[0] != "route-b" {
   61: 		t.Fatalf(
   62: 			"fallback routes = %#v, want route-b",
   63: 			result.FallbackRouteIDs,
   64: 		)
   65: 	}
   66: 	if input.Candidates[0].Route.ID != "route-b" ||
   67: 		input.Candidates[1].Route.ID != "route-a" {
   68: 		t.Fatalf("input candidate order was mutated")
   69: 	}
   70: }
   71:

  124: 
  125: func TestLLMRequestRouteSelectorUsesClockForCooldown(
  126: 	t *testing.T,
  127: ) {
  128: 	now := time.Date(
  129: 		2026,
  130: 		time.June,
  131: 		14,
  132: 		12,
  133: 		0,
  134: 		0,
  135: 		0,
  136: 		time.UTC,
  137: 	)
  138: 	selector := mustLLMRequestRouteSelector(t, now)
  139: 	input := validLLMRequestRouteSelectionInput()
  140: 	candidate := validLLMRequestRouteSelectionCandidate(
  141: 		"route-a",
  142: 		10,
  143: 		1,
  144: 	)
  145: 	cooldownUntil := now.Add(time.Minute)
  146: 	candidate.Route.CooldownUntil = &cooldownUntil
  147: 	input.Candidates = []llmrequest.RouteSelectionCandidate{
  148: 		candidate,
  149: 	}
  150: 
  151: 	_, err := selector.Select(context.Background(), input)
  152: 	if !errors.Is(err, llmrequest.ErrNoRouteAvailable) {
  153: 		t.Fatalf(
  154: 			"error = %v, want no route available",
  155: 			err,
  156: 		)
  157: 	}
  158: }
  159: 
  160: func TestLLMRequestRouteSelectorMapsInvalidRouteData(
  161: 	t *testing.T,
  162: ) {
  163: 	selector := mustLLMRequestRouteSelector(
  164: 		t,
  165: 		time.Now().UTC(),
  166: 	)
  167: 	input := validLLMRequestRouteSelectionInput()
  168: 	candidate := validLLMRequestRouteSelectionCandidate(
  169: 		"route-a",
  170: 		10,
  171: 		1,
  172: 	)
  173: 	candidate.Route.ResellerID = "other-reseller"
  174: 	input.Candidates = []llmrequest.RouteSelectionCandidate{
  175: 		candidate,
  176: 	}
  177: 
  178: 	_, err := selector.Select(context.Background(), input)
  179: 	if !errors.Is(err, llmrequest.ErrStageContractViolation) {
  180: 		t.Fatalf(
  181: 			"error = %v, want stage contract violation",
  182: 			err,
  183: 		)
  184: 	}
  185: }
  186: 
  187: func TestLLMRequestRouteSelectorHonorsCanceledContext(
  188: 	t *testing.T,
  189: ) {
  190: 	selector := mustLLMRequestRouteSelector(
  191: 		t,
  192: 		time.Now().UTC(),
  193: 	)
  194: 	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
  195: 	cancel()
  196: 
  197: 	_, err := selector.Select(
  198: 		ctx,
  199: 		validLLMRequestRouteSelectionInput(),
  200: 	)
  201: 	if !errors.Is(err, context.Canceled) {
  202: 		t.Fatalf("error = %v, want context canceled", err)
  203: 	}
  204: }
  205: 
  206: func TestNewLLMRequestRouteSelectorRequiresClock(t *testing.T) {
  207: 	_, err := NewLLMRequestRouteSelector(nil)
  208: 	if !errors.Is(err, llmrequest.ErrDependencyRequired) {
  209: 		t.Fatalf(
  210: 			"error = %v, want dependency required",
  211: 			err,
  212: 		)
  213: 	}
  214: }
  215: 
  216: func mustLLMRequestRouteSelector(
  217: 	t *testing.T,
  218: 	now time.Time,
  219: ) *LLMRequestRouteSelector {
  220: 	t.Helper()
  221: 
  222: 	selector, err := NewLLMRequestRouteSelector(
  223: 		llmRequestRouteSelectorClock{now: now},
  224: 	)
  225: 	if err != nil {
  226: 		t.Fatalf("NewLLMRequestRouteSelector: %v", err)
  227: 	}
  228: 	return selector
  229: }
  230: 
  231: func validLLMRequestRouteSelectionInput() llmrequest.RouteSelectionInput {
  232: 	return llmrequest.RouteSelectionInput{
  233: 		APIFamily:    domain.APIFamilyOpenAICompatible,
  234: 		EndpointKind: domain.EndpointChat,
  235: 		ClientModel:  "model-1",
  236: 		RequestedCapabilities: domain.CapabilitySet{
  237: 			Chat: true,
  238: 		},
  239: 	}
  240: }
  241: 
  242: func validLLMRequestRouteSelectionCandidate(
  243: 	routeID string,
  244: 	estimatedUpstreamCostCents int64,
  245: 	priority int,
  246: ) llmrequest.RouteSelectionCandidate {
  247: 	resellerID := "reseller-" + routeID
  248: 	return llmrequest.RouteSelectionCandidate{
  249: 		Route: domain.Route{
  250: 			ID:                 routeID,
  251: 			ResellerID:         resellerID,
  252: 			ProviderType:       domain.ProviderOpenAI,
  253: 			APIFamily:          domain.APIFamilyOpenAICompatible,
  254: 			EndpointKind:       domain.EndpointChat,
  255: 			ClientModel:        "model-1",
  256: 			ProviderModel:      "model-1",
  257: 			ModelRewritePolicy: domain.ModelRewritePolicyNone,
  258: 			Enabled:            true,
  259: 			Priority:           priority,
  260: 			Capabilities: domain.CapabilitySet{
  261: 				Chat: true,
  262: 			},
  263: 		},
  264: 		Reseller: domain.Reseller{
  265: 			ID:                  resellerID,
  266: 			ProviderType:        domain.ProviderOpenAI,
  267: 			Enabled:             true,
  268: 			BalanceCents:        1000,
  269: 			ReservedCents:       100,
  270: 			MinimumBalanceCents: 100,
  271: 		},
  272: 		Preflight: llmrequest.RouteCandidatePreflightResult{
  273: 			ForwardingAdapterAvailable:    true,
  274: 			SecretAvailable:               true,
  275: 			CostAvailable:                 true,
  276: 			EstimatedUpstreamCostCents:    estimatedUpstreamCostCents,
  277: 			RateLimitAllowed:              true,
  278: 			ConcurrencyAllowed:            true,
  279: 			ModelIdentifierRewriteAllowed: true,
  280: 		},
  281: 	}
  282: }

FILE: internal/app/provisioning_expiration_observer.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: 8dab33ae260715dbbaec70fb927560712f8460e2
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: package app
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"context"
    5: 	"errors"
    6: 	"fmt"
    7: 	"log"
    8: 
    9: 	provisioningapp "github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/application/provisioning"
   10: 	provisioningexpiration "github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/worker/provisioningexpiration"
   11: )
   12: 
   13: var ErrInvalidProvisioningExpirationObserver = errors.New(
   14: 	"invalid provisioning expiration observer",
   15: )
   16: 
   17: type ProvisioningExpirationLogObserver struct {
   18: 	logger *log.Logger
   19: }
   20: 
   21: func NewProvisioningExpirationLogObserver(
   22: 	logger *log.Logger,
   23: ) (*ProvisioningExpirationLogObserver, error) {
   24: 	if logger == nil {
   25: 		return nil,
   26: 			ErrInvalidProvisioningExpirationObserver
   27: 	}
   28: 	return &ProvisioningExpirationLogObserver{
   29: 		logger: logger,
   30: 	}, nil
   31: }
   32: 
   33: func (o *ProvisioningExpirationLogObserver) ObserveProvisioningExpirationCycle(
   34: 	cycle provisioningexpiration.Cycle,
   35: ) {
   36: 	if o == nil || o.logger == nil {
   37: 		return
   38: 	}
   39: 
   40: 	o.logger.Printf(
   41: 		"provisioning expiration cycle error_code=%s as_of=%s selected=%d expired=%d already_terminal=%d failed=%d",
   42: 		provisioningExpirationErrorCode(cycle.Err),
   43: 		cycle.Result.AsOf.UTC().Format(
   44: 			"2006-01-02T15:04:05.000000000Z",
   45: 		),
   46: 		cycle.Result.Selected,
   47: 		cycle.Result.Expired,
   48: 		cycle.Result.AlreadyTerminal,
   49: 		cycle.Result.Failed,
   50: 	)
   51: }
   52: 
   53: func provisioningExpirationErrorCode(
   54: 	err error,
   55: ) string {
   56: 	switch {
   57: 	case err == nil:
   58: 		return "none"
   59: 	case errors.Is(err, context.Canceled):
   60: 		return "context_canceled"
   61: 	case errors.Is(
   62: 		err,
   63: 		context.DeadlineExceeded,
   64: 	):
   65: 		return "context_deadline_exceeded"
   66: 	case errors.Is(
   67: 		err,
   68: 		provisioningapp.ErrExpirationPartialFailure,
   69: 	):
   70: 		return "partial_failure"
   71: 	case errors.Is(
   72: 		err,
   73: 		provisioningapp.ErrStoreUnavailable,
   74: 	):
   75: 		return "store_unavailable"
   76: 	case errors.Is(
   77: 		err,
   78: 		provisioningapp.ErrInternal,
   79: 	):
   80: 		return "internal"
   81: 	default:
   82: 		return "unexpected"
   83: 	}
   84: }
   85: 
   86: var _ provisioningexpiration.Observer = (*ProvisioningExpirationLogObserver)(nil)
   87: var _ fmt.Stringer = (*ProvisioningExpirationLogObserver)(nil)
   88: 
   89: func (*ProvisioningExpirationLogObserver) String() string {
   90: 	return "ProvisioningExpirationLogObserver"
   91: }

FILE: internal/app/provisioning_expiration_observer_test.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: 695677d0a1ea10ed52f64d3d294b6199ebb7c79f
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: package app
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"bytes"
    5: 	"errors"
    6: 	"log"
    7: 	"strings"
    8: 	"testing"
    9: 	"time"
   10: 
   11: 	provisioningapp "github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/application/provisioning"
   12: 	provisioningexpiration "github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/worker/provisioningexpiration"
   13: )
   14: 
   15: func TestProvisioningExpirationLogObserverRecordsSafeFields(
   16: 	t *testing.T,
   17: ) {
   18: 	var output bytes.Buffer
   19: 	observer, err :=
   20: 		NewProvisioningExpirationLogObserver(
   21: 			log.New(&output, "", 0),
   22: 		)
   23: 	if err != nil {
   24: 		t.Fatal(err)
   25: 	}
   26: 
   27: 	observer.ObserveProvisioningExpirationCycle(
   28: 		provisioningexpiration.Cycle{
   29: 			Result: provisioningapp.ExpireDueResult{
   30: 				AsOf: time.Date(
   31: 					2026,
   32: 					time.June,
   33: 					13,
   34: 					12,
   35: 					0,
   36: 					0,
   37: 					0,
   38: 					time.UTC,
   39: 				),
   40: 				Selected:        4,
   41: 				Expired:         2,
   42: 				AlreadyTerminal: 1,
   43: 				Failed:          1,
   44: 				FailedProvisioningIDs: []string{
   45: 					"prov_sensitive_identifier",
   46: 				},
   47: 			},
   48: 			Err: provisioningapp.ErrExpirationPartialFailure,
   49: 		},
   50: 	)
   51: 
   52: 	line := output.String()
   53: 	for _, fragment := range []string{
   54: 		"error_code=partial_failure",
   55: 		"selected=4",
   56: 		"expired=2",
   57: 		"already_terminal=1",
   58: 		"failed=1",
   59: 	} {
   60: 		if !strings.Contains(line, fragment) {
   61: 			t.Fatalf(
   62: 				"log is missing %q: %s",
   63: 				fragment,
   64: 				line,
   65: 			)
   66: 		}
   67: 	}
   68: 	if strings.Contains(
   69: 		line,
   70: 		"prov_sensitive_identifier",
   71: 	) {
   72: 		t.Fatalf(
   73: 			"log contains provisioning identifier: %s",
   74: 			line,
   75: 		)
   76: 	}
   77: }
   78: 
   79: func TestProvisioningExpirationLogObserverDoesNotLogRawError(
   80: 	t *testing.T,
   81: ) {
   82: 	var output bytes.Buffer
   83: 	observer, err :=
   84: 		NewProvisioningExpirationLogObserver(
   85: 			log.New(&output, "", 0),
   86: 		)
   87: 	if err != nil {
   88: 		t.Fatal(err)
   89: 	}
   90: 
   91: 	observer.ObserveProvisioningExpirationCycle(
   92: 		provisioningexpiration.Cycle{
   93: 			Err: errors.New(
   94: 				"sk_live_secret_from_untrusted_error",
   95: 			),
   96: 		},
   97: 	)
   98: 
   99: 	line := output.String()
  100: 	if !strings.Contains(
  101: 		line,
  102: 		"error_code=unexpected",
  103: 	) {
  104: 		t.Fatalf("unexpected log: %s", line)
  105: 	}
  106: 	if strings.Contains(line, "sk_live_secret") {
  107: 		t.Fatalf("raw error leaked into log: %s", line)
  108: 	}
  109: }
  110: 
  111: func TestNewProvisioningExpirationLogObserverRejectsNilLogger(
  112: 	t *testing.T,
  113: ) {
  114: 	observer, err :=
  115: 		NewProvisioningExpirationLogObserver(nil)
  116: 	if observer != nil ||
  117: 		!errors.Is(
  118: 			err,
  119: 			ErrInvalidProvisioningExpirationObserver,
  120: 		) {
  121: 		t.Fatalf(
  122: 			"observer=%v error=%v",
  123: 			observer,
  124: 			err,
  125: 		)
  126: 	}
  127: }

   10: 
   11: type RepositoryGraph struct {
   12: 	Users              ports.UserRepository
   13: 	APIKeys            ports.APIKeyRepository
   14: 	Resellers          ports.ResellerQueryRepository
   15: 	Routes             ports.RouteRepository
   16: 	ModelCatalogRoutes ports.ModelCatalogRouteRepository
   17: 	RoutePrices        ports.RoutePriceRepository
   18: 	UsageLedger        ports.UsageLedger
   19: 	ForwardingAttempts ports.ForwardingAttemptStore
   20: 
   21: 	LLMRequestAtomicReservation        llmrequest.AtomicReservation
   22: 	LLMRequestRouteReservationTransfer llmrequest.RouteReservationTransfer
   23: 
   24: 	AdminUsers        ports.AdminUserRepository
   25: 	AdminAPIKeys      ports.AdminAPIKeyRepository
   26: 	AdminProvisioning ports.AdminAPIKeyProvisioningRepository
   27: 	AdminAudit        ports.AdminAuditStore
   28: 	AdminResellers    ports.ResellerRepository
   29: 	AdminRoutes       ports.AdminRouteRepository
   30: 	AdminRoutePrices  ports.AdminRoutePriceRepository
   31: 	AdminUsage        ports.AdminUsageLedger
   32: 
   33: 	BillingSessions ports.BillingSessionStore
   34: 	RouteEvents     ports.RouteEventStore
   35: 	TelegramAlerts  ports.TelegramAlertStore
   36: 
   37: 	APIKeyProvisioning ports.APIKeyProvisioningStore
   38: }
   39: 
   40: func NewRepositoryGraph(
   41: 	db *postgres.DB,
   42: 	clock ports.Clock,
   43: ) (RepositoryGraph, error) {
   44: 	users, err := postgres.NewUserRepository(db)
   45: 	if err != nil {
   46: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   47: 			"construct user repository: %w",
   48: 			err,
   49: 		)
   50: 	}
   51: 	apiKeys, err := postgres.NewAPIKeyRepository(db)
   52: 	if err != nil {
   53: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   54: 			"construct API-key repository: %w",
   55: 			err,
   56: 		)
   57: 	}
   58: 	resellers, err := postgres.NewResellerRepository(db)
   59: 	if err != nil {
   60: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   61: 			"construct reseller query repository: %w",
   62: 			err,
   63: 		)
   64: 	}
   65: 	routes, err := postgres.NewRouteRepository(db)
   66: 	if err != nil {
   67: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   68: 			"construct route repository: %w",
   69: 			err,
   70: 		)
   71: 	}
   72: 	routePrices, err := postgres.NewRoutePriceRepository(db)
   73: 	if err != nil {
   74: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   75: 			"construct route-price repository: %w",
   76: 			err,
   77: 		)
   78: 	}
   79: 	usageLedger, err := postgres.NewUsageLedger(db)
   80: 	if err != nil {
   81: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   82: 			"construct usage ledger: %w",
   83: 			err,
   84: 		)
   85: 	}
   86: 	forwardingAttempts, err :=
   87: 		postgres.NewForwardingAttemptStore(db)
   88: 	if err != nil {
   89: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   90: 			"construct forwarding-attempt store: %w",
   91: 			err,
   92: 		)
   93: 	}
   94: 	atomicReservation, err :=
   95: 		postgres.NewLLMRequestAtomicReservation(db, clock)
   96: 	if err != nil {
   97: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   98: 			"construct LLM-request atomic reservation: %w",
   99: 			err,
  100: 		)
  101: 	}
  102: 	routeReservationTransfer, err :=
  103: 		postgres.NewLLMRequestRouteReservationTransfer(db, clock)
  104: 	if err != nil {
  105: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  106: 			"construct LLM-request route reservation transfer: %w",
  107: 			err,
  108: 		)
  109: 	}
  110: 
  111: 	adminUsers, err := postgres.NewAdminUserRepository(db)
  112: 	if err != nil {
  113: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  114: 			"construct admin user repository: %w",
  115: 			err,
  116: 		)
  117: 	}
  118: 	adminAPIKeys, err := postgres.NewAdminAPIKeyRepository(db)
  119: 	if err != nil {
  120: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  121: 			"construct admin API-key repository: %w",
  122: 			err,
  123: 		)
  124: 	}
  125: 	adminProvisioning, err :=
  126: 		postgres.NewAdminAPIKeyProvisioningRepository(db)
  127: 	if err != nil {
  128: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  129: 			"construct admin API-key provisioning repository: %w",
  130: 			err,
  131: 		)
  132: 	}
  133: 	adminAudit, err := postgres.NewAdminAuditStore(db)
  134: 	if err != nil {
  135: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  136: 			"construct admin audit store: %w",
  137: 			err,
  138: 		)
  139: 	}
  140: 	adminResellers, err := postgres.NewAdminResellerRepository(db)
  141: 	if err != nil {
  142: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  143: 			"construct admin reseller repository: %w",
  144: 			err,
  145: 		)
  146: 	}
  147: 	adminRoutes, err := postgres.NewAdminRouteRepository(db)
  148: 	if err != nil {
  149: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  150: 			"construct admin route repository: %w",
  151: 			err,
  152: 		)
  153: 	}
  154: 	adminRoutePrices, err :=
  155: 		postgres.NewAdminRoutePriceRepository(db)
  156: 	if err != nil {
  157: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  158: 			"construct admin route-price repository: %w",
  159: 			err,
  160: 		)
  161: 	}
  162: 	adminUsage, err := postgres.NewAdminUsageLedger(db)
  163: 	if err != nil {
  164: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  165: 			"construct admin usage ledger: %w",
  166: 			err,
  167: 		)
  168: 	}
  169: 
  170: 	billingSessions, err := postgres.NewBillingSessionStore(db)
  171: 	if err != nil {
  172: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  173: 			"construct billing-session store: %w",
  174: 			err,
  175: 		)
  176: 	}
  177: 	routeEvents, err := postgres.NewRouteEventStore(db)
  178: 	if err != nil {
  179: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  180: 			"construct route-event store: %w",
  181: 			err,
  182: 		)
  183: 	}
  184: 	telegramAlerts, err := postgres.NewTelegramAlertStore(db)
  185: 	if err != nil {
  186: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  187: 			"construct Telegram-alert store: %w",
  188: 			err,
  189: 		)
  190: 	}
  191: 	apiKeyProvisioning, err :=
  192: 		postgres.NewAPIKeyProvisioningStore(db)
  193: 	if err != nil {
  194: 		return RepositoryGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  195: 			"construct API-key provisioning store: %w",
  196: 			err,
  197: 		)
  198: 	}
  199: 
  200: 	return RepositoryGraph{
  201: 		Users:              users,
  202: 		APIKeys:            apiKeys,
  203: 		Resellers:          resellers,
  204: 		Routes:             routes,
  205: 		ModelCatalogRoutes: routes,
  206: 		RoutePrices:        routePrices,
  207: 		UsageLedger:        usageLedger,
  208: 		ForwardingAttempts: forwardingAttempts,
  209: 
  210: 		LLMRequestAtomicReservation:        atomicReservation,
  211: 		LLMRequestRouteReservationTransfer: routeReservationTransfer,
  212: 
  213: 		AdminUsers:        adminUsers,
  214: 		AdminAPIKeys:      adminAPIKeys,
  215: 		AdminProvisioning: adminProvisioning,
  216: 		AdminAudit:        adminAudit,
  217: 		AdminResellers:    adminResellers,
  218: 		AdminRoutes:       adminRoutes,
  219: 		AdminRoutePrices:  adminRoutePrices,
  220: 		AdminUsage:        adminUsage,
  221: 
  222: 		BillingSessions: billingSessions,
  223: 		RouteEvents:     routeEvents,
  224: 		TelegramAlerts:  telegramAlerts,
  225: 
  226: 		APIKeyProvisioning: apiKeyProvisioning,
  227: 	}, nil
  228: }
  229: 
  230: func (g RepositoryGraph) Validate() error {
  231: 	switch {
  232: 	case g.Users == nil:
  233: 		return fmt.Errorf("user repository is nil")
  234: 	case g.APIKeys == nil:
  235: 		return fmt.Errorf("API-key repository is nil")
  236: 	case g.Resellers == nil:
  237: 		return fmt.Errorf("reseller query repository is nil")
  238: 	case g.Routes == nil:
  239: 		return fmt.Errorf("route repository is nil")
  240: 	case g.ModelCatalogRoutes == nil:
  241: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  242: 			"model catalog route repository is nil",
  243: 		)
  244: 	case g.RoutePrices == nil:
  245: 		return fmt.Errorf("route-price repository is nil")
  246: 	case g.UsageLedger == nil:
  247: 		return fmt.Errorf("usage ledger is nil")
  248: 	case g.ForwardingAttempts == nil:
  249: 		return fmt.Errorf("forwarding-attempt store is nil")
  250: 	case g.LLMRequestAtomicReservation == nil:
  251: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  252: 			"LLM-request atomic reservation is nil",
  253: 		)
  254: 	case g.LLMRequestRouteReservationTransfer == nil:
  255: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  256: 			"LLM-request route reservation transfer is nil",
  257: 		)
  258: 	case g.AdminUsers == nil:
  259: 		return fmt.Errorf("admin user repository is nil")
  260: 	case g.AdminAPIKeys == nil:
  261: 		return fmt.Errorf("admin API-key repository is nil")
  262: 	case g.AdminProvisioning == nil:
  263: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  264: 			"admin API-key provisioning repository is nil",
  265: 		)
  266: 	case g.AdminAudit == nil:
  267: 		return fmt.Errorf("admin audit store is nil")
  268: 	case g.AdminResellers == nil:
  269: 		return fmt.Errorf("admin reseller repository is nil")
  270: 	case g.AdminRoutes == nil:
  271: 		return fmt.Errorf("admin route repository is nil")
  272: 	case g.AdminRoutePrices == nil:
  273: 		return fmt.Errorf("admin route-price repository is nil")
  274: 	case g.AdminUsage == nil:
  275: 		return fmt.Errorf("admin usage ledger is nil")
  276: 	case g.BillingSessions == nil:
  277: 		return fmt.Errorf("billing-session store is nil")
  278: 	case g.RouteEvents == nil:
  279: 		return fmt.Errorf("route-event store is nil")
  280: 	case g.TelegramAlerts == nil:
  281: 		return fmt.Errorf("Telegram-alert store is nil")
  282: 	case g.APIKeyProvisioning == nil:
  283: 		return fmt.Errorf("API-key provisioning store is nil")
  284: 	default:
  285: 		return nil
  286: 	}
  287: }

FILE: internal/app/runtime.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: 438a0bcdcea3d27a3f9af5807cf0fb71214ff65f
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: package app
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"context"
    5: 	"fmt"
    6: 	"net/http"
    7: 	"sync"
    8: 
    9: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/config"
   10: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/infrastructure/postgres"
   11: 	provisioningexpiration "github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/worker/provisioningexpiration"
   12: )
   13: 
   14: type Runtime struct {
   15: 	Config       config.Config
   16: 	Primitives   RuntimePrimitives
   17: 	Security     SecurityGraph
   18: 	Provisioning ProvisioningInfrastructureGraph
   19: 	Billing      BillingInfrastructureGraph
   20: 	Forwarding   ForwardingInfrastructureGraph
   21: 	Repositories RepositoryGraph
   22: 	Applications ApplicationGraph
   23: 	Workers      WorkerGraph
   24: 	Transports   TransportGraph
   25: 	Handler      http.Handler
   26: 
   27: 	database  *postgres.DB
   28: 	closeOnce sync.Once
   29: }
   30: 
   31: func NewRuntime(
   32: 	ctx context.Context,
   33: 	cfg config.Config,
   34: 	provisioningExpirationObserver provisioningexpiration.Observer,
   35: ) (*Runtime, error) {
   36: 	primitives, err := NewRuntimePrimitives()
   37: 	if err != nil {
   38: 		return nil, err
   39: 	}
   40: 
   41: 	security, err := NewSecurityGraph(cfg)
   42: 	if err != nil {
   43: 		return nil, err
   44: 	}
   45: 
   46: 	provisioningInfrastructure, err :=
   47: 		NewProvisioningInfrastructureGraph(
   48: 			cfg,
   49: 			security,
   50: 		)
   51: 	if err != nil {
   52: 		return nil, err
   53: 	}
   54: 
   55: 	billingInfrastructure, err :=
   56: 		NewBillingInfrastructureGraph(
   57: 			cfg,
   58: 			primitives.Clock,
   59: 		)
   60: 	if err != nil {
   61: 		return nil, err
   62: 	}
   63: 
   64: 	forwardingInfrastructure, err :=
   65: 		NewForwardingInfrastructureGraph()
   66: 	if err != nil {
   67: 		return nil, err
   68: 	}
   69: 
   70: 	database, err := postgres.Open(
   71: 		ctx,
   72: 		cfg.DatabaseDSN,
   73: 	)
   74: 	if err != nil {
   75: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf(
   76: 			"open PostgreSQL: %w",
   77: 			err,
   78: 		)
   79: 	}
   80: 
   81: 	closed := false
   82: 	closeDatabase := func() {
   83: 		if closed {
   84: 			return
   85: 		}
   86: 		closed = true
   87: 		database.Close()
   88: 	}
   89: 
   90: 	if err := database.ApplyMigrations(ctx); err != nil {
   91: 		closeDatabase()
   92: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf(
   93: 			"apply PostgreSQL migrations: %w",
   94: 			err,
   95: 		)
   96: 	}
   97: 	if err := database.ValidateSchema(ctx); err != nil {
   98: 		closeDatabase()
   99: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf(
  100: 			"validate PostgreSQL schema: %w",
  101: 			err,
  102: 		)
  103: 	}
  104: 
  105: 	repositories, err := NewRepositoryGraph(
  106: 		database,
  107: 		primitives.Clock,
  108: 	)
  109: 	if err != nil {
  110: 		closeDatabase()
  111: 		return nil, err
  112: 	}
  113: 	if err := repositories.Validate(); err != nil {
  114: 		closeDatabase()
  115: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf(
  116: 			"validate repository graph: %w",
  117: 			err,
  118: 		)
  119: 	}
  120: 
  121: 	applications, err := NewApplicationGraph(
  122: 		cfg,
  123: 		primitives,
  124: 		security,
  125: 		provisioningInfrastructure,
  126: 		billingInfrastructure,
  127: 		forwardingInfrastructure,
  128: 		repositories,
  129: 	)
  130: 	if err != nil {
  131: 		closeDatabase()
  132: 		return nil, err
  133: 	}
  134: 
  135: 	workers, err := NewWorkerGraph(
  136: 		cfg,
  137: 		applications,
  138: 		provisioningExpirationObserver,
  139: 	)
  140: 	if err != nil {
  141: 		closeDatabase()
  142: 		return nil, err
  143: 	}
  144: 
  145: 	transports, err := NewTransportGraph(
  146: 		cfg,
  147: 		primitives,
  148: 		security,
  149: 		applications,
  150: 	)
  151: 	if err != nil {
  152: 		closeDatabase()
  153: 		return nil, err
  154: 	}
  155: 
  156: 	runtime := &Runtime{
  157: 		Config:       cfg,
  158: 		Primitives:   primitives,
  159: 		Security:     security,
  160: 		Provisioning: provisioningInfrastructure,
  161: 		Billing:      billingInfrastructure,
  162: 		Forwarding:   forwardingInfrastructure,
  163: 		Repositories: repositories,
  164: 		Applications: applications,
  165: 		Workers:      workers,
  166: 		Transports:   transports,
  167: 		Handler:      transports.Root,
  168: 		database:     database,
  169: 	}
  170: 	return runtime, nil
  171: }
  172: 
  173: func (r *Runtime) Ping(ctx context.Context) error {
  174: 	if r == nil || r.database == nil {
  175: 		return postgres.ErrInvalidDatabaseConfig
  176: 	}
  177: 	return r.database.Ping(ctx)
  178: }
  179: 
  180: func (r *Runtime) Close() {
  181: 	if r == nil {
  182: 		return
  183: 	}
  184: 	r.closeOnce.Do(func() {
  185: 		if r.database != nil {
  186: 			r.database.Close()
  187: 		}
  188: 	})
  189: }

  219: 			"runtime provisioning transport is disabled",
  220: 		)
  221: 	}

  223: 		t.Fatal("runtime handler is nil")
  224: 	}

  227: 			"runtime handler is not transport graph root",
  228: 		)

  232: 	); err != nil {
  233: 		t.Fatalf("runtime ping: %v", err)
  234: 	}
  235: 
  236: 	runtime.Close()
  237: 	runtime.Close()
  238: }

====================================================================================================
FILE: internal/app/worker.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: bb413584d678dca90cc42420f37be652eb949eed
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: package app
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"context"
    5: 	"errors"
    6: 	"fmt"
    7: 	"log"
    8: 
    9: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/config"
   10: 	forwardingattemptrecovery "github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/worker/forwardingattemptrecovery"
   11: 	provisioningexpiration "github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/worker/provisioningexpiration"
   12: )
   13: 
   14: var ErrInvalidWorkerGraph = errors.New(
   15: 	"invalid worker graph",
   16: )
   17: 
   18: type WorkerRunner interface {
   19: 	Run(context.Context) error
   20: }
   21: 
   22: type WorkerGraph struct {
   23: 	ProvisioningExpirationEnabled bool
   24: 	ProvisioningExpiration        WorkerRunner
   25: 
   26: 	ForwardingAttemptRecoveryEnabled bool
   27: 	ForwardingAttemptRecovery        WorkerRunner
   28: }
   29: 
   30: func NewWorkerGraph(
   31: 	cfg config.Config,
   32: 	applications ApplicationGraph,
   33: 	provisioningObserver provisioningexpiration.Observer,
   34: ) (WorkerGraph, error) {
   35: 	recoveryObserver, err :=
   36: 		NewForwardingAttemptRecoveryLogObserver(
   37: 			log.Default(),
   38: 		)
   39: 	if err != nil {
   40: 		return WorkerGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   41: 			"construct forwarding attempt recovery observer: %w",
   42: 			err,
   43: 		)
   44: 	}
   45: 	return newWorkerGraphWithObservers(
   46: 		cfg,
   47: 		applications,
   48: 		provisioningObserver,
   49: 		recoveryObserver,
   50: 	)
   51: }
   52: 
   53: func newWorkerGraphWithObservers(
   54: 	cfg config.Config,
   55: 	applications ApplicationGraph,
   56: 	provisioningObserver provisioningexpiration.Observer,
   57: 	recoveryObserver forwardingattemptrecovery.Observer,
   58: ) (WorkerGraph, error) {
   59: 	if err := applications.Validate(); err != nil {
   60: 		return WorkerGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   61: 			"validate application graph: %w",
   62: 			err,
   63: 		)
   64: 	}
   65: 
   66: 	recoveryWorker, err := forwardingattemptrecovery.New(
   67: 		applications.ForwardingAttemptRecovery,
   68: 		recoveryObserver,
   69: 		cfg.ForwardingAttemptRecoveryInterval,
   70: 		cfg.ForwardingAttemptRecoveryBatchSize,
   71: 	)
   72: 	if err != nil {
   73: 		return WorkerGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   74: 			"construct forwarding attempt recovery worker: %w",
   75: 			err,
   76: 		)
   77: 	}
   78: 
   79: 	graph := WorkerGraph{
   80: 		ForwardingAttemptRecoveryEnabled: true,
   81: 		ForwardingAttemptRecovery:        recoveryWorker,
   82: 	}
   83: 	if applications.ProvisioningEnabled {
   84: 		provisioningWorker, err := provisioningexpiration.New(
   85: 			applications.Provisioning,
   86: 			provisioningObserver,
   87: 			cfg.APIKeyProvisioningExpirationInterval,
   88: 			cfg.APIKeyProvisioningExpirationBatchSize,
   89: 		)
   90: 		if err != nil {
   91: 			return WorkerGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
   92: 				"construct provisioning expiration worker: %w",
   93: 				err,
   94: 			)
   95: 		}
   96: 		graph.ProvisioningExpirationEnabled = true
   97: 		graph.ProvisioningExpiration = provisioningWorker
   98: 	}
   99: 
  100: 	if err := graph.Validate(); err != nil {
  101: 		return WorkerGraph{}, fmt.Errorf(
  102: 			"validate worker graph: %w",
  103: 			err,
  104: 		)
  105: 	}
  106: 	return graph, nil
  107: }
  108: 
  109: func (g WorkerGraph) Validate() error {
  110: 	switch {
  111: 	case g.ProvisioningExpirationEnabled &&
  112: 		g.ProvisioningExpiration == nil:
  113: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  114: 			"enabled provisioning expiration worker is nil",
  115: 		)
  116: 	case !g.ProvisioningExpirationEnabled &&
  117: 		g.ProvisioningExpiration != nil:
  118: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  119: 			"disabled provisioning expiration worker is non-nil",
  120: 		)
  121: 	case g.ForwardingAttemptRecoveryEnabled &&
  122: 		g.ForwardingAttemptRecovery == nil:
  123: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  124: 			"enabled forwarding attempt recovery worker is nil",
  125: 		)
  126: 	case !g.ForwardingAttemptRecoveryEnabled &&
  127: 		g.ForwardingAttemptRecovery != nil:
  128: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  129: 			"disabled forwarding attempt recovery worker is non-nil",
  130: 		)
  131: 	default:
  132: 		return nil
  133: 	}
  134: }
  135: 
  136: func (g WorkerGraph) Run(ctx context.Context) error {
  137: 	if ctx == nil {
  138: 		return ErrInvalidWorkerGraph
  139: 	}
  140: 	if err := g.Validate(); err != nil {
  141: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  142: 			"%w: %v",
  143: 			ErrInvalidWorkerGraph,
  144: 			err,
  145: 		)
  146: 	}
  147: 
  148: 	runners := make([]WorkerRunner, 0, 2)
  149: 	if g.ProvisioningExpirationEnabled {
  150: 		runners = append(
  151: 			runners,
  152: 			g.ProvisioningExpiration,
  153: 		)
  154: 	}
  155: 	if g.ForwardingAttemptRecoveryEnabled {
  156: 		runners = append(
  157: 			runners,
  158: 			g.ForwardingAttemptRecovery,
  159: 		)
  160: 	}
  161: 	if len(runners) == 0 {
  162: 		<-ctx.Done()
  163: 		return nil
  164: 	}
  165: 
  166: 	runContext, cancel := context.WithCancel(ctx)
  167: 	defer cancel()
  168: 
  169: 	results := make(chan error, len(runners))
  170: 	for _, runner := range runners {
  171: 		current := runner
  172: 		go func() {
  173: 			results <- current.Run(runContext)
  174: 		}()
  175: 	}
  176: 
  177: 	var result error
  178: 	for range runners {
  179: 		currentErr := <-results
  180: 		if result == nil {
  181: 			result = currentErr
  182: 			cancel()
  183: 		} else {
  184: 			result = errors.Join(result, currentErr)
  185: 		}
  186: 	}
  187: 	return result
  188: }

  167: func TestWorkerGraphRunDisabledWaitsForCancellation(
  168: 	t *testing.T,
  169: ) {
  170: 	graph := WorkerGraph{}
  171: 	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(
  172: 		context.Background(),
  173: 	)
  174: 	done := make(chan error, 1)
  175: 	go func() {
  176: 		done <- graph.Run(ctx)
  177: 	}()
  178: 
  179: 	select {
  180: 	case err := <-done:
  181: 		t.Fatalf(
  182: 			"disabled graph returned before cancellation: %v",
  183: 			err,
  184: 		)
  185: 	case <-time.After(20 * time.Millisecond):
  186: 	}
  187: 
  188: 	cancel()
  189: 	select {
  190: 	case err := <-done:
  191: 		if err != nil {
  192: 			t.Fatalf("Run: %v", err)
  193: 		}
  194: 	case <-time.After(time.Second):
  195: 		t.Fatal(
  196: 			"disabled graph did not stop after cancellation",
  197: 		)
  198: 	}
  199: }
  200: 
  201: func TestWorkerGraphRunRejectsInvalidState(
  202: 	t *testing.T,
  203: ) {
  204: 	runner := &workerGraphRunner{}
  205: 	graph := WorkerGraph{
  206: 		ProvisioningExpiration: runner,
  207: 	}
  208: 
  209: 	err := graph.Run(context.Background())
  210: 	if !errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidWorkerGraph) {
  211: 		t.Fatalf(
  212: 			"error = %v, want ErrInvalidWorkerGraph",
  213: 			err,
  214: 		)
  215: 	}
  216: 	if runner.calls != 0 {
  217: 		t.Fatal("invalid graph invoked worker")
  218: 	}
  219: }

   13: 		"id": batch.ID, "user_id": batch.UserID,
   14: 		"billing_subject_user_id": batch.BillingSubjectUserID,

   21: 		"created_at":                     batch.CreatedAt, "charged_at": batch.ChargedAt,

   26: func (s *Service) ListBillingChargeBatches(ctx context.Context, input BillingBatchListInput) (ListResult[domain.BillingChargeBatch], error) {
   27: 	pageReq, err := normalizePage(input.Limit, input.Offset)
   28: 	if err != nil {
   29: 		return ListResult[domain.BillingChargeBatch]{}, err
   30: 	}
   31: 	if err := validateWindow(input.CreatedFrom, input.CreatedTo); err != nil {
   32: 		return ListResult[domain.BillingChargeBatch]{}, err
   33: 	}
   34: 	if input.ProviderType != "" && !validateProviderType(input.ProviderType) {
   35: 		return ListResult[domain.BillingChargeBatch]{}, ErrInvalidRequest
   36: 	}
   37: 	page, err := s.deps.Ledger.ListBillingChargeBatches(ctx, ports.BillingChargeBatchListFilter{UserID: input.UserID, ProviderType: input.ProviderType, ClientModel: input.ClientModel, Status: input.Status, CreatedFrom: input.CreatedFrom, CreatedTo: input.CreatedTo, Page: pageReq})
   38: 	if err != nil {
   39: 		return ListResult[domain.BillingChargeBatch]{}, mapStoreError(err)
   40: 	}
   41: 	return listResult(page, pageReq), nil
   42: }
   43: 
   44: func (s *Service) GetBillingChargeBatch(ctx context.Context, id string) (ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot, error) {
   45: 	if !validBillingChargeID(id) {
   46: 		return ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot{}, ErrInvalidRequest
   47: 	}
   48: 	snapshot, err := s.deps.Ledger.LoadChargeBatchByID(ctx, id)
   49: 	if err != nil {
   50: 		return ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot{}, mapStoreError(err)
   51: 	}
   52: 	return snapshot, nil
   53: }
   54: 
   55: func (s *Service) RetryFailedBillingChargeBatch(ctx context.Context, command CommandContext, id string) (domain.BillingChargeBatch, error) {
   56: 	if validateCommand(command) != nil || !validBillingChargeID(id) {
   57: 		return domain.BillingChargeBatch{}, ErrInvalidRequest
   58: 	}
   59: 	snapshot, err := s.deps.Ledger.LoadChargeBatchByID(ctx, id)
   60: 	if err != nil {
   61: 		return domain.BillingChargeBatch{}, mapStoreError(err)
   62: 	}
   63: 	if snapshot.Batch.Status != domain.BillingChargeStatusFailed {
   64: 		return domain.BillingChargeBatch{}, ErrStateConflict
   65: 	}
   66: 	at, err := nowUTC(s.deps.Clock)
   67: 	if err != nil {
   68: 		return domain.BillingChargeBatch{}, err
   69: 	}
   70: 	audit := auditContext(command, domain.AuditActionBillingChargeRetry, "billing_charge_batch", id, billingBatchState(snapshot.Batch), nil, at)
   71: 	batch, err := s.deps.BatchRetrier.RetryFailedBatch(ctx, id, audit)
   72: 	if err != nil {
   73: 		switch {
   74: 		case errors.Is(err, ErrBatchRetryNotFound):
   75: 			return domain.BillingChargeBatch{}, ErrNotFound
   76: 		case errors.Is(err, ErrBatchRetryStateConflict):
   77: 			return domain.BillingChargeBatch{}, ErrStateConflict
   78: 		case errors.Is(err, ErrBatchRetryUnavailable):
   79: 			return domain.BillingChargeBatch{}, ErrStoreUnavailable
   80: 		default:
   81: 			return domain.BillingChargeBatch{}, ErrInternal
   82: 		}
   83: 	}
   84: 	return batch, nil
   85: }
   86:

   90: 		return ListResult[domain.AdminAuditEntry]{}, err

   93: 		return ListResult[domain.AdminAuditEntry]{}, err
   94: 	}
   95: 	page, err := s.deps.Audit.ListAuditEntries(ctx, ports.AuditListFilter{AdminSubject: input.AdminSubject, Action: input.Action, EntityType: input.EntityType, EntityID: input.EntityID, CreatedFrom: input.CreatedFrom, CreatedTo: input.CreatedTo, Page: pageReq})
   96: 	if err != nil {
   97: 		return ListResult[domain.AdminAuditEntry]{}, mapStoreError(err)
   98: 	}
   99: 	return listResult(page, pageReq), nil
  100: }

FILE: internal/application/admin/resellers.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: b8687aff8e77d67648ee01c07e6d82eb47a4ffc8

    1: package admin
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"context"

    7: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/ports"
