   10: func resellerState(r domain.Reseller) domain.AuditState {
   11: 	return domain.AuditState{
   12: 		"id": r.ID, "name": r.Name, "provider_type": r.ProviderType,
   13: 		"base_url": r.BaseURL, "api_key_env": r.APIKeyEnv, "enabled": r.Enabled,
   14: 		"balance_cents": r.BalanceCents, "reserved_cents": r.ReservedCents,
   15: 		"minimum_balance_cents": r.MinimumBalanceCents, "created_at": r.CreatedAt,
   16: 		"updated_at": r.UpdatedAt, "disabled_at": r.DisabledAt,
   17: 	}
   18: }
   19: 
   20: func resellerView(r domain.Reseller, present bool) ResellerView {
   21: 	return ResellerView{ID: r.ID, Name: r.Name, ProviderType: r.ProviderType, BaseURL: r.BaseURL, APIKeyEnv: r.APIKeyEnv, APIKeyEnvPresent: present, Enabled: r.Enabled, BalanceCents: r.BalanceCents, ReservedCents: r.ReservedCents, MinimumBalanceCents: r.MinimumBalanceCents, CreatedAt: r.CreatedAt, UpdatedAt: r.UpdatedAt}
   22: }
   23: 
   24: func validateReseller(r domain.Reseller) error {
   25: 	if isBlank(r.ID) || isBlank(r.Name) || !validateProviderType(r.ProviderType) || r.APIKeyEnv == "" {
   26: 		return ErrInvalidRequest
   27: 	}
   28: 	if err := domain.ValidateResellerBaseURL(r.BaseURL); err != nil {
   29: 		return ErrInvalidRequest
   30: 	}
   31: 	if r.ReservedCents < 0 || r.MinimumBalanceCents < 0 {
   32: 		return ErrInvalidRequest
   33: 	}
   34: 	if _, err := checkedAvailableResellerBalance(r); err != nil {
   35: 		return err
   36: 	}
   37: 	if requireUTC(r.CreatedAt) != nil || requireUTC(r.UpdatedAt) != nil || optionalUTC(r.DisabledAt) != nil {
   38: 		return ErrInvalidRequest
   39: 	}
   40: 	return nil
   41: }
   42: 
   43: func (s *Service) ListResellers(ctx context.Context, input ResellerListInput) (ListResult[ResellerView], error) {
   44: 	pageReq, err := normalizePage(input.Limit, input.Offset)
   45: 	if err != nil {
   46: 		return ListResult[ResellerView]{}, err
   47: 	}
   48: 	if input.ProviderType != "" && !validateProviderType(input.ProviderType) {
   49: 		return ListResult[ResellerView]{}, ErrInvalidRequest
   50: 	}
   51: 	page, err := s.deps.Resellers.ListResellers(ctx, ports.ResellerListFilter{ProviderType: input.ProviderType, Enabled: input.Enabled, Page: pageReq})
   52: 	if err != nil {
   53: 		return ListResult[ResellerView]{}, mapStoreError(err)
   54: 	}
   55: 	items := make([]ResellerView, len(page.Items))
   56: 	for i, reseller := range page.Items {
   57: 		present, err := s.deps.Secrets.Exists(ctx, reseller.APIKeyEnv)
   58: 		if err != nil {
   59: 			return ListResult[ResellerView]{}, ErrStoreUnavailable
   60: 		}
   61: 		items[i] = resellerView(reseller, present)
   62: 	}
   63: 	return ListResult[ResellerView]{Data: items, Pagination: Pagination{Limit: pageReq.Limit, Offset: pageReq.Offset, Total: page.Total}}, nil
   64: }
   65: 
   66: func (s *Service) GetReseller(ctx context.Context, id string) (ResellerView, error) {
   67: 	if isBlank(id) {
   68: 		return ResellerView{}, ErrInvalidRequest
   69: 	}
   70: 	reseller, err := s.deps.Resellers.FindResellerByID(ctx, id)
   71: 	if err != nil {
   72: 		return ResellerView{}, mapStoreError(err)
   73: 	}
   74: 	if reseller == nil {
   75: 		return ResellerView{}, ErrNotFound
   76: 	}
   77: 	present, err := s.deps.Secrets.Exists(ctx, reseller.APIKeyEnv)
   78: 	if err != nil {
   79: 		return ResellerView{}, ErrStoreUnavailable
   80: 	}
   81: 	return resellerView(*reseller, present), nil
   82: }
   83: 
   84: func (s *Service) CreateReseller(ctx context.Context, command CommandContext, input CreateResellerInput) (ResellerView, error) {
   85: 	if validateCommand(command) != nil {
   86: 		return ResellerView{}, ErrInvalidRequest
   87: 	}
   88: 	at, err := nowUTC(s.deps.Clock)
   89: 	if err != nil {
   90: 		return ResellerView{}, err
   91: 	}
   92: 	reseller := input.Reseller
   93: 	reseller.ReservedCents = 0
   94: 	reseller.CreatedAt = at
   95: 	reseller.UpdatedAt = at
   96: 	reseller.DisabledAt = nil
   97: 	if err := validateReseller(reseller); err != nil {
   98: 		return ResellerView{}, err
   99: 	}
  100: 	present, err := s.deps.Secrets.Exists(ctx, reseller.APIKeyEnv)
  101: 	if err != nil {
  102: 		return ResellerView{}, ErrStoreUnavailable
  103: 	}
  104: 	audit := auditContext(command, domain.AuditActionResellerCreate, "reseller", reseller.ID, nil, resellerState(reseller), at)
  105: 	created, err := s.deps.Resellers.CreateResellerWithAudit(ctx, reseller, audit)
  106: 	if err != nil {
  107: 		return ResellerView{}, mapStoreError(err)
  108: 	}
  109: 	return resellerView(created, present), nil
  110: }
  111: 
  112: func (s *Service) UpdateReseller(ctx context.Context, command CommandContext, input UpdateResellerInput) (ResellerView, error) {
  113: 	if validateCommand(command) != nil || isBlank(input.ID) || (input.Name == nil && input.BaseURL == nil && input.APIKeyEnv == nil && input.Enabled == nil && input.MinimumBalanceCents == nil) {
  114: 		return ResellerView{}, ErrInvalidRequest
  115: 	}
  116: 	current, err := s.deps.Resellers.FindResellerByID(ctx, input.ID)
  117: 	if err != nil {
  118: 		return ResellerView{}, mapStoreError(err)
  119: 	}
  120: 	if current == nil {
  121: 		return ResellerView{}, ErrNotFound
  122: 	}
  123: 	next := *current
  124: 	if input.Name != nil {
  125: 		next.Name = *input.Name
  126: 	}
  127: 	if input.BaseURL != nil {
  128: 		next.BaseURL = *input.BaseURL
  129: 	}
  130: 	if input.APIKeyEnv != nil {
  131: 		next.APIKeyEnv = *input.APIKeyEnv
  132: 	}
  133: 	if input.Enabled != nil {
  134: 		next.Enabled = *input.Enabled
  135: 	}
  136: 	if input.MinimumBalanceCents != nil {
  137: 		next.MinimumBalanceCents = *input.MinimumBalanceCents
  138: 	}
  139: 	at, err := nowUTC(s.deps.Clock)
  140: 	if err != nil {
  141: 		return ResellerView{}, err
  142: 	}
  143: 	next.UpdatedAt = at
  144: 	if current.Enabled && !next.Enabled {
  145: 		next.DisabledAt = &at
  146: 	}
  147: 	if !current.Enabled && next.Enabled {
  148: 		next.DisabledAt = nil
  149: 	}
  150: 	if err := validateReseller(next); err != nil {
  151: 		return ResellerView{}, err
  152: 	}
  153: 	present, err := s.deps.Secrets.Exists(ctx, next.APIKeyEnv)
  154: 	if err != nil {
  155: 		return ResellerView{}, ErrStoreUnavailable
  156: 	}
  157: 	audit := auditContext(command, domain.AuditActionResellerUpdate, "reseller", next.ID, resellerState(*current), resellerState(next), at)
  158: 	updated, err := s.deps.Resellers.CompareAndSwapResellerWithAudit(ctx, *current, next, audit)
  159: 	if err != nil {
  160: 		return ResellerView{}, mapStoreError(err)
  161: 	}
  162: 	return resellerView(updated, present), nil
  163: }
  164: 
  165: func (s *Service) SetResellerEnabled(ctx context.Context, command CommandContext, id string, enabled bool) (ResellerView, error) {
  166: 	if validateCommand(command) != nil || isBlank(id) {
  167: 		return ResellerView{}, ErrInvalidRequest
  168: 	}
  169: 	current, err := s.deps.Resellers.FindResellerByID(ctx, id)
  170: 	if err != nil {
  171: 		return ResellerView{}, mapStoreError(err)
  172: 	}
  173: 	if current == nil {
  174: 		return ResellerView{}, ErrNotFound
  175: 	}
  176: 	if current.Enabled == enabled {
  177: 		return ResellerView{}, ErrStateConflict
  178: 	}
  179: 	at, err := nowUTC(s.deps.Clock)
  180: 	if err != nil {
  181: 		return ResellerView{}, err
  182: 	}
  183: 	next := *current
  184: 	next.Enabled = enabled
  185: 	next.UpdatedAt = at
  186: 	action := domain.AuditActionResellerDisable
  187: 	if enabled {
  188: 		next.DisabledAt = nil
  189: 		action = domain.AuditActionResellerEnable
  190: 	} else {
  191: 		next.DisabledAt = &at
  192: 	}
  193: 	present, err := s.deps.Secrets.Exists(ctx, next.APIKeyEnv)
  194: 	if err != nil {
  195: 		return ResellerView{}, ErrStoreUnavailable
  196: 	}
  197: 	audit := auditContext(command, action, "reseller", id, resellerState(*current), resellerState(next), at)
  198: 	updated, err := s.deps.Resellers.CompareAndSwapResellerWithAudit(ctx, *current, next, audit)
  199: 	if err != nil {
  200: 		return ResellerView{}, mapStoreError(err)
  201: 	}
  202: 	return resellerView(updated, present), nil
  203: }
  204: 
  205: func checkedAvailableResellerBalance(r domain.Reseller) (int64, error) {
  206: 	available, err := checkedSub(r.BalanceCents, r.ReservedCents)
  207: 	if err != nil {
  208: 		return 0, ErrInvalidRequest
  209: 	}
  210: 	available, err = checkedSub(available, r.MinimumBalanceCents)
  211: 	if err != nil {
  212: 		return 0, ErrInvalidRequest
  213: 	}
  214: 	return available, nil
  215: }
  216: 
  217: func resellerBalance(r domain.Reseller) (ResellerBalance, error) {
  218: 	available, err := checkedAvailableResellerBalance(r)
  219: 	if err != nil {
  220: 		return ResellerBalance{}, err
  221: 	}
  222: 	return ResellerBalance{ResellerID: r.ID, BalanceCents: r.BalanceCents, ReservedCents: r.ReservedCents, MinimumBalanceCents: r.MinimumBalanceCents, AvailableBalanceCents: available, Currency: currencyRUB}, nil
  223: }
  224: 
  225: func (s *Service) GetResellerBalance(ctx context.Context, id string) (ResellerBalance, error) {
  226: 	if isBlank(id) {
  227: 		return ResellerBalance{}, ErrInvalidRequest
  228: 	}
  229: 	reseller, err := s.deps.Resellers.FindResellerByID(ctx, id)
  230: 	if err != nil {
  231: 		return ResellerBalance{}, mapStoreError(err)
  232: 	}
  233: 	if reseller == nil {
  234: 		return ResellerBalance{}, ErrNotFound
  235: 	}
  236: 	return resellerBalance(*reseller)
  237: }
  238: 
  239: func (s *Service) AdjustResellerBalance(ctx context.Context, command CommandContext, id string, delta int64, reason string) (ResellerBalance, error) {
  240: 	if validateCommand(command) != nil || isBlank(id) || isBlank(reason) {
  241: 		return ResellerBalance{}, ErrInvalidRequest
  242: 	}
  243: 	current, err := s.deps.Resellers.FindResellerByID(ctx, id)
  244: 	if err != nil {
  245: 		return ResellerBalance{}, mapStoreError(err)
  246: 	}
  247: 	if current == nil {
  248: 		return ResellerBalance{}, ErrNotFound
  249: 	}
  250: 	balance, err := checkedAdd(current.BalanceCents, delta)
  251: 	if err != nil {
  252: 		return ResellerBalance{}, err
  253: 	}
  254: 	at, err := nowUTC(s.deps.Clock)
  255: 	if err != nil {
  256: 		return ResellerBalance{}, err
  257: 	}
  258: 	next := *current
  259: 	next.BalanceCents = balance
  260: 	next.UpdatedAt = at
  261: 	result, err := resellerBalance(next)
  262: 	if err != nil {
  263: 		return ResellerBalance{}, err
  264: 	}
  265: 	audit := auditContext(command, domain.AuditActionResellerBalanceAdjust, "reseller", id, resellerState(*current), resellerState(next), at)
  266: 	if _, err := s.deps.Resellers.CompareAndSwapResellerWithAudit(ctx, *current, next, audit); err != nil {
  267: 		return ResellerBalance{}, mapStoreError(err)
  268: 	}
  269: 	return result, nil
  270: }
  271: 
  272: func (s *Service) SetResellerBalance(ctx context.Context, command CommandContext, id string, balance int64, reason string) (ResellerBalance, error) {
  273: 	if validateCommand(command) != nil || isBlank(id) || isBlank(reason) {
  274: 		return ResellerBalance{}, ErrInvalidRequest
  275: 	}
  276: 	current, err := s.deps.Resellers.FindResellerByID(ctx, id)
  277: 	if err != nil {
  278: 		return ResellerBalance{}, mapStoreError(err)
  279: 	}
  280: 	if current == nil {
  281: 		return ResellerBalance{}, ErrNotFound
  282: 	}
  283: 	at, err := nowUTC(s.deps.Clock)
  284: 	if err != nil {
  285: 		return ResellerBalance{}, err
  286: 	}
  287: 	next := *current
  288: 	next.BalanceCents = balance
  289: 	next.UpdatedAt = at
  290: 	result, err := resellerBalance(next)
  291: 	if err != nil {
  292: 		return ResellerBalance{}, err
  293: 	}
  294: 	audit := auditContext(command, domain.AuditActionResellerBalanceSet, "reseller", id, resellerState(*current), resellerState(next), at)
  295: 	if _, err := s.deps.Resellers.CompareAndSwapResellerWithAudit(ctx, *current, next, audit); err != nil {
  296: 		return ResellerBalance{}, mapStoreError(err)
  297: 	}
  298: 	return result, nil
  299: }

   77: func TestCreateResellerChecksSecretPresenceBeforeCommit(t *testing.T) {
   78: 	repo := &stage10MajorResellerRepoFake{}
   79: 	secrets := &stage10MajorSecretPresenceFake{err: errors.New("diagnostic unavailable")}
   80: 	service := &Service{deps: Dependencies{
   81: 		Resellers: repo,
   82: 		Secrets:   secrets,
   83: 		Clock:     &stage10MajorAdminClock{now: time.Unix(100, 0).UTC()},
   84: 	}}
   85: 	_, err := service.CreateReseller(context.Background(), CommandContext{RequestID: "admreq_1", AdminSubject: "admin_token"}, CreateResellerInput{Reseller: stage10MajorValidReseller()})
   86: 	if !errors.Is(err, ErrStoreUnavailable) {
   87: 		t.Fatalf("error = %v", err)
   88: 	}
   89: 	repo.mu.Lock()
   90: 	createCalls := repo.createCalls
   91: 	repo.mu.Unlock()
   92: 	if createCalls != 0 {
   93: 		t.Fatalf("mutation committed before secret diagnostic: %d", createCalls)
   94: 	}
   95: 
   96: 	secrets.mu.Lock()
   97: 	secrets.err = nil
   98: 	secrets.present = true
   99: 	secrets.calls = nil
  100: 	secrets.mu.Unlock()
  101: 	view, err := service.CreateReseller(context.Background(), CommandContext{RequestID: "admreq_2", AdminSubject: "admin_token"}, CreateResellerInput{Reseller: stage10MajorValidReseller()})
  102: 	if err != nil {
  103: 		t.Fatal(err)
  104: 	}
  105: 	if !view.APIKeyEnvPresent {
  106: 		t.Fatal("secret presence boolean was not returned")
  107: 	}
  108: 	secrets.mu.Lock()
  109: 	calls := append([]string(nil), secrets.calls...)
  110: 	secrets.mu.Unlock()
  111: 	if len(calls) != 1 || calls[0] != "PROVIDER_KEY" {
  112: 		t.Fatalf("secret diagnostic calls = %v", calls)
  113: 	}
  114: }

  233: func TestCreateAPIKeyPersistsOnlyHMACAndReturnsRawAfterCommit(t *testing.T) {
  234: 	users := &fakeUsers{user: &domain.User{ID: "usr_1", Enabled: true}}
  235: 	keys := &fakeKeys{}

  237: 	result, err := service.CreateAPIKey(nil, command(), CreateAPIKeyInput{UserID: "usr_1", Name: "Laptop key"})

  239: 		t.Fatal(err)
  240: 	}

  242: 		t.Fatalf("raw=%q", result.APIKey)
  243: 	}

  246: 	keys.mu.Unlock()
  247: 	if persisted.KeyHash == "" || persisted.KeyHash == result.APIKey || len(persisted.KeyHash) != 64 {
  248: 		t.Fatalf("persisted hash=%q", persisted.KeyHash)
  249: 	}
  250: 	if audit.Action != domain.AuditActionAPIKeyCreate {
  251: 		t.Fatalf("action=%q", audit.Action)
  252: 	}
  253: 	encoded, err := json.Marshal(audit)
  254: 	if err != nil {
  255: 		t.Fatal(err)
  256: 	}
  257: 	text := string(encoded)
  258: 	if strings.Contains(text, result.APIKey) || strings.Contains(text, persisted.KeyHash) || strings.Contains(text, "key_hash") {
  259: 		t.Fatalf("secret in audit: %s", text)
  260: 	}
  261: }

  325: func TestPricingFailedResolutionUsesSingleAtomicCASAndExactAuditAction(t *testing.T) {
  326: 	now := time.Unix(1, 0).UTC()
  327: 	current := domain.UsageRecord{LocalRequestID: "llmreq_1", UserID: "usr_1", ProviderType: domain.ProviderOpenAI, ClientModel: "model-a", BillingModel: "openai:model-a", Currency: "RUB", UsageCompleteness: "failed", Status: domain.UsageStatusPricingFailed, FailureReason: "pricing_failed", CreatedAt: now, UpdatedAt: now, FailedAt: &now}
  328: 	ledgerStore := &fakeLedger{record: &current}
  329: 	service := newServiceForTest(t, &fakeUsers{}, &fakeKeys{}, &fakeResellers{}, &fakeRoutes{}, ledgerStore, &fakeSecrets{}, &fakeGenerator{})
  330: 	batchID := "billchg_" + strings.Repeat("a", 64)
  331: 	resolved, err := service.ResolveUsageCharged(nil, command(), ResolveChargedInput{LocalRequestID: "llmreq_1", ChargedAmountCents: 123, BillingChargeRequestID: batchID, Reason: "external charge confirmed"})
  332: 	if err != nil {
  333: 		t.Fatal(err)
  334: 	}
  335: 	ledgerStore.mu.Lock()
  336: 	calls, audit := ledgerStore.resolveCalls, ledgerStore.audit
  337: 	ledgerStore.mu.Unlock()
  338: 	if calls != 1 || resolved.Status != domain.UsageStatusCharged || resolved.BillingChargeRequestID != batchID {
  339: 		t.Fatalf("calls=%d resolved=%+v", calls, resolved)
  340: 	}
  341: 	if audit.Action != domain.AuditActionUsageResolveCharged || audit.RequestID != command().RequestID {
  342: 		t.Fatalf("audit=%+v", audit)
  343: 	}
  344: }

   35: 	f.mu.Lock()
   36: 	defer f.mu.Unlock()
   37: 	f.createCalls++

   43: 	defer f.mu.Unlock()

   77: func TestStage10V5CreateResellerChecksSecretPresenceBeforeCommit(t *testing.T) {
   78: 	repo := &stage10V5ResellerRepoFake{}
   79: 	secrets := &stage10V5SecretPresenceFake{err: errors.New("diagnostic unavailable")}
   80: 	service := &Service{deps: Dependencies{
   81: 		Resellers: repo,
   82: 		Secrets:   secrets,
   83: 		Clock:     &stage10V5AdminClock{now: time.Unix(100, 0).UTC()},
   84: 	}}
   85: 	_, err := service.CreateReseller(context.Background(), CommandContext{RequestID: "admreq_1", AdminSubject: "admin_token"}, CreateResellerInput{Reseller: stage10V5ValidReseller()})
   86: 	if !errors.Is(err, ErrStoreUnavailable) {
   87: 		t.Fatalf("error = %v", err)
   88: 	}
   89: 	repo.mu.Lock()
   90: 	createCalls := repo.createCalls
   91: 	repo.mu.Unlock()
   92: 	if createCalls != 0 {
   93: 		t.Fatalf("mutation committed before secret diagnostic: %d", createCalls)
   94: 	}
   95: 
   96: 	secrets.mu.Lock()
   97: 	secrets.err = nil
   98: 	secrets.present = true
   99: 	secrets.calls = nil
  100: 	secrets.mu.Unlock()
  101: 	view, err := service.CreateReseller(context.Background(), CommandContext{RequestID: "admreq_2", AdminSubject: "admin_token"}, CreateResellerInput{Reseller: stage10V5ValidReseller()})
  102: 	if err != nil {
  103: 		t.Fatal(err)
  104: 	}
  105: 	if !view.APIKeyEnvPresent {
  106: 		t.Fatal("secret presence boolean was not returned")
  107: 	}
  108: 	secrets.mu.Lock()
  109: 	calls := append([]string(nil), secrets.calls...)
  110: 	secrets.mu.Unlock()
  111: 	if len(calls) != 1 || calls[0] != "PROVIDER_KEY" {
  112: 		t.Fatalf("secret diagnostic calls = %v", calls)
  113: 	}
  114: }

  151: }

FILE: internal/application/billing/admission.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: 95443aa1919400903b71dfae7c8422161a7cb806
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: package billing
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"context"
    5: 	"fmt"
    6: 	"strings"
    7: 
    8: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/application/ledger"
    9: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/ports"
   10: )
   11: 
   12: const currencyRUB = "RUB"
   13: 
   14: type AdmissionService struct {
   15: 	identity ports.BillingIdentityService
   16: 	balance  ports.BillingBalanceClient
   17: 	ledger   ports.UsageLedger
   18: }
   19: 
   20: type AdmissionInput struct {
   21: 	UserID               string
   22: 	BillingSubjectUserID string
   23: 	RequiredReserveCents int64
   24: 	Currency             string
   25: }
   26: 
   27: type AdmissionResult struct {
   28: 	Allowed               bool
   29: 	RemoteBalanceCents    int64
   30: 	PendingAmountCents    int64
   31: 	EffectiveBalanceCents int64
   32: 	RequiredReserveCents  int64
   33: 	Currency              string
   34: }
   35: 
   36: func NewAdmissionService(identity ports.BillingIdentityService, balance ports.BillingBalanceClient, usageLedger ports.UsageLedger) (*AdmissionService, error) {
   37: 	if identity == nil || balance == nil || usageLedger == nil {
   38: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("%w: dependency", ErrInvalidBillingInput)
   39: 	}
   40: 	return &AdmissionService{identity: identity, balance: balance, ledger: usageLedger}, nil
   41: }
   42: 
   43: func (s *AdmissionService) Admit(ctx context.Context, input AdmissionInput) (AdmissionResult, error) {
   44: 	var result AdmissionResult
   45: 	if strings.TrimSpace(input.UserID) == "" || strings.TrimSpace(input.BillingSubjectUserID) == "" || input.RequiredReserveCents < 0 {
   46: 		return result, fmt.Errorf("%w: admission", ErrInvalidBillingInput)
   47: 	}
   48: 	currency := input.Currency
   49: 	if currency == "" {
   50: 		currency = currencyRUB
   51: 	}
   52: 	if currency != currencyRUB {
   53: 		return result, fmt.Errorf("%w: currency", ErrInvalidBillingInput)
   54: 	}
   55: 	token, err := s.identity.TokenForSubject(ctx, input.BillingSubjectUserID)
   56: 	if err != nil {
   57: 		return result, ErrBillingIdentityUnavailable
   58: 	}
   59: 	remote, err := s.balance.GetBalance(ctx, token)
   60: 	if err != nil {
   61: 		return result, ErrBillingUnavailable
   62: 	}
   63: 	if err := validateBillingBalance(remote); err != nil {
   64: 		return result, err
   65: 	}
   66: 	snapshot, err := s.ledger.LoadExposure(ctx, input.UserID, currency)
   67: 	if err != nil {
   68: 		return result, ErrBillingStoreUnavailable
   69: 	}
   70: 	exposure, err := ledger.CalculateExposure(snapshot)
   71: 	if err != nil {
   72: 		if err == ledger.ErrUnresolvedUsage {
   73: 			return result, err
   74: 		}
   75: 		return result, ErrBillingStoreUnavailable
   76: 	}
   77: 	balanceResult, err := ledger.EvaluateBalance(ledger.BalanceInput{RemoteBalanceCents: remote.BalanceCents, RequiredReserveCents: input.RequiredReserveCents, Exposure: exposure})
   78: 	result = AdmissionResult{
   79: 		Allowed:               balanceResult.Allowed,
   80: 		RemoteBalanceCents:    balanceResult.RemoteBalanceCents,
   81: 		PendingAmountCents:    balanceResult.PendingAmountCents,
   82: 		EffectiveBalanceCents: balanceResult.EffectiveBalanceCents,
   83: 		RequiredReserveCents:  balanceResult.RequiredReserveCents,
   84: 		Currency:              currency,
   85: 	}
   86: 	if err != nil {
   87: 		return result, err
   88: 	}
   89: 	return result, nil
   90: }
   91: 
   92: func validateBillingBalance(balance ports.BillingBalance) error {
   93: 	if balance.Currency != currencyRUB || balance.BalanceCents < 0 {
   94: 		return ErrBillingUnavailable
   95: 	}
   96: 	return nil
   97: }

    1: package billing

   21: type AutoChargeConfig struct {
   22: 	ThresholdCents     int64
   23: 	MinimumChargeCents int64
   24: }
   25: 
   26: type AutoChargeService struct {
   27: 	identity ports.BillingIdentityService
   28: 	balance  ports.BillingBalanceClient
   29: 	charge   ports.BillingChargeClient
   30: 	ledger   ports.UsageLedger
   31: 	clock    ports.Clock
   32: 	config   AutoChargeConfig
   33: }
   34: 
   35: type AutoChargeInput struct {
   36: 	UserID               string
   37: 	BillingSubjectUserID string
   38: 	Currency             string
   39: }
   40: 
   41: type AutoChargeResult struct {
   42: 	ProcessedBatchID        string
   43: 	ProcessedBatchIDs       []string
   44: 	Deferred                bool
   45: 	BillingBalanceCents     *int64
   46: 	ChargedAmountCents      int64
   47: 	UsedBillingBalanceCents bool
   48: }
   49: 
   50: type chargeGroup struct {
   51: 	key     groupKey
   52: 	records []domain.UsageRecord
   53: 	pending int64
   54: }
   55: 
   56: type groupKey struct {
   57: 	UserID       string
   58: 	ProviderType domain.ProviderType
   59: 	ClientModel  string
   60: 	Currency     string
   61: }
   62: 
   63: func NewAutoChargeService(identity ports.BillingIdentityService, balance ports.BillingBalanceClient, charge ports.BillingChargeClient, usageLedger ports.UsageLedger, clock ports.Clock, config AutoChargeConfig) (*AutoChargeService, error) {
   64: 	if identity == nil || balance == nil || charge == nil || usageLedger == nil || clock == nil {
   65: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("%w: dependency", ErrInvalidBillingInput)
   66: 	}
   67: 	if config.ThresholdCents <= 0 || config.MinimumChargeCents < 0 {
   68: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("%w: config", ErrInvalidBillingInput)
   69: 	}
   70: 	return &AutoChargeService{identity: identity, balance: balance, charge: charge, ledger: usageLedger, clock: clock, config: config}, nil
   71: }
   72: 
   73: func (s *AutoChargeService) Run(ctx context.Context, input AutoChargeInput) (AutoChargeResult, error) {
   74: 	var result AutoChargeResult
   75: 	if strings.TrimSpace(input.UserID) == "" || strings.TrimSpace(input.BillingSubjectUserID) == "" {
   76: 		return result, fmt.Errorf("%w: auto charge", ErrInvalidBillingInput)
   77: 	}
   78: 	currency := input.Currency
   79: 	if currency == "" {
   80: 		currency = currencyRUB
   81: 	}
   82: 	if currency != currencyRUB {
   83: 		return result, fmt.Errorf("%w: currency", ErrInvalidBillingInput)
   84: 	}
   85: 
   86: 	open, err := s.ledger.LoadOpenChargeBatches(ctx, input.UserID, input.BillingSubjectUserID, currency)
   87: 	if err != nil {
   88: 		return result, ErrBillingStoreUnavailable
   89: 	}
   90: 	open = append([]ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot(nil), open...)
   91: 	sort.Slice(open, func(i, j int) bool {
   92: 		if !open[i].Batch.CreatedAt.Equal(open[j].Batch.CreatedAt) {
   93: 			return open[i].Batch.CreatedAt.Before(open[j].Batch.CreatedAt)
   94: 		}
   95: 		return open[i].Batch.ID < open[j].Batch.ID
   96: 	})
   97: 	for _, snapshot := range open {
   98: 		if snapshot.Batch.Status == domain.BillingChargeStatusSucceeded {
   99: 			return result, ErrBillingStoreContractViolation
  100: 		}
  101: 		processed, err := s.processPreparedBatch(ctx, input, snapshot)
  102: 		var mergeErr error
  103: 		result, mergeErr = mergeProcessedResult(result, processed)
  104: 		if mergeErr != nil {
  105: 			return result, mergeErr
  106: 		}
  107: 		if err != nil {
  108: 			return result, err
  109: 		}
  110: 	}
  111: 
  112: 	candidates, err := s.ledger.LoadChargeCandidates(ctx, input.UserID, currency)
  113: 	if err != nil {
  114: 		return result, ErrBillingStoreUnavailable
  115: 	}
  116: 	groups, err := BuildChargeGroups(input.UserID, currency, candidates)
  117: 	if err != nil {
  118: 		return result, ErrBillingStoreContractViolation
  119: 	}
  120: 	pending, err := sumGroups(groups)
  121: 	if err != nil {
  122: 		return result, ErrBillingStoreContractViolation
  123: 	}
  124: 	if pending < s.config.ThresholdCents {
  125: 		result.Deferred = len(result.ProcessedBatchIDs) == 0
  126: 		if len(result.ProcessedBatchIDs) > 0 {
  127: 			return result, nil
  128: 		}
  129: 		return result, ErrChargeDeferred
  130: 	}
  131: 
  132: 	token, err := s.identity.TokenForSubject(ctx, input.BillingSubjectUserID)
  133: 	if err != nil {
  134: 		return result, ErrBillingIdentityUnavailable
  135: 	}
  136: 	remote, err := s.balance.GetBalance(ctx, token)
  137: 	if err != nil {
  138: 		return result, ErrBillingUnavailable
  139: 	}
  140: 	if err := validateBillingBalance(remote); err != nil {
  141: 		return result, err
  142: 	}
  143: 	remainingRemote := remote.BalanceCents
  144: 	for groupIndex, group := range groups {
  145: 		amount := min64(group.pending, remainingRemote)
  146: 		if amount <= 0 || amount < s.config.MinimumChargeCents {
  147: 			continue
  148: 		}
  149: 		plan, err := BuildChargePlan(input.BillingSubjectUserID, group.records, amount, s.clock.Now().UTC())
  150: 		if err != nil {
  151: 			return result, ErrBillingStoreContractViolation
  152: 		}
  153: 		prepared, err := s.ledger.PrepareChargeBatch(ctx, plan)
  154: 		if err != nil {
  155: 			return result, ErrBillingStoreUnavailable
  156: 		}
  157: 		processed, err := s.processPreparedBatch(ctx, input, prepared)
  158: 		var mergeErr error
  159: 		result, mergeErr = mergeProcessedResult(result, processed)
  160: 		if mergeErr != nil {
  161: 			return result, mergeErr
  162: 		}
  163: 		if err != nil {
  164: 			return result, err
  165: 		}
  166: 		if groupIndex+1 < len(groups) {
  167: 			remainingRemote, err = s.resolveRemainingRemoteBalance(
  168: 				ctx,
  169: 				token,
  170: 				remainingRemote,
  171: 				prepared,
  172: 				processed,
  173: 			)
  174: 			if err != nil {
  175: 				return result, err
  176: 			}
  177: 		}
  178: 	}
  179: 	if len(result.ProcessedBatchIDs) == 0 {
  180: 		return AutoChargeResult{Deferred: true}, ErrChargeDeferred
  181: 	}
  182: 	return result, nil
  183: }
  184: 
  185: func (s *AutoChargeService) processPreparedBatch(ctx context.Context, input AutoChargeInput, snapshot ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot) (AutoChargeResult, error) {
  186: 	result := AutoChargeResult{ProcessedBatchID: snapshot.Batch.ID, ProcessedBatchIDs: []string{snapshot.Batch.ID}}
  187: 	if err := ValidateChargeSnapshot(input, snapshot); err != nil {
  188: 		return result, ErrBillingStoreContractViolation
  189: 	}
  190: 	if snapshot.Batch.Status == domain.BillingChargeStatusSucceeded {
  191: 		result.BillingBalanceCents = snapshot.Batch.BillingResponseBalanceCents
  192: 		result.ChargedAmountCents = snapshot.Batch.AmountCents
  193: 		result.UsedBillingBalanceCents = snapshot.Batch.BillingResponseBalanceCents != nil
  194: 		return result, nil
  195: 	}
  196: 	chargeResult, err := s.charge.Charge(ctx, ports.BillingChargeRequest{
  197: 		RequestID:    snapshot.Batch.ID,
  198: 		UserID:       snapshot.Batch.BillingSubjectUserID,
  199: 		Model:        snapshot.Batch.BillingModel,
  200: 		InputTokens:  snapshot.Batch.InputTokens,
  201: 		OutputTokens: snapshot.Batch.OutputTokens,
  202: 		AmountCents:  snapshot.Batch.AmountCents,
  203: 		Currency:     snapshot.Batch.Currency,
  204: 	})
  205: 	if err != nil {
  206: 		if markErr := s.ledger.MarkChargeBatchFailed(ctx, snapshot.Batch.ID, snapshot.Batch.Status, "billing_unavailable", s.clock.Now().UTC()); markErr != nil {
  207: 			return result, ErrChargeReconciliationRequired
  208: 		}
  209: 		return result, ErrBillingUnavailable
  210: 	}
  211: 	if err := validateBillingChargeResult(chargeResult); err != nil {
  212: 		return result, ErrChargeReconciliationRequired
  213: 	}
  214: 	success := ports.UsageChargeSuccess{BatchID: snapshot.Batch.ID, BillingBalanceCents: chargeResult.BalanceCents, ChargedAt: s.clock.Now().UTC(), Allocations: snapshot.Allocations, ExpectedRecords: snapshot.ExpectedRecords}
  215: 	if err := s.ledger.ApplyChargeSuccess(ctx, success); err != nil {
  216: 		return result, ErrChargeReconciliationRequired
  217: 	}
  218: 	result.BillingBalanceCents = chargeResult.BalanceCents
  219: 	result.ChargedAmountCents = snapshot.Batch.AmountCents
  220: 	result.UsedBillingBalanceCents = chargeResult.BalanceCents != nil
  221: 	return result, nil
  222: }
  223: 
  224: func (s *AutoChargeService) resolveRemainingRemoteBalance(
  225: 	ctx context.Context,
  226: 	billingToken string,
  227: 	previous int64,
  228: 	prepared ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot,
  229: 	processed AutoChargeResult,
  230: ) (int64, error) {
  231: 	if prepared.Batch.Status == domain.BillingChargeStatusSucceeded &&
  232: 		processed.BillingBalanceCents == nil {
  233: 		refreshed, err := s.balance.GetBalance(ctx, billingToken)
  234: 		if err != nil {
  235: 			return 0, ErrBillingUnavailable
  236: 		}
  237: 		if err := validateBillingBalance(refreshed); err != nil {
  238: 			return 0, err
  239: 		}
  240: 		return refreshed.BalanceCents, nil
  241: 	}
  242: 
  243: 	return nextRemoteBalance(
  244: 		previous,
  245: 		prepared.Batch.AmountCents,
  246: 		processed.BillingBalanceCents,
  247: 	)
  248: }
  249: 
  250: func validateBillingChargeResult(result ports.BillingChargeResult) error {
  251: 	if result.BalanceCents != nil && *result.BalanceCents < 0 {
  252: 		return ErrBillingUnavailable
  253: 	}
  254: 	return nil
  255: }
  256: 
  257: func BuildChargeGroups(userID string, currency string, records []domain.UsageRecord) ([]chargeGroup, error) {
  258: 	if strings.TrimSpace(userID) == "" || currency != currencyRUB {
  259: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("%w: grouping input", ErrInvalidBillingInput)
  260: 	}
  261: 	copied := append([]domain.UsageRecord(nil), records...)
  262: 	filtered := make([]domain.UsageRecord, 0, len(copied))
  263: 	for _, record := range copied {
  264: 		if err := validateChargeCandidate(userID, currency, record); err != nil {
  265: 			return nil, err
  266: 		}
  267: 		filtered = append(filtered, record)
  268: 	}
  269: 	sort.SliceStable(filtered, func(i, j int) bool {
  270: 		if filtered[i].ProviderType != filtered[j].ProviderType {
  271: 			return filtered[i].ProviderType < filtered[j].ProviderType
  272: 		}
  273: 		if filtered[i].ClientModel != filtered[j].ClientModel {
  274: 			return filtered[i].ClientModel < filtered[j].ClientModel
  275: 		}
  276: 		if filtered[i].Currency != filtered[j].Currency {
  277: 			return filtered[i].Currency < filtered[j].Currency
  278: 		}
  279: 		if !filtered[i].CreatedAt.Equal(filtered[j].CreatedAt) {
  280: 			return filtered[i].CreatedAt.Before(filtered[j].CreatedAt)
  281: 		}
  282: 		return filtered[i].LocalRequestID < filtered[j].LocalRequestID
  283: 	})
  284: 	byKey := make(map[groupKey][]domain.UsageRecord)
  285: 	for _, record := range filtered {
  286: 		key := groupKey{UserID: record.UserID, ProviderType: record.ProviderType, ClientModel: record.ClientModel, Currency: record.Currency}
  287: 		byKey[key] = append(byKey[key], record)
  288: 	}
  289: 	keys := make([]groupKey, 0, len(byKey))
  290: 	for key := range byKey {
  291: 		keys = append(keys, key)
  292: 	}
  293: 	sort.Slice(keys, func(i, j int) bool {
  294: 		if keys[i].ProviderType != keys[j].ProviderType {
  295: 			return keys[i].ProviderType < keys[j].ProviderType
  296: 		}
  297: 		if keys[i].ClientModel != keys[j].ClientModel {
  298: 			return keys[i].ClientModel < keys[j].ClientModel
  299: 		}
  300: 		return keys[i].Currency < keys[j].Currency
  301: 	})
  302: 	groups := make([]chargeGroup, 0, len(keys))
  303: 	for _, key := range keys {
  304: 		recs := append([]domain.UsageRecord(nil), byKey[key]...)
  305: 		sort.SliceStable(recs, func(i, j int) bool {
  306: 			if !recs[i].CreatedAt.Equal(recs[j].CreatedAt) {
  307: 				return recs[i].CreatedAt.Before(recs[j].CreatedAt)
  308: 			}
  309: 			return recs[i].LocalRequestID < recs[j].LocalRequestID
  310: 		})
  311: 		var pending int64
  312: 		for _, rec := range recs {
  313: 			var err error
  314: 			pending, err = checkedAddAmount(pending, rec.RemainingAmountCents)
  315: 			if err != nil {
  316: 				return nil, err
  317: 			}
  318: 		}
  319: 		groups = append(groups, chargeGroup{key: key, records: recs, pending: pending})
  320: 	}
  321: 	return groups, nil
  322: }
  323: 
  324: func validateChargeCandidate(userID string, currency string, record domain.UsageRecord) error {
  325: 	billingModel, err := pricing.BillingModel(record.ProviderType, record.ClientModel)
  326: 	if err != nil || record.BillingModel != billingModel {
  327: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: billing model", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  328: 	}
  329: 	if err := ledger.ValidateRecord(record); err != nil {
  330: 		return err
  331: 	}
  332: 	if record.UserID != userID {
  333: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: candidate user", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  334: 	}
  335: 	if record.Currency != currency {
  336: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: candidate currency", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  337: 	}
  338: 	if record.Status != domain.UsageStatusBillable && record.Status != domain.UsageStatusPartiallyCharged {
  339: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: candidate status", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  340: 	}
  341: 	if record.RemainingAmountCents <= 0 || record.CreatedAt.IsZero() {
  342: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: candidate fields", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  343: 	}
  344: 	if record.Status == domain.UsageStatusBillable && record.BillingChargeRequestID != "" {
  345: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: billable candidate claim", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  346: 	}
  347: 	if record.Status == domain.UsageStatusPartiallyCharged && record.BillingChargeRequestID == "" {
  348: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: partially charged candidate claim", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  349: 	}
  350: 	chargedPlusRemaining, err := checkedAddAmount(record.ChargedAmountCents, record.RemainingAmountCents)
  351: 	if err != nil {
  352: 		return err
  353: 	}
  354: 	if record.ClientAmountCents <= 0 || record.ChargedAmountCents < 0 || chargedPlusRemaining != record.ClientAmountCents {
  355: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: candidate amounts", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  356: 	}
  357: 	return nil
  358: }
  359: 
  360: func ValidateChargeSnapshot(input AutoChargeInput, snapshot ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot) error {
  361: 	batch := snapshot.Batch
  362: 	if batch.UserID != input.UserID || batch.BillingSubjectUserID != input.BillingSubjectUserID || batch.Currency != normalizedCurrency(input.Currency) {
  363: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: batch owner", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  364: 	}
  365: 	switch batch.Status {
  366: 	case domain.BillingChargeStatusPending, domain.BillingChargeStatusFailed, domain.BillingChargeStatusSucceeded:
  367: 	default:
  368: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: batch status", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  369: 	}
  370: 	if err := ledger.ValidateChargeBatch(batch); err != nil {
  371: 		return err
  372: 	}
  373: 	billingModel, err := pricing.BillingModel(batch.ProviderType, batch.ClientModel)
  374: 	if err != nil {
  375: 		return err
  376: 	}
  377: 	if batch.BillingModel != billingModel {
  378: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: batch billing model", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  379: 	}
  380: 	if len(snapshot.Allocations) == 0 || len(snapshot.ExpectedRecords) == 0 {
  381: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: empty allocations", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  382: 	}
  383: 	if len(snapshot.ExpectedRecords) != len(snapshot.Allocations) {
  384: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: expected records", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  385: 	}
  386: 	expectedByLocalRequestID := make(map[string]domain.UsageRecord, len(snapshot.ExpectedRecords))
  387: 	for _, record := range snapshot.ExpectedRecords {
  388: 		if _, ok := expectedByLocalRequestID[record.LocalRequestID]; ok {
  389: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w: duplicate expected record", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  390: 		}
  391: 		if err := validateExpectedRecordForBatch(batch, record); err != nil {
  392: 			return err
  393: 		}
  394: 		expectedByLocalRequestID[record.LocalRequestID] = record
  395: 	}
  396: 	seen := make(map[string]struct{}, len(snapshot.Allocations))
  397: 	var total int64
  398: 	for _, allocation := range snapshot.Allocations {
  399: 		if err := ledger.ValidateAllocation(batch, allocation); err != nil {
  400: 			return err
  401: 		}
  402: 		if allocation.ID != StableAllocationID(batch.ID, allocation.LocalRequestID) {
  403: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w: allocation id", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  404: 		}
  405: 		record, ok := expectedByLocalRequestID[allocation.LocalRequestID]
  406: 		if !ok {
  407: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w: allocation record", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  408: 		}
  409: 		if allocation.ChargedAmountCents > record.RemainingAmountCents || allocation.RemainingAmountCents != record.RemainingAmountCents-allocation.ChargedAmountCents {
  410: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w: allocation expectation", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  411: 		}
  412: 		if _, ok := seen[allocation.LocalRequestID]; ok {
  413: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w: duplicate allocation", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  414: 		}
  415: 		seen[allocation.LocalRequestID] = struct{}{}
  416: 		var err error
  417: 		total, err = checkedAddAmount(total, allocation.ChargedAmountCents)
  418: 		if err != nil {
  419: 			return err
  420: 		}
  421: 	}
  422: 	if total != batch.AmountCents {
  423: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: allocation sum", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  424: 	}
  425: 	inputTokens, outputTokens, err := allocatedTokenTotals(snapshot.ExpectedRecords, snapshot.Allocations)
  426: 	if err != nil {
  427: 		return err
  428: 	}
  429: 	if batch.InputTokens != inputTokens || batch.OutputTokens != outputTokens {
  430: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: token totals", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  431: 	}
  432: 	if batch.ID != StableBatchID(batch, snapshot.ExpectedRecords, snapshot.Allocations) {
  433: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: batch id", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  434: 	}
  435: 	return nil
  436: }
  437: 
  438: func validateExpectedRecordForBatch(batch domain.BillingChargeBatch, record domain.UsageRecord) error {
  439: 	if err := ledger.ValidateRecord(record); err != nil {
  440: 		return err
  441: 	}
  442: 	if record.UserID != batch.UserID || record.ProviderType != batch.ProviderType || record.ClientModel != batch.ClientModel || record.Currency != batch.Currency || record.BillingModel != batch.BillingModel {
  443: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: expected record owner", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  444: 	}
  445: 	if record.Status != domain.UsageStatusBillable && record.Status != domain.UsageStatusPartiallyCharged {
  446: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: expected record status", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  447: 	}
  448: 	if record.BillingChargeRequestID != batch.ID {
  449: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: expected record claim", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  450: 	}
  451: 	chargedPlusRemaining, err := checkedAddAmount(record.ChargedAmountCents, record.RemainingAmountCents)
  452: 	if err != nil {
  453: 		return err
  454: 	}
  455: 	if record.ClientAmountCents <= 0 || record.ChargedAmountCents < 0 || record.RemainingAmountCents <= 0 || chargedPlusRemaining != record.ClientAmountCents {
  456: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: expected record amounts", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  457: 	}
  458: 	return nil
  459: }
  460: 
  461: func allocatedTokenTotals(records []domain.UsageRecord, allocations []domain.BillingChargeAllocation) (int64, int64, error) {
  462: 	recordByID := make(map[string]domain.UsageRecord, len(records))
  463: 	for _, record := range records {
  464: 		recordByID[record.LocalRequestID] = record
  465: 	}
  466: 	var inputTokens int64
  467: 	var outputTokens int64
  468: 	for _, allocation := range allocations {
  469: 		record, ok := recordByID[allocation.LocalRequestID]
  470: 		if !ok {
  471: 			return 0, 0, fmt.Errorf("%w: allocation record", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  472: 		}
  473: 		inTok, err := allocateTokens(record.Usage.InputTokens, record.ChargedAmountCents, record.ChargedAmountCents+allocation.ChargedAmountCents, record.ClientAmountCents)
  474: 		if err != nil {
  475: 			return 0, 0, err
  476: 		}
  477: 		outTok, err := allocateTokens(record.Usage.OutputTokens, record.ChargedAmountCents, record.ChargedAmountCents+allocation.ChargedAmountCents, record.ClientAmountCents)
  478: 		if err != nil {
  479: 			return 0, 0, err
  480: 		}
  481: 		inputTokens, err = checkedAddToken(inputTokens, inTok)
  482: 		if err != nil {
  483: 			return 0, 0, err
  484: 		}
  485: 		outputTokens, err = checkedAddToken(outputTokens, outTok)
  486: 		if err != nil {
  487: 			return 0, 0, err
  488: 		}
  489: 	}
  490: 	return inputTokens, outputTokens, nil
  491: }
  492: 
  493: func normalizedCurrency(currency string) string {
  494: 	if currency == "" {
  495: 		return currencyRUB
  496: 	}
  497: 	return currency
  498: }
  499: 
  500: func BuildChargePlan(billingSubjectUserID string, records []domain.UsageRecord, amount int64, createdAt time.Time) (ports.UsageChargeBatchPlan, error) {
  501: 	var plan ports.UsageChargeBatchPlan
  502: 	createdAt = createdAt.UTC()
  503: 	if strings.TrimSpace(billingSubjectUserID) == "" || amount <= 0 || len(records) == 0 {
  504: 		return plan, fmt.Errorf("%w: input", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  505: 	}
  506: 	recs := append([]domain.UsageRecord(nil), records...)
  507: 	sort.SliceStable(recs, func(i, j int) bool {
  508: 		if !recs[i].CreatedAt.Equal(recs[j].CreatedAt) {
  509: 			return recs[i].CreatedAt.Before(recs[j].CreatedAt)
  510: 		}
  511: 		return recs[i].LocalRequestID < recs[j].LocalRequestID
  512: 	})
  513: 	first := recs[0]
  514: 	billingModel, err := pricing.BillingModel(first.ProviderType, first.ClientModel)
  515: 	if err != nil {
  516: 		return plan, err
  517: 	}
  518: 	left := amount
  519: 	allocations := make([]domain.BillingChargeAllocation, 0, len(recs))
  520: 	allocatedRecords := make([]domain.UsageRecord, 0, len(recs))
  521: 	var inputTokens, outputTokens int64
  522: 	partialCount := 0
  523: 	for _, rec := range recs {
  524: 		if rec.UserID != first.UserID || rec.ProviderType != first.ProviderType || rec.ClientModel != first.ClientModel || rec.Currency != first.Currency {
  525: 			return plan, fmt.Errorf("%w: mixed group", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  526: 		}
  527: 		chargedPlusRemaining, err := checkedAddAmount(rec.ChargedAmountCents, rec.RemainingAmountCents)
  528: 		if err != nil {
  529: 			return plan, err
  530: 		}
  531: 		if rec.ClientAmountCents <= 0 || rec.ChargedAmountCents < 0 || rec.RemainingAmountCents <= 0 || chargedPlusRemaining != rec.ClientAmountCents {
  532: 			return plan, fmt.Errorf("%w: amount invariant", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  533: 		}
  534: 		if left <= 0 {
  535: 			break
  536: 		}
  537: 		delta := min64(rec.RemainingAmountCents, left)
  538: 		if delta <= 0 {
  539: 			continue
  540: 		}
  541: 		newRemaining := rec.RemainingAmountCents - delta
  542: 		if newRemaining > 0 {
  543: 			partialCount++
  544: 		}
  545: 		inTok, err := allocateTokens(rec.Usage.InputTokens, rec.ChargedAmountCents, rec.ChargedAmountCents+delta, rec.ClientAmountCents)
  546: 		if err != nil {
  547: 			return plan, err
  548: 		}
  549: 		outTok, err := allocateTokens(rec.Usage.OutputTokens, rec.ChargedAmountCents, rec.ChargedAmountCents+delta, rec.ClientAmountCents)
  550: 		if err != nil {
  551: 			return plan, err
  552: 		}
  553: 		inputTokens, err = checkedAddToken(inputTokens, inTok)
  554: 		if err != nil {
  555: 			return plan, err
  556: 		}
  557: 		outputTokens, err = checkedAddToken(outputTokens, outTok)
  558: 		if err != nil {
  559: 			return plan, err
  560: 		}
  561: 		allocations = append(allocations, domain.BillingChargeAllocation{LocalRequestID: rec.LocalRequestID, ChargedAmountCents: delta, RemainingAmountCents: newRemaining, CreatedAt: createdAt})
  562: 		allocatedRecords = append(allocatedRecords, rec)
  563: 		left -= delta
  564: 	}
  565: 	if left != 0 || len(allocations) == 0 || partialCount > 1 {
  566: 		return plan, fmt.Errorf("%w: allocation", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  567: 	}
  568: 	batch := domain.BillingChargeBatch{UserID: first.UserID, BillingSubjectUserID: billingSubjectUserID, ProviderType: first.ProviderType, ClientModel: first.ClientModel, BillingModel: billingModel, InputTokens: inputTokens, OutputTokens: outputTokens, AmountCents: amount, Currency: first.Currency, Status: domain.BillingChargeStatusPending, CreatedAt: createdAt, UpdatedAt: createdAt}
  569: 	batch.ID = StableBatchID(batch, allocatedRecords, allocations)
  570: 	for i := range allocations {
  571: 		allocations[i].BatchID = batch.ID
  572: 		allocations[i].ID = StableAllocationID(batch.ID, allocations[i].LocalRequestID)
  573: 	}
  574: 	batch.ID = StableBatchID(batch, allocatedRecords, allocations)
  575: 	for i := range allocations {
  576: 		allocations[i].BatchID = batch.ID
  577: 		allocations[i].ID = StableAllocationID(batch.ID, allocations[i].LocalRequestID)
  578: 	}
  579: 	plan.Batch = batch
  580: 	plan.Allocations = allocations
  581: 	plan.ExpectedRecords = allocatedRecords
  582: 	return plan, nil
  583: }
  584: 
  585: func StableBatchID(batch domain.BillingChargeBatch, records []domain.UsageRecord, allocations []domain.BillingChargeAllocation) string {
  586: 	type recordExpectation struct {
  587: 		LocalRequestID       string             `json:"local_request_id"`
  588: 		Status               domain.UsageStatus `json:"status"`
  589: 		ClientAmountCents    int64              `json:"client_amount_cents"`
  590: 		ChargedAmountCents   int64              `json:"charged_amount_cents"`
  591: 		RemainingAmountCents int64              `json:"remaining_amount_cents"`
  592: 		InputTokens          int64              `json:"input_tokens"`
  593: 		OutputTokens         int64              `json:"output_tokens"`
  594: 	}
  595: 	type allocationExpectation struct {
  596: 		LocalRequestID       string `json:"local_request_id"`
  597: 		ChargedAmountCents   int64  `json:"charged_amount_cents"`
  598: 		RemainingAmountCents int64  `json:"remaining_amount_cents"`
  599: 	}
  600: 	type canonical struct {
  601: 		UserID               string                  `json:"user_id"`
  602: 		BillingSubjectUserID string                  `json:"billing_subject_user_id"`
  603: 		ProviderType         domain.ProviderType     `json:"provider_type"`
  604: 		ClientModel          string                  `json:"client_model"`
  605: 		BillingModel         string                  `json:"billing_model"`
  606: 		InputTokens          int64                   `json:"input_tokens"`
  607: 		OutputTokens         int64                   `json:"output_tokens"`
  608: 		Currency             string                  `json:"currency"`
  609: 		AmountCents          int64                   `json:"amount_cents"`
  610: 		Records              []recordExpectation     `json:"records"`
  611: 		Allocations          []allocationExpectation `json:"allocations"`
  612: 	}
  613: 	payload := canonical{UserID: batch.UserID, BillingSubjectUserID: batch.BillingSubjectUserID, ProviderType: batch.ProviderType, ClientModel: batch.ClientModel, BillingModel: batch.BillingModel, InputTokens: batch.InputTokens, OutputTokens: batch.OutputTokens, Currency: batch.Currency, AmountCents: batch.AmountCents}
  614: 	for _, rec := range records {
  615: 		payload.Records = append(payload.Records, recordExpectation{LocalRequestID: rec.LocalRequestID, Status: rec.Status, ClientAmountCents: rec.ClientAmountCents, ChargedAmountCents: rec.ChargedAmountCents, RemainingAmountCents: rec.RemainingAmountCents, InputTokens: rec.Usage.InputTokens, OutputTokens: rec.Usage.OutputTokens})
  616: 	}
  617: 	for _, alloc := range allocations {
  618: 		payload.Allocations = append(payload.Allocations, allocationExpectation{LocalRequestID: alloc.LocalRequestID, ChargedAmountCents: alloc.ChargedAmountCents, RemainingAmountCents: alloc.RemainingAmountCents})
  619: 	}
  620: 	body, _ := json.Marshal(payload)
  621: 	sum := sha256.Sum256(body)
  622: 	return "billchg_" + hex.EncodeToString(sum[:])
  623: }
  624: 
  625: func StableAllocationID(batchID string, localRequestID string) string {
  626: 	sum := sha256.Sum256([]byte(batchID + "\x00" + localRequestID))
  627: 	return "billalloc_" + hex.EncodeToString(sum[:])
  628: }
  629: 
  630: func allocateTokens(totalTokens, previousCharged, newCharged, clientAmount int64) (int64, error) {
  631: 	if totalTokens < 0 || previousCharged < 0 || newCharged < previousCharged || clientAmount <= 0 || newCharged > clientAmount {
  632: 		return 0, fmt.Errorf("%w: token input", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  633: 	}
  634: 	before := floorMulDiv(totalTokens, previousCharged, clientAmount)
  635: 	after := floorMulDiv(totalTokens, newCharged, clientAmount)
  636: 	return after - before, nil
  637: }
  638: 
  639: func floorMulDiv(a, b, c int64) int64 {
  640: 	var x big.Int
  641: 	x.Mul(big.NewInt(a), big.NewInt(b))
  642: 	x.Div(&x, big.NewInt(c))
  643: 	return x.Int64()
  644: }
  645: 
  646: func mergeProcessedResult(result AutoChargeResult, processed AutoChargeResult) (AutoChargeResult, error) {
  647: 	if processed.ProcessedBatchID != "" {
  648: 		result.ProcessedBatchID = processed.ProcessedBatchID
  649: 		result.ProcessedBatchIDs = append(result.ProcessedBatchIDs, processed.ProcessedBatchID)
  650: 	}
  651: 	var err error
  652: 	result.ChargedAmountCents, err = checkedAddAmount(result.ChargedAmountCents, processed.ChargedAmountCents)
  653: 	if err != nil {
  654: 		return result, err
  655: 	}
  656: 	if processed.BillingBalanceCents != nil {
  657: 		result.BillingBalanceCents = processed.BillingBalanceCents
  658: 	}
  659: 	result.UsedBillingBalanceCents = result.UsedBillingBalanceCents || processed.UsedBillingBalanceCents
  660: 	return result, nil
  661: }
  662: 
  663: func sumGroups(groups []chargeGroup) (int64, error) {
  664: 	var sum int64
  665: 	for _, group := range groups {
  666: 		var err error
  667: 		sum, err = checkedAddAmount(sum, group.pending)
  668: 		if err != nil {
  669: 			return 0, err
  670: 		}
  671: 	}
  672: 	return sum, nil
  673: }
  674: 
  675: func checkedAddAmount(left int64, right int64) (int64, error) {
  676: 	if right > 0 && left > math.MaxInt64-right {
  677: 		return 0, ledger.ErrAmountOverflow
  678: 	}
  679: 	if right < 0 && left < math.MinInt64-right {
  680: 		return 0, ledger.ErrAmountOverflow
  681: 	}
  682: 	return left + right, nil
  683: }
  684: 
  685: func checkedAddToken(left int64, right int64) (int64, error) {
  686: 	if right > 0 && left > math.MaxInt64-right {
  687: 		return 0, ErrTokenOverflow
  688: 	}
  689: 	if right < 0 && left < math.MinInt64-right {
  690: 		return 0, ErrTokenOverflow
  691: 	}
  692: 	return left + right, nil
  693: }
  694: 
  695: func nextRemoteBalance(previous int64, charged int64, billingBalanceCents *int64) (int64, error) {
  696: 	if billingBalanceCents != nil {
  697: 		if *billingBalanceCents < 0 {
  698: 			return 0, fmt.Errorf("%w: remote balance", ErrInvalidChargePlan)
  699: 		}
  700: 		return *billingBalanceCents, nil
  701: 	}
  702: 	return checkedSubAmount(previous, charged)
  703: }
  704: 
  705: func checkedSubAmount(left int64, right int64) (int64, error) {
  706: 	if right > 0 && left < math.MinInt64+right {
  707: 		return 0, ledger.ErrAmountOverflow
  708: 	}
  709: 	if right < 0 && left > math.MaxInt64+right {
  710: 		return 0, ledger.ErrAmountOverflow
  711: 	}
  712: 	return left - right, nil
  713: }
  714: 
  715: func min64(a, b int64) int64 {
  716: 	if a < b {
  717: 		return a
  718: 	}
  719: 	return b
  720: }

  109: 	return f.exposure, f.exposureErr
  110: }
  111: func (f *fakeUsageLedger) LoadOpenChargeBatches(ctx context.Context, userID string, subject string, currency string) ([]ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot, error) {
  112: 	f.mu.Lock()
  113: 	defer f.mu.Unlock()
  114: 	return append([]ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot(nil), f.open...), nil
  115: }
  116: func (f *fakeUsageLedger) LoadChargeCandidates(ctx context.Context, userID string, currency string) ([]domain.UsageRecord, error) {
  117: 	f.mu.Lock()
  118: 	defer f.mu.Unlock()
  119: 	out := make([]domain.UsageRecord, 0, len(f.records))
  120: 	for _, record := range f.records {
  121: 		if record.UserID != userID || record.Currency != currency || record.RemainingAmountCents <= 0 {
  122: 			continue
  123: 		}
  124: 		switch record.Status {
  125: 		case domain.UsageStatusBillable:
  126: 			if record.BillingChargeRequestID == "" {
  127: 				out = append(out, record)
  128: 			}
  129: 		case domain.UsageStatusPartiallyCharged:
  130: 			if f.batchSucceededLocked(record.BillingChargeRequestID) {
  131: 				out = append(out, record)
  132: 			}
  133: 		}
  134: 	}
  135: 	sort.Slice(out, func(i, j int) bool { return out[i].LocalRequestID < out[j].LocalRequestID })
  136: 	return out, nil
  137: }
  138: func (f *fakeUsageLedger) PrepareChargeBatch(ctx context.Context, plan ports.UsageChargeBatchPlan) (ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot, error) {
  139: 	f.mu.Lock()
  140: 	defer f.mu.Unlock()
  141: 	f.prepareCalls++
  142: 	if f.prepareBeforeCharge != nil && f.chargeCalls != nil {
  143: 		v := *f.chargeCalls == 0
  144: 		*f.prepareBeforeCharge = v
  145: 	}
  146: 	if existing, ok := f.batches[plan.Batch.ID]; ok {
  147: 		if existing.Batch != plan.Batch || !reflect.DeepEqual(existing.Allocations, plan.Allocations) || !reflect.DeepEqual(existing.ExpectedRecords, claimedExpected(plan)) {
  148: 			return ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot{}, errors.New("idempotency payload mismatch")
  149: 		}
  150: 		return existing, nil
  151: 	}
  152: 	for _, exp := range plan.ExpectedRecords {
  153: 		cur := f.records[exp.LocalRequestID]
  154: 		if cur != exp {
  155: 			return ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot{}, errors.New("expectation mismatch")
  156: 		}
  157: 		if cur.Status == domain.UsageStatusPartiallyCharged && !f.batchSucceededLocked(cur.BillingChargeRequestID) {
  158: 			return ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot{}, errors.New("active partial claim")
  159: 		}
  160: 	}
  161: 	claimedExpected := make([]domain.UsageRecord, 0, len(plan.ExpectedRecords))
  162: 	for _, exp := range plan.ExpectedRecords {
  163: 		cur := f.records[exp.LocalRequestID]
  164: 		cur.BillingChargeRequestID = plan.Batch.ID
  165: 		f.records[exp.LocalRequestID] = cur
  166: 		claimedExpected = append(claimedExpected, cur)
  167: 	}
  168: 	snap := ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot{Batch: plan.Batch, Allocations: append([]domain.BillingChargeAllocation(nil), plan.Allocations...), ExpectedRecords: claimedExpected}
  169: 	f.batches[plan.Batch.ID] = snap
  170: 	return snap, nil
  171: }
  172: func (f *fakeUsageLedger) batchSucceededLocked(batchID string) bool {
  173: 	if batchID == "" {
  174: 		return false
  175: 	}
  176: 	if snap, ok := f.batches[batchID]; ok {
  177: 		return snap.Batch.Status == domain.BillingChargeStatusSucceeded
  178: 	}
  179: 	for _, snap := range f.open {
  180: 		if snap.Batch.ID == batchID {
  181: 			return snap.Batch.Status == domain.BillingChargeStatusSucceeded
  182: 		}
  183: 	}
  184: 	return false
  185: }
  186: 
  187: func (f *fakeUsageLedger) seedSucceededBatchForRecord(record domain.UsageRecord) {
  188: 	f.mu.Lock()
  189: 	defer f.mu.Unlock()
  190: 	if record.BillingChargeRequestID == "" {
  191: 		return
  192: 	}
  193: 	now := time.Unix(1, 0).UTC()
  194: 	f.batches[record.BillingChargeRequestID] = ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot{Batch: domain.BillingChargeBatch{ID: record.BillingChargeRequestID, UserID: record.UserID, BillingSubjectUserID: "billing", ProviderType: record.ProviderType, ClientModel: record.ClientModel, BillingModel: record.BillingModel, InputTokens: 1, OutputTokens: 0, AmountCents: record.ChargedAmountCents, Currency: record.Currency, Status: domain.BillingChargeStatusSucceeded, CreatedAt: now, ChargedAt: &now, UpdatedAt: now}}
  195: }
  196: 
  197: func (f *fakeUsageLedger) MarkChargeBatchFailed(ctx context.Context, batchID string, expectedStatus domain.BillingChargeStatus, code string, failedAt time.Time) error {
  198: 	f.mu.Lock()
  199: 	defer f.mu.Unlock()
  200: 	f.markFailedCalls++
  201: 	if f.markErr != nil {
  202: 		return f.markErr
  203: 	}
  204: 	snap, ok := f.batches[batchID]
  205: 	if !ok {
  206: 		for _, open := range f.open {
  207: 			if open.Batch.ID == batchID {
  208: 				snap = open
  209: 				ok = true
  210: 				break
  211: 			}
  212: 		}
  213: 	}
  214: 	if !ok {
  215: 		return errors.New("missing batch")
  216: 	}
  217: 	if snap.Batch.Status == domain.BillingChargeStatusSucceeded {
  218: 		return nil
  219: 	}
  220: 	if snap.Batch.Status != expectedStatus {
  221: 		return errors.New("status mismatch")
  222: 	}
  223: 	if snap.Batch.Status != domain.BillingChargeStatusPending {
  224: 		return nil
  225: 	}
  226: 	failedAt = failedAt.UTC()
  227: 	snap.Batch.Status = domain.BillingChargeStatusFailed
  228: 	snap.Batch.BillingErrorCode = code
  229: 	snap.Batch.FailedAt = &failedAt
  230: 	snap.Batch.UpdatedAt = failedAt
  231: 	f.batches[batchID] = snap
  232: 	return nil
  233: }
  234: func (f *fakeUsageLedger) ApplyChargeSuccess(ctx context.Context, success ports.UsageChargeSuccess) error {
  235: 	f.mu.Lock()
  236: 	defer f.mu.Unlock()
  237: 	f.applyCalls++
  238: 	if f.applyErr != nil {
  239: 		return f.applyErr
  240: 	}
  241: 	snap, ok := f.batches[success.BatchID]
  242: 	if !ok {
  243: 		for _, o := range f.open {
  244: 			if o.Batch.ID == success.BatchID {
  245: 				snap = o
  246: 				ok = true
  247: 			}
  248: 		}
  249: 	}
  250: 	if !ok {
  251: 		return errors.New("missing batch")
  252: 	}
  253: 	if len(success.ExpectedRecords) == 0 {
  254: 		return errors.New("missing expected records")
  255: 	}
  256: 	if !reflect.DeepEqual(success.Allocations, snap.Allocations) || !reflect.DeepEqual(success.ExpectedRecords, snap.ExpectedRecords) {
  257: 		return errors.New("success command mismatch")
  258: 	}
  259: 	if snap.Batch.Status == domain.BillingChargeStatusSucceeded {
  260: 		return nil
  261: 	}
  262: 	if snap.Batch.Status != domain.BillingChargeStatusPending && snap.Batch.Status != domain.BillingChargeStatusFailed {
  263: 		return errors.New("status mismatch")
  264: 	}
  265: 	expected := make(map[string]domain.UsageRecord, len(snap.ExpectedRecords))
  266: 	for _, record := range snap.ExpectedRecords {
  267: 		expected[record.LocalRequestID] = record
  268: 	}
  269: 	success.ChargedAt = success.ChargedAt.UTC()
  270: 	for _, alloc := range snap.Allocations {
  271: 		r := f.records[alloc.LocalRequestID]
  272: 		exp, ok := expected[alloc.LocalRequestID]
  273: 		if !ok || r != exp || r.BillingChargeRequestID != success.BatchID || (r.Status != domain.UsageStatusBillable && r.Status != domain.UsageStatusPartiallyCharged) || alloc.RemainingAmountCents != r.RemainingAmountCents-alloc.ChargedAmountCents {
  274: 			return errors.New("expectation mismatch")
  275: 		}
  276: 		r.ChargedAmountCents += alloc.ChargedAmountCents
  277: 		r.RemainingAmountCents = alloc.RemainingAmountCents
  278: 		r.BillingChargeRequestID = success.BatchID
  279: 		r.ChargedAt = &success.ChargedAt
  280: 		if r.RemainingAmountCents == 0 {
  281: 			r.Status = domain.UsageStatusCharged
  282: 		} else {
  283: 			r.Status = domain.UsageStatusPartiallyCharged
  284: 		}
  285: 		if r.ChargedAmountCents+r.RemainingAmountCents != r.ClientAmountCents {
  286: 			return errors.New("bad invariant")
  287: 		}
  288: 		f.records[alloc.LocalRequestID] = r
  289: 		for i := range f.candidates {
  290: 			if f.candidates[i].LocalRequestID == alloc.LocalRequestID {
  291: 				f.candidates[i] = r
  292: 			}
  293: 		}
  294: 	}
  295: 	snap.Batch.Status = domain.BillingChargeStatusSucceeded
  296: 	snap.Batch.ChargedAt = &success.ChargedAt
  297: 	snap.Batch.FailedAt = nil
  298: 	snap.Batch.BillingErrorCode = ""
  299: 	snap.Batch.BillingResponseBalanceCents = success.BillingBalanceCents
  300: 	snap.Batch.UpdatedAt = success.ChargedAt
  301: 	f.batches[success.BatchID] = snap
  302: 	return nil
  303: }

  305: func TestBalanceAdmissionAndPricingFailedBlock(t *testing.T) {

  307: 	bal := &fakeBalance{balance: ports.BillingBalance{Currency: "RUB", BalanceCents: 1000}}

  309: 	fl.exposure = ports.UsageExposureSnapshot{Currency: "RUB", BillableRemainingAmountCents: 200}
  310: 	svc, _ := NewAdmissionService(id, bal, fl)

  312: 	if err != nil || !res.Allowed || res.EffectiveBalanceCents != 800 {
  313: 		t.Fatalf("res=%+v err=%v", res, err)
  314: 	}
  315: 	if id.subjects[0] != "billing" || bal.tokens[0] != "jwt" {
  316: 		t.Fatalf("identity boundary failed")
  317: 	}
  318: 	fl.exposure.PricingFailedCount = 1
  319: 	_, err = svc.Admit(t.Context(), AdmissionInput{UserID: "local", BillingSubjectUserID: "billing"})
  320: 	if !errors.Is(err, ledger.ErrUnresolvedUsage) {
  321: 		t.Fatalf("err=%v", err)
  322: 	}
  323: }

  372: func TestProcessPreparedBatchTreatsSucceededPrepareReplayAsIdempotentSuccess(t *testing.T) {
  373: 	record := rec("succeeded-prepare-replay", domain.ProviderOpenAI, "m", 100, 0, 100, 1)
  374: 	plan, err := BuildChargePlan("billing", []domain.UsageRecord{record}, 100, time.Unix(1, 0).UTC())
  375: 	if err != nil {
  376: 		t.Fatal(err)
  377: 	}
  378: 
  379: 	chargedAt := time.Unix(2, 0).UTC()
  380: 	balance := int64(900)
  381: 	snapshot := ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot{
  382: 		Batch:           plan.Batch,
  383: 		Allocations:     plan.Allocations,
  384: 		ExpectedRecords: claimedExpected(plan),
  385: 	}
  386: 	snapshot.Batch.Status = domain.BillingChargeStatusSucceeded
  387: 	snapshot.Batch.BillingResponseBalanceCents = &balance
  388: 	snapshot.Batch.ChargedAt = &chargedAt
  389: 	snapshot.Batch.UpdatedAt = chargedAt
  390: 
  391: 	charge := &fakeCharge{}
  392: 	usageLedger := newFakeLedger(nil)
  393: 	service, err := NewAutoChargeService(
  394: 		&fakeIdentity{token: "jwt"},
  395: 		&fakeBalance{balance: ports.BillingBalance{Currency: "RUB", BalanceCents: 1000}},
  396: 		charge,
  397: 		usageLedger,
  398: 		testClock{chargedAt},
  399: 		AutoChargeConfig{ThresholdCents: 100, MinimumChargeCents: 1},
  400: 	)
  401: 	if err != nil {
  402: 		t.Fatal(err)
  403: 	}
  404: 
  405: 	result, err := service.processPreparedBatch(
  406: 		t.Context(),
  407: 		AutoChargeInput{UserID: "u", BillingSubjectUserID: "billing", Currency: "RUB"},
  408: 		snapshot,
  409: 	)
  410: 	if err != nil {
  411: 		t.Fatal(err)
  412: 	}
  413: 	if len(charge.requests) != 0 {
  414: 		t.Fatalf("succeeded replay called Billing: %+v", charge.requests)
  415: 	}
  416: 	if usageLedger.applyCalls != 0 || usageLedger.markFailedCalls != 0 {
  417: 		t.Fatalf("succeeded replay mutated ledger: apply=%d failed=%d", usageLedger.applyCalls, usageLedger.markFailedCalls)
  418: 	}
  419: 	if result.ProcessedBatchID != snapshot.Batch.ID || len(result.ProcessedBatchIDs) != 1 || result.ProcessedBatchIDs[0] != snapshot.Batch.ID {
  420: 		t.Fatalf("processed result=%+v", result)
  421: 	}
  422: 	if result.ChargedAmountCents != snapshot.Batch.AmountCents || !result.UsedBillingBalanceCents || result.BillingBalanceCents == nil || *result.BillingBalanceCents != balance {
  423: 		t.Fatalf("billing result=%+v", result)
  424: 	}
  425: }

  458: func TestPartialTokenAllocationStableIDs(t *testing.T) {

  461: 	r.Usage.OutputTokens = 7

  467: 		t.Fatalf("tokens=%d/%d", p1.Batch.InputTokens, p1.Batch.OutputTokens)
  468: 	}
  469: 	p2, _ := BuildChargePlan("billing", []domain.UsageRecord{r}, 25, time.Unix(99, 0))
  470: 	if p1.Batch.ID != p2.Batch.ID || p1.Allocations[0].ID != p2.Allocations[0].ID {
  471: 		t.Fatal("ids not stable")
  472: 	}
  473: 	p3, _ := BuildChargePlan("billing", []domain.UsageRecord{r}, 30, time.Unix(1, 0).UTC())
  474: 	if p1.Batch.ID == p3.Batch.ID {
  475: 		t.Fatal("amount change did not change id")
  476: 	}
  477: 	r.ChargedAmountCents = 50
  478: 	r.RemainingAmountCents = 50
  479: 	p4, _ := BuildChargePlan("billing", []domain.UsageRecord{r}, 25, time.Unix(1, 0).UTC())
  480: 	if p1.Batch.ID == p4.Batch.ID {
  481: 		t.Fatal("previous charged change did not change id")
  482: 	}
  483: }

  485: func TestAutoChargeLifecycleFailureRetrySuccessAndReconciliation(t *testing.T) {
  486: 	now := time.Unix(100, 0)
  487: 	chargeCalls := 0
  488: 	preparedBefore := false
  489: 	records := []domain.UsageRecord{rec("r1", domain.ProviderOpenAI, "gpt", 100, 0, 100, 1)}
  490: 	fl := newFakeLedger(records)
  491: 	fl.prepareBeforeCharge = &preparedBefore
  492: 	fl.chargeCalls = &chargeCalls
  493: 	ch := &fakeCharge{err: errors.New("remote down")}
  494: 	id := &fakeIdentity{token: "jwt"}
  495: 	bal := &fakeBalance{balance: ports.BillingBalance{Currency: "RUB", BalanceCents: 1000}}
  496: 	svc, _ := NewAutoChargeService(id, bal, ch, fl, testClock{now}, AutoChargeConfig{ThresholdCents: 100, MinimumChargeCents: 1})
  497: 	_, err := svc.Run(t.Context(), AutoChargeInput{UserID: "u", BillingSubjectUserID: "billing"})
  498: 	chargeCalls = len(ch.requests)
  499: 	if !errors.Is(err, ErrBillingUnavailable) || !preparedBefore || fl.markFailedCalls != 1 {
  500: 		t.Fatalf("err=%v prepared=%v failed=%d", err, preparedBefore, fl.markFailedCalls)
  501: 	}
  502: 	for _, r := range fl.records {
  503: 		if r.ChargedAmountCents != 0 || r.RemainingAmountCents != 100 {
  504: 			t.Fatal("usage changed on failure")
  505: 		}
  506: 	}
  507: 	var failed ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot
  508: 	for _, b := range fl.batches {
  509: 		failed = b
  510: 	}
  511: 	fl.open = []ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot{failed}
  512: 	ch.err = nil
  513: 	ch.requests = nil
  514: 	_, err = svc.Run(t.Context(), AutoChargeInput{UserID: "u", BillingSubjectUserID: "billing"})
  515: 	if err != nil {
  516: 		t.Fatal(err)
  517: 	}
  518: 	if len(ch.requests) != 1 || ch.requests[0].RequestID != failed.Batch.ID {
  519: 		t.Fatalf("retry request=%+v failed=%s", ch.requests, failed.Batch.ID)
  520: 	}
  521: 	if fl.records["llmreq_r1"].Status != domain.UsageStatusCharged || fl.applyCalls != 1 {
  522: 		t.Fatalf("record=%+v apply=%d", fl.records["llmreq_r1"], fl.applyCalls)
  523: 	}
  524: 	fl.open = []ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot{failed}
  525: 	fl.applyErr = errors.New("store write failed")
  526: 	ch.requests = nil
  527: 	_, err = svc.Run(t.Context(), AutoChargeInput{UserID: "u", BillingSubjectUserID: "billing"})
  528: 	if !errors.Is(err, ErrChargeReconciliationRequired) || len(ch.requests) != 1 {
  529: 		t.Fatalf("err=%v calls=%d", err, len(ch.requests))
  530: 	}
  531: }

  533: func TestOpenBatchesProcessedFirstMixedGroupsAndConcurrentPrepare(t *testing.T) {
  534: 	records := []domain.UsageRecord{rec("a", domain.ProviderAnthropic, "m", 100, 0, 100, 1), rec("b", domain.ProviderOpenAI, "m", 100, 0, 100, 2)}
  535: 	groups, _ := BuildChargeGroups("u", "RUB", records)
  536: 	if len(groups) != 2 {
  537: 		t.Fatalf("groups=%d", len(groups))
  538: 	}
  539: 	plan, err := BuildChargePlan("billing", groups[0].records, 100, time.Unix(1, 0).UTC())
  540: 	if err != nil {
  541: 		t.Fatal(err)
  542: 	}
  543: 	open := ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot{Batch: plan.Batch, Allocations: plan.Allocations, ExpectedRecords: claimedExpected(plan)}
  544: 	fl := newFakeLedger(records)
  545: 	for _, expected := range open.ExpectedRecords {
  546: 		fl.records[expected.LocalRequestID] = expected
  547: 	}
  548: 	fl.open = []ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot{open}
  549: 	ch := &fakeCharge{}
  550: 	svc, _ := NewAutoChargeService(&fakeIdentity{token: "jwt"}, &fakeBalance{balance: ports.BillingBalance{Currency: "RUB", BalanceCents: 1000}}, ch, fl, testClock{time.Unix(1, 0).UTC()}, AutoChargeConfig{ThresholdCents: 100, MinimumChargeCents: 1})
  551: 	_, err = svc.Run(t.Context(), AutoChargeInput{UserID: "u", BillingSubjectUserID: "billing"})
  552: 	if err != nil {
  553: 		t.Fatal(err)
  554: 	}
  555: 	if len(ch.requests) != 2 || ch.requests[0].RequestID != open.Batch.ID || fl.prepareCalls != 1 {
  556: 		t.Fatalf("open/groups not processed in order: requests=%+v prepare=%d", ch.requests, fl.prepareCalls)
  557: 	}
  558: 	fl2 := newFakeLedger(records[:1])
  559: 	t.Cleanup(func() {
  560: 		if len(fl2.batches) != 1 {
  561: 			t.Fatalf("batches=%d", len(fl2.batches))
  562: 		}
  563: 	})
  564: 	for i := 0; i < 2; i++ {
  565: 		t.Run("concurrent prepare", func(t *testing.T) {
  566: 			t.Parallel()
  567: 			_, _ = fl2.PrepareChargeBatch(t.Context(), plan)
  568: 		})
  569: 	}
  570: }
  571: 
  572: func TestDTOsAndErrorsDoNotExposeSecretsOrRawBodies(t *testing.T) {
  573: 	for _, typ := range []reflect.Type{reflect.TypeOf(AdmissionResult{}), reflect.TypeOf(AutoChargeResult{}), reflect.TypeOf(domain.BillingChargeBatch{}), reflect.TypeOf(domain.BillingChargeAllocation{})} {
  574: 		for _, forbidden := range []string{"ServiceToken", "BillingJWT", "RawRequest", "RawResponse", "RawError", "Authorization"} {
  575: 			if _, ok := typ.FieldByName(forbidden); ok {
  576: 				t.Fatalf("%s exposes %s", typ.Name(), forbidden)
  577: 			}
  578: 		}
  579: 	}
  580: 	for _, err := range []error{ErrBillingUnavailable, ErrBillingIdentityUnavailable, ErrChargeReconciliationRequired} {
  581: 		if strings.Contains(err.Error(), "secret") || strings.Contains(err.Error(), "raw") {
  582: 			t.Fatalf("bad err %v", err)
  583: 		}
  584: 	}
  585: }
  586: 
  587: func rec(id string, provider domain.ProviderType, model string, client, charged, remaining int64, created int64) domain.UsageRecord {
  588: 	localRequestID := id
  589: 	if !strings.HasPrefix(localRequestID, "llmreq_") {
  590: 		localRequestID = "llmreq_" + localRequestID
  591: 	}
  592: 	createdAt := time.Unix(created, 0)
  593: 	status := domain.UsageStatusBillable
  594: 	record := domain.UsageRecord{LocalRequestID: localRequestID, UserID: "u", ProviderType: provider, ClientModel: model, BillingModel: string(provider) + ":" + model, ClientAmountCents: client, ChargedAmountCents: charged, RemainingAmountCents: remaining, Currency: "RUB", Status: status, UsageCompleteness: "detailed", Usage: domain.TokenUsage{InputTokens: client / 10, OutputTokens: client / 20}, CreatedAt: createdAt, BillableAt: &createdAt}
  595: 	if charged > 0 {
  596: 		record.Status = domain.UsageStatusPartiallyCharged
  597: 		record.ChargedAt = &createdAt
  598: 		record.BillingChargeRequestID = "billchg_" + strings.Repeat("1", 64)
  599: 	}
  600: 	return record
  601: }

  603: func TestDeterministicOrderingExplicit(t *testing.T) {
  604: 	recs := []domain.UsageRecord{rec("b", domain.ProviderOpenAI, "m", 10, 0, 10, 1), rec("a", domain.ProviderOpenAI, "m", 10, 0, 10, 1)}
  605: 	groups, _ := BuildChargeGroups("u", "RUB", recs)
  606: 	ids := []string{groups[0].records[0].LocalRequestID, groups[0].records[1].LocalRequestID}
  607: 	sort.Strings(ids)
  608: 	if groups[0].records[0].LocalRequestID != ids[0] {
  609: 		t.Fatal("not sorted by id")
  610: 	}
  611: }

  613: func TestInvalidCandidatesAreRejectedAndOverflowIsChecked(t *testing.T) {
  614: 	badUser := rec("bad-user", domain.ProviderOpenAI, "m", 10, 0, 10, 1)
  615: 	badUser.UserID = "other"
  616: 	if _, err := BuildChargeGroups("u", "RUB", []domain.UsageRecord{badUser}); !errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidChargePlan) {
  617: 		t.Fatalf("bad user err=%v", err)
  618: 	}
  619: 	badModel := rec("bad-model", domain.ProviderOpenAI, "m", 10, 0, 10, 1)
  620: 	badModel.BillingModel = ""
  621: 	if _, err := BuildChargeGroups("u", "RUB", []domain.UsageRecord{badModel}); !errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidChargePlan) {
  622: 		t.Fatalf("bad model err=%v", err)
  623: 	}
  624: 	badLifecycle := rec("bad-lifecycle", domain.ProviderOpenAI, "m", 10, 0, 10, 1)
  625: 	badLifecycle.BillableAt = nil
  626: 	if _, err := BuildChargeGroups("u", "RUB", []domain.UsageRecord{badLifecycle}); !errors.Is(err, ledger.ErrRecordCorrupt) {
  627: 		t.Fatalf("bad lifecycle err=%v", err)
  628: 	}
  629: 	overflowA := rec("overflow-a", domain.ProviderOpenAI, "m", 1<<62, 0, 1<<62, 1)
  630: 	overflowB := rec("overflow-b", domain.ProviderOpenAI, "m", 1<<62, 0, 1<<62, 2)
  631: 	if _, err := BuildChargeGroups("u", "RUB", []domain.UsageRecord{overflowA, overflowB}); !errors.Is(err, ledger.ErrAmountOverflow) {
  632: 		t.Fatalf("amount overflow err=%v", err)
  633: 	}
  634: 	tokA := rec("tok-a", domain.ProviderOpenAI, "m", 10, 0, 10, 1)
  635: 	tokB := rec("tok-b", domain.ProviderOpenAI, "m", 10, 0, 10, 2)
  636: 	tokA.Usage.InputTokens = 1 << 62
  637: 	tokB.Usage.InputTokens = 1 << 62
  638: 	if _, err := BuildChargePlan("billing", []domain.UsageRecord{tokA, tokB}, 20, time.Unix(1, 0).UTC()); !errors.Is(err, ErrTokenOverflow) {
  639: 		t.Fatalf("token overflow err=%v", err)
  640: 	}
  641: }

  643: func TestValidateChargeSnapshotAndFailureMarkReconciliation(t *testing.T) {
  644: 	r := rec("snap", domain.ProviderOpenAI, "m", 10, 0, 10, 1)
  645: 	plan, err := BuildChargePlan("billing", []domain.UsageRecord{r}, 10, time.Unix(1, 0).UTC())
  646: 	if err != nil {
  647: 		t.Fatal(err)
  648: 	}
  649: 	snapshot := ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot{Batch: plan.Batch, Allocations: plan.Allocations, ExpectedRecords: claimedExpected(plan)}
  650: 	if err := ValidateChargeSnapshot(AutoChargeInput{UserID: "u", BillingSubjectUserID: "billing", Currency: "RUB"}, snapshot); err != nil {
  651: 		t.Fatalf("valid snapshot err=%v", err)
  652: 	}
  653: 	snapshot.Allocations = append(snapshot.Allocations, snapshot.Allocations[0])
  654: 	if err := ValidateChargeSnapshot(AutoChargeInput{UserID: "u", BillingSubjectUserID: "billing", Currency: "RUB"}, snapshot); !errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidChargePlan) {
  655: 		t.Fatalf("duplicate allocation err=%v", err)
  656: 	}
  657: 
  658: 	fl := newFakeLedger([]domain.UsageRecord{r})
  659: 	fl.markErr = errors.New("store down")
  660: 	ch := &fakeCharge{err: errors.New("remote uncertain")}
  661: 	svc, _ := NewAutoChargeService(&fakeIdentity{token: "jwt"}, &fakeBalance{balance: ports.BillingBalance{Currency: "RUB", BalanceCents: 100}}, ch, fl, testClock{time.Unix(2, 0).UTC()}, AutoChargeConfig{ThresholdCents: 10, MinimumChargeCents: 1})
  662: 	_, err = svc.Run(t.Context(), AutoChargeInput{UserID: "u", BillingSubjectUserID: "billing"})
  663: 	if !errors.Is(err, ErrChargeReconciliationRequired) {
  664: 		t.Fatalf("err=%v", err)
  665: 	}
  666: }

  668: func TestRemoteBalanceResultControlsNextGroupAmount(t *testing.T) {
  669: 	records := []domain.UsageRecord{rec("anthropic", domain.ProviderAnthropic, "m", 100, 0, 100, 1), rec("openai", domain.ProviderOpenAI, "m", 100, 0, 100, 2)}
  670: 	firstRemoteBalance := int64(40)
  671: 	ch := &fakeCharge{results: []ports.BillingChargeResult{{BalanceCents: &firstRemoteBalance}, {}}}
  672: 	fl := newFakeLedger(records)
  673: 	svc, _ := NewAutoChargeService(&fakeIdentity{token: "jwt"}, &fakeBalance{balance: ports.BillingBalance{Currency: "RUB", BalanceCents: 200}}, ch, fl, testClock{time.Unix(1, 0).UTC()}, AutoChargeConfig{ThresholdCents: 100, MinimumChargeCents: 1})
  674: 	result, err := svc.Run(t.Context(), AutoChargeInput{UserID: "u", BillingSubjectUserID: "billing"})
  675: 	if err != nil {
  676: 		t.Fatal(err)
  677: 	}
  678: 	if len(result.ProcessedBatchIDs) != 2 || len(ch.requests) != 2 {
  679: 		t.Fatalf("processed=%+v requests=%+v", result.ProcessedBatchIDs, ch.requests)
  680: 	}
  681: 	if ch.requests[0].AmountCents != 100 || ch.requests[1].AmountCents != firstRemoteBalance {
  682: 		t.Fatalf("amounts=%d/%d", ch.requests[0].AmountCents, ch.requests[1].AmountCents)
  683: 	}
  684: }

  686: func TestApplyChargeSuccessRequiresExpectedRecords(t *testing.T) {
  687: 	r := rec("expect", domain.ProviderOpenAI, "m", 100, 0, 100, 1)
  688: 	plan, err := BuildChargePlan("billing", []domain.UsageRecord{r}, 100, time.Unix(1, 0).UTC())
  689: 	if err != nil {
  690: 		t.Fatal(err)
  691: 	}
  692: 	fl := newFakeLedger([]domain.UsageRecord{r})
  693: 	snapshot, err := fl.PrepareChargeBatch(t.Context(), plan)
  694: 	if err != nil {
  695: 		t.Fatal(err)
  696: 	}
  697: 	changed := fl.records[r.LocalRequestID]
  698: 	changed.ChargedAmountCents = 1
  699: 	changed.RemainingAmountCents = 99
  700: 	fl.records[r.LocalRequestID] = changed
  701: 	err = fl.ApplyChargeSuccess(t.Context(), ports.UsageChargeSuccess{BatchID: snapshot.Batch.ID, ChargedAt: time.Unix(2, 0).UTC(), Allocations: snapshot.Allocations, ExpectedRecords: snapshot.ExpectedRecords})
  702: 	if err == nil {
  703: 		t.Fatal("expected mismatch")
  704: 	}
  705: }
  706: 
  707: func claimedExpected(plan ports.UsageChargeBatchPlan) []domain.UsageRecord {
  708: 	out := make([]domain.UsageRecord, 0, len(plan.ExpectedRecords))
  709: 	for _, record := range plan.ExpectedRecords {
  710: 		record.BillingChargeRequestID = plan.Batch.ID
  711: 		out = append(out, record)
  712: 	}
  713: 	return out
  714: }

  721: 		t.Fatalf("autocharge err=%v", err)

  726: 		t.Fatalf("admission err=%v", err)
