  276: func TestLocalRequestAndClientIdempotency(t *testing.T) {
  277: 	svc, store, _ := newServiceForTest(t)
  278: 	input := validReserveInput("llmreq_same")
  279: 	first, err := svc.Reserve(t.Context(), input)
  280: 	if err != nil {
  281: 		t.Fatal(err)
  282: 	}
  283: 	second, err := svc.Reserve(t.Context(), input)
  284: 	if err != nil {
  285: 		t.Fatal(err)
  286: 	}
  287: 	if second.Disposition != ReserveDispositionAlreadyReserved || !SameReservation(first.Record, second.Record) || store.len() != 1 {
  288: 		t.Fatal("same local idempotency failed")
  289: 	}
  290: 	for _, mutate := range []func(*ReserveInput){func(i *ReserveInput) { i.UserID = "other" }, func(i *ReserveInput) { i.EstimatedClientAmountCents++ }, func(i *ReserveInput) { i.SelectedRouteID = "route_2" }} {
  291: 		changed := input
  292: 		mutate(&changed)
  293: 		if _, err := svc.Reserve(t.Context(), changed); !errors.Is(err, ErrLocalRequestConflict) {
  294: 			t.Fatalf("want local conflict got %v", err)
  295: 		}
  296: 	}
  297: 	r := billableRecord(first.Record.LocalRequestID)
  298: 	store.put(r)
  299: 	if _, err := svc.Reserve(t.Context(), input); !errors.Is(err, ErrLocalRequestConflict) {
  300: 		t.Fatalf("billable local err=%v", err)
  301: 	}
  302: 
  303: 	key := "idem"
  304: 	in1 := validReserveInput("llmreq_idem_1")
  305: 	in1.IdempotencyKey = &key
  306: 	if _, err := svc.Reserve(t.Context(), in1); err != nil {
  307: 		t.Fatal(err)
  308: 	}
  309: 	in2 := validReserveInput("llmreq_idem_2")
  310: 	in2.IdempotencyKey = &key
  311: 	if _, err := svc.Reserve(t.Context(), in2); !errors.Is(err, ErrRequestInProgress) {
  312: 		t.Fatalf("same scope err=%v", err)
  313: 	}
  314: 	in3 := validReserveInput("llmreq_idem_3")
  315: 	in3.UserID = "user_2"
  316: 	in3.IdempotencyKey = &key
  317: 	if _, err := svc.Reserve(t.Context(), in3); err != nil {
  318: 		t.Fatal(err)
  319: 	}
  320: 	in4 := validReserveInput("llmreq_idem_4")
  321: 	in4.EndpointKind = domain.EndpointEmbeddings
  322: 	in4.IdempotencyKey = &key
  323: 	if _, err := svc.Reserve(t.Context(), in4); err != nil {
  324: 		t.Fatal(err)
  325: 	}
  326: 	in5 := validReserveInput("llmreq_idem_5")
  327: 	in6 := validReserveInput("llmreq_idem_6")
  328: 	if _, err := svc.Reserve(t.Context(), in5); err != nil {
  329: 		t.Fatal(err)
  330: 	}
  331: 	if _, err := svc.Reserve(t.Context(), in6); err != nil {
  332: 		t.Fatal(err)
  333: 	}
  334: }

  336: func TestIdempotencyExistingStatusMappingAndConcurrency(t *testing.T) {
  337: 	for status, want := range map[domain.UsageStatus]error{domain.UsageStatusReserved: ErrRequestInProgress, domain.UsageStatusBillable: ErrIdempotencyReplayNotAvailable, domain.UsageStatusPartiallyCharged: ErrIdempotencyReplayNotAvailable, domain.UsageStatusCharged: ErrIdempotencyReplayNotAvailable, domain.UsageStatusReleased: ErrIdempotencyKeyReused, domain.UsageStatusFailed: ErrIdempotencyKeyReused, domain.UsageStatusPricingFailed: ErrUnresolvedUsage, domain.UsageStatus("mystery"): ErrRecordCorrupt} {
  338: 		t.Run(string(status), func(t *testing.T) {
  339: 			svc, store, _ := newServiceForTest(t)
  340: 			key := "idem_status"
  341: 			r := reserveRecord("llmreq_existing")
  342: 			r.IdempotencyKey = key
  343: 			r.Status = status
  344: 			store.put(r)
  345: 			input := validReserveInput("llmreq_new")
  346: 			input.IdempotencyKey = &key
  347: 			_, err := svc.Reserve(t.Context(), input)
  348: 			if !errors.Is(err, want) {
  349: 				t.Fatalf("err=%v want %v", err, want)
  350: 			}
  351: 		})
  352: 	}
  353: 
  354: 	svc, store, _ := newServiceForTest(t)
  355: 	key := "race"
  356: 	start := make(chan struct{})
  357: 	errs := make(chan error, 2)
  358: 	for _, id := range []string{"llmreq_race_1", "llmreq_race_2"} {
  359: 		go func(id string) {
  360: 			<-start
  361: 			input := validReserveInput(id)
  362: 			input.IdempotencyKey = &key
  363: 			_, err := svc.Reserve(context.WithValue(t.Context(), struct{}{}, id), input)
  364: 			errs <- err
  365: 		}(id)
  366: 	}
  367: 	close(start)
  368: 	e1, e2 := <-errs, <-errs
  369: 	created, conflict := 0, 0
  370: 	for _, err := range []error{e1, e2} {
  371: 		if err == nil {
  372: 			created++
  373: 		} else if errors.Is(err, ErrRequestInProgress) {
  374: 			conflict++
  375: 		} else {
  376: 			t.Fatalf("unexpected err %v", err)
  377: 		}
  378: 	}
  379: 	if created != 1 || conflict != 1 || store.len() != 1 {
  380: 		t.Fatalf("created=%d conflict=%d len=%d", created, conflict, store.len())
  381: 	}
  382: }

  384: func TestUnresolvedUsageBlocksReserveAndPending(t *testing.T) {
  385: 	svc, store, _ := newServiceForTest(t)
  386: 	pf := reserveRecord("llmreq_pf")
  387: 	pf.Status = domain.UsageStatusPricingFailed
  388: 	pf.FailureReason = "usage_resolution_failed"
  389: 	store.put(pf)
  390: 	if _, err := svc.Reserve(t.Context(), validReserveInput("llmreq_no_key")); !errors.Is(err, ErrUnresolvedUsage) {
  391: 		t.Fatalf("no key err=%v", err)
  392: 	}
  393: 	key := "new"
  394: 	withKey := validReserveInput("llmreq_with_key")
  395: 	withKey.IdempotencyKey = &key
  396: 	if _, err := svc.Reserve(t.Context(), withKey); !errors.Is(err, ErrUnresolvedUsage) {
  397: 		t.Fatalf("with key err=%v", err)
  398: 	}
  399: 	other := validReserveInput("llmreq_other_user")
  400: 	other.UserID = "other"
  401: 	if _, err := svc.Reserve(t.Context(), other); err != nil {
  402: 		t.Fatal(err)
  403: 	}
  404: 	if _, err := PendingAmountForRecord(pf); !errors.Is(err, ErrUnresolvedUsage) {
  405: 		t.Fatalf("pricing_failed pending err=%v", err)
  406: 	}
  407: 	before := store.len()
  408: 	blocked := validReserveInput("llmreq_blocked_created")
  409: 	_, _ = svc.Reserve(t.Context(), blocked)
  410: 	if store.len() != before {
  411: 		t.Fatal("unresolved outcome created record")
  412: 	}
  413: }
  414: 
  415: func TestReleaseFailBillablePricingFailed(t *testing.T) {
  416: 	t.Run("release", func(t *testing.T) {
  417: 		svc, store, clock := newServiceForTest(t)
  418: 		r := reserveRecord("llmreq_rel")
  419: 		store.put(r)
  420: 		out, err := svc.Release(t.Context(), ReleaseInput{LocalRequestID: r.LocalRequestID, FailureReason: "upstream_not_sent"})
  421: 		if err != nil {
  422: 			t.Fatal(err)
  423: 		}
  424: 		if out.Status != domain.UsageStatusReleased || out.FailureReason != "upstream_not_sent" || out.ReleasedAt == nil || out.ReleasedAt.Location() != time.UTC || out.UpdatedAt.Location() != time.UTC || out.EstimatedClientAmountCents != r.EstimatedClientAmountCents || out.ClientAmountCents != 0 {
  425: 			t.Fatal("bad release")
  426: 		}
  427: 		clock.set(clock.now.Add(time.Hour))
  428: 		again, err := svc.Release(t.Context(), ReleaseInput{LocalRequestID: r.LocalRequestID, FailureReason: "upstream_not_sent"})
  429: 		if err != nil {
  430: 			t.Fatal(err)
  431: 		}
  432: 		if !again.ReleasedAt.Equal(*out.ReleasedAt) || !again.UpdatedAt.Equal(out.UpdatedAt) {
  433: 			t.Fatal("timestamp changed")
  434: 		}
  435: 		if _, err := svc.Release(t.Context(), ReleaseInput{LocalRequestID: r.LocalRequestID, FailureReason: "other"}); !errors.Is(err, ErrLedgerStateConflict) {
  436: 			t.Fatalf("diff reason err=%v", err)
  437: 		}
  438: 		billable := billableRecord("llmreq_rel_billable")
  439: 		store.put(billable)
  440: 		if _, err := svc.Release(t.Context(), ReleaseInput{LocalRequestID: billable.LocalRequestID, FailureReason: "upstream_not_sent"}); !errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidStateTransition) {
  441: 			t.Fatalf("billable release err=%v", err)
  442: 		}
  443: 		charged := chargedRecord("llmreq_rel_charged")
  444: 		store.put(charged)
  445: 		if _, err := svc.Release(t.Context(), ReleaseInput{LocalRequestID: charged.LocalRequestID, FailureReason: "upstream_not_sent"}); !errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidStateTransition) {
  446: 			t.Fatalf("charged release err=%v", err)
  447: 		}
  448: 		if _, err := svc.Release(t.Context(), ReleaseInput{LocalRequestID: "llmreq_raw", FailureReason: "provider said: raw-provider-response"}); !errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidLedgerInput) {
  449: 			t.Fatalf("raw reason err=%v", err)
  450: 		}
  451: 	})
  452: 	t.Run("fail", func(t *testing.T) {
  453: 		svc, store, _ := newServiceForTest(t)
  454: 		r := reserveRecord("llmreq_fail")
  455: 		store.put(r)
  456: 		out, err := svc.Fail(t.Context(), FailInput{LocalRequestID: r.LocalRequestID, FailureReason: "internal_failure"})
  457: 		if err != nil {
  458: 			t.Fatal(err)
  459: 		}
  460: 		if out.Status != domain.UsageStatusFailed || out.FailedAt == nil {
  461: 			t.Fatal("bad fail")
  462: 		}
  463: 		if _, err := svc.Fail(t.Context(), FailInput{LocalRequestID: r.LocalRequestID, FailureReason: "internal_failure"}); err != nil {
  464: 			t.Fatal(err)
  465: 		}
  466: 		if _, err := svc.Fail(t.Context(), FailInput{LocalRequestID: r.LocalRequestID, FailureReason: "validation_failed"}); !errors.Is(err, ErrLedgerStateConflict) {
  467: 			t.Fatalf("diff fail err=%v", err)
  468: 		}
  469: 		bill := billableRecord("llmreq_fail_bill")
  470: 		store.put(bill)
  471: 		if _, err := svc.Fail(t.Context(), FailInput{LocalRequestID: bill.LocalRequestID, FailureReason: "internal_failure"}); !errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidStateTransition) {
  472: 			t.Fatalf("billable fail err=%v", err)
  473: 		}
  474: 	})
  475: 	t.Run("billable", func(t *testing.T) {
  476: 		svc, store, _ := newServiceForTest(t)
  477: 		r := reserveRecord("llmreq_bill")
  478: 		store.put(r)
  479: 		input := CommitBillableInput{LocalRequestID: r.LocalRequestID, Usage: domain.TokenUsage{InputTokens: 11, OutputTokens: 3}, UsageCompleteness: pricing.UsageCompletenessDetailed, ClientAmountCents: 77, ActualUpstreamCostCents: 55, ProviderRequestID: "req_provider", ProviderResponseModel: "provider_model"}
  480: 		out, err := svc.CommitBillable(t.Context(), input)
  481: 		if err != nil {
  482: 			t.Fatal(err)
  483: 		}
  484: 		if out.Status != domain.UsageStatusBillable || out.Usage != input.Usage || out.UsageCompleteness != string(input.UsageCompleteness) || out.ProviderRequestID != input.ProviderRequestID || out.ProviderResponseModel != input.ProviderResponseModel || out.ActualUpstreamCostCents != 55 || out.ClientAmountCents != 77 || out.ChargedAmountCents != 0 || out.RemainingAmountCents != 77 || out.BillableAt == nil || !SameReservation(r, out) {
  485: 			t.Fatal("bad billable")
  486: 		}
  487: 		if _, err := svc.CommitBillable(t.Context(), input); err != nil {
  488: 			t.Fatal(err)
  489: 		}
  490: 		changed := input
  491: 		changed.ClientAmountCents = 78
  492: 		if _, err := svc.CommitBillable(t.Context(), changed); !errors.Is(err, ErrLedgerStateConflict) {
  493: 			t.Fatalf("changed amount err=%v", err)
  494: 		}
  495: 		changed = input
  496: 		changed.Usage.OutputTokens++
  497: 		if _, err := svc.CommitBillable(t.Context(), changed); !errors.Is(err, ErrLedgerStateConflict) {
  498: 			t.Fatalf("changed usage err=%v", err)
  499: 		}
  500: 		zero := reserveRecord("llmreq_zero")
  501: 		store.put(zero)
  502: 		input.LocalRequestID = zero.LocalRequestID
  503: 		input.ClientAmountCents = 0
  504: 		if out, err := svc.CommitBillable(t.Context(), input); err != nil || out.RemainingAmountCents != 0 {
  505: 			t.Fatalf("zero err=%v out=%+v", err, out)
  506: 		}
  507: 	})
  508: 	t.Run("pricing failed", func(t *testing.T) {
  509: 		svc, store, _ := newServiceForTest(t)
  510: 		r := reserveRecord("llmreq_pricefail")
  511: 		store.put(r)
  512: 		input := MarkPricingFailedInput{LocalRequestID: r.LocalRequestID, Usage: domain.TokenUsage{InputTokens: 9}, UsageCompleteness: pricing.UsageCompletenessFailed, ProviderRequestID: "req", ProviderResponseModel: "model", FailureReason: "usage_resolution_failed"}
  513: 		out, err := svc.MarkPricingFailed(t.Context(), input)
  514: 		if err != nil {
  515: 			t.Fatal(err)
  516: 		}
  517: 		if out.Status != domain.UsageStatusPricingFailed || out.Usage != input.Usage || out.ProviderRequestID != "req" || out.FailureReason != input.FailureReason || out.ClientAmountCents != 0 || out.RemainingAmountCents != 0 || !SameReservation(r, out) {
  518: 			t.Fatal("bad pricing failed")
  519: 		}
  520: 		if _, err := svc.MarkPricingFailed(t.Context(), input); err != nil {
  521: 			t.Fatal(err)
  522: 		}
  523: 		input.FailureReason = "internal_failure"
  524: 		if _, err := svc.MarkPricingFailed(t.Context(), input); !errors.Is(err, ErrLedgerStateConflict) {
  525: 			t.Fatalf("diff pf err=%v", err)
  526: 		}
  527: 		if _, err := svc.Reserve(t.Context(), validReserveInput("llmreq_after_pf")); !errors.Is(err, ErrUnresolvedUsage) {
  528: 			t.Fatalf("future reserve err=%v", err)
  529: 		}
  530: 	})
  531: }

  565: func TestCASConflictSemantics(t *testing.T) {
  566: 	svc, store, _ := newServiceForTest(t)
  567: 	r := reserveRecord("llmreq_cas")
  568: 	store.put(r)
  569: 	out, err := svc.Release(t.Context(), ReleaseInput{LocalRequestID: r.LocalRequestID, FailureReason: "upstream_not_sent"})
  570: 	if err != nil || out.Status != domain.UsageStatusReleased || store.casCount() != 1 {
  571: 		t.Fatalf("applied err=%v calls=%d", err, store.casCount())
  572: 	}
  573: 	svc, store, _ = newServiceForTest(t)
  574: 	r = reserveRecord("llmreq_cas_same")
  575: 	store.put(r)
  576: 	desired := r
  577: 	desired.Status = domain.UsageStatusReleased
  578: 	desired.FailureReason = "upstream_not_sent"
  579: 	nt := time.Date(2026, 6, 12, 6, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC)
  580: 	desired.ReleasedAt = &nt
  581: 	desired.UpdatedAt = nt
  582: 	store.forceCASResult = &ports.UsageTransitionResult{Applied: false, Current: &desired}
  583: 	if _, err := svc.Release(t.Context(), ReleaseInput{LocalRequestID: r.LocalRequestID, FailureReason: "upstream_not_sent"}); err != nil || store.casCount() != 1 {
  584: 		t.Fatalf("same lost err=%v calls=%d", err, store.casCount())
  585: 	}
  586: 	svc, store, _ = newServiceForTest(t)
  587: 	r = reserveRecord("llmreq_cas_diff")
  588: 	store.put(r)
  589: 	diff := failedRecord(r.LocalRequestID)
  590: 	store.forceCASResult = &ports.UsageTransitionResult{Applied: false, Current: &diff}
  591: 	if _, err := svc.Release(t.Context(), ReleaseInput{LocalRequestID: r.LocalRequestID, FailureReason: "upstream_not_sent"}); !errors.Is(err, ErrLedgerStateConflict) || store.casCount() != 1 {
  592: 		t.Fatalf("diff err=%v calls=%d", err, store.casCount())
  593: 	}
  594: 	svc, store, _ = newServiceForTest(t)
  595: 	r = reserveRecord("llmreq_cas_owned")
  596: 	store.put(r)
  597: 	diffOwned := desired
  598: 	diffOwned.FailureReason = "other"
  599: 	store.forceCASResult = &ports.UsageTransitionResult{Applied: false, Current: &diffOwned}
  600: 	if _, err := svc.Release(t.Context(), ReleaseInput{LocalRequestID: r.LocalRequestID, FailureReason: "upstream_not_sent"}); !errors.Is(err, ErrLedgerStateConflict) || store.casCount() != 1 {
  601: 		t.Fatalf("owned err=%v calls=%d", err, store.casCount())
  602: 	}
  603: }

  605: func TestRecordValidationPendingExposureBalance(t *testing.T) {
  606: 	now := time.Date(2026, 6, 12, 6, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC)
  607: 	valid := []domain.UsageRecord{reserveRecord("llmreq_v_res"), func() domain.UsageRecord {
  608: 		r := reserveRecord("llmreq_v_rel")
  609: 		r.Status = domain.UsageStatusReleased
  610: 		r.FailureReason = "upstream_not_sent"
  611: 		r.ReleasedAt = &now
  612: 		return r
  613: 	}(), func() domain.UsageRecord {
  614: 		r := reserveRecord("llmreq_v_bill")
  615: 		r.Status = domain.UsageStatusBillable
  616: 		r.Usage = domain.TokenUsage{InputTokens: 1}
  617: 		r.UsageCompleteness = string(pricing.UsageCompletenessDetailed)
  618: 		r.ClientAmountCents = 10
  619: 		r.RemainingAmountCents = 10
  620: 		r.BillableAt = &now
  621: 		return r
  622: 	}(), func() domain.UsageRecord {
  623: 		r := reserveRecord("llmreq_v_part")
  624: 		r.Status = domain.UsageStatusPartiallyCharged
  625: 		r.Usage = domain.TokenUsage{InputTokens: 1}
  626: 		r.UsageCompleteness = string(pricing.UsageCompletenessDetailed)
  627: 		r.BillableAt = &now
  628: 		r.ClientAmountCents = 10
  629: 		r.ChargedAmountCents = 4
  630: 		r.RemainingAmountCents = 6
  631: 		r.ChargedAt = &now
  632: 		r.BillingChargeRequestID = "billchg_" + strings.Repeat("c", 64)
  633: 		return r
  634: 	}(), func() domain.UsageRecord {
  635: 		r := reserveRecord("llmreq_v_charged")
  636: 		r.Status = domain.UsageStatusCharged
  637: 		r.Usage = domain.TokenUsage{InputTokens: 1}
  638: 		r.UsageCompleteness = string(pricing.UsageCompletenessDetailed)
  639: 		r.BillableAt = &now
  640: 		r.ClientAmountCents = 10
  641: 		r.ChargedAmountCents = 10
  642: 		r.RemainingAmountCents = 0
  643: 		r.ChargedAt = &now
  644: 		r.BillingChargeRequestID = "billchg_" + strings.Repeat("b", 64)
  645: 		return r
  646: 	}(), func() domain.UsageRecord {
  647: 		r := reserveRecord("llmreq_v_failed")
  648: 		r.Status = domain.UsageStatusFailed
  649: 		r.FailureReason = "internal_failure"
  650: 		r.FailedAt = &now
  651: 		return r
  652: 	}(), func() domain.UsageRecord {
  653: 		r := reserveRecord("llmreq_v_pf")
  654: 		r.Status = domain.UsageStatusPricingFailed
  655: 		r.FailureReason = "usage_resolution_failed"
  656: 		return r
  657: 	}()}
  658: 	for _, r := range valid {
  659: 		if err := ValidateRecord(r); err != nil {
  660: 			t.Fatalf("valid %s err=%v", r.Status, err)
  661: 		}
  662: 	}
  663: 	bad := []domain.UsageRecord{func() domain.UsageRecord { r := reserveRecord("llmreq_b1"); r.ClientAmountCents = 1; return r }(), func() domain.UsageRecord { r := valid[1]; r.ReleasedAt = nil; return r }(), func() domain.UsageRecord { r := valid[2]; r.BillableAt = nil; return r }(), func() domain.UsageRecord { r := valid[2]; r.RemainingAmountCents = 9; return r }(), func() domain.UsageRecord { r := valid[3]; r.ChargedAmountCents = 0; return r }(), func() domain.UsageRecord { r := valid[3]; r.ChargedAmountCents = 10; return r }(), func() domain.UsageRecord { r := valid[3]; r.RemainingAmountCents = 5; return r }(), func() domain.UsageRecord { r := valid[4]; r.RemainingAmountCents = 1; return r }(), func() domain.UsageRecord { r := valid[4]; r.ChargedAt = nil; return r }(), func() domain.UsageRecord { r := valid[6]; r.ClientAmountCents = 1; return r }()}
  664: 	for _, r := range bad {
  665: 		if err := ValidateRecord(r); err == nil {
  666: 			t.Fatalf("bad %s accepted", r.Status)
  667: 		}
  668: 	}
  669: 	if !errors.Is(ValidateTransition(domain.UsageStatusReleased, domain.UsageStatusBillable), ErrInvalidStateTransition) {
  670: 		t.Fatal("terminal transition accepted")
  671: 	}
  672: 
  673: 	pendingCases := map[domain.UsageStatus]struct {
  674: 		amount int64
  675: 		err    error
  676: 	}{domain.UsageStatusReserved: {50, nil}, domain.UsageStatusBillable: {10, nil}, domain.UsageStatusPartiallyCharged: {6, nil}, domain.UsageStatusReleased: {0, nil}, domain.UsageStatusCharged: {0, nil}, domain.UsageStatusFailed: {0, nil}, domain.UsageStatusPricingFailed: {0, ErrUnresolvedUsage}, domain.UsageStatus("bad"): {0, ErrRecordCorrupt}}
  677: 	for st, tc := range pendingCases {
  678: 		r := reserveRecord("llmreq_p_" + string(st))
  679: 		r.Status = st
  680: 		r.ClientAmountCents = 10
  681: 		r.RemainingAmountCents = tc.amount
  682: 		if st == domain.UsageStatusReserved {
  683: 			r.EstimatedClientAmountCents = tc.amount
  684: 		}
  685: 		got, err := PendingAmountForRecord(r)
  686: 		if tc.err != nil && !errors.Is(err, tc.err) {
  687: 			t.Fatalf("%s err=%v", st, err)
  688: 		}
  689: 		if tc.err == nil && (err != nil || got != tc.amount) {
  690: 			t.Fatalf("%s got=%d err=%v", st, got, err)
  691: 		}
  692: 	}
  693: 
  694: 	store := newFakeLedger()
  695: 	store.put(reserveRecord("llmreq_load_exp"))
  696: 	svc, err := NewService(store, &fixedClock{now: now})
  697: 	if err != nil {
  698: 		t.Fatal(err)
  699: 	}
  700: 	loaded, err := svc.LoadExposure(t.Context(), "user_1", "RUB")
  701: 	if err != nil || loaded.PendingAmountCents != 50 {
  702: 		t.Fatalf("loaded exposure=%+v err=%v", loaded, err)
  703: 	}
  704: 
  705: 	exp, err := CalculateExposure(ports.UsageExposureSnapshot{Currency: "RUB", ReservedEstimatedAmountCents: 1, BillableRemainingAmountCents: 2, PartiallyChargedRemainingAmountCents: 3, PricingFailedCount: 1})
  706: 	if err != nil || exp.PendingAmountCents != 6 || !exp.HasUnresolvedUsage {
  707: 		t.Fatalf("exp=%+v err=%v", exp, err)
  708: 	}
  709: 	if _, err := CalculateExposure(ports.UsageExposureSnapshot{Currency: "RUB"}); err != nil {
  710: 		t.Fatal(err)
  711: 	}
  712: 	if _, err := CalculateExposure(ports.UsageExposureSnapshot{Currency: "RUB", ReservedEstimatedAmountCents: -1}); !errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidLedgerInput) {
  713: 		t.Fatalf("negative exp err=%v", err)
  714: 	}
  715: 	if _, err := CalculateExposure(ports.UsageExposureSnapshot{Currency: "RUB", ReservedEstimatedAmountCents: math.MaxInt64, BillableRemainingAmountCents: 1}); !errors.Is(err, ErrAmountOverflow) {
  716: 		t.Fatalf("overflow exp err=%v", err)
  717: 	}
  718: 	if _, err := CalculateExposure(ports.UsageExposureSnapshot{Currency: "USD"}); !errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidLedgerInput) {
  719: 		t.Fatalf("currency exp err=%v", err)
  720: 	}
  721: 
  722: 	bal, err := EvaluateBalance(BalanceInput{RemoteBalanceCents: 100, RequiredReserveCents: 80, Exposure: Exposure{Currency: "RUB", PendingAmountCents: 20}})
  723: 	if err != nil || !bal.Allowed || bal.EffectiveBalanceCents != 80 {
  724: 		t.Fatalf("bal=%+v err=%v", bal, err)
  725: 	}
  726: 	if _, err := EvaluateBalance(BalanceInput{RemoteBalanceCents: 100, RequiredReserveCents: 81, Exposure: Exposure{Currency: "RUB", PendingAmountCents: 20}}); !errors.Is(err, ErrInsufficientFunds) {
  727: 		t.Fatalf("insufficient err=%v", err)
  728: 	}
  729: 	for _, input := range []BalanceInput{{RemoteBalanceCents: 0, RequiredReserveCents: 0, Exposure: Exposure{Currency: "RUB"}}, {RemoteBalanceCents: 10, RequiredReserveCents: 0, Exposure: Exposure{Currency: "RUB", PendingAmountCents: 20}}} {
  730: 		_, _ = EvaluateBalance(input)
  731: 	}
  732: 	if _, err := EvaluateBalance(BalanceInput{RemoteBalanceCents: 1, Exposure: Exposure{Currency: "RUB", HasUnresolvedUsage: true}}); !errors.Is(err, ErrUnresolvedUsage) {
  733: 		t.Fatalf("unresolved bal err=%v", err)
  734: 	}
  735: 	if _, err := EvaluateBalance(BalanceInput{RemoteBalanceCents: -1, Exposure: Exposure{Currency: "RUB"}}); !errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidLedgerInput) {
  736: 		t.Fatalf("negative remote err=%v", err)
  737: 	}
  738: 	if _, err := EvaluateBalance(BalanceInput{RemoteBalanceCents: 1, RequiredReserveCents: -1, Exposure: Exposure{Currency: "RUB"}}); !errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidLedgerInput) {
  739: 		t.Fatalf("negative required err=%v", err)
  740: 	}
  741: 	if _, err := EvaluateBalance(BalanceInput{RemoteBalanceCents: math.MinInt64, Exposure: Exposure{Currency: "RUB", PendingAmountCents: 1}}); !errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidLedgerInput) {
  742: 		t.Fatalf("overflow/negative input err=%v", err)
  743: 	}
  744: 	input := BalanceInput{RemoteBalanceCents: 100, RequiredReserveCents: 1, Exposure: Exposure{Currency: "RUB", PendingAmountCents: 2}}
  745: 	original := input
  746: 	_, _ = EvaluateBalance(input)
  747: 	if !reflect.DeepEqual(input, original) {
  748: 		t.Fatal("input mutated")
  749: 	}
  750: }

  752: func TestPersistenceBoundaryValidatesRecords(t *testing.T) {
  753: 	svc, store, _ := newServiceForTest(t)
  754: 	corrupt := reserveRecord("llmreq_corrupt_loaded")
  755: 	corrupt.ClientAmountCents = 1
  756: 	store.put(corrupt)
  757: 	if _, err := svc.Release(t.Context(), ReleaseInput{LocalRequestID: corrupt.LocalRequestID, FailureReason: "upstream_not_sent"}); !errors.Is(err, ErrRecordCorrupt) {
  758: 		t.Fatalf("corrupt loaded err=%v", err)
  759: 	}
  760: 	if store.casCount() != 0 {
  761: 		t.Fatalf("CAS called for corrupt loaded record: %d", store.casCount())
  762: 	}
  763: 
  764: 	svc, store, _ = newServiceForTest(t)
  765: 	reserved := reserveRecord("llmreq_corrupt_cas_current")
  766: 	store.put(reserved)
  767: 	desired := reserved
  768: 	desired.Status = domain.UsageStatusReleased
  769: 	desired.FailureReason = "upstream_not_sent"
  770: 	now := time.Date(2026, 6, 12, 6, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC)
  771: 	desired.ReleasedAt = &now
  772: 	desired.UpdatedAt = now
  773: 	corruptCurrent := desired
  774: 	corruptCurrent.ClientAmountCents = 1
  775: 	store.forceCASResult = &ports.UsageTransitionResult{Applied: false, Current: &corruptCurrent}
  776: 	if _, err := svc.Release(t.Context(), ReleaseInput{LocalRequestID: reserved.LocalRequestID, FailureReason: "upstream_not_sent"}); !errors.Is(err, ErrRecordCorrupt) {
  777: 		t.Fatalf("corrupt CAS current err=%v", err)
  778: 	}
  779: 	if store.casCount() != 1 {
  780: 		t.Fatalf("CAS calls=%d, want 1", store.casCount())
  781: 	}
  782: 
  783: 	svc, store, _ = newServiceForTest(t)
  784: 	input := validReserveInput("llmreq_constructed_validated")
  785: 	if _, err := svc.Reserve(t.Context(), input); err != nil {
  786: 		t.Fatal(err)
  787: 	}
  788: 	persisted, err := store.FindByLocalRequestID(t.Context(), input.LocalRequestID)
  789: 	if err != nil {
  790: 		t.Fatal(err)
  791: 	}
  792: 	if err := ValidateRecord(*persisted); err != nil {
  793: 		t.Fatalf("constructed reserved record was not valid: %v", err)
  794: 	}
  795: }
  796: 
  797: func TestSafetyNoPayloadsOrSecrets(t *testing.T) {
  798: 	for _, typ := range []reflect.Type{reflect.TypeOf(ReserveInput{}), reflect.TypeOf(ReserveResult{}), reflect.TypeOf(ReleaseInput{}), reflect.TypeOf(FailInput{}), reflect.TypeOf(CommitBillableInput{}), reflect.TypeOf(MarkPricingFailedInput{}), reflect.TypeOf(Exposure{}), reflect.TypeOf(BalanceInput{}), reflect.TypeOf(BalanceResult{}), reflect.TypeOf(domain.UsageRecord{})} {
  799: 		forbiddenFieldFragments := []string{"RequestBody", "ResponseBody", "RawRequest", "RawResponse", "Authorization", "RawAPIKey", "UserAPIKey", "ResellerAPIKey", "BillingJWT", "ServiceToken", "ProviderErrorBody"}
  800: 		for i := 0; i < typ.NumField(); i++ {
  801: 			for _, fragment := range forbiddenFieldFragments {
  802: 				if strings.Contains(typ.Field(i).Name, fragment) {
  803: 					t.Fatalf("%s has forbidden field %s", typ.Name(), typ.Field(i).Name)
  804: 				}
  805: 			}
  806: 		}
  807: 	}
  808: 	secrets := []string{"sk_user_secret", "rk_reseller_secret", "billing-jwt-secret", "raw-provider-response", "raw-request-prompt"}
  809: 	values := []any{ReserveResult{}, Exposure{}, BalanceResult{}, domain.UsageRecord{}, ErrInvalidLedgerInput, ErrUsageStoreUnavailable}
  810: 	for _, v := range values {
  811: 		text := stringify(v)
  812: 		for _, secret := range secrets {
  813: 			if strings.Contains(text, secret) {
  814: 				t.Fatalf("leaked %s in %T", secret, v)
  815: 			}
  816: 		}
  817: 	}
  818: }
  819: 
  820: func ptr(s string) *string { return &s }
  821: func stringify(v any) string {
  822: 	return strings.TrimSpace(strings.ReplaceAll(strings.ReplaceAll(reflect.ValueOf(v).String(), "\n", " "), "\t", " "))
  823: }
  824: 
  825: func TestValidateChargeBatchCanonicalModelBalanceAndUTC(t *testing.T) {
  826: 	now := time.Unix(1, 0).UTC()
  827: 	chargedAt := time.Unix(2, 0).UTC()
  828: 	balance := int64(0)
  829: 	batch := domain.BillingChargeBatch{
  830: 		ID:                          "billchg_" + strings.Repeat("a", 64),
  831: 		UserID:                      "u",
  832: 		BillingSubjectUserID:        "billing",
  833: 		ProviderType:                domain.ProviderOpenAI,
  834: 		ClientModel:                 "gpt",
  835: 		BillingModel:                "openai:gpt",
  836: 		InputTokens:                 1,
  837: 		OutputTokens:                2,
  838: 		AmountCents:                 3,
  839: 		Currency:                    "RUB",
  840: 		Status:                      domain.BillingChargeStatusSucceeded,
  841: 		BillingResponseBalanceCents: &balance,
  842: 		CreatedAt:                   now,
  843: 		ChargedAt:                   &chargedAt,
  844: 		UpdatedAt:                   chargedAt,
  845: 	}
  846: 	if err := ValidateChargeBatch(batch); err != nil {
  847: 		t.Fatalf("valid batch err=%v", err)
  848: 	}
  849: 	badModel := batch
  850: 	badModel.BillingModel = "wrong:gpt"
  851: 	if err := ValidateChargeBatch(badModel); err == nil {
  852: 		t.Fatal("bad billing model accepted")
  853: 	}
  854: 	badBalance := batch
  855: 	negative := int64(-1)
  856: 	badBalance.BillingResponseBalanceCents = &negative
  857: 	if err := ValidateChargeBatch(badBalance); err == nil {
  858: 		t.Fatal("negative response balance accepted")
  859: 	}
  860: 	badTime := batch
  861: 	local := time.Unix(1, 0)
  862: 	badTime.CreatedAt = local
  863: 	if err := ValidateChargeBatch(badTime); err == nil {
  864: 		t.Fatal("non-UTC timestamp accepted")
  865: 	}
  866: }

FILE: internal/application/ledger/validation.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: 94128c2363b010b702bfbfbf118fbe29e4b7643a
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: package ledger
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"fmt"
    5: 	"regexp"
    6: 	"strings"
    7: 	"time"
    8: 
    9: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/application/pricing"
   10: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/domain"
   11: )
   12: 
   13: const currencyRUB = "RUB"
   14: 
   15: var failureReasonPattern = regexp.MustCompile(`^[a-z0-9_]+$`)
   16: 
   17: func validateLocalRequestID(localRequestID string) error {
   18: 	if !strings.HasPrefix(localRequestID, "llmreq_") || len(localRequestID) == len("llmreq_") {
   19: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: invalid local request id", ErrInvalidLedgerInput)
   20: 	}
   21: 	return nil
   22: }
   23: 
   24: func isBlank(value string) bool { return strings.TrimSpace(value) == "" }
   25: 
   26: func validateFailureReason(reason string) error {
   27: 	if !failureReasonPattern.MatchString(reason) {
   28: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: invalid failure reason", ErrInvalidLedgerInput)
   29: 	}
   30: 	return nil
   31: }
   32: 
   33: func validateNonNegativeAmount(name string, amount int64) error {
   34: 	if amount < 0 {
   35: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: negative %s", ErrInvalidLedgerInput, name)
   36: 	}
   37: 	return nil
   38: }
   39: 
   40: func validateUsage(usage domain.TokenUsage) error {
   41: 	if err := pricing.ValidateUsage(usage); err != nil {
   42: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: usage", ErrInvalidLedgerInput)
   43: 	}
   44: 	return nil
   45: }
   46: 
   47: func acceptedBillableCompleteness(value pricing.UsageCompleteness) bool {
   48: 	return value == pricing.UsageCompletenessDetailed || value == pricing.UsageCompletenessAggregate || value == pricing.UsageCompletenessEstimated
   49: }
   50: 
   51: func acceptedPricingFailedCompleteness(value pricing.UsageCompleteness) bool {
   52: 	return acceptedBillableCompleteness(value) || value == pricing.UsageCompletenessMissing || value == pricing.UsageCompletenessFailed
   53: }
   54: 
   55: func ValidateRecord(record domain.UsageRecord) error {
   56: 	if err := validateLocalRequestID(record.LocalRequestID); err != nil {
   57: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: local request id", ErrRecordCorrupt)
   58: 	}
   59: 	if !isKnownStatus(record.Status) {
   60: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: %s", ErrInvalidUsageStatus, record.Status)
   61: 	}
   62: 	if record.EstimatedClientAmountCents < 0 || record.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents < 0 || record.ClientAmountCents < 0 || record.ChargedAmountCents < 0 || record.RemainingAmountCents < 0 || record.ActualUpstreamCostCents < 0 {
   63: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: negative amount", ErrRecordCorrupt)
   64: 	}
   65: 	if err := validateUsage(record.EstimatedUsage); err != nil {
   66: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: estimated usage", ErrRecordCorrupt)
   67: 	}
   68: 	switch record.Status {
   69: 	case domain.UsageStatusReserved:
   70: 		if record.ReservedAt == nil || record.BillableAt != nil || record.ReleasedAt != nil || record.ChargedAt != nil || record.FailedAt != nil {
   71: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w: reserved timestamps", ErrRecordCorrupt)
   72: 		}
   73: 		if !isZeroUsage(record.Usage) || record.ClientAmountCents != 0 || record.ChargedAmountCents != 0 || record.RemainingAmountCents != 0 || record.ActualUpstreamCostCents != 0 {
   74: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w: reserved amounts", ErrRecordCorrupt)
   75: 		}
   76: 	case domain.UsageStatusReleased:
   77: 		if record.ReleasedAt == nil || validateFailureReason(record.FailureReason) != nil {
   78: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w: released fields", ErrRecordCorrupt)
   79: 		}
   80: 		if record.ClientAmountCents != 0 || record.ChargedAmountCents != 0 || record.RemainingAmountCents != 0 || record.ActualUpstreamCostCents != 0 {
   81: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w: released amounts", ErrRecordCorrupt)
   82: 		}
   83: 	case domain.UsageStatusFailed:
   84: 		if record.FailedAt == nil || validateFailureReason(record.FailureReason) != nil {
   85: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w: failed fields", ErrRecordCorrupt)
   86: 		}
   87: 	case domain.UsageStatusBillable:
   88: 		if record.BillableAt == nil || !acceptedBillableCompleteness(pricing.UsageCompleteness(record.UsageCompleteness)) || validateUsage(record.Usage) != nil {
   89: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w: billable fields", ErrRecordCorrupt)
   90: 		}
   91: 		if record.ChargedAmountCents != 0 || record.RemainingAmountCents != record.ClientAmountCents {
   92: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w: billable amounts", ErrRecordCorrupt)
   93: 		}
   94: 	case domain.UsageStatusPartiallyCharged:
   95: 		if record.ChargedAt == nil || strings.TrimSpace(record.BillingChargeRequestID) == "" || record.BillableAt == nil || !acceptedBillableCompleteness(pricing.UsageCompleteness(record.UsageCompleteness)) || validateUsage(record.Usage) != nil {
   96: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w: partially charged fields", ErrRecordCorrupt)
   97: 		}
   98: 		if record.ClientAmountCents <= 0 || record.ChargedAmountCents <= 0 || record.ChargedAmountCents >= record.ClientAmountCents || record.RemainingAmountCents != record.ClientAmountCents-record.ChargedAmountCents {
   99: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w: partially charged amounts", ErrRecordCorrupt)
  100: 		}
  101: 	case domain.UsageStatusCharged:
  102: 		if record.ChargedAt == nil || strings.TrimSpace(record.BillingChargeRequestID) == "" || record.BillableAt == nil || !acceptedBillableCompleteness(pricing.UsageCompleteness(record.UsageCompleteness)) || validateUsage(record.Usage) != nil || record.ChargedAmountCents != record.ClientAmountCents || record.RemainingAmountCents != 0 {
  103: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w: charged fields", ErrRecordCorrupt)
  104: 		}
  105: 	case domain.UsageStatusPricingFailed:
  106: 		if !acceptedPricingFailedCompleteness(pricing.UsageCompleteness(record.UsageCompleteness)) || validateFailureReason(record.FailureReason) != nil || record.ClientAmountCents != 0 || record.ChargedAmountCents != 0 || record.RemainingAmountCents != 0 {
  107: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w: pricing failed fields", ErrRecordCorrupt)
  108: 		}
  109: 	}
  110: 	billingModel, err := pricing.BillingModel(record.ProviderType, record.ClientModel)
  111: 	if err != nil || record.BillingModel != billingModel {
  112: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: billing model", ErrRecordCorrupt)
  113: 	}
  114: 	return nil
  115: }
  116: 
  117: func isZeroUsage(usage domain.TokenUsage) bool { return usage == (domain.TokenUsage{}) }
  118: 
  119: func ValidateChargeBatch(batch domain.BillingChargeBatch) error {
  120: 	if !validBillingChargeID(batch.ID) {
  121: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: charge batch id", ErrRecordCorrupt)
  122: 	}
  123: 	if isBlank(batch.UserID) || isBlank(batch.BillingSubjectUserID) || isBlank(string(batch.ProviderType)) || isBlank(batch.ClientModel) || isBlank(batch.BillingModel) {
  124: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: charge batch identity", ErrRecordCorrupt)
  125: 	}
  126: 	billingModel, err := pricing.BillingModel(batch.ProviderType, batch.ClientModel)
  127: 	if err != nil || batch.BillingModel != billingModel {
  128: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: charge batch billing model", ErrRecordCorrupt)
  129: 	}
  130: 	if batch.Currency != currencyRUB || batch.AmountCents <= 0 || batch.InputTokens < 0 || batch.OutputTokens < 0 {
  131: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: charge batch amounts", ErrRecordCorrupt)
  132: 	}
  133: 	if batch.BillingResponseBalanceCents != nil && *batch.BillingResponseBalanceCents < 0 {
  134: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: charge batch response balance", ErrRecordCorrupt)
  135: 	}
  136: 	if batch.CreatedAt.IsZero() || batch.UpdatedAt.IsZero() || !isUTCTime(batch.CreatedAt) || !isUTCTime(batch.UpdatedAt) {
  137: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: charge batch timestamps", ErrRecordCorrupt)
  138: 	}
  139: 	switch batch.Status {
  140: 	case domain.BillingChargeStatusPending:
  141: 		if batch.ChargedAt != nil || batch.FailedAt != nil || batch.BillingErrorCode != "" {
  142: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w: pending charge batch fields", ErrRecordCorrupt)
  143: 		}
  144: 	case domain.BillingChargeStatusFailed:
  145: 		if batch.FailedAt == nil || !isUTCTime(*batch.FailedAt) || batch.ChargedAt != nil || validateBillingErrorCode(batch.BillingErrorCode) != nil {
  146: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w: failed charge batch fields", ErrRecordCorrupt)
  147: 		}
  148: 	case domain.BillingChargeStatusSucceeded:
  149: 		if batch.ChargedAt == nil || !isUTCTime(*batch.ChargedAt) || batch.FailedAt != nil || batch.BillingErrorCode != "" {
  150: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w: succeeded charge batch fields", ErrRecordCorrupt)
  151: 		}
  152: 	default:
  153: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: charge batch status", ErrRecordCorrupt)
  154: 	}
  155: 	return nil
  156: }
  157: 
  158: func isUTCTime(value time.Time) bool { return value.Location() == time.UTC }
  159: 
  160: func ValidateAllocation(batch domain.BillingChargeBatch, allocation domain.BillingChargeAllocation) error {
  161: 	if !validBillingAllocationID(allocation.ID) || allocation.BatchID != batch.ID || isBlank(allocation.LocalRequestID) {
  162: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: charge allocation identity", ErrRecordCorrupt)
  163: 	}
  164: 	if allocation.ChargedAmountCents <= 0 || allocation.RemainingAmountCents < 0 {
  165: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: charge allocation amounts", ErrRecordCorrupt)
  166: 	}
  167: 	if allocation.CreatedAt.IsZero() {
  168: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: charge allocation timestamp", ErrRecordCorrupt)
  169: 	}
  170: 	return nil
  171: }
  172: 
  173: func validateBillingErrorCode(code string) error {
  174: 	if isBlank(code) || len(code) > 64 || !failureReasonPattern.MatchString(code) {
  175: 		return fmt.Errorf("%w: invalid billing error code", ErrRecordCorrupt)
  176: 	}
  177: 	return nil
  178: }
  179: 
  180: func validBillingChargeID(id string) bool {
  181: 	return len(id) == len("billchg_")+64 && strings.HasPrefix(id, "billchg_") && isLowerHex(id[len("billchg_"):])
  182: }
  183: 
  184: func validBillingAllocationID(id string) bool {
  185: 	return len(id) == len("billalloc_")+64 && strings.HasPrefix(id, "billalloc_") && isLowerHex(id[len("billalloc_"):])
  186: }
  187: 
  188: func isLowerHex(value string) bool {
  189: 	for _, ch := range value {
  190: 		if (ch < '0' || ch > '9') && (ch < 'a' || ch > 'f') {
  191: 			return false
  192: 		}
  193: 	}
  194: 	return true
  195: }

FILE: internal/application/llmrequest/contracts.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: 76abe43c4b7b520194e2a15b2c2288e2f18bba90
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: package llmrequest
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"context"
    5: 
    6: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/domain"
    7: )
    8: 
    9: type Authenticator interface {
   10: 	Authenticate(context.Context, string) (Principal, error)
   11: }
   12: 
   13: type RequestParser interface {
   14: 	Parse(context.Context, ParseInput) (ParsedRequest, error)
   15: }
   16: 
   17: type CapabilityDetector interface {
   18: 	Detect(context.Context, CapabilityInput) (domain.CapabilitySet, error)
   19: }
   20: 
   21: type RoutePlanner interface {
   22: 	Plan(context.Context, RoutePlanInput) (RoutePlan, error)
   23: }
   24: 
   25: type BillingAdmitter interface {
   26: 	Admit(context.Context, BillingAdmissionInput) (BillingAdmissionResult, error)
   27: }
   28: 
   29: type AtomicReservation interface {
   30: 	// Reserve must create the usage reserve and increment the selected reseller
   31: 	// reserve in one atomic operation. An error must leave both states unchanged.
   32: 	Reserve(context.Context, ReservationInput) (ReservationResult, error)
   33: }
   34: 
   35: type RouteReservationTransfer interface {
   36: 	// Transfer atomically:
   37: 	//   1. verifies ExpectedUsage is still the current reserved usage record;
   38: 	//   2. removes its unused estimated upstream reserve from the previous reseller;
   39: 	//   3. adds Target.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents to the target reseller reserve;
   40: 	//   4. replaces the reserved usage routing, pricing, and estimate snapshot with
   41: 	//      the immutable Target snapshot.
   42: 	//
   43: 	// Any error must leave the usage record and both reseller balances unchanged.
   44: 	// Repeating the identical already-committed transfer is idempotent.
   45: 	Transfer(
   46: 		context.Context,
   47: 		RouteReservationTransferInput,
   48: 	) (RouteReservationTransferResult, error)
   49: }
   50: 
   51: type ForwardingStageExecutor interface {
   52: 	Execute(
   53: 		context.Context,
   54: 		PreparedRequest,
   55: 		BillingAdmissionResult,
   56: 	) (ForwardedRequest, error)
   57: }
   58: 
   59: type UsageResolver interface {
   60: 	Resolve(
   61: 		context.Context,
   62: 		UsageResolutionInput,
   63: 	) (UsageResolutionResult, error)
   64: }
   65: 
   66: type Finalizer interface {
   67: 	Commit(
   68: 		context.Context,
   69: 		FinalizationInput,
   70: 	) (FinalizationResult, error)
   71: 	MarkPricingFailed(
   72: 		context.Context,
   73: 		PricingFailureInput,
   74: 	) (FinalizationResult, error)
   75: }
   76: 
   77: type AutoCharger interface {
   78: 	Run(context.Context, AutoChargeInput) AutoChargeResult
   79: }
   80: 
   81: type Dependencies struct {
   82: 	Authenticator      Authenticator
   83: 	RequestParser      RequestParser
   84: 	CapabilityDetector CapabilityDetector
   85: 	RoutePlanner       RoutePlanner
   86: 	BillingAdmitter    BillingAdmitter
   87: 	Forwarding         ForwardingStageExecutor
   88: 	UsageResolver      UsageResolver
   89: 	Finalizer          Finalizer
   90: 	AutoCharger        AutoCharger
   91: }

   12: 
   13: func TestServiceExecuteEmbeddingsCanonicalPipeline(
   14: 	t *testing.T,
   15: ) {
   16: 	var calls []string
   17: 	record := func(value string) {
   18: 		calls = append(calls, value)
   19: 	}
   20: 
   21: 	payload := []byte(
   22: 		`{"model":"embedding-model","input":["ab","c"]}`,
   23: 	)
   24: 	input := Input{
   25: 		LocalRequestID: "llmreq_embeddings_test",
   26: 		RawAPIKey:      "sk_test",
   27: 		APIFamily:      domain.APIFamilyOpenAICompatible,
   28: 		EndpointKind:   domain.EndpointEmbeddings,
   29: 		Payload:        payload,
   30: 	}
   31: 
   32: 	dependencies := validDependencies(nil)
   33: 	dependencies.Authenticator = authenticateFunc(
   34: 		func(
   35: 			_ context.Context,
   36: 			rawAPIKey string,
   37: 		) (Principal, error) {
   38: 			record("authenticate")
   39: 			if rawAPIKey != "sk_test" {
   40: 				t.Fatalf("raw API key=%q", rawAPIKey)
   41: 			}
   42: 			return Principal{
   43: 				UserID:               "user-1",
   44: 				APIKeyID:             "key-1",
   45: 				BillingSubjectUserID: "billing-1",
   46: 			}, nil
   47: 		},
   48: 	)
   49: 	dependencies.RequestParser = parseFunc(
   50: 		func(
   51: 			_ context.Context,
   52: 			value ParseInput,
   53: 		) (ParsedRequest, error) {
   54: 			record("parse")
   55: 			if value.APIFamily != domain.APIFamilyOpenAICompatible ||
   56: 				value.EndpointKind != domain.EndpointEmbeddings ||
   57: 				!bytes.Equal(value.Payload, payload) {
   58: 				t.Fatalf("parse input=%+v", value)
   59: 			}
   60: 			return ParsedRequest{
   61: 				ClientModel: "embedding-model",
   62: 			}, nil
   63: 		},
   64: 	)
   65: 	dependencies.CapabilityDetector = detectFunc(
   66: 		func(
   67: 			_ context.Context,
   68: 			value CapabilityInput,
   69: 		) (domain.CapabilitySet, error) {
   70: 			record("capabilities")
   71: 			if value.EndpointKind != domain.EndpointEmbeddings ||
   72: 				value.ClientModel != "embedding-model" ||
   73: 				!bytes.Equal(value.Payload, payload) {
   74: 				t.Fatalf("capability input=%+v", value)
   75: 			}
   76: 			return domain.CapabilitySet{
   77: 				Embeddings: true,
   78: 			}, nil
   79: 		},
   80: 	)
   81: 	dependencies.RoutePlanner = planFunc(
   82: 		func(
   83: 			_ context.Context,
   84: 			value RoutePlanInput,
   85: 		) (RoutePlan, error) {
   86: 			record("route")
   87: 			if value.EndpointKind != domain.EndpointEmbeddings ||
   88: 				value.ClientModel != "embedding-model" ||
   89: 				!value.RequestedCapabilities.Embeddings ||
   90: 				value.RequestedCapabilities.Chat {
   91: 				t.Fatalf("route input=%+v", value)
   92: 			}
   93: 
   94: 			plan := validRoutePlan()
   95: 			plan.Route.EndpointKind = domain.EndpointEmbeddings
   96: 			plan.Route.ClientModel = "embedding-model"
   97: 			plan.Route.ProviderModel = "provider-embedding-model"
   98: 			plan.BillingModel = "openai:embedding-model"
   99: 			plan.EstimatedUsage = domain.TokenUsage{
  100: 				InputTokens: 3,
  101: 			}
  102: 			plan.EstimatedClientAmountCents = 12
  103: 			plan.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents = 8
  104: 			return plan, nil
  105: 		},
  106: 	)
  107: 	dependencies.BillingAdmitter = admitFunc(
  108: 		func(
  109: 			_ context.Context,
  110: 			value BillingAdmissionInput,
  111: 		) (BillingAdmissionResult, error) {
  112: 			record("admission")
  113: 			if value.Principal.UserID != "user-1" ||
  114: 				value.RequiredReserveCents != 12 ||
  115: 				value.Currency != "RUB" {
  116: 				t.Fatalf("admission input=%+v", value)
  117: 			}
  118: 			return BillingAdmissionResult{
  119: 				Allowed:               true,
  120: 				RemoteBalanceCents:    1000,
  121: 				PendingAmountCents:    100,
  122: 				EffectiveBalanceCents: 900,
  123: 				RequiredReserveCents:  12,
  124: 				Currency:              "RUB",
  125: 			}, nil
  126: 		},
  127: 	)
  128: 	dependencies.Forwarding = forwardingStageFunc(
  129: 		func(
  130: 			_ context.Context,
  131: 			prepared PreparedRequest,
  132: 			admission BillingAdmissionResult,
  133: 		) (ForwardedRequest, error) {
  134: 			record("forwarding")

  136: 				!prepared.RequestedCapabilities.Embeddings ||
  137: 				prepared.Plan.Route.EndpointKind !=
  138: 					domain.EndpointEmbeddings ||
  139: 				admission.RequiredReserveCents != 12 {
  140: 				t.Fatalf(

  142: 					prepared,
  143: 					admission,
  144: 				)
  145: 			}
  146: 
  147: 			reservation := validReservation(
  148: 				reservationInput(prepared),
  149: 			)
  150: 			return ForwardedRequest{
  151: 				Reserved: ReservedRequest{
  152: 					Prepared:    prepared,
  153: 					Admission:   admission,
  154: 					Reservation: reservation,
  155: 				},
  156: 				Response: ports.ForwardResponse{
  157: 					StatusCode: 200,
  158: 					Body: []byte(`{
  159: 						"object":"list",
  160: 						"data":[{
  161: 							"object":"embedding",
  162: 							"embedding":[0.1,0.2],
  163: 							"index":0
  164: 						}],
  165: 						"model":"provider-embedding-model",
  166: 						"usage":{
  167: 							"prompt_tokens":3,
  168: 							"total_tokens":3
  169: 						}
  170: 					}`),
  171: 				},
  172: 			}, nil
  173: 		},
  174: 	)
  175: 	dependencies.UsageResolver = usageResolverFunc(
  176: 		func(
  177: 			_ context.Context,
  178: 			value UsageResolutionInput,
  179: 		) (UsageResolutionResult, error) {
  180: 			record("usage")
  181: 			if value.Reserved.Prepared.EndpointKind !=
  182: 				domain.EndpointEmbeddings ||
  183: 				value.Response.StatusCode != 200 {
  184: 				t.Fatalf("usage input=%+v", value)
  185: 			}
  186: 			return UsageResolutionResult{
  187: 				Usage: domain.TokenUsage{
  188: 					InputTokens: 3,
  189: 				},
  190: 				Completeness:          "detailed",
  191: 				UpstreamCostCents:     8,
  192: 				ClientAmountCents:     10,
  193: 				Currency:              "RUB",
  194: 				ProviderResponseModel: "provider-embedding-model",
  195: 			}, nil
  196: 		},
  197: 	)
  198: 	dependencies.Finalizer = finalizerFunc{
  199: 		commit: func(
  200: 			_ context.Context,
  201: 			value FinalizationInput,
  202: 		) (FinalizationResult, error) {
  203: 			record("finalize")
  204: 			if value.ResolvedUsage.Usage.InputTokens != 3 ||
  205: 				value.ResolvedUsage.Usage.OutputTokens != 0 ||
  206: 				value.ResolvedUsage.ClientAmountCents != 10 {
  207: 				t.Fatalf("finalization input=%+v", value)
  208: 			}
  209: 			return FinalizationResult{
  210: 				Usage: domain.UsageRecord{
  211: 					LocalRequestID: value.Reserved.
  212: 						Prepared.LocalRequestID,
  213: 					UserID: value.Reserved.Prepared.
  214: 						Principal.UserID,
  215: 					ProviderType: domain.ProviderOpenAI,
  216: 					ClientModel:  "embedding-model",
  217: 					BillingModel: "openai:embedding-model",
  218: 					Currency:     "RUB",
  219: 					Usage: domain.TokenUsage{
  220: 						InputTokens: 3,
  221: 					},
  222: 					UsageCompleteness:    "detailed",
  223: 					ClientAmountCents:    10,
  224: 					RemainingAmountCents: 10,
  225: 					Status:               domain.UsageStatusBillable,
  226: 				},
  227: 			}, nil
  228: 		},
  229: 		pricingFailed: func(
  230: 			context.Context,
  231: 			PricingFailureInput,
  232: 		) (FinalizationResult, error) {
  233: 			t.Fatal("pricing-failure finalizer called")
  234: 			return FinalizationResult{}, nil
  235: 		},
  236: 	}
  237: 	dependencies.AutoCharger = autoChargerFunc(
  238: 		func(
  239: 			_ context.Context,
  240: 			value AutoChargeInput,
  241: 		) AutoChargeResult {
  242: 			record("autocharge")
  243: 			if value.Principal.BillingSubjectUserID != "billing-1" ||
  244: 				value.FinalUsageRecord.Status !=
  245: 					domain.UsageStatusBillable ||
  246: 				value.FinalUsageRecord.ClientAmountCents != 10 {
  247: 				t.Fatalf("auto-charge input=%+v", value)
  248: 			}
  249: 			balance := int64(990)
  250: 			return AutoChargeResult{
  251: 				Status: AutoChargeStatusProcessed,
  252: 				ProcessedBatchIDs: []string{
  253: 					"billchg_embeddings",
  254: 				},
  255: 				ChargedAmountCents:  10,
  256: 				BillingBalanceCents: &balance,
  257: 			}
  258: 		},
  259: 	)
  260: 
  261: 	service, err := NewService(dependencies)
  262: 	if err != nil {
  263: 		t.Fatalf("NewService: %v", err)
  264: 	}
  265: 	result, err := service.Execute(
  266: 		context.Background(),
  267: 		input,
  268: 	)
  269: 	if err != nil {
  270: 		t.Fatalf("Execute: %v", err)
  271: 	}
  272: 
  273: 	wantCalls := []string{
  274: 		"authenticate",
  275: 		"parse",
  276: 		"capabilities",
  277: 		"route",
  278: 		"admission",
  279: 		"forwarding",
  280: 		"usage",
  281: 		"finalize",
  282: 		"autocharge",
  283: 	}
  284: 	if !reflect.DeepEqual(calls, wantCalls) {
  285: 		t.Fatalf("calls=%#v want=%#v", calls, wantCalls)
  286: 	}
  287: 
  288: 	if result.Reserved.Prepared.EndpointKind !=
  289: 		domain.EndpointEmbeddings ||
  290: 		!result.Reserved.Prepared.RequestedCapabilities.Embeddings ||
  291: 		result.ResolvedUsage.Usage.InputTokens != 3 ||
  292: 		result.ResolvedUsage.Usage.OutputTokens != 0 ||
  293: 		result.FinalUsageRecord.Status != domain.UsageStatusBillable ||
  294: 		result.FinalUsageRecord.ClientAmountCents != 10 ||
  295: 		result.AutoCharge.Status != AutoChargeStatusProcessed ||
  296: 		result.AutoCharge.ChargedAmountCents != 10 ||
  297: 		result.AutoCharge.BillingBalanceCents == nil ||
  298: 		*result.AutoCharge.BillingBalanceCents != 990 ||
  299: 		len(result.Response.Body) == 0 {
  300: 		t.Fatalf("result=%+v", result)
  301: 	}
  302: }

====================================================================================================

    1: package llmrequest
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"context"
    5: 	"errors"
    6: 	"fmt"
    7: 	"time"
    8: 
    9: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/domain"
   10: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/ports"
   11: )
   12: 
   13: type ForwardingExecutionInput struct {
   14: 	Prepared    PreparedRequest
   15: 	Admission   BillingAdmissionResult
   16: 	Reservation ReservationResult
   17: }
   18: 
   19: type ForwardingExecutionResult struct {
   20: 	Response ports.ForwardResponse
   21: }
   22: 
   23: type ForwardingExecutor interface {
   24: 	Forward(
   25: 		context.Context,
   26: 		ForwardingExecutionInput,
   27: 	) (ForwardingExecutionResult, error)
   28: }
   29: 
   30: type ForwardingFailure interface {
   31: 	error
   32: 	FailureKindValue() string
   33: 	FailureStatusCode() int
   34: 	FailureAttemptStateValue() string
   35: 	FailureRouteRetryCandidate() bool
   36: }
   37: 
   38: type ForwardingStage struct {
   39: 	capacity    ports.RouteCapacityManager
   40: 	reservation AtomicReservation
   41: 	transfer    RouteReservationTransfer
   42: 	attempts    ports.ForwardingAttemptStore
   43: 	clock       ports.Clock
   44: 	forwarder   ForwardingExecutor
   45: }
   46: 
   47: type ForwardedRequest struct {
   48: 	Reserved         ReservedRequest
   49: 	Response         ports.ForwardResponse
   50: 	ResolvedUsage    UsageResolutionResult
   51: 	FinalUsageRecord domain.UsageRecord
   52: 	AutoCharge       AutoChargeResult
   53: }
   54: 
   55: func NewForwardingStage(
   56: 	capacity ports.RouteCapacityManager,
   57: 	reservation AtomicReservation,
   58: 	transfer RouteReservationTransfer,
   59: 	attempts ports.ForwardingAttemptStore,
   60: 	clock ports.Clock,
   61: 	forwarder ForwardingExecutor,
   62: ) (*ForwardingStage, error) {
   63: 	if capacity == nil ||
   64: 		reservation == nil ||
   65: 		transfer == nil ||
   66: 		attempts == nil ||
   67: 		clock == nil ||
   68: 		forwarder == nil {
   69: 		return nil, ErrDependencyRequired
   70: 	}
   71: 	return &ForwardingStage{
   72: 		capacity:    capacity,
   73: 		reservation: reservation,
   74: 		transfer:    transfer,
   75: 		attempts:    attempts,
   76: 		clock:       clock,
   77: 		forwarder:   forwarder,
   78: 	}, nil
   79: }
   80: 
   81: func (s *ForwardingStage) Execute(
   82: 	ctx context.Context,
   83: 	prepared PreparedRequest,
   84: 	admission BillingAdmissionResult,
   85: ) (result ForwardedRequest, err error) {
   86: 	if s == nil || s.capacity == nil || s.reservation == nil ||
   87: 		s.transfer == nil || s.attempts == nil || s.clock == nil ||
   88: 		s.forwarder == nil {
   89: 		return ForwardedRequest{}, ErrDependencyRequired
   90: 	}
   91: 	if ctx == nil {
   92: 		return ForwardedRequest{}, fmt.Errorf(
   93: 			"%w: nil forwarding stage context",
   94: 			ErrInvalidInput,
   95: 		)
   96: 	}
   97: 	if err := ctx.Err(); err != nil {
   98: 		return ForwardedRequest{}, err
   99: 	}
  100: 	if err := validateBillingAdmission(prepared, admission); err != nil {
  101: 		return ForwardedRequest{}, err
  102: 	}
  103: 
  104: 	candidates := forwardingCandidates(prepared.Plan)
  105: 	var reservation ReservationResult
  106: 	reservationCreated := false
  107: 	var lastForwardErr error
  108: 	var lastCapacityErr error
  109: 
  110: 	for index, candidate := range candidates {
  111: 		attemptNumber := index + 1
  112: 		candidatePrepared := preparedForForwardingCandidate(
  113: 			prepared,
  114: 			candidate,
  115: 			candidates[index+1:],
  116: 		)
  117: 		lease, acquireErr := s.capacity.Acquire(
  118: 			ctx,
  119: 			ports.RouteCapacityAcquireInput{
  120: 				LocalRequestID: candidatePrepared.LocalRequestID,
  121: 				ReservationID: forwardingCapacityReservationID(
  122: 					candidatePrepared.LocalRequestID,
  123: 					attemptNumber,
  124: 				),
  125: 				Route:          candidatePrepared.Plan.Route,
  126: 				Reseller:       candidatePrepared.Plan.Reseller,
  127: 				EstimatedUsage: candidatePrepared.Plan.EstimatedUsage,
  128: 			},
  129: 		)
  130: 		if acquireErr != nil {
  131: 			if errors.Is(acquireErr, ports.ErrRouteCapacityUnavailable) {
  132: 				lastCapacityErr = fmt.Errorf(
  133: 					"route %q capacity unavailable: %w",
  134: 					candidatePrepared.Plan.Route.ID,
  135: 					acquireErr,
  136: 				)
  137: 				continue
  138: 			}
  139: 			return ForwardedRequest{}, fmt.Errorf(
  140: 				"acquire route capacity: %w",
  141: 				acquireErr,
  142: 			)
  143: 		}
  144: 		if err := validateForwardingCapacityLease(
  145: 			lease,
  146: 			candidatePrepared,
  147: 			attemptNumber,
  148: 		); err != nil {
  149: 			releaseErr := s.capacity.Release(
  150: 				context.WithoutCancel(ctx),
  151: 				lease,
  152: 			)
  153: 			return ForwardedRequest{}, errors.Join(err, releaseErr)
  154: 		}
  155: 
  156: 		attemptResult, attemptErr := s.executeLeasedCandidate(
  157: 			ctx,
  158: 			candidatePrepared,
  159: 			admission,
  160: 			reservation,
  161: 			reservationCreated,
  162: 			candidate,
  163: 			attemptNumber,
  164: 			lease,
  165: 		)
  166: 		if attemptResult.Reservation.Usage.LocalRequestID != "" {
  167: 			reservation = attemptResult.Reservation
  168: 			reservationCreated = true
  169: 		}
  170: 		if attemptErr == nil {
  171: 			return ForwardedRequest{
  172: 				Reserved: ReservedRequest{
  173: 					Prepared:  clonePreparedRequest(attemptResult.Prepared),
  174: 					Admission: admission,
  175: 					Reservation: cloneReservationResult(
  176: 						attemptResult.Reservation,
  177: 					),
  178: 				},
  179: 				Response: cloneForwardResponse(
  180: 					attemptResult.Execution.Response,
  181: 				),
  182: 			}, nil
  183: 		}
  184: 		lastForwardErr = attemptErr
  185: 		if !attemptResult.RetryAllowed {
  186: 			return ForwardedRequest{}, attemptErr
  187: 		}
  188: 		if err := ctx.Err(); err != nil {
  189: 			return ForwardedRequest{}, errors.Join(attemptErr, err)
  190: 		}
  191: 	}
  192: 
  193: 	switch {
  194: 	case lastForwardErr != nil && lastCapacityErr != nil:
  195: 		return ForwardedRequest{}, errors.Join(lastForwardErr, lastCapacityErr)
  196: 	case lastForwardErr != nil:
  197: 		return ForwardedRequest{}, lastForwardErr
  198: 	case lastCapacityErr != nil:
  199: 		return ForwardedRequest{}, lastCapacityErr
  200: 	default:
  201: 		return ForwardedRequest{}, fmt.Errorf(
  202: 			"%w: empty forwarding candidate plan",
  203: 			ErrStageContractViolation,
  204: 		)
  205: 	}
  206: }
  207: 
  208: type forwardingCandidate struct {
  209: 	Plan RouteFallbackPlan
  210: }
  211: 
  212: type leasedCandidateResult struct {
  213: 	Prepared     PreparedRequest
  214: 	Reservation  ReservationResult
  215: 	Execution    ForwardingExecutionResult
  216: 	RetryAllowed bool
  217: }
  218: 
  219: func (s *ForwardingStage) executeLeasedCandidate(
  220: 	ctx context.Context,
  221: 	prepared PreparedRequest,
  222: 	admission BillingAdmissionResult,
  223: 	current ReservationResult,
  224: 	reservationCreated bool,
  225: 	candidate forwardingCandidate,
  226: 	attemptNumber int,
  227: 	lease ports.RouteCapacityReservation,
  228: ) (result leasedCandidateResult, err error) {
  229: 	defer func() {
  230: 		releaseErr := s.capacity.Release(
  231: 			context.WithoutCancel(ctx),
  232: 			lease,
  233: 		)
  234: 		if releaseErr != nil {
  235: 			err = errors.Join(
  236: 				err,
  237: 				fmt.Errorf("release route capacity: %w", releaseErr),
  238: 			)
  239: 			result.RetryAllowed = false
  240: 		}
  241: 	}()
  242: 
  243: 	reservation := current
  244: 	if !reservationCreated {
  245: 		created, reserveErr := s.reservation.Reserve(
  246: 			ctx,
  247: 			reservationInput(prepared),
  248: 		)
  249: 		if reserveErr != nil {
  250: 			return leasedCandidateResult{}, fmt.Errorf(
  251: 				"reserve usage and reseller balance: %w",
  252: 				reserveErr,
  253: 			)
  254: 		}
  255: 		if err := validateReservation(prepared, created); err != nil {
  256: 			return leasedCandidateResult{}, err
  257: 		}
  258: 		reservation = created
  259: 	} else {
  260: 		transferred, transferErr := s.transfer.Transfer(
  261: 			ctx,
  262: 			RouteReservationTransferInput{
  263: 				ExpectedUsage: current.Usage,
  264: 				Target:        candidate.Plan,
  265: 			},
  266: 		)
  267: 		if transferErr != nil {
  268: 			return leasedCandidateResult{}, fmt.Errorf(
  269: 				"transfer route reservation: %w",
  270: 				transferErr,
  271: 			)
  272: 		}
  273: 		var validationErr error
  274: 		reservation, validationErr = validateTransferredReservation(
  275: 			prepared,
  276: 			current,
  277: 			transferred,
  278: 		)
  279: 		if validationErr != nil {
  280: 			return leasedCandidateResult{}, validationErr
  281: 		}
  282: 	}
  283: 
  284: 	result.Prepared = clonePreparedRequest(prepared)
  285: 	result.Reservation = cloneReservationResult(reservation)
  286: 
  287: 	startedAt, err := forwardingStageNow(s.clock)
  288: 	if err != nil {
  289: 		return result, err
  290: 	}
  291: 	started := forwardingAttemptStarted(prepared, attemptNumber, startedAt)
  292: 	persistedStarted, err := s.attempts.StartAttempt(ctx, started)
  293: 	if err != nil {
  294: 		return result, fmt.Errorf("start forwarding attempt: %w", err)
  295: 	}
  296: 	if !forwardingAttemptsEqual(persistedStarted, started) {
  297: 		return result, fmt.Errorf(
  298: 			"%w: invalid started forwarding attempt",
  299: 			ErrStageContractViolation,
  300: 		)
  301: 	}
  302: 
  303: 	execution, forwardErr := s.forwarder.Forward(
  304: 		ctx,
  305: 		ForwardingExecutionInput{
  306: 			Prepared:    clonePreparedRequest(prepared),
  307: 			Admission:   admission,
  308: 			Reservation: cloneReservationResult(reservation),
  309: 		},
  310: 	)
  311: 	result.Execution = execution
  312: 	completedAt, clockErr := forwardingStageNow(s.clock)
  313: 	if clockErr != nil {
  314: 		return result, errors.Join(forwardErr, clockErr)
  315: 	}
  316: 	if forwardErr == nil {
  317: 		terminal, terminalErr := succeededForwardingAttempt(
  318: 			started,
  319: 			completedAt,
  320: 			execution.Response.StatusCode,
  321: 		)
  322: 		if terminalErr != nil {
  323: 			return result, terminalErr
  324: 		}
  325: 		persisted, completionErr := s.attempts.CompleteAttempt(
  326: 			context.WithoutCancel(ctx),
  327: 			terminal,
  328: 		)
  329: 		if completionErr != nil {
  330: 			return result, fmt.Errorf(
  331: 				"complete successful forwarding attempt: %w",
  332: 				completionErr,
  333: 			)
  334: 		}
  335: 		if !forwardingAttemptsEqual(persisted, terminal) {
  336: 			return result, fmt.Errorf(
  337: 				"%w: invalid successful forwarding attempt",
  338: 				ErrStageContractViolation,
  339: 			)
  340: 		}
  341: 		return result, nil
  342: 	}
  343: 
  344: 	terminal, classificationErr := failedForwardingAttempt(
  345: 		started,
  346: 		completedAt,
  347: 		forwardErr,
  348: 	)
  349: 	if classificationErr != nil {
  350: 		return result, errors.Join(forwardErr, classificationErr)
  351: 	}
  352: 	persisted, completionErr := s.attempts.CompleteAttempt(
  353: 		context.WithoutCancel(ctx),
  354: 		terminal,
  355: 	)
  356: 	if completionErr != nil {
  357: 		return result, errors.Join(
  358: 			forwardErr,
  359: 			fmt.Errorf(
  360: 				"complete failed forwarding attempt: %w",
  361: 				completionErr,
  362: 			),
  363: 		)
  364: 	}
  365: 	if !forwardingAttemptsEqual(persisted, terminal) {
  366: 		return result, errors.Join(
  367: 			forwardErr,
  368: 			fmt.Errorf(
  369: 				"%w: invalid failed forwarding attempt",
  370: 				ErrStageContractViolation,
  371: 			),
  372: 		)
  373: 	}
  374: 	result.RetryAllowed = forwardingAttemptAllowsRetry(ctx, terminal)
  375: 	return result, fmt.Errorf(
  376: 		"forward route %q attempt %d: %w",
  377: 		prepared.Plan.Route.ID,
  378: 		attemptNumber,
  379: 		forwardErr,
  380: 	)
  381: }
  382: 
  383: func forwardingCandidates(plan RoutePlan) []forwardingCandidate {
  384: 	result := make([]forwardingCandidate, 0, 1+len(plan.Fallbacks))
  385: 	result = append(result, forwardingCandidate{Plan: RouteFallbackPlan{
  386: 		Route:                      plan.Route,
  387: 		Reseller:                   plan.Reseller,
  388: 		Price:                      plan.Price,
  389: 		BillingModel:               plan.BillingModel,
  390: 		EstimatedUsage:             plan.EstimatedUsage,
  391: 		EstimatedClientAmountCents: plan.EstimatedClientAmountCents,
  392: 		EstimatedUpstreamCostCents: plan.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents,
  393: 		Currency:                   plan.Currency,
  394: 		Confidence:                 plan.Confidence,
  395: 	}})
  396: 	for _, fallback := range plan.Fallbacks {
  397: 		result = append(result, forwardingCandidate{
  398: 			Plan: cloneRouteFallbackPlan(fallback),
  399: 		})
  400: 	}
  401: 	return result
  402: }
  403: 
  404: func preparedForForwardingCandidate(
  405: 	base PreparedRequest,
  406: 	candidate forwardingCandidate,
  407: 	remaining []forwardingCandidate,
  408: ) PreparedRequest {
  409: 	result := clonePreparedRequest(base)
  410: 	result.Plan = RoutePlan{
  411: 		Route:                      candidate.Plan.Route,
  412: 		Reseller:                   candidate.Plan.Reseller,
  413: 		Price:                      candidate.Plan.Price,
  414: 		BillingModel:               candidate.Plan.BillingModel,
  415: 		EstimatedUsage:             candidate.Plan.EstimatedUsage,
  416: 		EstimatedClientAmountCents: candidate.Plan.EstimatedClientAmountCents,
  417: 		EstimatedUpstreamCostCents: candidate.Plan.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents,
  418: 		Currency:                   candidate.Plan.Currency,
  419: 		Confidence:                 candidate.Plan.Confidence,
  420: 		Fallbacks:                  make([]RouteFallbackPlan, 0, len(remaining)),
  421: 	}
  422: 	for _, next := range remaining {
  423: 		result.Plan.Fallbacks = append(
  424: 			result.Plan.Fallbacks,
  425: 			cloneRouteFallbackPlan(next.Plan),
  426: 		)
  427: 	}
  428: 	return result
  429: }
  430: 
  431: func cloneRouteFallbackPlan(value RouteFallbackPlan) RouteFallbackPlan {
  432: 	return RouteFallbackPlan{
  433: 		Route:                      value.Route,
  434: 		Reseller:                   value.Reseller,
  435: 		Price:                      value.Price,
  436: 		BillingModel:               value.BillingModel,
  437: 		EstimatedUsage:             value.EstimatedUsage,
  438: 		EstimatedClientAmountCents: value.EstimatedClientAmountCents,
  439: 		EstimatedUpstreamCostCents: value.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents,
  440: 		Currency:                   value.Currency,
  441: 		Confidence:                 value.Confidence,
  442: 	}
  443: }
  444: 
  445: func validateForwardingCapacityLease(
  446: 	lease ports.RouteCapacityReservation,
  447: 	prepared PreparedRequest,
  448: 	attemptNumber int,
  449: ) error {
  450: 	if lease.LocalRequestID != prepared.LocalRequestID ||
  451: 		lease.ReservationID != forwardingCapacityReservationID(
  452: 			prepared.LocalRequestID,
  453: 			attemptNumber,
  454: 		) ||
  455: 		lease.RouteID != prepared.Plan.Route.ID {
  456: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  457: 			"%w: invalid route capacity reservation",
  458: 			ErrStageContractViolation,
  459: 		)
  460: 	}
  461: 	return nil
  462: }
  463: 
  464: func validateTransferredReservation(
  465: 	prepared PreparedRequest,
  466: 	previous ReservationResult,
  467: 	transferred RouteReservationTransferResult,
  468: ) (ReservationResult, error) {
  469: 	usage := transferred.Usage
  470: 	if usage.LocalRequestID != prepared.LocalRequestID ||
  471: 		usage.Status != domain.UsageStatusReserved ||
  472: 		usage.SelectedRouteID != prepared.Plan.Route.ID ||
  473: 		usage.SelectedResellerID != prepared.Plan.Reseller.ID ||
  474: 		usage.ProviderType != prepared.Plan.Route.ProviderType ||
  475: 		usage.ProviderModel != prepared.Plan.Route.ProviderModel ||
  476: 		usage.BillingModel != prepared.Plan.BillingModel ||
  477: 		usage.EstimatedUsage != prepared.Plan.EstimatedUsage ||
  478: 		usage.EstimatedClientAmountCents != prepared.Plan.EstimatedClientAmountCents ||
  479: 		usage.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents != prepared.Plan.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents ||
  480: 		usage.Currency != prepared.Plan.Currency ||
  481: 		transferred.ReservedReseller.ID != prepared.Plan.Reseller.ID {
  482: 		return ReservationResult{}, fmt.Errorf(
  483: 			"%w: invalid transferred route reservation",
  484: 			ErrStageContractViolation,
  485: 		)
  486: 	}
  487: 	reseller := transferred.ReservedReseller
  488: 	return ReservationResult{
  489: 		Disposition: previous.Disposition,
  490: 		Usage:       usage,
  491: 		Reseller:    &reseller,
  492: 	}, nil
  493: }
  494: 
  495: func forwardingAttemptAllowsRetry(
  496: 	ctx context.Context,
  497: 	attempt domain.ForwardingAttempt,
  498: ) bool {
  499: 	if ctx == nil || ctx.Err() != nil || !attempt.RouteRetryCandidate {
  500: 		return false
  501: 	}
  502: 	switch attempt.AttemptState {
  503: 	case domain.ForwardingAttemptStateNotSent,
  504: 		domain.ForwardingAttemptStateResponseReceived:
  505: 		return true
  506: 	case domain.ForwardingAttemptStateSentNoResponse:
  507: 		return false
  508: 	default:
  509: 		return false
  510: 	}
  511: }
  512: 
  513: func forwardingCapacityReservationID(
  514: 	localRequestID string,
  515: 	attemptNumber int,
  516: ) string {
  517: 	return fmt.Sprintf(
  518: 		"%s:attempt:%d",
  519: 		localRequestID,
  520: 		attemptNumber,
  521: 	)
  522: }
  523: 
  524: func forwardingStageNow(clock ports.Clock) (time.Time, error) {
  525: 	now := clock.Now()
  526: 	if now.IsZero() || now.Location() != time.UTC {
  527: 		return time.Time{}, fmt.Errorf(
  528: 			"%w: invalid forwarding stage clock",
  529: 			ErrStageContractViolation,
  530: 		)
  531: 	}
  532: 	return now, nil
  533: }
  534: 
  535: func forwardingAttemptStarted(
  536: 	prepared PreparedRequest,
  537: 	attemptNumber int,
  538: 	startedAt time.Time,
  539: ) domain.ForwardingAttempt {
  540: 	route := prepared.Plan.Route
  541: 	return domain.ForwardingAttempt{
  542: 		LocalRequestID: prepared.LocalRequestID,
  543: 		AttemptNumber:  attemptNumber,
  544: 		RouteID:        route.ID,
  545: 		ResellerID:     prepared.Plan.Reseller.ID,
  546: 		APIFamily:      prepared.APIFamily,
  547: 		EndpointKind:   prepared.EndpointKind,
  548: 		ClientModel:    prepared.ClientModel,
  549: 		ProviderType:   route.ProviderType,
  550: 		ProviderModel:  route.ProviderModel,
  551: 		Status: domain.
  552: 			ForwardingAttemptStatusStarted,
  553: 		StartedAt: startedAt,
  554: 	}
  555: }
  556: 
  557: func succeededForwardingAttempt(
  558: 	started domain.ForwardingAttempt,
  559: 	completedAt time.Time,
  560: 	statusCode int,
  561: ) (domain.ForwardingAttempt, error) {
  562: 	if statusCode < 200 || statusCode > 299 ||
  563: 		completedAt.Before(started.StartedAt) {
  564: 		return domain.ForwardingAttempt{}, fmt.Errorf(
  565: 			"%w: invalid successful forwarding result",
  566: 			ErrStageContractViolation,
  567: 		)
  568: 	}
  569: 	result := started
  570: 	result.Status = domain.ForwardingAttemptStatusSucceeded
  571: 	result.AttemptState =
  572: 		domain.ForwardingAttemptStateResponseReceived
  573: 	result.UpstreamStatusCode = statusCode
  574: 	result.CompletedAt = &completedAt
  575: 	return result, nil
  576: }
  577: 
  578: func failedForwardingAttempt(
  579: 	started domain.ForwardingAttempt,
  580: 	completedAt time.Time,
  581: 	forwardErr error,
  582: ) (domain.ForwardingAttempt, error) {
  583: 	var failure ForwardingFailure
  584: 	if !errors.As(forwardErr, &failure) || failure == nil {
  585: 		return domain.ForwardingAttempt{}, fmt.Errorf(
  586: 			"%w: forwarding executor returned unclassified error",
  587: 			ErrStageContractViolation,
  588: 		)
  589: 	}
  590: 	attemptState := domain.ForwardingAttemptState(
  591: 		failure.FailureAttemptStateValue(),
  592: 	)
  593: 	switch attemptState {
  594: 	case domain.ForwardingAttemptStateNotSent,
  595: 		domain.ForwardingAttemptStateSentNoResponse,
  596: 		domain.ForwardingAttemptStateResponseReceived:
  597: 	default:
  598: 		return domain.ForwardingAttempt{}, fmt.Errorf(
  599: 			"%w: invalid forwarding failure attempt state",
  600: 			ErrStageContractViolation,
  601: 		)
  602: 	}
  603: 	statusCode := failure.FailureStatusCode()
  604: 	if statusCode < 0 || statusCode > 599 ||
  605: 		(statusCode > 0 && statusCode < 100) ||
  606: 		failure.FailureKindValue() == "" ||
  607: 		completedAt.Before(started.StartedAt) {
  608: 		return domain.ForwardingAttempt{}, fmt.Errorf(
  609: 			"%w: invalid forwarding failure classification",
  610: 			ErrStageContractViolation,
  611: 		)
  612: 	}
  613: 	result := started
  614: 	result.Status = domain.ForwardingAttemptStatusFailed
  615: 	result.AttemptState = attemptState
  616: 	result.UpstreamStatusCode = statusCode
  617: 	result.FailureKind = failure.FailureKindValue()
  618: 	result.RouteRetryCandidate =
  619: 		failure.FailureRouteRetryCandidate()
  620: 	result.CompletedAt = &completedAt
  621: 	return result, nil
  622: }
  623: 
  624: func forwardingAttemptsEqual(
  625: 	left domain.ForwardingAttempt,
  626: 	right domain.ForwardingAttempt,
  627: ) bool {
  628: 	return left.LocalRequestID == right.LocalRequestID &&
  629: 		left.AttemptNumber == right.AttemptNumber &&
  630: 		left.RouteID == right.RouteID &&
  631: 		left.ResellerID == right.ResellerID &&
  632: 		left.APIFamily == right.APIFamily &&
  633: 		left.EndpointKind == right.EndpointKind &&
  634: 		left.ClientModel == right.ClientModel &&
  635: 		left.ProviderType == right.ProviderType &&
  636: 		left.ProviderModel == right.ProviderModel &&
  637: 		left.Status == right.Status &&
  638: 		left.AttemptState == right.AttemptState &&
  639: 		left.UpstreamStatusCode == right.UpstreamStatusCode &&
  640: 		left.FailureKind == right.FailureKind &&
  641: 		left.RouteRetryCandidate == right.RouteRetryCandidate &&
  642: 		left.StartedAt.Equal(right.StartedAt) &&
  643: 		equalForwardingAttemptTimes(
  644: 			left.CompletedAt,
  645: 			right.CompletedAt,
  646: 		)
  647: }
  648: 
  649: func equalForwardingAttemptTimes(
  650: 	left *time.Time,
  651: 	right *time.Time,
  652: ) bool {
  653: 	switch {
  654: 	case left == nil && right == nil:
  655: 		return true
  656: 	case left == nil || right == nil:
  657: 		return false
  658: 	default:
  659: 		return left.Equal(*right)
  660: 	}
  661: }
  662: 
  663: func cloneForwardResponse(
  664: 	value ports.ForwardResponse,
  665: ) ports.ForwardResponse {
  666: 	return ports.ForwardResponse{
  667: 		StatusCode: value.StatusCode,
  668: 		Headers:    cloneForwardHeaders(value.Headers),
  669: 		Body:       cloneBytes(value.Body),
  670: 	}
  671: }
  672: 
  673: func cloneForwardHeaders(
  674: 	value map[string][]string,
  675: ) map[string][]string {
  676: 	if value == nil {
  677: 		return nil
  678: 	}
  679: 	result := make(map[string][]string, len(value))
  680: 	for key, values := range value {
  681: 		result[key] = append([]string(nil), values...)
  682: 	}
  683: 	return result
  684: }
