   73: 
   74: func TestRepositoryRoutePlannerBuildsDeterministicCandidateSet(
   75: 	t *testing.T,
   76: ) {
   77: 	input := validRoutePlanInput()
   78: 	routes := []domain.Route{
   79: 		validPlannerRoute("route-b", "reseller-b"),
   80: 		validPlannerRoute("route-a", "reseller-a"),
   81: 	}
   82: 	resellers := map[string]domain.Reseller{
   83: 		"reseller-a": validPlannerReseller("reseller-a"),
   84: 		"reseller-b": validPlannerReseller("reseller-b"),
   85: 	}
   86: 	prices := map[string]domain.RoutePrice{
   87: 		"route-a": validPlannerPrice("route-a"),
   88: 		"route-b": validPlannerPrice("route-b"),
   89: 	}
   90: 
   91: 	var gotResellerIDs []string
   92: 	var gotRouteIDs []string
   93: 	var preflightOrder []string
   94: 	var selectorInput RouteSelectionInput
   95: 
   96: 	planner := mustRepositoryRoutePlanner(
   97: 		t,
   98: 		routeRepositoryFunc(
   99: 			func(
  100: 				_ context.Context,
  101: 				query ports.RouteQuery,
  102: 			) ([]domain.Route, error) {
  103: 				if query.APIFamily != input.APIFamily ||
  104: 					query.EndpointKind != input.EndpointKind ||
  105: 					query.ClientModel != input.ClientModel {
  106: 					t.Fatalf("query = %+v", query)
  107: 				}
  108: 				return routes, nil
  109: 			},
  110: 		),
  111: 		resellerRepositoryFunc(
  112: 			func(
  113: 				_ context.Context,
  114: 				ids []string,
  115: 			) (map[string]domain.Reseller, error) {
  116: 				gotResellerIDs = append([]string(nil), ids...)
  117: 				return resellers, nil
  118: 			},
  119: 		),
  120: 		routePriceRepositoryFunc(
  121: 			func(
  122: 				_ context.Context,
  123: 				ids []string,
  124: 			) (map[string]domain.RoutePrice, error) {
  125: 				gotRouteIDs = append([]string(nil), ids...)
  126: 				return prices, nil
  127: 			},
  128: 		),
  129: 		routeCandidatePreflightFunc(
  130: 			func(
  131: 				_ context.Context,
  132: 				value RouteCandidatePreflightInput,
  133: 			) (RouteCandidatePreflightResult, error) {
  134: 				preflightOrder = append(
  135: 					preflightOrder,
  136: 					value.Route.ID,
  137: 				)
  138: 				if !bytes.Equal(value.Payload, input.Payload) {
  139: 					t.Fatalf(
  140: 						"preflight payload = %q, want %q",
  141: 						value.Payload,
  142: 						input.Payload,
  143: 					)
  144: 				}
  145: 				value.Payload[0] = 'X'
  146: 				return validPlannerPreflight(value.Route.ID), nil
  147: 			},
  148: 		),
  149: 		routeCandidateSelectorFunc(
  150: 			func(
  151: 				_ context.Context,
  152: 				value RouteSelectionInput,
  153: 			) (RouteSelectionResult, error) {
  154: 				selectorInput = value
  155: 				return RouteSelectionResult{
  156: 					SelectedRouteID:  "route-b",
  157: 					FallbackRouteIDs: []string{"route-a"},
  158: 				}, nil
  159: 			},
  160: 		),
  161: 	)
  162: 
  163: 	plan, err := planner.Plan(context.Background(), input)
  164: 	if err != nil {
  165: 		t.Fatalf("Plan: %v", err)
  166: 	}
  167: 
  168: 	if !reflect.DeepEqual(
  169: 		gotResellerIDs,
  170: 		[]string{"reseller-a", "reseller-b"},
  171: 	) {
  172: 		t.Fatalf("reseller ids = %#v", gotResellerIDs)
  173: 	}
  174: 	if !reflect.DeepEqual(
  175: 		gotRouteIDs,
  176: 		[]string{"route-a", "route-b"},
  177: 	) {
  178: 		t.Fatalf("route ids = %#v", gotRouteIDs)
  179: 	}
  180: 	if !reflect.DeepEqual(
  181: 		preflightOrder,
  182: 		[]string{"route-a", "route-b"},
  183: 	) {
  184: 		t.Fatalf("preflight order = %#v", preflightOrder)
  185: 	}
  186: 	if len(selectorInput.Candidates) != 2 ||
  187: 		selectorInput.Candidates[0].Route.ID != "route-a" ||
  188: 		selectorInput.Candidates[1].Route.ID != "route-b" {
  189: 		t.Fatalf("selector input = %+v", selectorInput)
  190: 	}
  191: 	if !bytes.Equal(input.Payload, []byte(`{"model":"model-1"}`)) {
  192: 		t.Fatalf("caller payload mutated: %q", input.Payload)
  193: 	}
  194: 	if plan.Route.ID != "route-b" ||
  195: 		plan.Reseller.ID != "reseller-b" ||
  196: 		plan.Price.RouteID != "route-b" ||
  197: 		plan.BillingModel != "openai:provider-route-b" ||
  198: 		plan.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents != 20 {
  199: 		t.Fatalf("plan = %+v", plan)
  200: 	}
  201: 	if len(plan.Fallbacks) != 1 ||
  202: 		plan.Fallbacks[0].Route.ID != "route-a" ||
  203: 		plan.Fallbacks[0].Reseller.ID != "reseller-a" ||
  204: 		plan.Fallbacks[0].Price.RouteID != "route-a" ||
  205: 		plan.Fallbacks[0].BillingModel !=
  206: 			"openai:provider-route-a" ||
  207: 		plan.Fallbacks[0].EstimatedUpstreamCostCents != 10 {
  208: 		t.Fatalf("fallbacks = %+v", plan.Fallbacks)
  209: 	}
  210: }
  211: 
  212: func TestRepositoryRoutePlannerReturnsUnknownModel(t *testing.T) {
  213: 	planner := mustRepositoryRoutePlanner(
  214: 		t,
  215: 		routeRepositoryFunc(
  216: 			func(
  217: 				context.Context,
  218: 				ports.RouteQuery,
  219: 			) ([]domain.Route, error) {
  220: 				return nil, nil
  221: 			},
  222: 		),
  223: 		unusedResellerRepository(t),
  224: 		unusedRoutePriceRepository(t),
  225: 		unusedRouteCandidatePreflighter(t),
  226: 		unusedRouteCandidateSelector(t),
  227: 	)
  228: 
  229: 	_, err := planner.Plan(
  230: 		context.Background(),
  231: 		validRoutePlanInput(),
  232: 	)
  233: 	if !errors.Is(err, ErrUnknownModel) {
  234: 		t.Fatalf("error = %v, want unknown model", err)
  235: 	}
  236: }

  238: func TestRepositoryRoutePlannerRejectsRepositoryContractViolation(
  239: 	t *testing.T,
  240: ) {
  241: 	input := validRoutePlanInput()
  242: 	route := validPlannerRoute("route-a", "reseller-a")
  243: 	route.ClientModel = "other-model"
  244: 
  245: 	planner := mustRepositoryRoutePlanner(
  246: 		t,
  247: 		routeRepositoryFunc(
  248: 			func(
  249: 				context.Context,
  250: 				ports.RouteQuery,
  251: 			) ([]domain.Route, error) {
  252: 				return []domain.Route{route}, nil
  253: 			},
  254: 		),
  255: 		unusedResellerRepository(t),
  256: 		unusedRoutePriceRepository(t),
  257: 		unusedRouteCandidatePreflighter(t),
  258: 		unusedRouteCandidateSelector(t),
  259: 	)
  260: 
  261: 	_, err := planner.Plan(context.Background(), input)
  262: 	if !errors.Is(err, ErrStageContractViolation) {
  263: 		t.Fatalf(
  264: 			"error = %v, want stage contract violation",
  265: 			err,
  266: 		)
  267: 	}
  268: }

  270: func TestRepositoryRoutePlannerAllowsMissingPriceAsUnavailableCandidate(
  271: 	t *testing.T,
  272: ) {
  273: 	input := validRoutePlanInput()
  274: 	route := validPlannerRoute("route-a", "reseller-a")
  275: 	reseller := validPlannerReseller("reseller-a")
  276: 	var preflightSawNilPrice bool
  277: 
  278: 	planner := mustRepositoryRoutePlanner(
  279: 		t,
  280: 		routeRepositoryFunc(
  281: 			func(
  282: 				context.Context,
  283: 				ports.RouteQuery,
  284: 			) ([]domain.Route, error) {
  285: 				return []domain.Route{route}, nil
  286: 			},
  287: 		),
  288: 		resellerRepositoryFunc(
  289: 			func(
  290: 				context.Context,
  291: 				[]string,
  292: 			) (map[string]domain.Reseller, error) {
  293: 				return map[string]domain.Reseller{
  294: 					reseller.ID: reseller,
  295: 				}, nil
  296: 			},
  297: 		),
  298: 		routePriceRepositoryFunc(
  299: 			func(
  300: 				context.Context,
  301: 				[]string,
  302: 			) (map[string]domain.RoutePrice, error) {
  303: 				return map[string]domain.RoutePrice{}, nil
  304: 			},
  305: 		),
  306: 		routeCandidatePreflightFunc(
  307: 			func(
  308: 				_ context.Context,
  309: 				value RouteCandidatePreflightInput,
  310: 			) (RouteCandidatePreflightResult, error) {
  311: 				preflightSawNilPrice = value.Price == nil
  312: 				return RouteCandidatePreflightResult{
  313: 					SecretAvailable:               true,
  314: 					CostAvailable:                 false,
  315: 					RateLimitAllowed:              true,
  316: 					ConcurrencyAllowed:            true,
  317: 					ModelIdentifierRewriteAllowed: true,
  318: 				}, nil
  319: 			},
  320: 		),
  321: 		routeCandidateSelectorFunc(
  322: 			func(
  323: 				context.Context,
  324: 				RouteSelectionInput,
  325: 			) (RouteSelectionResult, error) {
  326: 				return RouteSelectionResult{},
  327: 					errors.New("no route available")
  328: 			},
  329: 		),
  330: 	)
  331: 
  332: 	_, err := planner.Plan(context.Background(), input)
  333: 	if err == nil || !preflightSawNilPrice {
  334: 		t.Fatalf(
  335: 			"error = %v, preflight saw nil price = %v",
  336: 			err,
  337: 			preflightSawNilPrice,
  338: 		)
  339: 	}
  340: }

  466: func TestRepositoryRoutePlannerStopsAtDependencyError(t *testing.T) {
  467: 	dependencyError := errors.New("dependency failed")
  468: 	input := validRoutePlanInput()
  469: 	route := validPlannerRoute("route-a", "reseller-a")
  470: 
  471: 	tests := []struct {
  472: 		name    string
  473: 		planner *RepositoryRoutePlanner
  474: 	}{
  475: 		{
  476: 			name: "routes",
  477: 			planner: mustRepositoryRoutePlanner(
  478: 				t,
  479: 				routeRepositoryFunc(
  480: 					func(
  481: 						context.Context,
  482: 						ports.RouteQuery,
  483: 					) ([]domain.Route, error) {
  484: 						return nil, dependencyError
  485: 					},
  486: 				),
  487: 				unusedResellerRepository(t),
  488: 				unusedRoutePriceRepository(t),
  489: 				unusedRouteCandidatePreflighter(t),
  490: 				unusedRouteCandidateSelector(t),
  491: 			),
  492: 		},
  493: 		{
  494: 			name: "resellers",
  495: 			planner: mustRepositoryRoutePlanner(
  496: 				t,
  497: 				routeRepositoryFunc(
  498: 					func(
  499: 						context.Context,
  500: 						ports.RouteQuery,
  501: 					) ([]domain.Route, error) {
  502: 						return []domain.Route{route}, nil
  503: 					},
  504: 				),
  505: 				resellerRepositoryFunc(
  506: 					func(
  507: 						context.Context,
  508: 						[]string,
  509: 					) (map[string]domain.Reseller, error) {
  510: 						return nil, dependencyError
  511: 					},
  512: 				),
  513: 				unusedRoutePriceRepository(t),
  514: 				unusedRouteCandidatePreflighter(t),
  515: 				unusedRouteCandidateSelector(t),
  516: 			),
  517: 		},
  518: 	}
  519: 
  520: 	for _, test := range tests {
  521: 		t.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {
  522: 			_, err := test.planner.Plan(
  523: 				context.Background(),
  524: 				input,
  525: 			)
  526: 			if !errors.Is(err, dependencyError) {
  527: 				t.Fatalf(
  528: 					"error = %v, want dependency error",
  529: 					err,
  530: 				)
  531: 			}
  532: 		})
  533: 	}
  534: }
  535: 
  536: func plannerWithSingleCandidate(
  537: 	t *testing.T,
  538: 	selector routeCandidateSelectorFunc,
  539: ) *RepositoryRoutePlanner {
  540: 	t.Helper()
  541: 
  542: 	route := validPlannerRoute("route-a", "reseller-a")
  543: 	reseller := validPlannerReseller("reseller-a")
  544: 	price := validPlannerPrice(route.ID)
  545: 
  546: 	return mustRepositoryRoutePlanner(
  547: 		t,
  548: 		routeRepositoryFunc(
  549: 			func(
  550: 				context.Context,
  551: 				ports.RouteQuery,
  552: 			) ([]domain.Route, error) {
  553: 				return []domain.Route{route}, nil
  554: 			},
  555: 		),
  556: 		resellerRepositoryFunc(
  557: 			func(
  558: 				context.Context,
  559: 				[]string,
  560: 			) (map[string]domain.Reseller, error) {
  561: 				return map[string]domain.Reseller{
  562: 					reseller.ID: reseller,
  563: 				}, nil
  564: 			},
  565: 		),
  566: 		routePriceRepositoryFunc(
  567: 			func(
  568: 				context.Context,
  569: 				[]string,
  570: 			) (map[string]domain.RoutePrice, error) {
  571: 				return map[string]domain.RoutePrice{
  572: 					price.RouteID: price,
  573: 				}, nil
  574: 			},
  575: 		),
  576: 		routeCandidatePreflightFunc(
  577: 			func(
  578: 				context.Context,
  579: 				RouteCandidatePreflightInput,
  580: 			) (RouteCandidatePreflightResult, error) {
  581: 				return validPlannerPreflight(route.ID), nil
  582: 			},
  583: 		),
  584: 		selector,
  585: 	)
  586: }
  587: 
  588: func mustRepositoryRoutePlanner(
  589: 	t *testing.T,
  590: 	routes ports.RouteRepository,
  591: 	resellers ports.ResellerQueryRepository,
  592: 	prices ports.RoutePriceRepository,
  593: 	preflighter RouteCandidatePreflighter,
  594: 	selector RouteCandidateSelector,
  595: ) *RepositoryRoutePlanner {
  596: 	t.Helper()
  597: 
  598: 	planner, err := NewRepositoryRoutePlanner(
  599: 		routes,
  600: 		resellers,
  601: 		prices,
  602: 		preflighter,
  603: 		selector,
  604: 	)
  605: 	if err != nil {
  606: 		t.Fatalf("NewRepositoryRoutePlanner: %v", err)
  607: 	}
  608: 	return planner
  609: }
  610: 
  611: func validRoutePlanInput() RoutePlanInput {
  612: 	return RoutePlanInput{
  613: 		Principal: Principal{
  614: 			UserID:               "user-1",
  615: 			APIKeyID:             "key-1",
  616: 			BillingSubjectUserID: "billing-1",
  617: 		},
  618: 		APIFamily:    domain.APIFamilyOpenAICompatible,
  619: 		EndpointKind: domain.EndpointChat,
  620: 		ClientModel:  "model-1",
  621: 		RequestedCapabilities: domain.CapabilitySet{
  622: 			Chat: true,
  623: 		},
  624: 		Payload: []byte(`{"model":"model-1"}`),
  625: 	}
  626: }
  627: 
  628: func validPlannerRoute(
  629: 	id string,
  630: 	resellerID string,
  631: ) domain.Route {
  632: 	return domain.Route{
  633: 		ID:            id,
  634: 		ResellerID:    resellerID,
  635: 		ProviderType:  domain.ProviderOpenAI,
  636: 		APIFamily:     domain.APIFamilyOpenAICompatible,
  637: 		EndpointKind:  domain.EndpointChat,
  638: 		ClientModel:   "model-1",
  639: 		ProviderModel: "provider-" + id,
  640: 		Enabled:       true,
  641: 	}
  642: }
  643: 
  644: func validPlannerReseller(id string) domain.Reseller {
  645: 	return domain.Reseller{
  646: 		ID:           id,
  647: 		ProviderType: domain.ProviderOpenAI,
  648: 		Enabled:      true,
  649: 	}
  650: }
  651: 
  652: func validPlannerPrice(routeID string) domain.RoutePrice {
  653: 	return domain.RoutePrice{
  654: 		RouteID:  routeID,
  655: 		Currency: "RUB",
  656: 		Enabled:  true,
  657: 	}
  658: }
  659: 
  660: func validPlannerPreflight(
  661: 	routeID string,
  662: ) RouteCandidatePreflightResult {
  663: 	cost := int64(10)
  664: 	if routeID == "route-b" {
  665: 		cost = 20
  666: 	}
  667: 	return RouteCandidatePreflightResult{
  668: 		ForwardingAdapterAvailable: true,
  669: 		SecretAvailable:            true,
  670: 		CostAvailable:              true,
  671: 		EstimatedUsage: domain.TokenUsage{
  672: 			InputTokens:  10,
  673: 			OutputTokens: 5,
  674: 		},
  675: 		EstimatedClientAmountCents:    cost + 5,
  676: 		EstimatedUpstreamCostCents:    cost,
  677: 		Currency:                      "RUB",
  678: 		Confidence:                    "conservative",
  679: 		RateLimitAllowed:              true,
  680: 		ConcurrencyAllowed:            true,
  681: 		ModelIdentifierRewriteAllowed: true,
  682: 	}
  683: }
  684: 
  685: func unusedResellerRepository(
  686: 	t *testing.T,
  687: ) ports.ResellerQueryRepository {
  688: 	t.Helper()
  689: 	return resellerRepositoryFunc(
  690: 		func(
  691: 			context.Context,
  692: 			[]string,
  693: 		) (map[string]domain.Reseller, error) {
  694: 			t.Fatal("reseller repository must not be called")
  695: 			return nil, nil
  696: 		},
  697: 	)
  698: }
  699: 
  700: func unusedRoutePriceRepository(
  701: 	t *testing.T,
  702: ) ports.RoutePriceRepository {
  703: 	t.Helper()
  704: 	return routePriceRepositoryFunc(
  705: 		func(
  706: 			context.Context,
  707: 			[]string,
  708: 		) (map[string]domain.RoutePrice, error) {
  709: 			t.Fatal("route price repository must not be called")
  710: 			return nil, nil
  711: 		},
  712: 	)
  713: }
  714: 
  715: func unusedRouteCandidatePreflighter(
  716: 	t *testing.T,
  717: ) RouteCandidatePreflighter {
  718: 	t.Helper()
  719: 	return routeCandidatePreflightFunc(
  720: 		func(
  721: 			context.Context,
  722: 			RouteCandidatePreflightInput,
  723: 		) (RouteCandidatePreflightResult, error) {
  724: 			t.Fatal("route preflighter must not be called")
  725: 			return RouteCandidatePreflightResult{}, nil
  726: 		},
  727: 	)
  728: }
  729: 
  730: func unusedRouteCandidateSelector(
  731: 	t *testing.T,
  732: ) RouteCandidateSelector {
  733: 	t.Helper()
  734: 	return routeCandidateSelectorFunc(
  735: 		func(
  736: 			context.Context,
  737: 			RouteSelectionInput,
  738: 		) (RouteSelectionResult, error) {
  739: 			t.Fatal("route selector must not be called")
  740: 			return RouteSelectionResult{}, nil
  741: 		},
  742: 	)
  743: }

    1: package llmrequest
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"context"
    5: 	"errors"
    6: 	"fmt"
    7: 	"strings"
    8: 	"time"
    9: 	"unicode"
   10: 
   11: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/domain"
   12: )
   13: 
   14: const localRequestIDPrefix = "llmreq_"
   15: 
   16: type Service struct {
   17: 	authenticator      Authenticator
   18: 	requestParser      RequestParser
   19: 	capabilityDetector CapabilityDetector
   20: 	routePlanner       RoutePlanner
   21: 	billingAdmitter    BillingAdmitter
   22: 	forwarding         ForwardingStageExecutor
   23: 	usageResolver      UsageResolver
   24: 	finalizer          Finalizer
   25: 	autoCharger        AutoCharger
   26: }
   27: 
   28: func NewService(dependencies Dependencies) (*Service, error) {
   29: 	if dependencies.Authenticator == nil ||
   30: 		dependencies.RequestParser == nil ||
   31: 		dependencies.CapabilityDetector == nil ||
   32: 		dependencies.RoutePlanner == nil ||
   33: 		dependencies.BillingAdmitter == nil ||
   34: 		dependencies.Forwarding == nil ||
   35: 		dependencies.UsageResolver == nil ||
   36: 		dependencies.Finalizer == nil ||
   37: 		dependencies.AutoCharger == nil {
   38: 		return nil, ErrDependencyRequired
   39: 	}
   40: 
   41: 	return &Service{
   42: 		authenticator:      dependencies.Authenticator,
   43: 		requestParser:      dependencies.RequestParser,
   44: 		capabilityDetector: dependencies.CapabilityDetector,
   45: 		routePlanner:       dependencies.RoutePlanner,
   46: 		billingAdmitter:    dependencies.BillingAdmitter,
   47: 		forwarding:         dependencies.Forwarding,
   48: 		usageResolver:      dependencies.UsageResolver,
   49: 		finalizer:          dependencies.Finalizer,
   50: 		autoCharger:        dependencies.AutoCharger,
   51: 	}, nil
   52: }
   53: 
   54: func (s *Service) Execute(
   55: 	ctx context.Context,
   56: 	input Input,
   57: ) (ForwardedRequest, error) {
   58: 	if s == nil ||
   59: 		s.authenticator == nil ||
   60: 		s.requestParser == nil ||
   61: 		s.capabilityDetector == nil ||
   62: 		s.routePlanner == nil ||
   63: 		s.billingAdmitter == nil ||
   64: 		s.forwarding == nil ||
   65: 		s.usageResolver == nil ||
   66: 		s.finalizer == nil ||
   67: 		s.autoCharger == nil {
   68: 		return ForwardedRequest{}, ErrDependencyRequired
   69: 	}
   70: 	if ctx == nil {
   71: 		return ForwardedRequest{}, fmt.Errorf(
   72: 			"%w: nil context",
   73: 			ErrInvalidInput,
   74: 		)
   75: 	}
   76: 
   77: 	prepared, err := s.prepare(ctx, input)
   78: 	if err != nil {
   79: 		return ForwardedRequest{}, err
   80: 	}
   81: 
   82: 	admission, err := s.billingAdmitter.Admit(
   83: 		ctx,
   84: 		BillingAdmissionInput{
   85: 			Principal:            prepared.Principal,
   86: 			RequiredReserveCents: prepared.Plan.EstimatedClientAmountCents,
   87: 			Currency:             prepared.Plan.Currency,
   88: 		},
   89: 	)
   90: 	if err != nil {
   91: 		return ForwardedRequest{}, fmt.Errorf(
   92: 			"admit billing reserve: %w",
   93: 			err,
   94: 		)
   95: 	}
   96: 	if err := validateBillingAdmission(prepared, admission); err != nil {
   97: 		return ForwardedRequest{}, err
   98: 	}
   99: 
  100: 	forwarded, err := s.forwarding.Execute(
  101: 		ctx,
  102: 		clonePreparedRequest(prepared),
  103: 		admission,
  104: 	)
  105: 	if err != nil {
  106: 		return ForwardedRequest{}, fmt.Errorf(
  107: 			"execute forwarding stage: %w",
  108: 			err,
  109: 		)
  110: 	}
  111: 
  112: 	resolved, err := s.usageResolver.Resolve(
  113: 		ctx,
  114: 		UsageResolutionInput{
  115: 			Reserved: forwarded.Reserved,
  116: 			Response: cloneForwardResponse(
  117: 				forwarded.Response,
  118: 			),
  119: 		},
  120: 	)
  121: 	if err != nil {
  122: 		failureErr := s.markPricingFailed(
  123: 			ctx,
  124: 			forwarded.Reserved,
  125: 			"usage_resolution_failed",
  126: 		)
  127: 		if failureErr != nil {
  128: 			return ForwardedRequest{}, errors.Join(
  129: 				fmt.Errorf("resolve final usage: %w", err),
  130: 				failureErr,
  131: 			)
  132: 		}
  133: 		return ForwardedRequest{}, fmt.Errorf(
  134: 			"resolve final usage: %w",
  135: 			err,
  136: 		)
  137: 	}
  138: 	if err := validateUsageResolution(
  139: 		forwarded,
  140: 		resolved,
  141: 	); err != nil {
  142: 		failureErr := s.markPricingFailed(
  143: 			ctx,
  144: 			forwarded.Reserved,
  145: 			"usage_resolution_invalid",
  146: 		)
  147: 		if failureErr != nil {
  148: 			return ForwardedRequest{}, errors.Join(
  149: 				err,
  150: 				failureErr,
  151: 			)
  152: 		}
  153: 		return ForwardedRequest{}, err
  154: 	}
  155: 
  156: 	finalized, err := s.finalizer.Commit(
  157: 		ctx,
  158: 		FinalizationInput{
  159: 			Reserved:      forwarded.Reserved,
  160: 			ResolvedUsage: resolved,
  161: 		},
  162: 	)
  163: 	if err != nil {
  164: 		return ForwardedRequest{}, fmt.Errorf(
  165: 			"finalize billable usage: %w",
  166: 			err,
  167: 		)
  168: 	}
  169: 	if finalized.Usage.Status != domain.UsageStatusBillable ||
  170: 		finalized.Usage.LocalRequestID !=
  171: 			forwarded.Reserved.Prepared.LocalRequestID {
  172: 		return ForwardedRequest{}, fmt.Errorf(
  173: 			"%w: invalid finalization result",
  174: 			ErrStageContractViolation,
  175: 		)
  176: 	}
  177: 
  178: 	forwarded.ResolvedUsage = resolved
  179: 	forwarded.FinalUsageRecord = finalized.Usage
  180: 	forwarded.AutoCharge = cloneAutoChargeResult(
  181: 		s.autoCharger.Run(
  182: 			ctx,
  183: 			AutoChargeInput{
  184: 				Principal: forwarded.Reserved.
  185: 					Prepared.Principal,
  186: 				FinalUsageRecord: finalized.Usage,
  187: 			},
  188: 		),
  189: 	)
  190: 	return forwarded, nil
  191: }
  192: 
  193: func cloneAutoChargeResult(
  194: 	value AutoChargeResult,
  195: ) AutoChargeResult {
  196: 	result := value
  197: 	result.ProcessedBatchIDs = append(
  198: 		[]string(nil),
  199: 		value.ProcessedBatchIDs...,
  200: 	)
  201: 	if value.BillingBalanceCents != nil {
  202: 		copied := *value.BillingBalanceCents
  203: 		result.BillingBalanceCents = &copied
  204: 	}
  205: 	switch result.Status {
  206: 	case AutoChargeStatusDeferred,
  207: 		AutoChargeStatusProcessed,
  208: 		AutoChargeStatusFailed:
  209: 	default:
  210: 		result = AutoChargeResult{
  211: 			Status: AutoChargeStatusFailed,
  212: 		}
  213: 	}
  214: 	if result.ChargedAmountCents < 0 {
  215: 		result = AutoChargeResult{
  216: 			Status: AutoChargeStatusFailed,
  217: 		}
  218: 	}
  219: 	return result
  220: }
  221: 
  222: func (s *Service) markPricingFailed(
  223: 	ctx context.Context,
  224: 	reserved ReservedRequest,
  225: 	reason string,
  226: ) error {
  227: 	finalized, err := s.finalizer.MarkPricingFailed(
  228: 		ctx,
  229: 		PricingFailureInput{
  230: 			Reserved:      reserved,
  231: 			FailureReason: reason,
  232: 		},
  233: 	)
  234: 	if err != nil {
  235: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  236: 			"finalize pricing failure: %w",
  237: 			err,
  238: 		)
  239: 	}
  240: 	if finalized.Usage.Status !=
  241: 		domain.UsageStatusPricingFailed ||
  242: 		finalized.Usage.LocalRequestID !=
  243: 			reserved.Prepared.LocalRequestID {
  244: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  245: 			"%w: invalid pricing failure result",
  246: 			ErrStageContractViolation,
  247: 		)
  248: 	}
  249: 	return nil
  250: }
  251: 
  252: func validateUsageResolution(
  253: 	forwarded ForwardedRequest,
  254: 	resolved UsageResolutionResult,
  255: ) error {
  256: 	if resolved.Completeness == "" ||
  257: 		resolved.UpstreamCostCents < 0 ||
  258: 		resolved.ClientAmountCents < 0 ||
  259: 		(hasPositiveUsage(resolved.Usage) &&
  260: 			(resolved.UpstreamCostCents == 0 ||
  261: 				resolved.ClientAmountCents == 0)) ||
  262: 		resolved.Currency != forwarded.Reserved.Prepared.Plan.Currency ||
  263: 		!nonNegativeUsage(resolved.Usage) {
  264: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  265: 			"%w: invalid usage resolution",
  266: 			ErrStageContractViolation,
  267: 		)
  268: 	}
  269: 	return nil
  270: }
  271: 
  272: func (s *Service) prepare(
  273: 	ctx context.Context,
  274: 	input Input,
  275: ) (PreparedRequest, error) {
  276: 	if err := validateInput(input); err != nil {
  277: 		return PreparedRequest{}, err
  278: 	}
  279: 
  280: 	originalPayload := cloneBytes(input.Payload)
  281: 
  282: 	principal, err := s.authenticator.Authenticate(
  283: 		ctx,
  284: 		input.RawAPIKey,
  285: 	)
  286: 	if err != nil {
  287: 		return PreparedRequest{}, fmt.Errorf(
  288: 			"authenticate request: %w",
  289: 			err,
  290: 		)
  291: 	}
  292: 	if err := validatePrincipal(principal); err != nil {
  293: 		return PreparedRequest{}, err
  294: 	}
  295: 
  296: 	parsed, err := s.requestParser.Parse(
  297: 		ctx,
  298: 		ParseInput{
  299: 			APIFamily:    input.APIFamily,
  300: 			EndpointKind: input.EndpointKind,
  301: 			Payload:      cloneBytes(originalPayload),
  302: 		},
  303: 	)
  304: 	if err != nil {
  305: 		return PreparedRequest{}, fmt.Errorf(
  306: 			"parse request: %w",
  307: 			err,
  308: 		)
  309: 	}
  310: 	if strings.TrimSpace(parsed.ClientModel) == "" {
  311: 		return PreparedRequest{}, fmt.Errorf(
  312: 			"%w: parser returned blank client model",
  313: 			ErrStageContractViolation,
  314: 		)
  315: 	}
  316: 
  317: 	requestedCapabilities, err := s.capabilityDetector.Detect(
  318: 		ctx,
  319: 		CapabilityInput{
  320: 			APIFamily:    input.APIFamily,
  321: 			EndpointKind: input.EndpointKind,
  322: 			ClientModel:  parsed.ClientModel,
  323: 			Payload:      cloneBytes(originalPayload),
  324: 		},
  325: 	)
  326: 	if err != nil {
  327: 		return PreparedRequest{}, fmt.Errorf(
  328: 			"detect requested capabilities: %w",
  329: 			err,
  330: 		)
  331: 	}
  332: 
  333: 	plan, err := s.routePlanner.Plan(
  334: 		ctx,
  335: 		RoutePlanInput{
  336: 			Principal:             principal,
  337: 			APIFamily:             input.APIFamily,
  338: 			EndpointKind:          input.EndpointKind,
  339: 			ClientModel:           parsed.ClientModel,
  340: 			RequestedCapabilities: requestedCapabilities,
  341: 			Payload:               cloneBytes(originalPayload),
  342: 		},
  343: 	)
  344: 	if err != nil {
  345: 		return PreparedRequest{}, fmt.Errorf(
  346: 			"plan route: %w",
  347: 			err,
  348: 		)
  349: 	}
  350: 	if err := validateRoutePlan(
  351: 		input,
  352: 		parsed,
  353: 		plan,
  354: 	); err != nil {
  355: 		return PreparedRequest{}, err
  356: 	}
  357: 
  358: 	return PreparedRequest{
  359: 		LocalRequestID:        input.LocalRequestID,
  360: 		IdempotencyKey:        cloneStringPointer(input.IdempotencyKey),
  361: 		Principal:             principal,
  362: 		APIFamily:             input.APIFamily,
  363: 		EndpointKind:          input.EndpointKind,
  364: 		ClientModel:           parsed.ClientModel,
  365: 		RequestedCapabilities: requestedCapabilities,
  366: 		Payload:               cloneBytes(originalPayload),
  367: 		Plan:                  plan,
  368: 	}, nil
  369: }
  370: 
  371: func validateInput(input Input) error {
  372: 	if !validLocalRequestID(input.LocalRequestID) ||
  373: 		strings.TrimSpace(input.RawAPIKey) == "" ||
  374: 		input.APIFamily == "" ||
  375: 		input.EndpointKind == "" ||
  376: 		input.Payload == nil {
  377: 		return ErrInvalidInput
  378: 	}
  379: 	if input.IdempotencyKey != nil &&
  380: 		strings.TrimSpace(*input.IdempotencyKey) == "" {
  381: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  382: 			"%w: blank idempotency key",
  383: 			ErrInvalidInput,
  384: 		)
  385: 	}
  386: 	return nil
  387: }
  388: 
  389: func validatePrincipal(value Principal) error {
  390: 	if strings.TrimSpace(value.UserID) == "" ||
  391: 		strings.TrimSpace(value.APIKeyID) == "" ||
  392: 		strings.TrimSpace(value.BillingSubjectUserID) == "" {
  393: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  394: 			"%w: invalid authentication principal",
  395: 			ErrStageContractViolation,
  396: 		)
  397: 	}
  398: 	return nil
  399: }
  400: 
  401: func validateRoutePlan(
  402: 	input Input,
  403: 	parsed ParsedRequest,
  404: 	plan RoutePlan,
  405: ) error {
  406: 	route := plan.Route
  407: 	reseller := plan.Reseller
  408: 	price := plan.Price
  409: 
  410: 	if strings.TrimSpace(route.ID) == "" ||
  411: 		strings.TrimSpace(route.ResellerID) == "" ||
  412: 		strings.TrimSpace(route.ClientModel) == "" ||
  413: 		strings.TrimSpace(route.ProviderModel) == "" ||
  414: 		strings.TrimSpace(reseller.ID) == "" ||
  415: 		strings.TrimSpace(price.RouteID) == "" ||
  416: 		strings.TrimSpace(plan.BillingModel) == "" ||
  417: 		route.APIFamily != input.APIFamily ||
  418: 		route.EndpointKind != input.EndpointKind ||
  419: 		route.ClientModel != parsed.ClientModel ||
  420: 		route.ResellerID != reseller.ID ||
  421: 		route.ProviderType == "" ||
  422: 		route.ProviderType != reseller.ProviderType ||
  423: 		price.RouteID != route.ID ||
  424: 		!route.Enabled ||
  425: 		!reseller.Enabled ||
  426: 		!price.Enabled ||
  427: 		price.Currency != "RUB" ||
  428: 		plan.Currency != "RUB" ||
  429: 		plan.EstimatedClientAmountCents < 0 ||
  430: 		plan.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents < 0 ||
  431: 		strings.TrimSpace(plan.Confidence) == "" ||
  432: 		!nonNegativeUsage(plan.EstimatedUsage) {
  433: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  434: 			"%w: invalid route plan",
  435: 			ErrStageContractViolation,
  436: 		)
  437: 	}
  438: 	return nil
  439: }
  440: 
  441: func validateBillingAdmission(
  442: 	prepared PreparedRequest,
  443: 	admission BillingAdmissionResult,
  444: ) error {
  445: 	if !admission.Allowed ||
  446: 		admission.Currency != prepared.Plan.Currency ||
  447: 		admission.RequiredReserveCents !=
  448: 			prepared.Plan.EstimatedClientAmountCents ||
  449: 		admission.RemoteBalanceCents < 0 ||
  450: 		admission.PendingAmountCents < 0 ||
  451: 		admission.RemoteBalanceCents <
  452: 			admission.PendingAmountCents ||
  453: 		admission.EffectiveBalanceCents !=
  454: 			admission.RemoteBalanceCents-
  455: 				admission.PendingAmountCents ||
  456: 		admission.EffectiveBalanceCents <
  457: 			admission.RequiredReserveCents {
  458: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  459: 			"%w: invalid billing admission",
  460: 			ErrStageContractViolation,
  461: 		)
  462: 	}
  463: 	return nil
  464: }
  465: 
  466: func reservationInput(
  467: 	prepared PreparedRequest,
  468: ) ReservationInput {
  469: 	return ReservationInput{
  470: 		LocalRequestID: prepared.LocalRequestID,
  471: 		IdempotencyKey: cloneStringPointer(
  472: 			prepared.IdempotencyKey,
  473: 		),
  474: 		Principal:      prepared.Principal,
  475: 		APIFamily:      prepared.APIFamily,
  476: 		EndpointKind:   prepared.EndpointKind,
  477: 		ClientModel:    prepared.ClientModel,
  478: 		BillingModel:   prepared.Plan.BillingModel,
  479: 		Route:          prepared.Plan.Route,
  480: 		Reseller:       prepared.Plan.Reseller,
  481: 		EstimatedUsage: prepared.Plan.EstimatedUsage,
  482: 		EstimatedClientAmountCents: prepared.Plan.
  483: 			EstimatedClientAmountCents,
  484: 		EstimatedUpstreamCostCents: prepared.Plan.
  485: 			EstimatedUpstreamCostCents,
  486: 		Currency: prepared.Plan.Currency,
  487: 	}
  488: }
  489: 
  490: func validateReservation(
  491: 	prepared PreparedRequest,
  492: 	result ReservationResult,
  493: ) error {
  494: 	usage := result.Usage
  495: 	expectedIdempotencyKey := ""
  496: 	if prepared.IdempotencyKey != nil {
  497: 		expectedIdempotencyKey = *prepared.IdempotencyKey
  498: 	}
  499: 
  500: 	if result.Disposition != ReservationDispositionCreated &&
  501: 		result.Disposition !=
  502: 			ReservationDispositionAlreadyReserved ||
  503: 		usage.LocalRequestID != prepared.LocalRequestID ||
  504: 		usage.IdempotencyKey != expectedIdempotencyKey ||
  505: 		usage.UserID != prepared.Principal.UserID ||
  506: 		usage.APIKeyID != prepared.Principal.APIKeyID ||
  507: 		usage.APIFamily != prepared.APIFamily ||
  508: 		usage.EndpointKind != prepared.EndpointKind ||
  509: 		usage.ClientModel != prepared.ClientModel ||
  510: 		usage.BillingModel != prepared.Plan.BillingModel ||
  511: 		usage.SelectedRouteID != prepared.Plan.Route.ID ||
  512: 		usage.SelectedResellerID != prepared.Plan.Reseller.ID ||
  513: 		usage.ProviderType != prepared.Plan.Route.ProviderType ||
  514: 		usage.ProviderModel != prepared.Plan.Route.ProviderModel ||
  515: 		usage.EstimatedUsage != prepared.Plan.EstimatedUsage ||
  516: 		usage.EstimatedClientAmountCents !=
  517: 			prepared.Plan.EstimatedClientAmountCents ||
  518: 		usage.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents !=
  519: 			prepared.Plan.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents ||
  520: 		usage.Currency != prepared.Plan.Currency ||
  521: 		usage.UsageCompleteness != "missing" ||
  522: 		usage.Status != domain.UsageStatusReserved ||
  523: 		usage.Usage != (domain.TokenUsage{}) ||
  524: 		usage.ClientAmountCents != 0 ||
  525: 		usage.ChargedAmountCents != 0 ||
  526: 		usage.RemainingAmountCents != 0 ||
  527: 		usage.ActualUpstreamCostCents != 0 ||
  528: 		usage.ReservedAt == nil ||
  529: 		usage.ReleasedAt != nil ||
  530: 		usage.BillableAt != nil ||
  531: 		usage.ChargedAt != nil ||
  532: 		usage.FailedAt != nil ||
  533: 		usage.CreatedAt.IsZero() ||
  534: 		usage.UpdatedAt.IsZero() ||
  535: 		usage.CreatedAt.Location() != time.UTC ||
  536: 		usage.ReservedAt.Location() != time.UTC ||
  537: 		usage.UpdatedAt.Location() != time.UTC ||
  538: 		!usage.CreatedAt.Equal(*usage.ReservedAt) ||
  539: 		!usage.UpdatedAt.Equal(*usage.ReservedAt) ||
  540: 		strings.TrimSpace(usage.FailureReason) != "" ||
  541: 		strings.TrimSpace(usage.BillingChargeRequestID) != "" {
  542: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  543: 			"%w: invalid atomic reservation",
  544: 			ErrStageContractViolation,
  545: 		)
  546: 	}
  547: 
  548: 	switch result.Disposition {
  549: 	case ReservationDispositionCreated:
  550: 		if result.Reseller == nil ||
  551: 			result.Reseller.ID != prepared.Plan.Reseller.ID ||
  552: 			result.Reseller.ProviderType !=
  553: 				prepared.Plan.Reseller.ProviderType ||
  554: 			result.Reseller.ReservedCents <
  555: 				prepared.Plan.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents {
  556: 			return fmt.Errorf(
  557: 				"%w: invalid created reseller reserve",
  558: 				ErrStageContractViolation,
  559: 			)
  560: 		}
  561: 	case ReservationDispositionAlreadyReserved:
  562: 		if result.Reseller != nil {
  563: 			return fmt.Errorf(
  564: 				"%w: replay returned mutable reseller snapshot",
  565: 				ErrStageContractViolation,
  566: 			)
  567: 		}
  568: 	}
  569: 	return nil
  570: }
  571: 
  572: func validLocalRequestID(value string) bool {
  573: 	if !strings.HasPrefix(value, localRequestIDPrefix) ||
  574: 		len(value) == len(localRequestIDPrefix) {
  575: 		return false
  576: 	}
  577: 	for _, current := range value {
  578: 		if unicode.IsControl(current) ||
  579: 			unicode.IsSpace(current) {
  580: 			return false
  581: 		}
  582: 	}
  583: 	return true
  584: }
  585: 
  586: func hasPositiveUsage(value domain.TokenUsage) bool {
  587: 	return value.InputTokens > 0 ||
  588: 		value.CachedInputTokens > 0 ||
  589: 		value.OutputTokens > 0 ||
  590: 		value.ReasoningTokens > 0 ||
  591: 		value.ImageInputTokens > 0 ||
  592: 		value.AudioInputTokens > 0 ||
  593: 		value.AudioOutputTokens > 0 ||
  594: 		value.FileInputTokens > 0 ||
  595: 		value.VideoInputTokens > 0 ||
  596: 		value.ImageGenerationUnits > 0
  597: }
  598: 
  599: func nonNegativeUsage(value domain.TokenUsage) bool {
  600: 	return value.InputTokens >= 0 &&
  601: 		value.CachedInputTokens >= 0 &&
  602: 		value.OutputTokens >= 0 &&
  603: 		value.ReasoningTokens >= 0 &&
  604: 		value.ImageInputTokens >= 0 &&
  605: 		value.AudioInputTokens >= 0 &&
  606: 		value.AudioOutputTokens >= 0 &&
  607: 		value.FileInputTokens >= 0 &&
  608: 		value.VideoInputTokens >= 0 &&
  609: 		value.ImageGenerationUnits >= 0
  610: }
  611: 
  612: func clonePreparedRequest(
  613: 	value PreparedRequest,
  614: ) PreparedRequest {
  615: 	result := value
  616: 	result.IdempotencyKey = cloneStringPointer(
  617: 		value.IdempotencyKey,
  618: 	)
  619: 	result.Payload = cloneBytes(value.Payload)
  620: 	result.Plan.Fallbacks = cloneRouteFallbackPlans(
  621: 		value.Plan.Fallbacks,
  622: 	)
  623: 	return result
  624: }
  625: 
  626: func cloneRouteFallbackPlans(
  627: 	values []RouteFallbackPlan,
  628: ) []RouteFallbackPlan {
  629: 	if values == nil {
  630: 		return nil
  631: 	}
  632: 	return append([]RouteFallbackPlan(nil), values...)
  633: }
  634: 
  635: func cloneReservationResult(
  636: 	value ReservationResult,
  637: ) ReservationResult {
  638: 	result := value
  639: 	result.Usage.ReservedAt = cloneTimePointer(
  640: 		value.Usage.ReservedAt,
  641: 	)
  642: 	result.Usage.ReleasedAt = cloneTimePointer(
  643: 		value.Usage.ReleasedAt,
  644: 	)
  645: 	result.Usage.BillableAt = cloneTimePointer(
  646: 		value.Usage.BillableAt,
  647: 	)
  648: 	result.Usage.ChargedAt = cloneTimePointer(
  649: 		value.Usage.ChargedAt,
  650: 	)
  651: 	result.Usage.FailedAt = cloneTimePointer(
  652: 		value.Usage.FailedAt,
  653: 	)
  654: 	if value.Reseller != nil {
  655: 		reseller := *value.Reseller
  656: 		reseller.DisabledAt = cloneTimePointer(
  657: 			value.Reseller.DisabledAt,
  658: 		)
  659: 		result.Reseller = &reseller
  660: 	}
  661: 	return result
  662: }
  663: 
  664: func cloneBytes(value []byte) []byte {
  665: 	if value == nil {
  666: 		return nil
  667: 	}
  668: 	return append([]byte(nil), value...)
  669: }
  670: 
  671: func cloneStringPointer(value *string) *string {
  672: 	if value == nil {
  673: 		return nil
  674: 	}
  675: 	copyValue := *value
  676: 	return &copyValue
  677: }
  678: 
  679: func cloneTimePointer(value *time.Time) *time.Time {
  680: 	if value == nil {
  681: 		return nil
  682: 	}
  683: 	copyValue := *value
  684: 	return &copyValue
  685: }

  235: func TestServiceExecuteExecutesCanonicalOrder(t *testing.T) {
  236: 	var calls []string
  237: 	service := mustService(t, validDependencies(&calls))
  238: 	input := validInput()
  239: 
  240: 	reserved, err := service.Execute(
  241: 		context.Background(),
  242: 		input,
  243: 	)
  244: 	if err != nil {
  245: 		t.Fatalf("Execute: %v", err)
  246: 	}
  247: 
  248: 	wantCalls := []string{
  249: 		"authenticate",
  250: 		"parse",
  251: 		"capabilities",
  252: 		"route",
  253: 		"admission",
  254: 		"forwarding",
  255: 		"usage",
  256: 		"finalize",
  257: 		"autocharge",
  258: 	}
  259: 	if !reflect.DeepEqual(calls, wantCalls) {
  260: 		t.Fatalf("calls = %#v, want %#v", calls, wantCalls)
  261: 	}
  262: 	if reserved.Reserved.Prepared.LocalRequestID !=
  263: 		input.LocalRequestID ||
  264: 		reserved.Reserved.Prepared.Principal.UserID != "user-1" ||
  265: 		reserved.Reserved.Prepared.ClientModel != "model-1" ||
  266: 		!reserved.Reserved.Prepared.RequestedCapabilities.Chat ||
  267: 		reserved.Reserved.Prepared.Plan.Route.ID != "route-1" ||
  268: 		!bytes.Equal(
  269: 			reserved.Reserved.Prepared.Payload,
  270: 			input.Payload,
  271: 		) ||
  272: 		!reserved.Reserved.Admission.Allowed ||
  273: 		reserved.Reserved.Reservation.Disposition !=
  274: 			ReservationDispositionCreated ||
  275: 		reserved.Reserved.Reservation.Usage.Status !=
  276: 			domain.UsageStatusReserved ||
  277: 		reserved.Response.StatusCode != 200 ||
  278: 		reserved.ResolvedUsage.Completeness != "detailed" ||
  279: 		reserved.ResolvedUsage.ClientAmountCents != 15 ||
  280: 		reserved.FinalUsageRecord.Status !=
  281: 			domain.UsageStatusBillable ||
  282: 		reserved.AutoCharge.Status !=
  283: 			AutoChargeStatusDeferred {
  284: 		t.Fatalf("forwarded = %+v", reserved)
  285: 	}
  286: }

  288: func TestServiceExecuteRejectsNonzeroUsageWithZeroFinalAmount(

  290: ) {
  291: 	tests := []struct {
  292: 		name   string
  293: 		mutate func(*UsageResolutionResult)
  294: 	}{

  306: 		},
  307: 	}

  327: 						Currency:          "RUB",

  330: 					return result, nil
  331: 				},
  332: 			)
  333: 
  334: 			service := mustService(t, dependencies)
  335: 			_, err := service.Execute(
  336: 				context.Background(),
  337: 				validInput(),
  338: 			)
  339: 			if !errors.Is(err, ErrStageContractViolation) {

  344: 			}

  349: 				"capabilities",
  350: 				"route",
  351: 				"admission",
  352: 				"forwarding",
  353: 				"usage",
  354: 				"pricing_failed",
  355: 			}
  356: 			if !reflect.DeepEqual(calls, wantCalls) {
  357: 				t.Fatalf(
  358: 					"calls = %#v, want %#v",
  359: 					calls,
  360: 					wantCalls,
  361: 				)
  362: 			}
  363: 		})
  364: 	}

  367: func TestServiceExecuteStopsAtFirstFailedStage(t *testing.T) {
  368: 	stageError := errors.New("stage failed")
  369: 
  370: 	tests := []struct {
  371: 		name      string
  372: 		failStage string
  373: 		wantCalls []string
  374: 	}{
  375: 		{
  376: 			name:      "authentication",
  377: 			failStage: "authenticate",
  378: 			wantCalls: []string{"authenticate"},
  379: 		},
  380: 		{
  381: 			name:      "parser",
  382: 			failStage: "parse",
  383: 			wantCalls: []string{"authenticate", "parse"},
  384: 		},
  385: 		{
  386: 			name:      "capability detector",
  387: 			failStage: "capabilities",
  388: 			wantCalls: []string{
  389: 				"authenticate",
  390: 				"parse",
  391: 				"capabilities",
  392: 			},
  393: 		},
  394: 		{
  395: 			name:      "route planner",
  396: 			failStage: "route",
  397: 			wantCalls: []string{
  398: 				"authenticate",
  399: 				"parse",
  400: 				"capabilities",
  401: 				"route",
  402: 			},
  403: 		},
  404: 		{
  405: 			name:      "billing admission",
  406: 			failStage: "admission",
  407: 			wantCalls: []string{
  408: 				"authenticate",
  409: 				"parse",
  410: 				"capabilities",
  411: 				"route",
  412: 				"admission",
  413: 			},
  414: 		},
  415: 		{
  416: 			name:      "forwarding stage",
  417: 			failStage: "forwarding",
  418: 			wantCalls: []string{
  419: 				"authenticate",
  420: 				"parse",
  421: 				"capabilities",
  422: 				"route",
  423: 				"admission",
  424: 				"forwarding",
  425: 			},
  426: 		},
  427: 		{
  428: 			name:      "usage resolution",
  429: 			failStage: "usage",
  430: 			wantCalls: []string{
  431: 				"authenticate",
  432: 				"parse",
  433: 				"capabilities",
  434: 				"route",
  435: 				"admission",
  436: 				"forwarding",
  437: 				"usage",
  438: 				"pricing_failed",
  439: 			},
  440: 		},
  441: 	}
  442: 
  443: 	for _, test := range tests {
  444: 		t.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {
  445: 			var calls []string
  446: 			dependencies := validDependencies(&calls)
  447: 			dependencies = failingDependencies(
  448: 				dependencies,
  449: 				&calls,
  450: 				test.failStage,
  451: 				stageError,
  452: 			)
  453: 			service := mustService(t, dependencies)
  454: 
  455: 			_, err := service.Execute(
  456: 				context.Background(),
  457: 				validInput(),
  458: 			)
  459: 			if !errors.Is(err, stageError) {
  460: 				t.Fatalf("error = %v, want stage error", err)
  461: 			}
  462: 			if !reflect.DeepEqual(calls, test.wantCalls) {
  463: 				t.Fatalf(
  464: 					"calls = %#v, want %#v",
  465: 					calls,
  466: 					test.wantCalls,
  467: 				)
  468: 			}
  469: 		})
  470: 	}
  471: }

  513: func TestServiceExecuteIsolatesPayloadBetweenStages(t *testing.T) {
  514: 	input := validInput()
  515: 	original := append([]byte(nil), input.Payload...)
  516: 
  517: 	dependencies := validDependencies(nil)
  518: 	dependencies.RequestParser = parseFunc(
  519: 		func(
  520: 			_ context.Context,
  521: 			value ParseInput,
  522: 		) (ParsedRequest, error) {
  523: 			value.Payload[0] = 'X'
  524: 			return ParsedRequest{
  525: 				ClientModel: "model-1",
  526: 			}, nil
  527: 		},
  528: 	)
  529: 	dependencies.CapabilityDetector = detectFunc(
  530: 		func(
  531: 			_ context.Context,
  532: 			value CapabilityInput,
  533: 		) (domain.CapabilitySet, error) {
  534: 			if !bytes.Equal(value.Payload, original) {
  535: 				t.Fatalf(
  536: 					"capability payload = %q, want %q",
  537: 					value.Payload,
  538: 					original,
  539: 				)
  540: 			}
  541: 			value.Payload[0] = 'Y'
  542: 			return domain.CapabilitySet{Chat: true}, nil
  543: 		},
  544: 	)
  545: 	dependencies.RoutePlanner = planFunc(
  546: 		func(
  547: 			_ context.Context,
  548: 			value RoutePlanInput,
  549: 		) (RoutePlan, error) {
  550: 			if !bytes.Equal(value.Payload, original) {
  551: 				t.Fatalf(
  552: 					"route payload = %q, want %q",
  553: 					value.Payload,
  554: 					original,
  555: 				)
  556: 			}
  557: 			value.Payload[0] = 'Z'
  558: 			return validRoutePlan(), nil
  559: 		},
  560: 	)
  561: 
  562: 	service := mustService(t, dependencies)
  563: 	reserved, err := service.Execute(
  564: 		context.Background(),
  565: 		input,
  566: 	)
  567: 	if err != nil {
  568: 		t.Fatalf("Execute: %v", err)
  569: 	}
  570: 	if !bytes.Equal(input.Payload, original) {
  571: 		t.Fatalf(
  572: 			"caller payload = %q, want %q",
  573: 			input.Payload,
  574: 			original,
  575: 		)
  576: 	}
  577: 	if !bytes.Equal(
  578: 		reserved.Reserved.Prepared.Payload,
  579: 		original,
  580: 	) {
  581: 		t.Fatalf(
  582: 			"prepared payload = %q, want %q",
  583: 			reserved.Reserved.Prepared.Payload,
  584: 			original,
  585: 		)
  586: 	}
  587: }
  588: 
  589: func TestServiceExecuteRejectsInvalidRoutePlan(t *testing.T) {
  590: 	dependencies := validDependencies(nil)
  591: 	dependencies.RoutePlanner = planFunc(
  592: 		func(
  593: 			context.Context,
  594: 			RoutePlanInput,
  595: 		) (RoutePlan, error) {
  596: 			plan := validRoutePlan()
  597: 			plan.BillingModel = ""
  598: 			return plan, nil
  599: 		},
  600: 	)
  601: 
  602: 	service := mustService(t, dependencies)
  603: 	_, err := service.Execute(
  604: 		context.Background(),
  605: 		validInput(),
  606: 	)
  607: 	if !errors.Is(err, ErrStageContractViolation) {
  608: 		t.Fatalf(
  609: 			"error = %v, want stage contract violation",
  610: 			err,
  611: 		)
  612: 	}
  613: }
  614: 
  615: func validDependencies(
  616: 	calls *[]string,
  617: ) Dependencies {
  618: 	record := func(value string) {
  619: 		if calls != nil {
  620: 			*calls = append(*calls, value)
  621: 		}
  622: 	}
  623: 
  624: 	return Dependencies{
  625: 		Authenticator: authenticateFunc(
  626: 			func(
  627: 				_ context.Context,
  628: 				rawAPIKey string,
  629: 			) (Principal, error) {
  630: 				record("authenticate")
  631: 				if rawAPIKey != "sk_test" {
  632: 					return Principal{}, errors.New(
  633: 						"unexpected API key",
  634: 					)
  635: 				}
  636: 				return Principal{
  637: 					UserID:               "user-1",
  638: 					APIKeyID:             "key-1",
  639: 					BillingSubjectUserID: "billing-1",
  640: 				}, nil
  641: 			},
  642: 		),
  643: 		RequestParser: parseFunc(
  644: 			func(
  645: 				_ context.Context,
  646: 				input ParseInput,
  647: 			) (ParsedRequest, error) {
  648: 				record("parse")
  649: 				if input.APIFamily !=
  650: 					domain.APIFamilyOpenAICompatible ||
  651: 					input.EndpointKind != domain.EndpointChat {
  652: 					return ParsedRequest{}, errors.New(
  653: 						"unexpected parse input",
  654: 					)
  655: 				}
  656: 				return ParsedRequest{
  657: 					ClientModel: "model-1",
  658: 				}, nil
  659: 			},
  660: 		),
  661: 		CapabilityDetector: detectFunc(
  662: 			func(
  663: 				_ context.Context,
  664: 				input CapabilityInput,
  665: 			) (domain.CapabilitySet, error) {
  666: 				record("capabilities")
  667: 				if input.ClientModel != "model-1" {
  668: 					return domain.CapabilitySet{},
  669: 						errors.New(
  670: 							"unexpected capability input",
  671: 						)
  672: 				}
  673: 				return domain.CapabilitySet{
  674: 					Chat: true,
  675: 				}, nil
  676: 			},
  677: 		),
  678: 		RoutePlanner: planFunc(
  679: 			func(
  680: 				_ context.Context,
  681: 				input RoutePlanInput,
  682: 			) (RoutePlan, error) {
  683: 				record("route")
  684: 				if input.Principal.UserID != "user-1" ||
  685: 					input.ClientModel != "model-1" ||
  686: 					!input.RequestedCapabilities.Chat {
  687: 					return RoutePlan{}, errors.New(
  688: 						"unexpected route input",
  689: 					)
  690: 				}
  691: 				return validRoutePlan(), nil
  692: 			},
  693: 		),
  694: 		BillingAdmitter: admitFunc(
  695: 			func(
  696: 				_ context.Context,
  697: 				input BillingAdmissionInput,
  698: 			) (BillingAdmissionResult, error) {
  699: 				record("admission")
  700: 				if input.Principal.UserID != "user-1" ||
  701: 					input.RequiredReserveCents != 20 ||
  702: 					input.Currency != "RUB" {
  703: 					return BillingAdmissionResult{},
  704: 						errors.New(
  705: 							"unexpected admission input",
  706: 						)
  707: 				}
  708: 				return validAdmission(input), nil
  709: 			},
  710: 		),
  711: 		Forwarding: forwardingStageFunc(
  712: 			func(
  713: 				_ context.Context,
  714: 				prepared PreparedRequest,
  715: 				admission BillingAdmissionResult,
  716: 			) (ForwardedRequest, error) {
  717: 				record("forwarding")
  718: 				if prepared.LocalRequestID != "llmreq_test" ||
  719: 					prepared.Principal.UserID != "user-1" ||
  720: 					prepared.Plan.Route.ID != "route-1" ||
  721: 					!admission.Allowed {
  722: 					return ForwardedRequest{},
  723: 						errors.New(
  724: 							"unexpected forwarding input",
  725: 						)
  726: 				}
  727: 				reservation := validReservation(
  728: 					reservationInput(prepared),
  729: 				)
  730: 				return ForwardedRequest{
  731: 					Reserved: ReservedRequest{
  732: 						Prepared:    prepared,
  733: 						Admission:   admission,
  734: 						Reservation: reservation,
  735: 					},
  736: 					Response: ports.ForwardResponse{
  737: 						StatusCode: 200,
  738: 						Body:       []byte(`{"ok":true}`),
  739: 					},
  740: 				}, nil
  741: 			},
  742: 		),
  743: 		UsageResolver: usageResolverFunc(
  744: 			func(
  745: 				_ context.Context,
  746: 				input UsageResolutionInput,
  747: 			) (UsageResolutionResult, error) {
  748: 				record("usage")
  749: 				if input.Reserved.Prepared.LocalRequestID !=
  750: 					"llmreq_test" ||
  751: 					input.Response.StatusCode != 200 {
  752: 					return UsageResolutionResult{},
  753: 						errors.New(
  754: 							"unexpected usage input",
  755: 						)
  756: 				}
  757: 				return UsageResolutionResult{
  758: 					Usage: domain.TokenUsage{
  759: 						InputTokens:  10,
  760: 						OutputTokens: 5,
  761: 					},
  762: 					Completeness:      "detailed",
  763: 					UpstreamCostCents: 10,
  764: 					ClientAmountCents: 15,
  765: 					Currency:          "RUB",
  766: 				}, nil
  767: 			},
  768: 		),
  769: 		Finalizer: finalizerFunc{
  770: 			commit: func(
  771: 				_ context.Context,
  772: 				input FinalizationInput,
  773: 			) (FinalizationResult, error) {
  774: 				record("finalize")
  775: 				return FinalizationResult{
  776: 					Usage: domain.UsageRecord{
  777: 						LocalRequestID: input.Reserved.
  778: 							Prepared.LocalRequestID,
  779: 						UserID: input.Reserved.Prepared.
  780: 							Principal.UserID,
  781: 						Currency: "RUB",
  782: 						Status: domain.
  783: 							UsageStatusBillable,
  784: 					},
  785: 				}, nil
  786: 			},
  787: 			pricingFailed: func(
  788: 				_ context.Context,
  789: 				input PricingFailureInput,
  790: 			) (FinalizationResult, error) {
  791: 				record("pricing_failed")
  792: 				return FinalizationResult{
  793: 					Usage: domain.UsageRecord{
  794: 						LocalRequestID: input.Reserved.
  795: 							Prepared.LocalRequestID,
  796: 						Status: domain.
  797: 							UsageStatusPricingFailed,
  798: 					},
  799: 				}, nil
  800: 			},
  801: 		},
  802: 		AutoCharger: autoChargerFunc(
  803: 			func(
  804: 				_ context.Context,
  805: 				input AutoChargeInput,
  806: 			) AutoChargeResult {
  807: 				record("autocharge")
  808: 				if input.FinalUsageRecord.Status !=
  809: 					domain.UsageStatusBillable {
  810: 					return AutoChargeResult{
  811: 						Status: AutoChargeStatusFailed,
  812: 					}
  813: 				}
  814: 				return AutoChargeResult{
  815: 					Status: AutoChargeStatusDeferred,
  816: 				}
  817: 			},
  818: 		),
  819: 	}
  820: }
  821: 
  822: func failingDependencies(
  823: 	value Dependencies,
  824: 	calls *[]string,
  825: 	stage string,
  826: 	stageError error,
  827: ) Dependencies {
  828: 	record := func() {
  829: 		*calls = append(*calls, stage)
  830: 	}
  831: 
  832: 	switch stage {
  833: 	case "authenticate":
  834: 		value.Authenticator = authenticateFunc(
  835: 			func(
  836: 				context.Context,
  837: 				string,
  838: 			) (Principal, error) {
  839: 				record()
  840: 				return Principal{}, stageError
  841: 			},
  842: 		)
  843: 	case "parse":
  844: 		value.RequestParser = parseFunc(
  845: 			func(
  846: 				context.Context,
  847: 				ParseInput,
  848: 			) (ParsedRequest, error) {
  849: 				record()
  850: 				return ParsedRequest{}, stageError
  851: 			},
  852: 		)
  853: 	case "capabilities":
  854: 		value.CapabilityDetector = detectFunc(
  855: 			func(
  856: 				context.Context,
  857: 				CapabilityInput,
  858: 			) (domain.CapabilitySet, error) {
  859: 				record()
  860: 				return domain.CapabilitySet{}, stageError
  861: 			},
  862: 		)
  863: 	case "route":
  864: 		value.RoutePlanner = planFunc(
  865: 			func(
  866: 				context.Context,
  867: 				RoutePlanInput,
  868: 			) (RoutePlan, error) {
  869: 				record()
  870: 				return RoutePlan{}, stageError
  871: 			},
  872: 		)
  873: 	case "admission":
  874: 		value.BillingAdmitter = admitFunc(
  875: 			func(
  876: 				context.Context,
  877: 				BillingAdmissionInput,
  878: 			) (BillingAdmissionResult, error) {
  879: 				record()
  880: 				return BillingAdmissionResult{}, stageError
  881: 			},
  882: 		)
  883: 	case "forwarding":
  884: 		value.Forwarding = forwardingStageFunc(
  885: 			func(
  886: 				context.Context,
  887: 				PreparedRequest,
  888: 				BillingAdmissionResult,
  889: 			) (ForwardedRequest, error) {
  890: 				record()
  891: 				return ForwardedRequest{}, stageError
  892: 			},
  893: 		)
  894: 	case "usage":
  895: 		value.UsageResolver = usageResolverFunc(
  896: 			func(
  897: 				context.Context,
  898: 				UsageResolutionInput,
  899: 			) (UsageResolutionResult, error) {
  900: 				record()
  901: 				return UsageResolutionResult{}, stageError
  902: 			},
  903: 		)
  904: 	default:
  905: 		panic("unknown stage")
  906: 	}
  907: 	return value
  908: }
  909: 
  910: func validInput() Input {
  911: 	idempotencyKey := "idem-1"
  912: 	return Input{
  913: 		LocalRequestID: "llmreq_test",
  914: 		RawAPIKey:      "sk_test",
  915: 		IdempotencyKey: &idempotencyKey,
  916: 		APIFamily:      domain.APIFamilyOpenAICompatible,
  917: 		EndpointKind:   domain.EndpointChat,
  918: 		Payload:        []byte(`{"model":"model-1"}`),
  919: 	}
  920: }
  921: 
  922: func validRoutePlan() RoutePlan {
  923: 	return RoutePlan{
  924: 		Route: domain.Route{
  925: 			ID:            "route-1",
  926: 			ResellerID:    "reseller-1",
  927: 			ProviderType:  domain.ProviderOpenAI,
  928: 			APIFamily:     domain.APIFamilyOpenAICompatible,
  929: 			EndpointKind:  domain.EndpointChat,
  930: 			ClientModel:   "model-1",
  931: 			ProviderModel: "model-1",
  932: 			Enabled:       true,
  933: 		},
  934: 		Reseller: domain.Reseller{
  935: 			ID:           "reseller-1",
  936: 			ProviderType: domain.ProviderOpenAI,
  937: 			Enabled:      true,
  938: 		},
  939: 		Price: domain.RoutePrice{
  940: 			RouteID:  "route-1",
  941: 			Currency: "RUB",
  942: 			Enabled:  true,
  943: 		},
  944: 		BillingModel: "openai:model-1",
  945: 		EstimatedUsage: domain.TokenUsage{
  946: 			InputTokens:  10,
  947: 			OutputTokens: 5,
  948: 		},
  949: 		EstimatedClientAmountCents: 20,
  950: 		EstimatedUpstreamCostCents: 10,
  951: 		Currency:                   "RUB",
  952: 		Confidence:                 "conservative",
  953: 	}
  954: }
  955: 
  956: func validAdmission(
  957: 	input BillingAdmissionInput,
  958: ) BillingAdmissionResult {
  959: 	return BillingAdmissionResult{
  960: 		Allowed:               true,
  961: 		RemoteBalanceCents:    1000,
  962: 		PendingAmountCents:    100,
  963: 		EffectiveBalanceCents: 900,
  964: 		RequiredReserveCents:  input.RequiredReserveCents,
  965: 		Currency:              input.Currency,
  966: 	}
  967: }
  968: 
  969: func validReservation(
  970: 	input ReservationInput,
  971: ) ReservationResult {
  972: 	reservedAt := time.Date(
  973: 		2026,
  974: 		time.June,
  975: 		14,
  976: 		12,
  977: 		0,
  978: 		0,
  979: 		0,
  980: 		time.UTC,
  981: 	)
  982: 	idempotencyKey := ""
  983: 	if input.IdempotencyKey != nil {
  984: 		idempotencyKey = *input.IdempotencyKey
  985: 	}
  986: 	reseller := input.Reseller
  987: 	reseller.ReservedCents = 10
  988: 	return ReservationResult{
  989: 		Disposition: ReservationDispositionCreated,
  990: 		Usage: domain.UsageRecord{
  991: 			LocalRequestID:     input.LocalRequestID,
  992: 			IdempotencyKey:     idempotencyKey,
  993: 			UserID:             input.Principal.UserID,
  994: 			APIKeyID:           input.Principal.APIKeyID,
  995: 			APIFamily:          input.APIFamily,
  996: 			EndpointKind:       input.EndpointKind,
  997: 			ClientModel:        input.ClientModel,
  998: 			BillingModel:       input.BillingModel,
  999: 			SelectedRouteID:    input.Route.ID,
 1000: 			SelectedResellerID: input.Reseller.ID,
 1001: 			ProviderType:       input.Route.ProviderType,
 1002: 			ProviderModel:      input.Route.ProviderModel,
 1003: 			EstimatedUsage:     input.EstimatedUsage,
 1004: 			EstimatedClientAmountCents: input.
 1005: 				EstimatedClientAmountCents,
 1006: 			EstimatedUpstreamCostCents: input.
 1007: 				EstimatedUpstreamCostCents,
 1008: 			Currency:          input.Currency,
 1009: 			UsageCompleteness: "missing",
 1010: 			Status:            domain.UsageStatusReserved,
 1011: 			CreatedAt:         reservedAt,
 1012: 			ReservedAt:        &reservedAt,
 1013: 			UpdatedAt:         reservedAt,
 1014: 		},
 1015: 		Reseller: &reseller,
 1016: 	}
 1017: }
 1018: 
 1019: func mustService(
 1020: 	t *testing.T,
 1021: 	dependencies Dependencies,
 1022: ) *Service {
 1023: 	t.Helper()
 1024: 
 1025: 	service, err := NewService(dependencies)
 1026: 	if err != nil {
 1027: 		t.Fatalf("NewService: %v", err)
 1028: 	}
 1029: 	return service
 1030: }

GIT_BLOB_SHA: c4d5be14aad0035c074a8694b9b06a7f78c2b299

    1: package llmrequest
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/domain"
    5: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/ports"
    6: )
    7: 
    8: type Input struct {
    9: 	LocalRequestID string
   10: 	RawAPIKey      string
   11: 	IdempotencyKey *string
   12: 
   13: 	APIFamily    domain.APIFamily
   14: 	EndpointKind domain.EndpointKind
   15: 
   16: 	Payload []byte
   17: }
   18: 
   19: type Principal struct {
   20: 	UserID               string
   21: 	APIKeyID             string
   22: 	BillingSubjectUserID string
   23: }
   24: 
   25: type ParseInput struct {
   26: 	APIFamily    domain.APIFamily
   27: 	EndpointKind domain.EndpointKind
   28: 	Payload      []byte
   29: }
   30: 
   31: type ParsedRequest struct {
   32: 	ClientModel string
   33: }
   34: 
   35: type CapabilityInput struct {
   36: 	APIFamily    domain.APIFamily
   37: 	EndpointKind domain.EndpointKind
   38: 	ClientModel  string
   39: 	Payload      []byte
   40: }
   41: 
   42: type RoutePlanInput struct {
   43: 	Principal Principal
   44: 
   45: 	APIFamily             domain.APIFamily
   46: 	EndpointKind          domain.EndpointKind
   47: 	ClientModel           string
   48: 	RequestedCapabilities domain.CapabilitySet
   49: 	Payload               []byte
   50: }
   51: 
   52: type RouteFallbackPlan struct {
   53: 	Route    domain.Route
   54: 	Reseller domain.Reseller
   55: 	Price    domain.RoutePrice
   56: 
   57: 	BillingModel   string
   58: 	EstimatedUsage domain.TokenUsage
   59: 
   60: 	EstimatedClientAmountCents int64
   61: 	EstimatedUpstreamCostCents int64
   62: 
   63: 	Currency   string
   64: 	Confidence string
   65: }
   66: 
   67: type RoutePlan struct {
   68: 	Route    domain.Route
   69: 	Reseller domain.Reseller
   70: 	Price    domain.RoutePrice
   71: 
   72: 	BillingModel   string
   73: 	EstimatedUsage domain.TokenUsage
   74: 
   75: 	EstimatedClientAmountCents int64
   76: 	EstimatedUpstreamCostCents int64
   77: 
   78: 	Currency   string
   79: 	Confidence string
   80: 
   81: 	Fallbacks []RouteFallbackPlan
   82: }
   83: 
   84: type PreparedRequest struct {
   85: 	LocalRequestID string
   86: 	IdempotencyKey *string
   87: 
   88: 	Principal Principal
   89: 
   90: 	APIFamily             domain.APIFamily
   91: 	EndpointKind          domain.EndpointKind
   92: 	ClientModel           string
   93: 	RequestedCapabilities domain.CapabilitySet
   94: 
   95: 	Payload []byte
   96: 	Plan    RoutePlan
   97: }
   98: 
   99: type BillingAdmissionInput struct {
  100: 	Principal Principal
  101: 
  102: 	RequiredReserveCents int64
  103: 	Currency             string
  104: }
  105: 
  106: type BillingAdmissionResult struct {
  107: 	Allowed bool
  108: 
  109: 	RemoteBalanceCents    int64
  110: 	PendingAmountCents    int64
  111: 	EffectiveBalanceCents int64
  112: 	RequiredReserveCents  int64
  113: 	Currency              string
  114: }
  115: 
  116: type ReservationInput struct {
  117: 	LocalRequestID string
  118: 	IdempotencyKey *string
  119: 
  120: 	Principal Principal
  121: 
  122: 	APIFamily    domain.APIFamily
  123: 	EndpointKind domain.EndpointKind
  124: 	ClientModel  string
  125: 	BillingModel string
  126: 
  127: 	Route    domain.Route
  128: 	Reseller domain.Reseller
  129: 
  130: 	EstimatedUsage domain.TokenUsage
  131: 
  132: 	EstimatedClientAmountCents int64
  133: 	EstimatedUpstreamCostCents int64
  134: 	Currency                   string
  135: }
  136: 
  137: type RouteReservationTransferInput struct {
  138: 	// ExpectedUsage is the exact currently persisted reserved usage snapshot.
  139: 	// The transfer must fail rather than overwrite a different committed state.
  140: 	ExpectedUsage domain.UsageRecord
  141: 
  142: 	// Target is the immutable fallback snapshot selected during the original
  143: 	// routing decision. The transfer must not re-query or re-price the route.
  144: 	Target RouteFallbackPlan
  145: }
  146: 
  147: type RouteReservationTransferResult struct {
  148: 	// Usage is the exact committed reserved usage snapshot after the transfer.
  149: 	Usage domain.UsageRecord
  150: 
  151: 	// ReleasedReseller is the committed previous reseller balance snapshot after
  152: 	// its unused estimated upstream reserve has been removed.
  153: 	ReleasedReseller domain.Reseller
  154: 
  155: 	// ReservedReseller is the committed target reseller balance snapshot after
  156: 	// the target estimated upstream reserve has been added.
  157: 	ReservedReseller domain.Reseller
  158: }
  159: 
  160: type ReservationDisposition string
  161: 
  162: const (
  163: 	ReservationDispositionCreated         ReservationDisposition = "created"
  164: 	ReservationDispositionAlreadyReserved ReservationDisposition = "already_reserved"
  165: )
  166: 
  167: type ReservationResult struct {
  168: 	Disposition ReservationDisposition
  169: 	Usage       domain.UsageRecord
  170: 	Reseller    *domain.Reseller
  171: }
  172: 
  173: type ReservedRequest struct {
  174: 	Prepared    PreparedRequest
  175: 	Admission   BillingAdmissionResult
  176: 	Reservation ReservationResult
  177: }
  178: 
  179: type UsageResolutionInput struct {
  180: 	Reserved ReservedRequest
  181: 	Response ports.ForwardResponse
  182: }
  183: 
  184: type UsageResolutionResult struct {
  185: 	Usage        domain.TokenUsage
  186: 	Completeness string
  187: 	Estimated    bool
  188: 
  189: 	UpstreamCostCents int64
  190: 	ClientAmountCents int64
  191: 	Currency          string
  192: 
  193: 	ProviderRequestID     string
  194: 	ProviderResponseModel string
  195: }
  196: 
  197: type FinalizationInput struct {
  198: 	Reserved      ReservedRequest
  199: 	ResolvedUsage UsageResolutionResult
  200: }
  201: 
  202: type PricingFailureInput struct {
  203: 	Reserved      ReservedRequest
  204: 	FailureReason string
  205: }
  206: 
  207: type FinalizationResult struct {
  208: 	Usage domain.UsageRecord
  209: }
  210: 
  211: type AutoChargeStatus string
  212: 
  213: const (
  214: 	AutoChargeStatusDeferred  AutoChargeStatus = "deferred"
  215: 	AutoChargeStatusProcessed AutoChargeStatus = "processed"
  216: 	AutoChargeStatusFailed    AutoChargeStatus = "failed"
  217: )
  218: 
  219: type AutoChargeInput struct {
  220: 	Principal        Principal
  221: 	FinalUsageRecord domain.UsageRecord
  222: }
  223: 
  224: type AutoChargeResult struct {
  225: 	Status AutoChargeStatus
  226: 
  227: 	ProcessedBatchIDs  []string
  228: 	ChargedAmountCents int64
  229: 
  230: 	BillingBalanceCents *int64
  231: }

    1: package modelcatalog
