    3: import (
    4: 	"context"
    5: 	"errors"
    6: 	"math"
    7: 	"math/big"
    8: 	"sort"
    9: 	"strings"
   10: 	"time"
   11: 
   12: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/domain"
   13: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/ports"
   14: )
   15: 
   16: const (
   17: 	catalogObject = "list"
   18: 	modelObject   = "model"
   19: 	modelOwner    = "tokenio"
   20: )
   21: 
   22: type PublicPricingCalculator interface {
   23: 	CalculatePublicPricing(
   24: 		domain.RoutePrice,
   25: 	) (Pricing, error)
   26: }
   27: 
   28: type Dependencies struct {
   29: 	Routes         ports.ModelCatalogRouteRepository
   30: 	Resellers      ports.ResellerQueryRepository
   31: 	Prices         ports.RoutePriceRepository
   32: 	Secrets        ports.SecretPresenceChecker
   33: 	AdapterSupport ports.ForwardingAdapterSupport
   34: 	RewriteSupport ports.ModelIdentifierRewriteSupport
   35: 	PublicPricing  PublicPricingCalculator
   36: 	Clock          ports.Clock
   37: 	Currency       string
   38: }
   39: 
   40: type Service struct {
   41: 	deps Dependencies
   42: }
   43: 
   44: type routeGroup struct {
   45: 	kind   domain.EndpointKind
   46: 	routes []domain.Route
   47: }
   48: 
   49: type catalogCandidate struct {
   50: 	route         domain.Route
   51: 	pricing       Pricing
   52: 	referenceCost int64
   53: }
   54: 
   55: func NewService(deps Dependencies) (*Service, error) {
   56: 	if deps.Routes == nil ||
   57: 		deps.Resellers == nil ||
   58: 		deps.Prices == nil ||
   59: 		deps.Secrets == nil ||
   60: 		deps.AdapterSupport == nil ||
   61: 		deps.RewriteSupport == nil ||
   62: 		deps.PublicPricing == nil ||
   63: 		deps.Clock == nil ||
   64: 		!validOpaque(deps.Currency) {
   65: 		return nil, ErrInvalidInput
   66: 	}
   67: 	return &Service{deps: deps}, nil
   68: }
   69: 
   70: func (s *Service) List(
   71: 	ctx context.Context,
   72: 	apiFamily domain.APIFamily,
   73: ) (Catalog, error) {
   74: 	if ctx == nil ||
   75: 		s == nil ||
   76: 		!validAPIFamily(apiFamily) {
   77: 		return Catalog{}, ErrInvalidInput
   78: 	}
   79: 	if err := ctx.Err(); err != nil {
   80: 		return Catalog{}, err
   81: 	}
   82: 
   83: 	now := s.deps.Clock.Now()
   84: 	if now.IsZero() {
   85: 		return Catalog{}, ErrCatalogUnavailable
   86: 	}
   87: 	now = now.UTC()
   88: 
   89: 	routes, err := s.deps.Routes.ListModelCatalogRoutes(
   90: 		ctx,
   91: 		apiFamily,
   92: 	)
   93: 	if err != nil {
   94: 		return Catalog{}, mapDependencyError(err)
   95: 	}
   96: 
   97: 	groups, routeIDs, resellerIDs, err :=
   98: 		groupCatalogRoutes(routes, apiFamily)
   99: 	if err != nil {
  100: 		return Catalog{}, err
  101: 	}
  102: 
  103: 	resellers, err := s.deps.Resellers.FindByIDs(
  104: 		ctx,
  105: 		resellerIDs,
  106: 	)
  107: 	if err != nil {
  108: 		return Catalog{}, mapDependencyError(err)
  109: 	}
  110: 	if err := validateReturnedResellers(
  111: 		resellers,
  112: 		resellerIDs,
  113: 	); err != nil {
  114: 		return Catalog{}, err
  115: 	}
  116: 
  117: 	prices, err := s.deps.Prices.FindByRouteIDs(
  118: 		ctx,
  119: 		routeIDs,
  120: 	)
  121: 	if err != nil {
  122: 		return Catalog{}, mapDependencyError(err)
  123: 	}
  124: 	if err := validateReturnedPrices(
  125: 		prices,
  126: 		routeIDs,
  127: 	); err != nil {
  128: 		return Catalog{}, err
  129: 	}
  130: 
  131: 	modelIDs := make([]string, 0, len(groups))
  132: 	for modelID := range groups {
  133: 		modelIDs = append(modelIDs, modelID)
  134: 	}
  135: 	sort.Strings(modelIDs)
  136: 
  137: 	secretPresence := make(map[string]bool)
  138: 	result := Catalog{
  139: 		Object: catalogObject,
  140: 		Data:   make([]Model, 0, len(modelIDs)),
  141: 	}
  142: 
  143: 	for _, modelID := range modelIDs {
  144: 		group := groups[modelID]
  145: 		model, err := s.buildModel(
  146: 			ctx,
  147: 			modelID,
  148: 			group,
  149: 			resellers,
  150: 			prices,
  151: 			secretPresence,
  152: 			now,
  153: 		)
  154: 		if err != nil {
  155: 			return Catalog{}, err
  156: 		}
  157: 		result.Data = append(result.Data, model)
  158: 	}
  159: 	return result, nil
  160: }
  161: 
  162: func groupCatalogRoutes(
  163: 	routes []domain.Route,
  164: 	apiFamily domain.APIFamily,
  165: ) (
  166: 	map[string]routeGroup,
  167: 	[]string,
  168: 	[]string,
  169: 	error,
  170: ) {
  171: 	groups := make(map[string]routeGroup)
  172: 	routeIDs := make([]string, 0, len(routes))
  173: 	resellerIDs := make([]string, 0, len(routes))
  174: 	seenRoutes := make(map[string]struct{}, len(routes))
  175: 	seenResellers := make(map[string]struct{})
  176: 
  177: 	for _, route := range routes {
  178: 		if err := validateRouteRecord(
  179: 			route,
  180: 			apiFamily,
  181: 		); err != nil {
  182: 			return nil, nil, nil, err
  183: 		}
  184: 		if _, exists := seenRoutes[route.ID]; exists {
  185: 			return nil, nil, nil, ErrCatalogUnavailable
  186: 		}
  187: 		seenRoutes[route.ID] = struct{}{}
  188: 		routeIDs = append(routeIDs, route.ID)
  189: 
  190: 		if _, exists := seenResellers[route.ResellerID]; !exists {
  191: 			seenResellers[route.ResellerID] = struct{}{}
  192: 			resellerIDs = append(
  193: 				resellerIDs,
  194: 				route.ResellerID,
  195: 			)
  196: 		}
  197: 
  198: 		group, exists := groups[route.ClientModel]
  199: 		if exists && group.kind != route.EndpointKind {
  200: 			return nil, nil, nil, ErrCatalogUnavailable
  201: 		}
  202: 		group.kind = route.EndpointKind
  203: 		group.routes = append(group.routes, route)
  204: 		groups[route.ClientModel] = group
  205: 	}
  206: 
  207: 	sort.Strings(routeIDs)
  208: 	sort.Strings(resellerIDs)
  209: 	return groups, routeIDs, resellerIDs, nil
  210: }
  211: 
  212: func (s *Service) buildModel(
  213: 	ctx context.Context,
  214: 	modelID string,
  215: 	group routeGroup,
  216: 	resellers map[string]domain.Reseller,
  217: 	prices map[string]domain.RoutePrice,
  218: 	secretPresence map[string]bool,
  219: 	now time.Time,
  220: ) (Model, error) {
  221: 	candidates := make(
  222: 		[]catalogCandidate,
  223: 		0,
  224: 		len(group.routes),
  225: 	)
  226: 
  227: 	for _, route := range group.routes {
  228: 		reseller, exists := resellers[route.ResellerID]
  229: 		if !exists {
  230: 			return Model{}, ErrCatalogUnavailable
  231: 		}
  232: 		if err := validateResellerRecord(
  233: 			reseller,
  234: 			route,
  235: 		); err != nil {
  236: 			return Model{}, err
  237: 		}
  238: 
  239: 		price, hasPrice := prices[route.ID]
  240: 		if hasPrice {
  241: 			if err := validatePriceRecord(
  242: 				price,
  243: 				route.ID,
  244: 			); err != nil {
  245: 				return Model{}, err
  246: 			}
  247: 		}
  248: 
  249: 		if !hasPrice ||
  250: 			!catalogRouteStaticallyAvailable(
  251: 				route,
  252: 				reseller,
  253: 				price,
  254: 				s.deps.Currency,
  255: 				now,
  256: 			) ||
  257: 			!s.routeConfigurationSupported(route) {
  258: 			continue
  259: 		}
  260: 
  261: 		exists, known := secretPresence[reseller.APIKeyEnv]
  262: 		if !known {
  263: 			var err error
  264: 			exists, err = s.deps.Secrets.Exists(
  265: 				ctx,
  266: 				reseller.APIKeyEnv,
  267: 			)
  268: 			if err != nil {
  269: 				return Model{}, mapDependencyError(err)
  270: 			}
  271: 			secretPresence[reseller.APIKeyEnv] = exists
  272: 		}
  273: 		if !exists {
  274: 			continue
  275: 		}
  276: 
  277: 		pricing, err := s.deps.PublicPricing.
  278: 			CalculatePublicPricing(price)
  279: 		if err != nil {
  280: 			return Model{}, ErrCatalogUnavailable
  281: 		}
  282: 		referenceCost, ok := catalogReferenceCost(
  283: 			route.EndpointKind,
  284: 			pricing,
  285: 		)
  286: 		if !ok {
  287: 			continue
  288: 		}
  289: 		candidates = append(
  290: 			candidates,
  291: 			catalogCandidate{
  292: 				route:         route,
  293: 				pricing:       pricing,
  294: 				referenceCost: referenceCost,
  295: 			},
  296: 		)
  297: 	}
  298: 
  299: 	model := Model{
  300: 		ID:           modelID,
  301: 		Object:       modelObject,
  302: 		OwnedBy:      modelOwner,
  303: 		Type:         string(group.kind),
  304: 		Active:       false,
  305: 		Pricing:      nil,
  306: 		Capabilities: domain.CapabilitySet{},
  307: 	}
  308: 	if len(candidates) == 0 {
  309: 		return model, nil
  310: 	}
  311: 
  312: 	sort.Slice(candidates, func(i, j int) bool {
  313: 		left := candidates[i]
  314: 		right := candidates[j]
  315: 		if left.referenceCost != right.referenceCost {
  316: 			return left.referenceCost < right.referenceCost
  317: 		}
  318: 		if left.route.Priority != right.route.Priority {
  319: 			return left.route.Priority < right.route.Priority
  320: 		}
  321: 		return left.route.ID < right.route.ID
  322: 	})
  323: 
  324: 	selectedPricing := candidates[0].pricing
  325: 	model.Active = true
  326: 	model.Pricing = &selectedPricing
  327: 	for _, candidate := range candidates {
  328: 		model.Capabilities = unionCapabilities(
  329: 			model.Capabilities,
  330: 			candidate.route.Capabilities,
  331: 		)
  332: 	}
  333: 	return model, nil
  334: }
  335: 
  336: func (s *Service) routeConfigurationSupported(
  337: 	route domain.Route,
  338: ) bool {
  339: 	if !s.deps.AdapterSupport.SupportsForwardingAdapter(
  340: 		route.APIFamily,
  341: 		route.ProviderType,
  342: 		route.EndpointKind,
  343: 	) {
  344: 		return false
  345: 	}
  346: 	if !endpointCapabilityPresent(route) {
  347: 		return false
  348: 	}
  349: 
  350: 	switch route.ModelRewritePolicy {
  351: 	case domain.ModelRewritePolicyNone:
  352: 		return route.ProviderModel == route.ClientModel
  353: 	case domain.ModelRewritePolicyProviderModel:
  354: 		return route.ProviderModel != "" &&
  355: 			s.deps.RewriteSupport.
  356: 				SupportsModelIdentifierRewrite(
  357: 					route.APIFamily,
  358: 					route.ProviderType,
  359: 				)
  360: 	default:
  361: 		return false
  362: 	}
  363: }
  364: 
  365: func catalogRouteStaticallyAvailable(
  366: 	route domain.Route,
  367: 	reseller domain.Reseller,
  368: 	price domain.RoutePrice,
  369: 	currency string,
  370: 	now time.Time,
  371: ) bool {
  372: 	if !route.Enabled ||
  373: 		route.DisabledAt != nil ||
  374: 		!reseller.Enabled ||
  375: 		reseller.DisabledAt != nil ||
  376: 		!price.Enabled ||
  377: 		price.Currency != currency {
  378: 		return false
  379: 	}
  380: 	if route.CooldownUntil != nil &&
  381: 		route.CooldownUntil.After(now) {
  382: 		return false
  383: 	}
  384: 	return positiveAvailableBalance(reseller)
  385: }
  386: 
  387: func positiveAvailableBalance(
  388: 	reseller domain.Reseller,
  389: ) bool {
  390: 	available := big.NewInt(reseller.BalanceCents)
  391: 	available.Sub(
  392: 		available,
  393: 		big.NewInt(reseller.ReservedCents),
  394: 	)
  395: 	available.Sub(
  396: 		available,
  397: 		big.NewInt(reseller.MinimumBalanceCents),
  398: 	)
  399: 	return available.Sign() > 0
  400: }
  401: 
  402: func catalogReferenceCost(
  403: 	kind domain.EndpointKind,
  404: 	pricing Pricing,
  405: ) (int64, bool) {
  406: 	switch kind {
  407: 	case domain.EndpointChat:
  408: 		if pricing.InputPricePer1MTokensCents <= 0 ||
  409: 			pricing.OutputPricePer1MTokensCents <= 0 {
  410: 			return 0, false
  411: 		}
  412: 		total, ok := safeAdd(
  413: 			pricing.InputPricePer1MTokensCents,
  414: 			pricing.OutputPricePer1MTokensCents,
  415: 		)
  416: 		return total, ok
  417: 
  418: 	case domain.EndpointEmbeddings:
  419: 		if pricing.InputPricePer1MTokensCents <= 0 {
  420: 			return 0, false
  421: 		}
  422: 		return pricing.InputPricePer1MTokensCents, true
  423: 
  424: 	case domain.EndpointImagesGeneration:
  425: 		if pricing.ImageGenerationPricePerUnitCents <= 0 ||
  426: 			pricing.ImageGenerationUnitKind !=
  427: 				domain.ImageGenerationUnitKindGeneratedImage {
  428: 			return 0, false
  429: 		}
  430: 		return pricing.ImageGenerationPricePerUnitCents, true
  431: 
  432: 	default:
  433: 		return 0, false
  434: 	}
  435: }
  436: 
  437: func safeAdd(left, right int64) (int64, bool) {
  438: 	if left < 0 || right < 0 ||
  439: 		left > math.MaxInt64-right {
  440: 		return 0, false
  441: 	}
  442: 	return left + right, true
  443: }
  444: 
  445: func endpointCapabilityPresent(
  446: 	route domain.Route,
  447: ) bool {
  448: 	switch route.EndpointKind {
  449: 	case domain.EndpointChat:
  450: 		return route.Capabilities.Chat
  451: 	case domain.EndpointEmbeddings:
  452: 		return route.Capabilities.Embeddings
  453: 	case domain.EndpointImagesGeneration:
  454: 		return route.Capabilities.ImagesGeneration
  455: 	default:
  456: 		return false
  457: 	}
  458: }
  459: 
  460: func unionCapabilities(
  461: 	left domain.CapabilitySet,
  462: 	right domain.CapabilitySet,
  463: ) domain.CapabilitySet {
  464: 	return domain.CapabilitySet{
  465: 		Chat: left.Chat || right.Chat,
  466: 		Embeddings: left.Embeddings ||
  467: 			right.Embeddings,
  468: 		ImagesGeneration: left.ImagesGeneration ||
  469: 			right.ImagesGeneration,
  470: 		Tools: left.Tools || right.Tools,
  471: 		ToolChoice: left.ToolChoice ||
  472: 			right.ToolChoice,
  473: 		ResponseFormat: left.ResponseFormat ||
  474: 			right.ResponseFormat,
  475: 		JSONSchema: left.JSONSchema ||
  476: 			right.JSONSchema,
  477: 		ImageInput: left.ImageInput ||
  478: 			right.ImageInput,
  479: 		AudioInput: left.AudioInput ||
  480: 			right.AudioInput,
  481: 		FileInput: left.FileInput ||
  482: 			right.FileInput,
  483: 		VideoInput: left.VideoInput ||
  484: 			right.VideoInput,
  485: 		Reasoning: left.Reasoning ||
  486: 			right.Reasoning,
  487: 	}
  488: }
  489: 
  490: func validateRouteRecord(
  491: 	route domain.Route,
  492: 	apiFamily domain.APIFamily,
  493: ) error {
  494: 	if !validOpaque(route.ID) ||
  495: 		!validOpaque(route.ResellerID) ||
  496: 		!validOpaque(route.ClientModel) ||
  497: 		!validOpaque(route.ProviderModel) ||
  498: 		!validProviderType(route.ProviderType) ||
  499: 		route.APIFamily != apiFamily ||
  500: 		!validEndpointKind(route.EndpointKind) ||
  501: 		!validRewritePolicy(route.ModelRewritePolicy) ||
  502: 		route.Priority < 0 ||
  503: 		route.RequestsPerMinute < 0 ||
  504: 		route.TokensPerMinute < 0 ||
  505: 		route.ConcurrentRequests < 0 ||
  506: 		route.DefaultMaxOutputTokens < 0 ||
  507: 		route.Enabled != (route.DisabledAt == nil) ||
  508: 		!validOptionalUTC(route.DisabledAt) ||
  509: 		!validOptionalUTC(route.CooldownUntil) ||
  510: 		!validCooldownState(route) {
  511: 		return ErrCatalogUnavailable
  512: 	}
  513: 	return nil
  514: }
  515: 
  516: func validateResellerRecord(
  517: 	reseller domain.Reseller,
  518: 	route domain.Route,
  519: ) error {
  520: 	if reseller.ID != route.ResellerID ||
  521: 		!validOpaque(reseller.ID) ||
  522: 		!validOpaque(reseller.BaseURL) ||
  523: 		!validOpaque(reseller.APIKeyEnv) ||
  524: 		!validProviderType(reseller.ProviderType) ||
  525: 		reseller.ProviderType != route.ProviderType ||
  526: 		reseller.ReservedCents < 0 ||
  527: 		reseller.MinimumBalanceCents < 0 ||
  528: 		reseller.Enabled != (reseller.DisabledAt == nil) ||
  529: 		!validOptionalUTC(reseller.DisabledAt) {
  530: 		return ErrCatalogUnavailable
  531: 	}
  532: 	return nil
  533: }
  534: 
  535: func validatePriceRecord(
  536: 	price domain.RoutePrice,
  537: 	routeID string,
  538: ) error {
  539: 	values := []int64{
  540: 		price.InputPricePer1MTokensCents,
  541: 		price.CachedInputPricePer1MTokensCents,
  542: 		price.OutputPricePer1MTokensCents,
  543: 		price.ReasoningOutputPricePer1MTokensCents,
  544: 		price.ImageInputPricePer1MTokensCents,
  545: 		price.AudioInputPricePer1MTokensCents,
  546: 		price.AudioOutputPricePer1MTokensCents,
  547: 		price.FileInputPricePer1MTokensCents,
  548: 		price.VideoInputPricePer1MTokensCents,
  549: 		price.ImageGenerationPricePerUnitCents,
  550: 	}
  551: 	for _, value := range values {
  552: 		if value < 0 {
  553: 			return ErrCatalogUnavailable
  554: 		}
  555: 	}
  556: 
  557: 	if price.RouteID != routeID ||
  558: 		!validOpaque(price.RouteID) ||
  559: 		!validOpaque(price.Currency) ||
  560: 		price.MarkupCoefficient <= 0 ||
  561: 		math.IsNaN(price.MarkupCoefficient) ||
  562: 		math.IsInf(price.MarkupCoefficient, 0) ||
  563: 		!validImageGenerationUnitKind(
  564: 			price.ImageGenerationUnitKind,
  565: 		) {
  566: 		return ErrCatalogUnavailable
  567: 	}
  568: 	return nil
  569: }
  570: 
  571: func validateReturnedResellers(
  572: 	values map[string]domain.Reseller,
  573: 	requested []string,
  574: ) error {
  575: 	allowed := make(map[string]struct{}, len(requested))
  576: 	for _, id := range requested {
  577: 		allowed[id] = struct{}{}
  578: 	}
  579: 	for id := range values {
  580: 		if _, exists := allowed[id]; !exists {
  581: 			return ErrCatalogUnavailable
  582: 		}
  583: 	}
  584: 	return nil
  585: }
  586: 
  587: func validateReturnedPrices(
  588: 	values map[string]domain.RoutePrice,
  589: 	requested []string,
  590: ) error {
  591: 	allowed := make(map[string]struct{}, len(requested))
  592: 	for _, id := range requested {
  593: 		allowed[id] = struct{}{}
  594: 	}
  595: 	for id := range values {
  596: 		if _, exists := allowed[id]; !exists {
  597: 			return ErrCatalogUnavailable
  598: 		}
  599: 	}
  600: 	return nil
  601: }
  602: 
  603: func validOpaque(value string) bool {
  604: 	return value != "" &&
  605: 		value == strings.TrimSpace(value)
  606: }
  607: 
  608: func validAPIFamily(value domain.APIFamily) bool {
  609: 	switch value {
  610: 	case domain.APIFamilyOpenAICompatible,
  611: 		domain.APIFamilyGeminiNative,
  612: 		domain.APIFamilyAnthropicNative,
  613: 		domain.APIFamilyOllamaNative:
  614: 		return true
  615: 	default:
  616: 		return false
  617: 	}
  618: }
  619: 
  620: func validProviderType(value domain.ProviderType) bool {
  621: 	switch value {
  622: 	case domain.ProviderOpenAI,
  623: 		domain.ProviderOpenRouter,
  624: 		domain.ProviderTogether,
  625: 		domain.ProviderGroq,
  626: 		domain.ProviderOllama,
  627: 		domain.ProviderLMStudio,
  628: 		domain.ProviderVLLM,
  629: 		domain.ProviderGemini,
  630: 		domain.ProviderAnthropic,
  631: 		domain.ProviderHydra:
  632: 		return true
  633: 	default:
  634: 		return false
  635: 	}
  636: }
  637: 
  638: func validEndpointKind(value domain.EndpointKind) bool {
  639: 	switch value {
  640: 	case domain.EndpointChat,
  641: 		domain.EndpointEmbeddings,
  642: 		domain.EndpointImagesGeneration:
  643: 		return true
  644: 	default:
  645: 		return false
  646: 	}
  647: }
  648: 
  649: func validRewritePolicy(
  650: 	value domain.ModelRewritePolicy,
  651: ) bool {
  652: 	switch value {
  653: 	case domain.ModelRewritePolicyNone,
  654: 		domain.ModelRewritePolicyProviderModel:
  655: 		return true
  656: 	default:
  657: 		return false
  658: 	}
  659: }
  660: 
  661: func validImageGenerationUnitKind(
  662: 	value domain.ImageGenerationUnitKind,
  663: ) bool {
  664: 	switch value {
  665: 	case domain.ImageGenerationUnitKindNone,
  666: 		domain.ImageGenerationUnitKindGeneratedImage:
  667: 		return true
  668: 	default:
  669: 		return false
  670: 	}
  671: }
  672: 
  673: func validOptionalUTC(value *time.Time) bool {
  674: 	return value == nil ||
  675: 		(!value.IsZero() && value.Location() == time.UTC)
  676: }
  677: 
  678: func validCooldownState(route domain.Route) bool {
  679: 	if route.CooldownUntil == nil {
  680: 		return route.CooldownReason == ""
  681: 	}
  682: 	return validOpaque(route.CooldownReason)
  683: }
  684: 
  685: func mapDependencyError(err error) error {
  686: 	if err == nil {
  687: 		return nil
  688: 	}
  689: 	if errors.Is(err, context.Canceled) ||
  690: 		errors.Is(err, context.DeadlineExceeded) {
  691: 		return err
  692: 	}
  693: 	return ErrCatalogUnavailable
  694: }

   67: 	_ context.Context,

   71: 		f.calls = make(map[string]int)
   72: 	}

   74: 	return f.values[name], f.err

   98: type fakePublicPricingCalculator struct {
   99: 	calls  []domain.RoutePrice
  100: 	result Pricing
  101: 	err    error
  102: }
  103: 
  104: func (f *fakePublicPricingCalculator) CalculatePublicPricing(
  105: 	price domain.RoutePrice,
  106: ) (Pricing, error) {
  107: 	f.calls = append(f.calls, price)
  108: 	if f.err != nil {
  109: 		return Pricing{}, f.err
  110: 	}
  111: 	result := f.result
  112: 	if result.Currency == "" {
  113: 		result = Pricing{
  114: 			Currency:                         price.Currency,
  115: 			InputPricePer1MTokensCents:       int64(math.Ceil(float64(price.InputPricePer1MTokensCents) * price.MarkupCoefficient)),
  116: 			OutputPricePer1MTokensCents:      int64(math.Ceil(float64(price.OutputPricePer1MTokensCents) * price.MarkupCoefficient)),
  117: 			ImageGenerationPricePerUnitCents: int64(math.Ceil(float64(price.ImageGenerationPricePerUnitCents) * price.MarkupCoefficient)),
  118: 			ImageGenerationUnitKind:          price.ImageGenerationUnitKind,
  119: 		}
  120: 	}
  121: 	return result, nil
  122: }
  123:

  125: 	value time.Time

  129: 	return f.value
  130: }

  137: 		12,
  138: 		0,
  139: 		0,
  140: 		0,
  141: 		time.UTC,
  142: 	)
  143: }

  202: func newTestService(
  203: 	t *testing.T,
  204: 	routes *fakeRoutes,
  205: 	resellers *fakeResellers,
  206: 	prices *fakePrices,
  207: 	secrets *fakeSecrets,
  208: 	rewrite *fakeRewriteSupport,

  212: 		Routes:         routes,

  219: 		Clock: fixedClock{
  220: 			value: testTime(),
  221: 		},
  222: 		Currency: "RUB",
  223: 	})
  224: 	if err != nil {
  225: 		t.Fatalf("NewService: %v", err)
  226: 	}
  227: 	return service
  228: }

  230: func TestListBuildsSafeDeterministicCatalog(
  231: 	t *testing.T,
  232: ) {
  233: 	routeExpensive := testRoute(
  234: 		"route_expensive",
  235: 		"gpt-test",
  236: 		"reseller_expensive",
  237: 		20,
  238: 	)
  239: 	routeExpensive.Capabilities.Tools = true
  240: 
  241: 	routeSelected := testRoute(
  242: 		"route_selected",
  243: 		"gpt-test",
  244: 		"reseller_selected",
  245: 		10,
  246: 	)
  247: 	routeSelected.Capabilities.ImageInput = true
  248: 
  249: 	routeInactive := testRoute(
  250: 		"route_inactive",
  251: 		"aaa-inactive",
  252: 		"reseller_inactive",
  253: 		1,
  254: 	)
  255: 	routeInactive.Enabled = false
  256: 	disabledAt := testTime().Add(-time.Hour)
  257: 	routeInactive.DisabledAt = &disabledAt
  258: 
  259: 	routes := &fakeRoutes{
  260: 		values: []domain.Route{
  261: 			routeExpensive,
  262: 			routeInactive,
  263: 			routeSelected,
  264: 		},
  265: 	}
  266: 	resellers := &fakeResellers{
  267: 		values: map[string]domain.Reseller{
  268: 			"reseller_expensive": testReseller(
  269: 				"reseller_expensive",
  270: 				"EXPENSIVE_KEY",
  271: 			),
  272: 			"reseller_selected": testReseller(
  273: 				"reseller_selected",
  274: 				"SELECTED_KEY",
  275: 			),
  276: 			"reseller_inactive": testReseller(
  277: 				"reseller_inactive",
  278: 				"INACTIVE_KEY",
  279: 			),
  280: 		},
  281: 	}
  282: 	prices := &fakePrices{
  283: 		values: map[string]domain.RoutePrice{
  284: 			"route_expensive": testPrice(
  285: 				"route_expensive",
  286: 				200,
  287: 				400,
  288: 				1,
  289: 			),
  290: 			"route_selected": testPrice(
  291: 				"route_selected",
  292: 				100,
  293: 				200,
  294: 				1.5,
  295: 			),
  296: 			"route_inactive": testPrice(
  297: 				"route_inactive",
  298: 				10,
  299: 				20,
  300: 				1,
  301: 			),
  302: 		},
  303: 	}
  304: 	secrets := &fakeSecrets{
  305: 		values: map[string]bool{
  306: 			"EXPENSIVE_KEY": true,
  307: 			"SELECTED_KEY":  true,
  308: 			"INACTIVE_KEY":  true,
  309: 		},
  310: 	}
  311: 	service := newTestService(
  312: 		t,
  313: 		routes,
  314: 		resellers,
  315: 		prices,
  316: 		secrets,
  317: 		&fakeRewriteSupport{},
  318: 	)
  319: 
  320: 	catalog, err := service.List(
  321: 		context.Background(),
  322: 		domain.APIFamilyOpenAICompatible,
  323: 	)
  324: 	if err != nil {
  325: 		t.Fatalf("List: %v", err)
  326: 	}
  327: 
  328: 	if catalog.Object != "list" ||
  329: 		len(catalog.Data) != 2 ||
  330: 		catalog.Data[0].ID != "aaa-inactive" ||
  331: 		catalog.Data[1].ID != "gpt-test" {
  332: 		t.Fatalf("catalog = %+v", catalog)
  333: 	}
  334: 
  335: 	inactive := catalog.Data[0]
  336: 	if inactive.Active ||
  337: 		inactive.Pricing != nil ||
  338: 		inactive.Capabilities !=
  339: 			(domain.CapabilitySet{}) {
  340: 		t.Fatalf("inactive model = %+v", inactive)
  341: 	}
  342: 
  343: 	active := catalog.Data[1]
  344: 	if !active.Active ||
  345: 		active.Object != "model" ||
  346: 		active.OwnedBy != "tokenio" ||
  347: 		active.Type != "chat" ||
  348: 		active.Pricing == nil ||
  349: 		active.Pricing.InputPricePer1MTokensCents != 150 ||
  350: 		active.Pricing.OutputPricePer1MTokensCents != 300 ||
  351: 		!active.Capabilities.Chat ||
  352: 		!active.Capabilities.Tools ||
  353: 		!active.Capabilities.ImageInput {
  354: 		t.Fatalf("active model = %+v", active)
  355: 	}
  356: 
  357: 	if secrets.calls["EXPENSIVE_KEY"] != 1 ||
  358: 		secrets.calls["SELECTED_KEY"] != 1 ||
  359: 		secrets.calls["INACTIVE_KEY"] != 0 {
  360: 		t.Fatalf("secret calls = %+v", secrets.calls)
  361: 	}
  362: 
  363: 	encoded, err := json.Marshal(catalog)
  364: 	if err != nil {
  365: 		t.Fatalf("Marshal: %v", err)
  366: 	}
  367: 	response := string(encoded)
  368: 	for _, forbidden := range []string{
  369: 		"route_id",
  370: 		"reseller_id",
  371: 		"provider_model",
  372: 		"provider_type",
  373: 		"api_key_env",
  374: 		"markup_coefficient",
  375: 		"cooldown_reason",
  376: 		"priority",
  377: 	} {
  378: 		if strings.Contains(response, forbidden) {
  379: 			t.Fatalf(
  380: 				"catalog leaked %q: %s",
  381: 				forbidden,
  382: 				response,
  383: 			)
  384: 		}
  385: 	}
  386: }

  476:

  484: 			supported: false,

  490: 			active:    true,

  500: 					values: []domain.Route{route},

  508: 					},

  516: 							1,
  517: 						),
  518: 					},
  519: 				},

  523: 					},
  524: 				},
  525: 				rewrite,
  526: 			)
  527: 
  528: 			catalog, err := service.List(

  532: 			if err != nil {
  533: 				t.Fatalf("List: %v", err)
  534: 			}
  535: 			if catalog.Data[0].Active != test.active ||
  536: 				rewrite.calls != 1 {

  538: 					"model=%+v rewrite calls=%d",
  539: 					catalog.Data[0],
  540: 					rewrite.calls,
  541: 				)
  542: 			}
  543: 		})

  547: func TestListMarksMissingSecretOrBalanceInactive(
  548: 	t *testing.T,
  549: ) {
  550: 	for _, test := range []struct {
  551: 		name     string
  552: 		secret   bool
  553: 		balance  int64
  554: 		reserved int64
  555: 		minimum  int64
  556: 	}{
  557: 		{
  558: 			name:    "missing secret",
  559: 			secret:  false,
  560: 			balance: 100,
  561: 		},
  562: 		{
  563: 			name:     "no available balance",
  564: 			secret:   true,
  565: 			balance:  100,
  566: 			reserved: 50,
  567: 			minimum:  50,
  568: 		},
  569: 	} {
  570: 		t.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {
  571: 			route := testRoute(
  572: 				"route_1",
  573: 				"gpt-test",
  574: 				"reseller_1",
  575: 				1,
  576: 			)
  577: 			reseller := testReseller(
  578: 				"reseller_1",
  579: 				"ROUTE_KEY",
  580: 			)
  581: 			reseller.BalanceCents = test.balance
  582: 			reseller.ReservedCents = test.reserved
  583: 			reseller.MinimumBalanceCents =
  584: 				test.minimum
  585: 
  586: 			service := newTestService(
  587: 				t,
  588: 				&fakeRoutes{
  589: 					values: []domain.Route{route},
  590: 				},
  591: 				&fakeResellers{

  593: 						"reseller_1": reseller,

  603: 						),

  609: 					},
  610: 				},
  611: 				&fakeRewriteSupport{},
  612: 			)
  613: 
  614: 			catalog, err := service.List(
  615: 				context.Background(),
  616: 				domain.APIFamilyOpenAICompatible,
  617: 			)
  618: 			if err != nil {
  619: 				t.Fatalf("List: %v", err)
  620: 			}

  622: 				catalog.Data[0].Pricing != nil {
  623: 				t.Fatalf(
  624: 					"model = %+v",
  625: 					catalog.Data[0],
  626: 				)
  627: 			}
  628: 		})
  629: 	}
  630: }

FILE: internal/application/routing/reasons.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: f390fb25777c353b8566bb622af35d250c6a0cb6

    1: package routing
    2: 
    3: type SkipReason string
    4: 
    5: const (
    6: 	SkipReasonManualDisabled                SkipReason = "manual_disabled"
    7: 	SkipReasonMissingResellerAPIKey         SkipReason = "missing_reseller_api_key"
    8: 	SkipReasonCooldownActive                SkipReason = "cooldown_active"
    9: 	SkipReasonMissingCapability             SkipReason = "missing_capability"
   10: 	SkipReasonInsufficientResellerBalance   SkipReason = "insufficient_reseller_balance"
   11: 	SkipReasonRateLimitExceeded             SkipReason = "rate_limit_exceeded"
   12: 	SkipReasonConcurrencyLimitExceeded      SkipReason = "concurrency_limit_exceeded"
   13: 	SkipReasonUnsupportedModelRewritePolicy SkipReason = "unsupported_model_rewrite_policy"
   14: 	SkipReasonInvalidRoutePrice             SkipReason = "invalid_route_price"
   15: 	SkipReasonInvalidResellerBalance        SkipReason = "invalid_reseller_balance"
   16: 	SkipReasonPricingUnavailable            SkipReason = "pricing_unavailable"
   17: )
   18: 
   19: type SkippedRoute struct {
   20: 	RouteID    string
   21: 	ResellerID string
   22: 	Reason     SkipReason
   23: }

====================================================================================================
FILE: internal/application/routing/selector.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: 4011fb54143ad1eb406776a3608e050d76e16a4e
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: package routing
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"fmt"
    5: 	"math"
    6: 	"sort"
    7: 	"strings"
    8: 	"time"
    9: 
   10: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/domain"
   11: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/ports"
   12: )
   13: 
   14: type SelectionInput struct {
   15: 	Query                 ports.RouteQuery
   16: 	RequestedCapabilities domain.CapabilitySet
   17: 	Candidates            []Candidate
   18: 	Now                   time.Time
   19: }
   20: 
   21: const SkipReasonForwardingAdapterUnavailable SkipReason = "forwarding_adapter_unavailable"
   22: 
   23: type Candidate struct {
   24: 	Route    domain.Route
   25: 	Reseller domain.Reseller
   26: 
   27: 	SecretAvailable bool
   28: 
   29: 	CostAvailable              bool
   30: 	ForwardingAdapterAvailable bool
   31: 	EstimatedUpstreamCostCents int64
   32: 
   33: 	RateLimitAllowed              bool
   34: 	ConcurrencyAllowed            bool
   35: 	ModelIdentifierRewriteAllowed bool
   36: }
   37: 
   38: type SelectionResult struct {
   39: 	Selected Candidate
   40: 
   41: 	Fallbacks []Candidate
   42: 	Skipped   []SkippedRoute
   43: }
   44: 
   45: func Select(input SelectionInput) (SelectionResult, error) {
   46: 	if err := validateInput(input); err != nil {
   47: 		return SelectionResult{}, err
   48: 	}
   49: 
   50: 	structural := make([]Candidate, 0, len(input.Candidates))
   51: 	for _, candidate := range input.Candidates {
   52: 		if matchesRouteKey(candidate.Route, input.Query) {
   53: 			structural = append(structural, candidate)
   54: 		}
   55: 	}
   56: 	if len(structural) == 0 {
   57: 		return SelectionResult{}, ErrUnknownModel
   58: 	}
   59: 	if err := validateStructuralCandidates(structural); err != nil {
   60: 		return SelectionResult{}, err
   61: 	}
   62: 
   63: 	skipped := make([]SkippedRoute, 0, len(structural))
   64: 	compatible := make([]Candidate, 0, len(structural))
   65: 	for _, candidate := range structural {
   66: 		if !Supports(candidate.Route.Capabilities, input.RequestedCapabilities) {
   67: 			skipped = append(skipped, skip(candidate, SkipReasonMissingCapability))
   68: 			continue
   69: 		}
   70: 		compatible = append(compatible, candidate)
   71: 	}
   72: 	if len(compatible) == 0 {
   73: 		return SelectionResult{Skipped: skipped}, ErrUnsupportedCapability
   74: 	}
   75: 
   76: 	eligible := make([]Candidate, 0, len(compatible))
   77: 	for _, candidate := range compatible {
   78: 		if reason, ok := primaryOperationalSkipReason(candidate, input.Now); ok {
   79: 			skipped = append(skipped, skip(candidate, reason))
   80: 			continue
   81: 		}
   82: 		eligible = append(eligible, candidate)
   83: 	}
   84: 	if len(eligible) == 0 {
   85: 		return SelectionResult{Skipped: skipped}, ErrNoRouteAvailable
   86: 	}
   87: 
   88: 	sort.Slice(eligible, func(i, j int) bool {
   89: 		left := eligible[i]
   90: 		right := eligible[j]
   91: 		if left.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents != right.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents {
   92: 			return left.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents < right.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents
   93: 		}
   94: 		if left.Route.Priority != right.Route.Priority {
   95: 			return left.Route.Priority < right.Route.Priority
   96: 		}
   97: 		return left.Route.ID < right.Route.ID
   98: 	})
   99: 
  100: 	fallbacks := make([]Candidate, len(eligible)-1)
  101: 	copy(fallbacks, eligible[1:])
  102: 	return SelectionResult{
  103: 		Selected:  eligible[0],
  104: 		Fallbacks: fallbacks,
  105: 		Skipped:   skipped,
  106: 	}, nil
  107: }
  108: 
  109: func validateInput(input SelectionInput) error {
  110: 	if input.Query.APIFamily == "" || input.Query.EndpointKind == "" || strings.TrimSpace(input.Query.ClientModel) == "" || input.Now.IsZero() {
  111: 		return ErrInvalidSelectionInput
  112: 	}
  113: 	return nil
  114: }
  115: 
  116: func matchesRouteKey(route domain.Route, query ports.RouteQuery) bool {
  117: 	return route.APIFamily == query.APIFamily &&
  118: 		route.EndpointKind == query.EndpointKind &&
  119: 		route.ClientModel == query.ClientModel
  120: }
  121: 
  122: func validateStructuralCandidates(candidates []Candidate) error {
  123: 	seenRouteIDs := make(map[string]struct{}, len(candidates))
  124: 	for _, candidate := range candidates {
  125: 		if candidate.Route.ID == "" || candidate.Route.ResellerID == "" || candidate.Reseller.ID == "" {
  126: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w", ErrInvalidRouteData)
  127: 		}
  128: 		if candidate.Route.ResellerID != candidate.Reseller.ID {
  129: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w", ErrInvalidRouteData)
  130: 		}
  131: 		if candidate.Route.ProviderType != candidate.Reseller.ProviderType {
  132: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w", ErrInvalidRouteData)
  133: 		}
  134: 		if _, exists := seenRouteIDs[candidate.Route.ID]; exists {
  135: 			return fmt.Errorf("%w", ErrInvalidRouteData)
  136: 		}
  137: 		seenRouteIDs[candidate.Route.ID] = struct{}{}
  138: 	}
  139: 	return nil
  140: }
  141: 
  142: func primaryOperationalSkipReason(candidate Candidate, now time.Time) (SkipReason, bool) {
  143: 	if !candidate.Route.Enabled || !candidate.Reseller.Enabled {
  144: 		return SkipReasonManualDisabled, true
  145: 	}
  146: 	if !candidate.ForwardingAdapterAvailable {
  147: 		return SkipReasonForwardingAdapterUnavailable, true
  148: 	}
  149: 	if !candidate.SecretAvailable {
  150: 		return SkipReasonMissingResellerAPIKey, true
  151: 	}
  152: 	if candidate.Route.CooldownUntil != nil && candidate.Route.CooldownUntil.After(now) {
  153: 		return SkipReasonCooldownActive, true
  154: 	}
  155: 	if !candidate.CostAvailable {
  156: 		return SkipReasonPricingUnavailable, true
  157: 	}
  158: 	if candidate.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents < 0 {
  159: 		return SkipReasonInvalidRoutePrice, true
  160: 	}
  161: 	available, err := availableResellerBalanceCents(candidate.Reseller)
  162: 	if err != nil {
  163: 		return SkipReasonInvalidResellerBalance, true
  164: 	}
  165: 	if available < candidate.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents {
  166: 		return SkipReasonInsufficientResellerBalance, true
  167: 	}
  168: 	if !candidate.RateLimitAllowed {
  169: 		return SkipReasonRateLimitExceeded, true
  170: 	}
  171: 	if !candidate.ConcurrencyAllowed {
  172: 		return SkipReasonConcurrencyLimitExceeded, true
  173: 	}
  174: 	if !modelRewritePolicyAllowed(candidate) {
  175: 		return SkipReasonUnsupportedModelRewritePolicy, true
  176: 	}
  177: 	return "", false
  178: }
  179: 
  180: func availableResellerBalanceCents(reseller domain.Reseller) (int64, error) {
  181: 	available, err := checkedSubInt64(reseller.BalanceCents, reseller.ReservedCents)
  182: 	if err != nil {
  183: 		return 0, err
  184: 	}
  185: 	return checkedSubInt64(available, reseller.MinimumBalanceCents)
  186: }
  187: 
  188: func checkedSubInt64(left, right int64) (int64, error) {
  189: 	if right > 0 && left < math.MinInt64+right {
  190: 		return 0, ErrInvalidRouteData
  191: 	}
  192: 	if right < 0 && left > math.MaxInt64+right {
  193: 		return 0, ErrInvalidRouteData
  194: 	}
  195: 	return left - right, nil
  196: }
  197: 
  198: func modelRewritePolicyAllowed(candidate Candidate) bool {
  199: 	switch candidate.Route.ModelRewritePolicy {
  200: 	case domain.ModelRewritePolicyNone:
  201: 		return candidate.Route.ProviderModel == candidate.Route.ClientModel
  202: 	case domain.ModelRewritePolicyProviderModel:
  203: 		return strings.TrimSpace(candidate.Route.ProviderModel) != "" && candidate.ModelIdentifierRewriteAllowed
  204: 	default:
  205: 		return false
  206: 	}
  207: }
  208: 
  209: func skip(candidate Candidate, reason SkipReason) SkippedRoute {
  210: 	return SkippedRoute{RouteID: candidate.Route.ID, ResellerID: candidate.Reseller.ID, Reason: reason}
  211: }

   16: func TestSelectionUsesExactRoutingKey(t *testing.T) {
   17: 	now := fixedNow()
   18: 	exact := baseCandidate("route-exact")
   19: 	otherFamily := baseCandidate("route-other-family")
   20: 	otherFamily.Route.APIFamily = domain.APIFamily("other_family")
   21: 	otherKind := baseCandidate("route-other-kind")
   22: 	otherKind.Route.EndpointKind = domain.EndpointKind("other_kind")
   23: 	otherModel := baseCandidate("route-other-model")
   24: 	otherModel.Route.ClientModel = "other-model"
   25: 	otherModel.Route.ProviderModel = "other-model"
   26: 
   27: 	result, err := Select(baseInput(now, domain.CapabilitySet{}, []Candidate{otherFamily, otherKind, otherModel, exact}))
   28: 	if err != nil {
   29: 		t.Fatalf("Select returned error: %v", err)
   30: 	}
   31: 	if result.Selected.Route.ID != "route-exact" {
   32: 		t.Fatalf("selected = %q, want route-exact", result.Selected.Route.ID)
   33: 	}
   34: 	if len(result.Fallbacks) != 0 {
   35: 		t.Fatalf("fallbacks = %v, want none", routeIDs(result.Fallbacks))
   36: 	}
   37: }

   39: func TestSelectionInputValidationAndUnknownModel(t *testing.T) {
   40: 	now := fixedNow()
   41: 	tests := []struct {
   42: 		name  string
   43: 		input SelectionInput
   44: 		want  error
   45: 	}{
   46: 		{name: "no exact key candidate", input: baseInput(now, domain.CapabilitySet{}, []Candidate{withClientModel(baseCandidate("route-other"), "other-model")}), want: ErrUnknownModel},
   47: 		{name: "empty API family", input: SelectionInput{Query: ports.RouteQuery{EndpointKind: domain.EndpointKind("kind"), ClientModel: "model"}, Now: now}, want: ErrInvalidSelectionInput},
   48: 		{name: "empty endpoint kind", input: SelectionInput{Query: ports.RouteQuery{APIFamily: domain.APIFamily("family"), ClientModel: "model"}, Now: now}, want: ErrInvalidSelectionInput},
   49: 		{name: "blank client model", input: SelectionInput{Query: ports.RouteQuery{APIFamily: domain.APIFamily("family"), EndpointKind: domain.EndpointKind("kind"), ClientModel: " \t\n "}, Now: now}, want: ErrInvalidSelectionInput},
   50: 		{name: "zero now", input: SelectionInput{Query: ports.RouteQuery{APIFamily: domain.APIFamily("family"), EndpointKind: domain.EndpointKind("kind"), ClientModel: "model"}}, want: ErrInvalidSelectionInput},
   51: 	}
   52: 	for _, tt := range tests {
   53: 		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
   54: 			_, err := Select(tt.input)
   55: 			if !errors.Is(err, tt.want) {
   56: 				t.Fatalf("error = %v, want %v", err, tt.want)
   57: 			}
   58: 		})
   59: 	}
   60: }
   61: 
   62: func TestOperationalAvailabilitySkipReasons(t *testing.T) {
   63: 	now := fixedNow()
   64: 	future := now.Add(time.Minute)
   65: 	past := now.Add(-time.Minute)
   66: 
   67: 	tests := []struct {
   68: 		name       string
   69: 		mutate     func(*Candidate)
   70: 		wantReason SkipReason
   71: 	}{
   72: 		{name: "disabled route", mutate: func(c *Candidate) { c.Route.Enabled = false }, wantReason: SkipReasonManualDisabled},
   73: 		{name: "disabled reseller", mutate: func(c *Candidate) { c.Reseller.Enabled = false }, wantReason: SkipReasonManualDisabled},
   74: 		{name: "missing forwarding adapter", mutate: func(c *Candidate) { c.ForwardingAdapterAvailable = false }, wantReason: SkipReasonForwardingAdapterUnavailable},
   75: 		{name: "missing secret", mutate: func(c *Candidate) { c.SecretAvailable = false }, wantReason: SkipReasonMissingResellerAPIKey},
   76: 		{name: "active cooldown", mutate: func(c *Candidate) { c.Route.CooldownUntil = &future }, wantReason: SkipReasonCooldownActive},
   77: 		{name: "missing cost", mutate: func(c *Candidate) { c.CostAvailable = false }, wantReason: SkipReasonPricingUnavailable},
   78: 		{name: "negative estimated cost", mutate: func(c *Candidate) { c.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents = -1 }, wantReason: SkipReasonInvalidRoutePrice},
   79: 		{name: "insufficient reseller balance", mutate: func(c *Candidate) { c.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents = 101 }, wantReason: SkipReasonInsufficientResellerBalance},
   80: 		{name: "reserved cents included", mutate: func(c *Candidate) { c.Reseller.ReservedCents = 51 }, wantReason: SkipReasonInsufficientResellerBalance},
   81: 		{name: "minimum balance cents included", mutate: func(c *Candidate) { c.Reseller.MinimumBalanceCents = 51 }, wantReason: SkipReasonInsufficientResellerBalance},
   82: 		{name: "rate limit denied", mutate: func(c *Candidate) { c.RateLimitAllowed = false }, wantReason: SkipReasonRateLimitExceeded},
   83: 		{name: "concurrency denied", mutate: func(c *Candidate) { c.ConcurrencyAllowed = false }, wantReason: SkipReasonConcurrencyLimitExceeded},
   84: 	}
   85: 	for _, tt := range tests {
   86: 		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
   87: 			candidate := baseCandidate("route-unavailable")
   88: 			tt.mutate(&candidate)
   89: 			result, err := Select(baseInput(now, domain.CapabilitySet{}, []Candidate{candidate}))
   90: 			if !errors.Is(err, ErrNoRouteAvailable) {
   91: 				t.Fatalf("error = %v, want ErrNoRouteAvailable", err)
   92: 			}
   93: 			assertSkippedReasons(t, result.Skipped, []SkipReason{tt.wantReason})
   94: 		})
   95: 	}
   96: 
   97: 	accepted := []struct {
   98: 		name   string
   99: 		mutate func(*Candidate)
  100: 	}{
  101: 		{name: "cooldown ending now", mutate: func(c *Candidate) { c.Route.CooldownUntil = &now }},
  102: 		{name: "cooldown in past", mutate: func(c *Candidate) { c.Route.CooldownUntil = &past }},
  103: 		{name: "zero estimated cost", mutate: func(c *Candidate) { c.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents = 0 }},
  104: 		{name: "exact balance equal to cost", mutate: func(c *Candidate) { c.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents = 100 }},
  105: 	}
  106: 	for _, tt := range accepted {
  107: 		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
  108: 			candidate := baseCandidate("route-available")
  109: 			tt.mutate(&candidate)
  110: 			result, err := Select(baseInput(now, domain.CapabilitySet{}, []Candidate{candidate}))
  111: 			if err != nil {
  112: 				t.Fatalf("Select returned error: %v", err)
  113: 			}
  114: 			if result.Selected.Route.ID != "route-available" {
  115: 				t.Fatalf("selected = %q, want route-available", result.Selected.Route.ID)
  116: 			}
  117: 		})
  118: 	}
  119: }
  120: 
  121: func TestModelRewritePolicy(t *testing.T) {
  122: 	now := fixedNow()
  123: 	tests := []struct {
  124: 		name       string
  125: 		mutate     func(*Candidate)
  126: 		wantError  error
  127: 		wantReason SkipReason
  128: 	}{
  129: 		{name: "none equal accepted", mutate: func(c *Candidate) {}},
  130: 		{name: "none different skipped", mutate: func(c *Candidate) { c.Route.ProviderModel = "different-model" }, wantError: ErrNoRouteAvailable, wantReason: SkipReasonUnsupportedModelRewritePolicy},
  131: 		{name: "provider model allowed accepted", mutate: func(c *Candidate) {
  132: 			c.Route.ModelRewritePolicy = domain.ModelRewritePolicyProviderModel
  133: 			c.Route.ProviderModel = "provider-model"
  134: 			c.ModelIdentifierRewriteAllowed = true
  135: 		}},
  136: 		{name: "provider model empty skipped", mutate: func(c *Candidate) {
  137: 			c.Route.ModelRewritePolicy = domain.ModelRewritePolicyProviderModel
  138: 			c.Route.ProviderModel = " "
  139: 		}, wantError: ErrNoRouteAvailable, wantReason: SkipReasonUnsupportedModelRewritePolicy},
  140: 		{name: "provider model adapter unsupported skipped", mutate: func(c *Candidate) {
  141: 			c.Route.ModelRewritePolicy = domain.ModelRewritePolicyProviderModel
  142: 			c.Route.ProviderModel = "provider-model"
  143: 			c.ModelIdentifierRewriteAllowed = false
  144: 		}, wantError: ErrNoRouteAvailable, wantReason: SkipReasonUnsupportedModelRewritePolicy},
  145: 		{name: "unknown policy skipped", mutate: func(c *Candidate) { c.Route.ModelRewritePolicy = domain.ModelRewritePolicy("unknown_policy") }, wantError: ErrNoRouteAvailable, wantReason: SkipReasonUnsupportedModelRewritePolicy},
  146: 	}
  147: 	for _, tt := range tests {
  148: 		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
  149: 			candidate := baseCandidate("route-rewrite")
  150: 			originalClientModel := candidate.Route.ClientModel
  151: 			originalProviderModel := candidate.Route.ProviderModel
  152: 			tt.mutate(&candidate)
  153: 			mutatedClientModel := candidate.Route.ClientModel
  154: 			mutatedProviderModel := candidate.Route.ProviderModel
  155: 			result, err := Select(baseInput(now, domain.CapabilitySet{}, []Candidate{candidate}))
  156: 			if tt.wantError != nil {
  157: 				if !errors.Is(err, tt.wantError) {
  158: 					t.Fatalf("error = %v, want %v", err, tt.wantError)
  159: 				}
  160: 				assertSkippedReasons(t, result.Skipped, []SkipReason{tt.wantReason})
  161: 			} else if err != nil {
  162: 				t.Fatalf("Select returned error: %v", err)
  163: 			}
  164: 			if candidate.Route.ClientModel != mutatedClientModel || candidate.Route.ProviderModel != mutatedProviderModel {
  165: 				t.Fatalf("candidate model fields mutated from %q/%q to %q/%q", mutatedClientModel, mutatedProviderModel, candidate.Route.ClientModel, candidate.Route.ProviderModel)
  166: 			}
  167: 			if tt.name == "none equal accepted" && (candidate.Route.ClientModel != originalClientModel || candidate.Route.ProviderModel != originalProviderModel) {
  168: 				t.Fatalf("baseline model fields mutated")
  169: 			}
  170: 		})
  171: 	}
  172: 
  173: 	wrongFamily := baseCandidate("route-wrong-family")
  174: 	wrongFamily.Route.APIFamily = domain.APIFamily("other_family")
  175: 	wrongFamily.Route.ModelRewritePolicy = domain.ModelRewritePolicyProviderModel
  176: 	wrongFamily.Route.ProviderModel = "provider-model"
  177: 	wrongFamily.ModelIdentifierRewriteAllowed = true
  178: 	exact := baseCandidate("route-exact")
  179: 	result, err := Select(baseInput(now, domain.CapabilitySet{}, []Candidate{wrongFamily, exact}))
  180: 	if err != nil {
  181: 		t.Fatalf("Select returned error: %v", err)
  182: 	}
  183: 	if result.Selected.Route.ID != "route-exact" {
  184: 		t.Fatalf("selected = %q, want route-exact", result.Selected.Route.ID)
  185: 	}
  186: }
  187: 
  188: func TestDeterministicOrderingAndInputImmutability(t *testing.T) {
  189: 	now := fixedNow()
  190: 	routeA := baseCandidate("route-a")
  191: 	routeA.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents = 10
  192: 	routeA.Route.Priority = 2
  193: 	routeB := baseCandidate("route-b")
  194: 	routeB.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents = 5
  195: 	routeB.Route.Priority = 9
  196: 	routeC := baseCandidate("route-c")
  197: 	routeC.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents = 10
  198: 	routeC.Route.Priority = 1
  199: 	routeD := baseCandidate("route-d")
  200: 	routeD.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents = 10
  201: 	routeD.Route.Priority = 1
  202: 
  203: 	candidates := []Candidate{routeA, routeD, routeC, routeB}
  204: 	before := cloneCandidates(candidates)
  205: 	result, err := Select(baseInput(now, domain.CapabilitySet{}, candidates))
  206: 	if err != nil {
  207: 		t.Fatalf("Select returned error: %v", err)
  208: 	}
  209: 	if result.Selected.Route.ID != "route-b" {
  210: 		t.Fatalf("selected = %q, want lower cost route-b", result.Selected.Route.ID)
  211: 	}
  212: 	wantFallbacks := []string{"route-c", "route-d", "route-a"}
  213: 	if got := routeIDs(result.Fallbacks); !slices.Equal(got, wantFallbacks) {
  214: 		t.Fatalf("fallbacks = %v, want %v", got, wantFallbacks)
  215: 	}
  216: 	if !reflect.DeepEqual(candidates, before) {
  217: 		t.Fatalf("input candidates mutated")
  218: 	}
  219: 
  220: 	permuted := []Candidate{routeD, routeC, routeA, routeB}
  221: 	result, err = Select(baseInput(now, domain.CapabilitySet{}, permuted))
  222: 	if err != nil {
  223: 		t.Fatalf("Select returned error for permuted input: %v", err)
  224: 	}
  225: 	if result.Selected.Route.ID != "route-b" || !slices.Equal(routeIDs(result.Fallbacks), wantFallbacks) {
  226: 		t.Fatalf("permuted result selected=%q fallbacks=%v", result.Selected.Route.ID, routeIDs(result.Fallbacks))
  227: 	}
  228: }
  229: 
  230: func TestDuplicateRouteIDRejected(t *testing.T) {
  231: 	candidateA := baseCandidate("route-duplicate")
  232: 	candidateB := baseCandidate("route-duplicate")
  233: 	candidateB.Reseller.ID = "reseller-b"
  234: 	candidateB.Route.ResellerID = "reseller-b"
  235: 
  236: 	_, err := Select(baseInput(fixedNow(), domain.CapabilitySet{}, []Candidate{candidateA, candidateB}))
  237: 	if !errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidRouteData) {
  238: 		t.Fatalf("error = %v, want ErrInvalidRouteData", err)
  239: 	}
  240: }
  241: 
  242: func TestErrorClassificationAndSafety(t *testing.T) {
  243: 	now := fixedNow()
  244: 
  245: 	_, err := Select(baseInput(now, domain.CapabilitySet{}, nil))
  246: 	if !errors.Is(err, ErrUnknownModel) {
  247: 		t.Fatalf("error = %v, want ErrUnknownModel", err)
  248: 	}
  249: 
  250: 	missingCap := baseCandidate("route-missing-cap")
  251: 	missingCap.Route.Capabilities = domain.CapabilitySet{}
  252: 	_, err = Select(baseInput(now, domain.CapabilitySet{Reasoning: true}, []Candidate{missingCap}))
  253: 	if !errors.Is(err, ErrUnsupportedCapability) {
  254: 		t.Fatalf("error = %v, want ErrUnsupportedCapability", err)
  255: 	}
  256: 
  257: 	unavailable := baseCandidate("route-unavailable")
  258: 	unavailable.SecretAvailable = false
  259: 	_, err = Select(baseInput(now, domain.CapabilitySet{}, []Candidate{unavailable}))
  260: 	if !errors.Is(err, ErrNoRouteAvailable) {
  261: 		t.Fatalf("error = %v, want ErrNoRouteAvailable", err)
  262: 	}
  263: 
  264: 	badRelation := baseCandidate("route-bad-relation")
  265: 	badRelation.Route.ResellerID = "different-reseller"
  266: 	_, err = Select(baseInput(now, domain.CapabilitySet{}, []Candidate{badRelation}))
  267: 	if !errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidRouteData) {
  268: 		t.Fatalf("error = %v, want ErrInvalidRouteData", err)
  269: 	}
  270: 
  271: 	badProviderType := baseCandidate("route-bad-provider-type")
  272: 	badProviderType.Route.ProviderType = domain.ProviderType("different-provider")
  273: 	_, err = Select(baseInput(now, domain.CapabilitySet{}, []Candidate{badProviderType}))
  274: 	if !errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidRouteData) {
  275: 		t.Fatalf("error = %v, want ErrInvalidRouteData", err)
  276: 	}
  277: 
  278: 	for _, sentinel := range []error{ErrInvalidSelectionInput, ErrUnknownModel, ErrUnsupportedCapability, ErrNoRouteAvailable, ErrInvalidRouteData} {
  279: 		if !errors.Is(fmt.Errorf("wrapped: %w", sentinel), sentinel) {
  280: 			t.Fatalf("errors.Is failed for %v", sentinel)
  281: 		}
  282: 	}
  283: 
  284: 	secretLike := "sk-live-secret-value"
  285: 	secretCandidate := baseCandidate("route-secret-safe")
  286: 	secretCandidate.Reseller.APIKeyEnv = secretLike
  287: 	secretCandidate.SecretAvailable = false
  288: 	result, err := Select(baseInput(now, domain.CapabilitySet{}, []Candidate{secretCandidate}))
  289: 	if !errors.Is(err, ErrNoRouteAvailable) {
  290: 		t.Fatalf("error = %v, want ErrNoRouteAvailable", err)
  291: 	}
  292: 	if strings.Contains(fmt.Sprint(err), secretLike) || strings.Contains(fmt.Sprintf("%#v", result.Skipped), secretLike) || strings.Contains(fmt.Sprintf("%#v", result), secretLike) {
  293: 		t.Fatalf("secret-like value leaked through error or diagnostics")
  294: 	}
  295: 	if strings.Contains(fmt.Sprint(err), "100") {
  296: 		t.Fatalf("balance-like value leaked through error")
  297: 	}
  298: }
  299: 
  300: func TestSecretSafetyTypeShapes(t *testing.T) {
  301: 	assertNoFields(t, reflect.TypeOf(Candidate{}), []string{"ResellerAPIKey", "RawAPIKey", "Authorization", "BillingJWT", "ServiceToken", "SecretValue"})
  302: 	assertNoFields(t, reflect.TypeOf(SelectionResult{}), []string{"ResellerAPIKey", "RawAPIKey", "Authorization", "BillingJWT", "ServiceToken", "SecretValue"})
  303: 	assertNoFields(t, reflect.TypeOf(SkippedRoute{}), []string{"APIKeyEnv", "BalanceCents", "ReservedCents", "MinimumBalanceCents", "Authorization"})
  304: }
  305: 
  306: func baseInput(now time.Time, requested domain.CapabilitySet, candidates []Candidate) SelectionInput {
  307: 	return SelectionInput{
  308: 		Query: ports.RouteQuery{
  309: 			APIFamily:    domain.APIFamily("family_a"),
  310: 			EndpointKind: domain.EndpointKind("kind_a"),
  311: 			ClientModel:  "client-model",
  312: 		},
  313: 		RequestedCapabilities: requested,
  314: 		Candidates:            candidates,
  315: 		Now:                   now,
  316: 	}
  317: }
  318: 
  319: func baseCandidate(routeID string) Candidate {
  320: 	return Candidate{
  321: 		Route: domain.Route{
  322: 			ID:                 routeID,
  323: 			ResellerID:         "reseller-a",
  324: 			ProviderType:       domain.ProviderType("provider-a"),
  325: 			APIFamily:          domain.APIFamily("family_a"),
  326: 			EndpointKind:       domain.EndpointKind("kind_a"),
  327: 			ClientModel:        "client-model",
  328: 			ProviderModel:      "client-model",
  329: 			ModelRewritePolicy: domain.ModelRewritePolicyNone,
  330: 			Enabled:            true,
  331: 			Priority:           10,
  332: 			Capabilities:       domain.CapabilitySet{Chat: true},
  333: 		},
  334: 		Reseller: domain.Reseller{
  335: 			ID:                  "reseller-a",
  336: 			ProviderType:        domain.ProviderType("provider-a"),
  337: 			APIKeyEnv:           "ROUTE_SECRET_ENV",
  338: 			Enabled:             true,
  339: 			BalanceCents:        100,
  340: 			ReservedCents:       0,
  341: 			MinimumBalanceCents: 0,
  342: 		},
  343: 		ForwardingAdapterAvailable:    true,
  344: 		SecretAvailable:               true,
  345: 		CostAvailable:                 true,
  346: 		EstimatedUpstreamCostCents:    50,
  347: 		RateLimitAllowed:              true,
  348: 		ConcurrencyAllowed:            true,
  349: 		ModelIdentifierRewriteAllowed: false,
  350: 	}
  351: }
  352: 
  353: func withClientModel(candidate Candidate, model string) Candidate {
  354: 	candidate.Route.ClientModel = model
  355: 	candidate.Route.ProviderModel = model
  356: 	return candidate
  357: }
  358: 
  359: func fixedNow() time.Time {
  360: 	return time.Date(2026, 6, 12, 10, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC)
  361: }
  362: 
  363: func routeIDs(candidates []Candidate) []string {
  364: 	ids := make([]string, len(candidates))
  365: 	for i, candidate := range candidates {
  366: 		ids[i] = candidate.Route.ID
  367: 	}
  368: 	return ids
  369: }
  370: 
  371: func cloneCandidates(candidates []Candidate) []Candidate {
  372: 	clone := make([]Candidate, len(candidates))
  373: 	copy(clone, candidates)
  374: 	return clone
  375: }
  376: 
  377: func assertSkippedReasons(t *testing.T, skipped []SkippedRoute, want []SkipReason) {
  378: 	t.Helper()
  379: 	if len(skipped) != len(want) {
  380: 		t.Fatalf("skipped len = %d, want %d: %#v", len(skipped), len(want), skipped)
  381: 	}
  382: 	for i := range want {
  383: 		if skipped[i].Reason != want[i] {
  384: 			t.Fatalf("skipped[%d].Reason = %q, want %q", i, skipped[i].Reason, want[i])
  385: 		}
  386: 	}
  387: }
  388: 
  389: func assertNoFields(t *testing.T, typ reflect.Type, forbidden []string) {
  390: 	t.Helper()
  391: 	for _, field := range forbidden {
  392: 		if _, ok := typ.FieldByName(field); ok {
  393: 			t.Fatalf("%s must not contain field %s", typ.Name(), field)
  394: 		}
  395: 	}
  396: }

   12: func TestStage10MajorSelectRejectsOverflowedResellerAvailableBalance(t *testing.T) {
   13: 	candidate := Candidate{
   14: 		Route: domain.Route{
   15: 			ID:                 "route_a",
   16: 			ResellerID:         "reseller_a",
   17: 			ProviderType:       domain.ProviderOpenAI,
   18: 			APIFamily:          domain.APIFamilyOpenAICompatible,
   19: 			EndpointKind:       domain.EndpointChat,
   20: 			ClientModel:        "model-a",
   21: 			ProviderModel:      "model-a",
   22: 			ModelRewritePolicy: domain.ModelRewritePolicyNone,
   23: 			Enabled:            true,
   24: 			Capabilities:       domain.CapabilitySet{Chat: true},
   25: 		},
   26: 		Reseller: domain.Reseller{
   27: 			ID:                  "reseller_a",
   28: 			ProviderType:        domain.ProviderOpenAI,
   29: 			Enabled:             true,
   30: 			BalanceCents:        math.MinInt64,
   31: 			ReservedCents:       1,
   32: 			MinimumBalanceCents: 0,
   33: 		},
   34: 		ForwardingAdapterAvailable:    true,
   35: 		SecretAvailable:               true,
   36: 		CostAvailable:                 true,
   37: 		EstimatedUpstreamCostCents:    1,
   38: 		RateLimitAllowed:              true,
   39: 		ConcurrencyAllowed:            true,
   40: 		ModelIdentifierRewriteAllowed: true,
   41: 	}
   42: 	result, err := Select(SelectionInput{
   43: 		Query: ports.RouteQuery{
   44: 			APIFamily:    domain.APIFamilyOpenAICompatible,
   45: 			EndpointKind: domain.EndpointChat,
   46: 			ClientModel:  "model-a",
   47: 		},
   48: 		RequestedCapabilities: domain.CapabilitySet{Chat: true},
   49: 		Candidates:            []Candidate{candidate},
   50: 		Now:                   time.Unix(100, 0).UTC(),
   51: 	})
   52: 	if err != ErrNoRouteAvailable {
   53: 		t.Fatalf("error = %v", err)
   54: 	}
   55: 	if len(result.Skipped) != 1 || result.Skipped[0].Reason != SkipReasonInvalidResellerBalance {
   56: 		t.Fatalf("skipped = %+v", result.Skipped)
   57: 	}
   58: }

   56: 	CooldownQuotaExceeded time.Duration
   57: 	Cooldown5XX           time.Duration
   58: 	CooldownTimeout       time.Duration
   59: 	CooldownAuthError     time.Duration
   60: 
   61: 	UpstreamTimeout     time.Duration
   62: 	UpstreamMaxAttempts int
   63: 	UpstreamMaxBackoff  time.Duration
   64: 
   65: 	RateLimitMaxWait time.Duration
   66: 
   67: 	HTTPReadHeaderTimeout time.Duration
   68: 	HTTPReadTimeout       time.Duration
   69: 	HTTPWriteTimeout      time.Duration
   70: 	HTTPIdleTimeout       time.Duration
   71: 	HTTPShutdownTimeout   time.Duration
   72: 
   73: 	LogLevel  string
   74: 	LogFormat string
   75: 	LogBodies bool
   76: }
   77: 
   78: func Load() (Config, error) {
   79: 	l := envLoader{}
   80: 
   81: 	cfg := Config{
   82: 		Environment: env("TOKENIO_ENV", "production"),
   83: 
   84: 		GatewayAddr: env("TOKENIO_GATEWAY_ADDR", ":8880"),
   85: 		DatabaseDSN: l.required("TOKENIO_DATABASE_DSN"),
   86: 
   87: 		BillingBaseURL:       l.requiredAbsoluteURL("TOKENIO_BILLING_BASE_URL"),
   88: 		BillingServiceToken:  l.required("TOKENIO_BILLING_SERVICE_TOKEN"),
   89: 		BillingJWTSigningKey: l.required("TOKENIO_BILLING_JWT_SIGNING_KEY"),
   90: 		BillingJWTTTL:        l.duration("TOKENIO_BILLING_JWT_TTL", 15*time.Minute),
   91: 		BillingTimeout:       l.duration("TOKENIO_BILLING_TIMEOUT", 30*time.Second),
   92: 
   93: 		AdminToken:            l.required("TOKENIO_ADMIN_TOKEN"),
   94: 		APIKeyHashSecret:      l.required("TOKENIO_API_KEY_HASH_SECRET"),
   95: 		APIKeyLastUsedTimeout: l.duration("TOKENIO_API_KEY_LAST_USED_TIMEOUT", 250*time.Millisecond),
   96: 
   97: 		ProvisioningServiceToken:        env("TOKENIO_PROVISIONING_SERVICE_TOKEN", ""),
   98: 		APIKeyProvisioningEncryptionKey: l.optionalBase64Bytes("TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_ENCRYPTION_KEY", 32),
   99: 		APIKeyProvisioningKeyVersion:    env("TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_KEY_VERSION", "v1"),
  100: 		APIKeyProvisioningTTL:           l.duration("TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_TTL", 24*time.Hour),
  101: 		APIKeyProvisioningExpirationInterval: l.duration(
  102: 			"TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_EXPIRATION_INTERVAL",
  103: 			time.Minute,
  104: 		),
  105: 		APIKeyProvisioningExpirationBatchSize: l.int(
  106: 			"TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_EXPIRATION_BATCH_SIZE",
  107: 			100,
  108: 		),
  109: 
  110: 		ForwardingAttemptRecoveryStaleAfter: l.duration(
  111: 			"TOKENIO_FORWARDING_ATTEMPT_RECOVERY_STALE_AFTER",
  112: 			5*time.Minute,
  113: 		),
  114: 		ForwardingAttemptRecoveryInterval: l.duration(
  115: 			"TOKENIO_FORWARDING_ATTEMPT_RECOVERY_INTERVAL",
  116: 			time.Minute,
  117: 		),
  118: 		ForwardingAttemptRecoveryBatchSize: l.int(
  119: 			"TOKENIO_FORWARDING_ATTEMPT_RECOVERY_BATCH_SIZE",
  120: 			100,
  121: 		),
  122: 
  123: 		CostCurrency:                env("TOKENIO_COST_CURRENCY", "RUB"),
  124: 		AutoChargeThresholdCents:    l.int64("TOKENIO_AUTO_CHARGE_THRESHOLD_CENTS", 1000),
  125: 		MinChargeAmountCents:        l.int64("TOKENIO_MIN_CHARGE_AMOUNT_CENTS", 100),
  126: 		MinRequestBalanceCents:      l.int64("TOKENIO_MIN_REQUEST_BALANCE_CENTS", 500),
  127: 		TokenEstimationSafetyFactor: l.float64("TOKENIO_TOKEN_ESTIMATION_SAFETY_FACTOR", 1.25),
  128: 		CostEstimationSafetyFactor:  l.float64("TOKENIO_COST_ESTIMATION_SAFETY_FACTOR", 1.10),
  129: 		RequestBodyMaxBytes: l.int64(
  130: 			"TOKENIO_REQUEST_BODY_MAX_BYTES",
  131: 			64<<20,
  132: 		),
  133: 		UpstreamResponseBodyMaxBytes: l.int64(
  134: 			"TOKENIO_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE_BODY_MAX_BYTES",
  135: 			64<<20,
  136: 		),
  137: 
  138: 		TelegramBotToken:          env("TOKENIO_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN", ""),
  139: 		TelegramChatID:            env("TOKENIO_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID", ""),
  140: 		TelegramAlertDedupePeriod: l.duration("TOKENIO_TELEGRAM_ALERT_DEDUPE_INTERVAL", time.Hour),
  141: 		ResellerBalanceAlertCents: l.int64("TOKENIO_RESELLER_BALANCE_ALERT_CENTS", 10000),
  142: 
  143: 		CooldownRateLimit:     l.duration("TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_RATE_LIMIT", time.Minute),
  144: 		CooldownQuotaExceeded: l.duration("TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_QUOTA_EXCEEDED", 24*time.Hour),
  145: 		Cooldown5XX:           l.duration("TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_5XX", 30*time.Second),
  146: 		CooldownTimeout:       l.duration("TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_TIMEOUT", 30*time.Second),
  147: 		CooldownAuthError:     l.duration("TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_AUTH_ERROR", 24*time.Hour),
  148: 
  149: 		UpstreamTimeout:     l.duration("TOKENIO_UPSTREAM_TIMEOUT", 90*time.Second),
  150: 		UpstreamMaxAttempts: l.int("TOKENIO_UPSTREAM_MAX_ATTEMPTS", 3),
  151: 		UpstreamMaxBackoff:  l.duration("TOKENIO_UPSTREAM_MAX_BACKOFF", 2*time.Second),
  152: 
  153: 		RateLimitMaxWait: l.duration("TOKENIO_RATE_LIMIT_MAX_WAIT", 5*time.Second),
  154: 
  155: 		HTTPReadHeaderTimeout: l.duration("TOKENIO_HTTP_READ_HEADER_TIMEOUT", 10*time.Second),
  156: 		HTTPReadTimeout:       l.duration("TOKENIO_HTTP_READ_TIMEOUT", 120*time.Second),
  157: 		HTTPWriteTimeout:      l.duration("TOKENIO_HTTP_WRITE_TIMEOUT", 120*time.Second),
  158: 		HTTPIdleTimeout:       l.duration("TOKENIO_HTTP_IDLE_TIMEOUT", 60*time.Second),
  159: 		HTTPShutdownTimeout:   l.duration("TOKENIO_HTTP_SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT", 30*time.Second),
  160: 
  161: 		LogLevel:  env("TOKENIO_LOG_LEVEL", "info"),
  162: 		LogFormat: env("TOKENIO_LOG_FORMAT", "text"),
  163: 		LogBodies: l.bool("TOKENIO_LOG_BODIES", false),
  164: 	}
  165: 
  166: 	if len(l.errs) > 0 {
  167: 		return Config{}, fmt.Errorf("invalid config: %s", strings.Join(l.errs, "; "))
  168: 	}
  169: 	if err := validate(cfg); err != nil {
  170: 		return Config{}, err
  171: 	}
  172: 	return cfg, nil
  173: }
  174: 
  175: func validate(cfg Config) error {
  176: 	if !oneOf(cfg.Environment, "production", "development", "test") {
  177: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_ENV must be one of production, development, test")
  178: 	}
  179: 	if strings.TrimSpace(cfg.GatewayAddr) == "" {
  180: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_GATEWAY_ADDR must be non-empty")
  181: 	}
  182: 	if cfg.CostCurrency != "RUB" {
  183: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_COST_CURRENCY must be RUB")
  184: 	}
  185: 	if cfg.AutoChargeThresholdCents <= 0 {
  186: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_AUTO_CHARGE_THRESHOLD_CENTS must be positive")
  187: 	}
  188: 	if cfg.MinChargeAmountCents < 0 {
  189: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_MIN_CHARGE_AMOUNT_CENTS must be non-negative")
  190: 	}
  191: 	if cfg.MinRequestBalanceCents < 0 {
  192: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_MIN_REQUEST_BALANCE_CENTS must be non-negative")
  193: 	}
  194: 	if cfg.TokenEstimationSafetyFactor < 1 {
  195: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_TOKEN_ESTIMATION_SAFETY_FACTOR must be >= 1")
  196: 	}
  197: 	if cfg.CostEstimationSafetyFactor < 1 {
  198: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_COST_ESTIMATION_SAFETY_FACTOR must be >= 1")
  199: 	}
  200: 	if cfg.RequestBodyMaxBytes <= 0 {
  201: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_REQUEST_BODY_MAX_BYTES must be positive")
  202: 	}
  203: 	if cfg.UpstreamResponseBodyMaxBytes <= 0 {
  204: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  205: 			"TOKENIO_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE_BODY_MAX_BYTES must be positive",
  206: 		)
  207: 	}
  208: 	if cfg.BillingJWTTTL <= 0 {
  209: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_BILLING_JWT_TTL must be positive")
  210: 	}
  211: 	if cfg.BillingTimeout <= 0 {
  212: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_BILLING_TIMEOUT must be positive")
  213: 	}
  214: 	if cfg.UpstreamTimeout <= 0 {
  215: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_UPSTREAM_TIMEOUT must be positive")
  216: 	}
  217: 	if cfg.UpstreamMaxAttempts < 1 {
  218: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_UPSTREAM_MAX_ATTEMPTS must be >= 1")
  219: 	}
  220: 	if cfg.UpstreamMaxBackoff <= 0 {
  221: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_UPSTREAM_MAX_BACKOFF must be positive")
  222: 	}
  223: 	if cfg.RateLimitMaxWait <= 0 {
  224: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_RATE_LIMIT_MAX_WAIT must be positive")
  225: 	}
  226: 	if cfg.CooldownRateLimit <= 0 {
  227: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_RATE_LIMIT must be positive")
  228: 	}
  229: 	if cfg.CooldownQuotaExceeded <= 0 {
  230: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_QUOTA_EXCEEDED must be positive")
  231: 	}
  232: 	if cfg.Cooldown5XX <= 0 {
  233: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_5XX must be positive")
  234: 	}
  235: 	if cfg.CooldownTimeout <= 0 {
  236: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_TIMEOUT must be positive")
  237: 	}
  238: 	if cfg.CooldownAuthError <= 0 {
  239: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_ROUTE_COOLDOWN_AUTH_ERROR must be positive")
  240: 	}
  241: 	if cfg.TelegramAlertDedupePeriod <= 0 {
  242: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_TELEGRAM_ALERT_DEDUPE_INTERVAL must be positive")
  243: 	}
  244: 	if cfg.ResellerBalanceAlertCents < 0 {
  245: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_RESELLER_BALANCE_ALERT_CENTS must be non-negative")
  246: 	}
  247: 	if (cfg.TelegramBotToken == "") != (cfg.TelegramChatID == "") {
  248: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TOKENIO_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID must be set together")
  249: 	}
  250: 	if cfg.HTTPReadHeaderTimeout <= 0 {
  251: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_HTTP_READ_HEADER_TIMEOUT must be positive")
  252: 	}
  253: 	if cfg.HTTPReadTimeout <= 0 {
  254: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_HTTP_READ_TIMEOUT must be positive")
  255: 	}
  256: 	if cfg.HTTPWriteTimeout <= 0 {
  257: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_HTTP_WRITE_TIMEOUT must be positive")
  258: 	}
  259: 	if cfg.HTTPIdleTimeout <= 0 {
  260: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_HTTP_IDLE_TIMEOUT must be positive")
  261: 	}
  262: 	if cfg.HTTPShutdownTimeout <= 0 {
  263: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_HTTP_SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT must be positive")
  264: 	}
  265: 	if !oneOf(cfg.LogLevel, "debug", "info", "warn", "error") {
  266: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_LOG_LEVEL must be one of debug, info, warn, error")
  267: 	}
  268: 	if !oneOf(cfg.LogFormat, "text", "json") {
  269: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_LOG_FORMAT must be text or json")
  270: 	}
  271: 	if strings.TrimSpace(cfg.APIKeyHashSecret) == "" {
  272: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_API_KEY_HASH_SECRET is required")
  273: 	}
  274: 	if cfg.APIKeyLastUsedTimeout <= 0 {
  275: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_API_KEY_LAST_USED_TIMEOUT must be positive")
  276: 	}
  277: 	if strings.TrimSpace(cfg.APIKeyProvisioningKeyVersion) == "" {
  278: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_KEY_VERSION must be non-empty")
  279: 	}
  280: 	if cfg.APIKeyProvisioningTTL <= 0 {
  281: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_TTL must be positive")
  282: 	}
  283: 	if cfg.APIKeyProvisioningExpirationInterval <= 0 {
  284: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  285: 			"TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_EXPIRATION_INTERVAL must be positive",
  286: 		)
  287: 	}
  288: 	if cfg.APIKeyProvisioningExpirationBatchSize < 1 {
  289: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  290: 			"TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_EXPIRATION_BATCH_SIZE must be >= 1",
  291: 		)
  292: 	}
  293: 	if cfg.ForwardingAttemptRecoveryStaleAfter <= 0 {
  294: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  295: 			"TOKENIO_FORWARDING_ATTEMPT_RECOVERY_STALE_AFTER must be positive",
  296: 		)
  297: 	}
  298: 	if cfg.ForwardingAttemptRecoveryInterval <= 0 {
  299: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  300: 			"TOKENIO_FORWARDING_ATTEMPT_RECOVERY_INTERVAL must be positive",
  301: 		)
  302: 	}
  303: 	if cfg.ForwardingAttemptRecoveryBatchSize < 1 {
  304: 		return fmt.Errorf(
  305: 			"TOKENIO_FORWARDING_ATTEMPT_RECOVERY_BATCH_SIZE must be >= 1",
  306: 		)
  307: 	}
  308: 	if keyLength := len(cfg.APIKeyProvisioningEncryptionKey); keyLength != 0 && keyLength != 32 {
  309: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_ENCRYPTION_KEY must decode to exactly 32 bytes")
  310: 	}
  311: 	if len(cfg.APIKeyProvisioningEncryptionKey) > 0 &&
  312: 		bytes.Equal(cfg.APIKeyProvisioningEncryptionKey, []byte(cfg.APIKeyHashSecret)) {
  313: 		return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_ENCRYPTION_KEY and TOKENIO_API_KEY_HASH_SECRET must use different key material")
  314: 	}
  315: 	if cfg.Environment == "production" {
  316: 		if strings.TrimSpace(cfg.ProvisioningServiceToken) == "" {
  317: 			return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_PROVISIONING_SERVICE_TOKEN is required in production")
  318: 		}
  319: 		if len(cfg.APIKeyProvisioningEncryptionKey) == 0 {
  320: 			return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_API_KEY_PROVISIONING_ENCRYPTION_KEY is required in production")
  321: 		}
  322: 		if len(cfg.AdminToken) < 32 {
  323: 			return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_ADMIN_TOKEN must be at least 32 characters in production")
  324: 		}
  325: 		if cfg.LogBodies {
  326: 			return fmt.Errorf("TOKENIO_LOG_BODIES=true is forbidden in production")
  327: 		}
  328: 	}
  329: 	return nil
  330: }
  331: 
  332: type envLoader struct {
  333: 	errs []string
  334: }
  335: 
  336: func (l *envLoader) required(key string) string {
  337: 	value := env(key, "")
  338: 	if value == "" {
  339: 		l.errs = append(l.errs, fmt.Sprintf("%s is required", key))
  340: 	}
  341: 	return value
  342: }
  343: 
  344: func (l *envLoader) requiredAbsoluteURL(key string) string {
  345: 	rawValue, ok := os.LookupEnv(key)
  346: 	if !ok || strings.TrimSpace(rawValue) == "" {
  347: 		l.errs = append(l.errs, fmt.Sprintf("%s is required", key))
  348: 		return ""
  349: 	}
  350: 
  351: 	value := strings.TrimSpace(rawValue)
  352: 	if value != rawValue {
  353: 		l.errs = append(l.errs, fmt.Sprintf("%s must not contain leading or trailing whitespace", key))
  354: 	}
  355: 
  356: 	parsed, err := url.Parse(value)
  357: 	if err != nil || !parsed.IsAbs() || parsed.Host == "" {
  358: 		l.errs = append(l.errs, fmt.Sprintf("%s must be a valid absolute URL", key))
  359: 	}
  360: 	return value
  361: }
  362: 
  363: func (l *envLoader) optionalBase64Bytes(key string, expectedLength int) []byte {
  364: 	value := env(key, "")
  365: 	if value == "" {
  366: 		return nil
  367: 	}
  368: 
  369: 	decoded, err := base64.StdEncoding.Strict().DecodeString(value)
  370: 	if err != nil {
  371: 		l.errs = append(l.errs, fmt.Sprintf("%s must be valid base64", key))
  372: 		return nil
  373: 	}
  374: 	if len(decoded) != expectedLength {
  375: 		l.errs = append(
  376: 			l.errs,
  377: 			fmt.Sprintf("%s must decode to exactly %d bytes", key, expectedLength),
  378: 		)
  379: 		return nil
  380: 	}
  381: 	return decoded
  382: }
  383: 
  384: func (l *envLoader) int(key string, fallback int) int {
  385: 	value := env(key, "")
  386: 	if value == "" {
  387: 		return fallback
  388: 	}
  389: 	parsed, err := strconv.Atoi(value)
  390: 	if err != nil {
  391: 		l.errs = append(l.errs, fmt.Sprintf("%s must be int: %v", key, err))
  392: 		return fallback
  393: 	}
  394: 	return parsed
  395: }
  396: 
  397: func (l *envLoader) int64(key string, fallback int64) int64 {
  398: 	value := env(key, "")
  399: 	if value == "" {
  400: 		return fallback
  401: 	}
  402: 	parsed, err := strconv.ParseInt(value, 10, 64)
  403: 	if err != nil {
  404: 		l.errs = append(l.errs, fmt.Sprintf("%s must be int64: %v", key, err))
  405: 		return fallback
  406: 	}
  407: 	return parsed
  408: }
  409: 
  410: func (l *envLoader) float64(key string, fallback float64) float64 {
  411: 	value := env(key, "")
  412: 	if value == "" {
  413: 		return fallback
  414: 	}
  415: 	parsed, err := strconv.ParseFloat(value, 64)
  416: 	if err != nil {
  417: 		l.errs = append(l.errs, fmt.Sprintf("%s must be float64: %v", key, err))
  418: 		return fallback
  419: 	}
  420: 	return parsed
  421: }
  422: 
  423: func (l *envLoader) duration(key string, fallback time.Duration) time.Duration {
  424: 	value := env(key, "")
  425: 	if value == "" {
  426: 		return fallback
  427: 	}
  428: 	parsed, err := time.ParseDuration(value)
  429: 	if err != nil {
  430: 		l.errs = append(l.errs, fmt.Sprintf("%s must be duration: %v", key, err))
  431: 		return fallback
  432: 	}
  433: 	return parsed
  434: }
  435: 
  436: func (l *envLoader) bool(key string, fallback bool) bool {
  437: 	value := env(key, "")
  438: 	if value == "" {
  439: 		return fallback
  440: 	}
  441: 	parsed, err := strconv.ParseBool(value)
  442: 	if err != nil {
  443: 		l.errs = append(l.errs, fmt.Sprintf("%s must be bool: %v", key, err))
  444: 		return fallback
  445: 	}
  446: 	return parsed
  447: }
  448: 
  449: func env(key string, fallback string) string {
  450: 	value := strings.TrimSpace(os.Getenv(key))
  451: 	if value == "" {
  452: 		return fallback
  453: 	}
  454: 	return value
  455: }
  456: 
  457: func oneOf(value string, allowed ...string) bool {
  458: 	for _, item := range allowed {
  459: 		if value == item {
  460: 			return true
  461: 		}
  462: 	}
  463: 	return false
  464: }

GIT_BLOB_SHA: 2abfa069e2b0c1c7f723d9a20491626393b5aaea
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: package domain
    2: 
    3: import "testing"
    4: 
    5: func TestAdminAuditActionsAreExactAndUnique(t *testing.T) {
    6: 	actions := []AuditAction{
    7: 		AuditActionUserCreate, AuditActionUserEnable, AuditActionUserDisable,
    8: 		AuditActionAPIKeyCreate, AuditActionAPIKeyRevoke,
    9: 		AuditActionResellerCreate, AuditActionResellerUpdate, AuditActionResellerEnable, AuditActionResellerDisable,
   10: 		AuditActionResellerBalanceAdjust, AuditActionResellerBalanceSet,
   11: 		AuditActionRouteCreate, AuditActionRouteUpdate, AuditActionRouteEnable, AuditActionRouteDisable,
   12: 		AuditActionRouteCooldownSet, AuditActionRouteCooldownClear, AuditActionRoutePriceUpsert,
   13: 		AuditActionUsageResolveBillable, AuditActionUsageResolveFailed, AuditActionUsageResolveCharged,
   14: 		AuditActionBillingChargeRetry,
   15: 	}
   16: 	expected := []string{
   17: 		"user.create", "user.enable", "user.disable", "api_key.create", "api_key.revoke",
   18: 		"reseller.create", "reseller.update", "reseller.enable", "reseller.disable",
   19: 		"reseller_balance.adjust", "reseller_balance.set", "route.create", "route.update",
   20: 		"route.enable", "route.disable", "route_cooldown.set", "route_cooldown.clear",
   21: 		"route_price.upsert", "usage.resolve_billable", "usage.resolve_failed",
   22: 		"usage.resolve_charged", "billing_charge.retry",
   23: 	}
   24: 	seen := map[AuditAction]bool{}
   25: 	for i, action := range actions {
   26: 		if string(action) != expected[i] {
   27: 			t.Fatalf("action[%d]=%q expected=%q", i, action, expected[i])
   28: 		}
   29: 		if seen[action] {
   30: 			t.Fatalf("duplicate action %q", action)
   31: 		}
   32: 		seen[action] = true
   33: 	}
   34: }

    9: func TestProviderTypeContractValues(t *testing.T) {
   10: 	values := map[string]ProviderType{
   11: 		"openai":     ProviderOpenAI,
   12: 		"openrouter": ProviderOpenRouter,
   13: 		"together":   ProviderTogether,

   18: 		"gemini":     ProviderGemini,
   19: 		"anthropic":  ProviderAnthropic,
   20: 		"hydra":      ProviderHydra,
   21: 	}
   22: 
   23: 	for want, got := range values {
   24: 		if string(got) != want {
   25: 			t.Fatalf("ProviderType value mismatch: got %q, want %q", got, want)
   26: 		}
   27: 	}
   28: }

  100: 		"reasoning",
  101: 	}
  102: 
  103: 	capabilitySetType := reflect.TypeOf(CapabilitySet{})

  105: 	for i := 0; i < capabilitySetType.NumField(); i++ {
  106: 		gotTags[capabilitySetType.Field(i).Tag.Get("json")] = true
  107: 	}
  108: 
  109: 	for _, tag := range wantTags {
  110: 		if !gotTags[tag] {
  111: 			t.Fatalf("CapabilitySet missing json contract field %q", tag)
  112: 		}
  113: 	}
  114: }

  221: 	fields := map[string]reflect.Type{

  223: 		"IdempotencyKey":             reflect.TypeOf(""),

  227: 		"EndpointKind":               reflect.TypeOf(EndpointKind("")),
  228: 		"ClientModel":                reflect.TypeOf(""),
  229: 		"BillingModel":               reflect.TypeOf(""),
  230: 		"SelectedRouteID":            reflect.TypeOf(""),
  231: 		"SelectedResellerID":         reflect.TypeOf(""),
  232: 		"ProviderType":               reflect.TypeOf(ProviderType("")),
  233: 		"ProviderModel":              reflect.TypeOf(""),
