FILE: internal/infrastructure/postgres/admin_usage_mapping.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: 2f76aa9d518324446f2ee94c7e1f5d7e94d99516
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: package postgres
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"time"
    5: 
    6: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/domain"
    7: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/ports"
    8: )
    9: 
   10: func canonicalAdminUsageRecord(
   11: 	value domain.UsageRecord,
   12: ) domain.UsageRecord {
   13: 	result := value
   14: 	result.CreatedAt = postgresAdminTime(value.CreatedAt)
   15: 	result.ReservedAt = canonicalAdminRouteTimePointer(
   16: 		value.ReservedAt,
   17: 	)
   18: 	result.ReleasedAt = canonicalAdminRouteTimePointer(
   19: 		value.ReleasedAt,
   20: 	)
   21: 	result.BillableAt = canonicalAdminRouteTimePointer(
   22: 		value.BillableAt,
   23: 	)
   24: 	result.ChargedAt = canonicalAdminRouteTimePointer(
   25: 		value.ChargedAt,
   26: 	)
   27: 	result.FailedAt = canonicalAdminRouteTimePointer(
   28: 		value.FailedAt,
   29: 	)
   30: 	result.UpdatedAt = postgresAdminTime(value.UpdatedAt)
   31: 	return result
   32: }
   33: 
   34: func adminUsageApplicationState(
   35: 	value domain.UsageRecord,
   36: ) domain.AuditState {
   37: 	return domain.AuditState{
   38: 		"local_request_id":           value.LocalRequestID,
   39: 		"user_id":                    value.UserID,
   40: 		"api_family":                 value.APIFamily,
   41: 		"endpoint_kind":              value.EndpointKind,
   42: 		"client_model":               value.ClientModel,
   43: 		"billing_model":              value.BillingModel,
   44: 		"selected_reseller_id":       value.SelectedResellerID,
   45: 		"selected_route_id":          value.SelectedRouteID,
   46: 		"provider_type":              value.ProviderType,
   47: 		"provider_model":             value.ProviderModel,
   48: 		"usage":                      value.Usage,
   49: 		"usage_completeness":         value.UsageCompleteness,
   50: 		"client_amount_cents":        value.ClientAmountCents,
   51: 		"charged_amount_cents":       value.ChargedAmountCents,
   52: 		"remaining_amount_cents":     value.RemainingAmountCents,
   53: 		"actual_upstream_cost_cents": value.ActualUpstreamCostCents,
   54: 		"currency":                   value.Currency,
   55: 		"status":                     value.Status,
   56: 		"failure_reason":             value.FailureReason,
   57: 		"billing_charge_request_id":  value.BillingChargeRequestID,
   58: 		"created_at":                 value.CreatedAt,
   59: 		"reserved_at":                value.ReservedAt,
   60: 		"released_at":                value.ReleasedAt,
   61: 		"billable_at":                value.BillableAt,
   62: 		"charged_at":                 value.ChargedAt,
   63: 		"failed_at":                  value.FailedAt,
   64: 		"updated_at":                 value.UpdatedAt,
   65: 	}
   66: }
   67: 
   68: func adminUsageState(value domain.UsageRecord) domain.AuditState {
   69: 	return adminUsageApplicationState(
   70: 		canonicalAdminUsageRecord(value),
   71: 	)
   72: }
   73: 
   74: func validateAdminUsageResolution(
   75: 	expected domain.UsageRecord,
   76: 	next domain.UsageRecord,
   77: 	action domain.AuditAction,
   78: ) error {
   79: 	if expected.Status != domain.UsageStatusPricingFailed ||
   80: 		expected.LocalRequestID != next.LocalRequestID ||
   81: 		!sameAdminUsageImmutable(expected, next) ||
   82: 		!isAdminUTCTime(next.UpdatedAt) ||
   83: 		!postgresAdminTime(next.UpdatedAt).After(
   84: 			postgresAdminTime(expected.UpdatedAt),
   85: 		) {
   86: 		return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
   87: 	}
   88: 
   89: 	switch action {
   90: 	case domain.AuditActionUsageResolveBillable:
   91: 		if next.Status != domain.UsageStatusBillable ||
   92: 			!validResolvedUsageCompleteness(
   93: 				next.UsageCompleteness,
   94: 			) ||
   95: 			next.BillingChargeRequestID != "" ||
   96: 			next.BillableAt == nil ||
   97: 			next.ChargedAt != nil ||
   98: 			next.FailedAt != nil ||
   99: 			next.FailureReason != "" ||
  100: 			next.ChargedAmountCents != 0 ||
  101: 			next.RemainingAmountCents !=
  102: 				next.ClientAmountCents {
  103: 			return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  104: 		}
  105: 	case domain.AuditActionUsageResolveFailed:
  106: 		if next.Status != domain.UsageStatusFailed ||
  107: 			next.FailureReason == "" ||
  108: 			next.BillingChargeRequestID != "" ||
  109: 			next.ClientAmountCents != 0 ||
  110: 			next.ChargedAmountCents != 0 ||
  111: 			next.RemainingAmountCents != 0 ||
  112: 			next.BillableAt != nil ||
  113: 			next.ChargedAt != nil ||
  114: 			next.FailedAt == nil {
  115: 			return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  116: 		}
  117: 	case domain.AuditActionUsageResolveCharged:
  118: 		if next.Status != domain.UsageStatusCharged ||
  119: 			!validResolvedUsageCompleteness(
  120: 				next.UsageCompleteness,
  121: 			) ||
  122: 			next.BillingChargeRequestID == "" ||
  123: 			next.ClientAmountCents < 0 ||
  124: 			next.ChargedAmountCents !=
  125: 				next.ClientAmountCents ||
  126: 			next.RemainingAmountCents != 0 ||
  127: 			next.BillableAt == nil ||
  128: 			next.ChargedAt == nil ||
  129: 			next.FailedAt != nil ||
  130: 			next.FailureReason != "" {
  131: 			return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  132: 		}
  133: 	default:
  134: 		return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  135: 	}
  136: 
  137: 	if !nonNegativeUsage(next.EstimatedUsage) ||
  138: 		!nonNegativeUsage(next.Usage) ||
  139: 		next.EstimatedClientAmountCents < 0 ||
  140: 		next.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents < 0 ||
  141: 		next.ClientAmountCents < 0 ||
  142: 		next.ChargedAmountCents < 0 ||
  143: 		next.RemainingAmountCents < 0 ||
  144: 		next.ActualUpstreamCostCents < 0 ||
  145: 		next.Currency != "RUB" ||
  146: 		!validUsageCompleteness(next.UsageCompleteness) {
  147: 		return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  148: 	}
  149: 	return nil
  150: }
  151: 
  152: func validResolvedUsageCompleteness(value string) bool {
  153: 	switch value {
  154: 	case "detailed", "aggregate", "estimated":
  155: 		return true
  156: 	default:
  157: 		return false
  158: 	}
  159: }
  160: 
  161: func sameAdminUsageImmutable(
  162: 	left domain.UsageRecord,
  163: 	right domain.UsageRecord,
  164: ) bool {
  165: 	return left.LocalRequestID == right.LocalRequestID &&
  166: 		left.IdempotencyKey == right.IdempotencyKey &&
  167: 		left.UserID == right.UserID &&
  168: 		left.APIKeyID == right.APIKeyID &&
  169: 		left.APIFamily == right.APIFamily &&
  170: 		left.EndpointKind == right.EndpointKind &&
  171: 		left.ClientModel == right.ClientModel &&
  172: 		left.BillingModel == right.BillingModel &&
  173: 		left.SelectedRouteID == right.SelectedRouteID &&
  174: 		left.SelectedResellerID == right.SelectedResellerID &&
  175: 		left.ProviderType == right.ProviderType &&
  176: 		left.ProviderModel == right.ProviderModel &&
  177: 		left.ProviderRequestID == right.ProviderRequestID &&
  178: 		left.ProviderResponseModel ==
  179: 			right.ProviderResponseModel &&
  180: 		left.EstimatedUsage == right.EstimatedUsage &&
  181: 		left.EstimatedClientAmountCents ==
  182: 			right.EstimatedClientAmountCents &&
  183: 		left.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents ==
  184: 			right.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents &&
  185: 		postgresAdminTime(left.CreatedAt).Equal(
  186: 			postgresAdminTime(right.CreatedAt),
  187: 		) &&
  188: 		sameAdminTimePointer(
  189: 			left.ReservedAt,
  190: 			right.ReservedAt,
  191: 		) &&
  192: 		sameAdminTimePointer(
  193: 			left.ReleasedAt,
  194: 			right.ReleasedAt,
  195: 		)
  196: }
  197: 
  198: func canonicalUsageAudit(
  199: 	audit domain.AuditContext,
  200: 	before domain.AuditState,
  201: 	after domain.AuditState,
  202: 	at time.Time,
  203: ) domain.AuditContext {
  204: 	result := audit
  205: 	result.BeforeState = before
  206: 	result.AfterState = after
  207: 	result.CreatedAt = postgresAdminTime(at)
  208: 	return result
  209: }
  210: 
  211: func canonicalAdminBillingBatch(
  212: 	value domain.BillingChargeBatch,
  213: ) domain.BillingChargeBatch {
  214: 	result := value
  215: 	result.CreatedAt = postgresAdminTime(value.CreatedAt)
  216: 	result.ChargedAt = canonicalAdminRouteTimePointer(
  217: 		value.ChargedAt,
  218: 	)
  219: 	result.FailedAt = canonicalAdminRouteTimePointer(
  220: 		value.FailedAt,
  221: 	)
  222: 	result.UpdatedAt = postgresAdminTime(value.UpdatedAt)
  223: 	return result
  224: }
  225: 
  226: func adminBillingBatchApplicationState(
  227: 	value domain.BillingChargeBatch,
  228: ) domain.AuditState {
  229: 	return domain.AuditState{
  230: 		"id":                             value.ID,
  231: 		"user_id":                        value.UserID,
  232: 		"billing_subject_user_id":        value.BillingSubjectUserID,
  233: 		"provider_type":                  value.ProviderType,
  234: 		"client_model":                   value.ClientModel,
  235: 		"billing_model":                  value.BillingModel,
  236: 		"input_tokens":                   value.InputTokens,
  237: 		"output_tokens":                  value.OutputTokens,
  238: 		"amount_cents":                   value.AmountCents,
  239: 		"currency":                       value.Currency,
  240: 		"billing_status":                 value.Status,
  241: 		"billing_response_balance_cents": value.BillingResponseBalanceCents,
  242: 		"billing_error_code":             value.BillingErrorCode,
  243: 		"created_at":                     value.CreatedAt,
  244: 		"charged_at":                     value.ChargedAt,
  245: 		"failed_at":                      value.FailedAt,
  246: 		"updated_at":                     value.UpdatedAt,
  247: 	}
  248: }
  249: 
  250: func adminBillingBatchState(
  251: 	value domain.BillingChargeBatch,
  252: ) domain.AuditState {
  253: 	return adminBillingBatchApplicationState(
  254: 		canonicalAdminBillingBatch(value),
  255: 	)
  256: }
  257: 
  258: func sameAdminBillingBatch(
  259: 	left domain.BillingChargeBatch,
  260: 	right domain.BillingChargeBatch,
  261: ) bool {
  262: 	return left.ID == right.ID &&
  263: 		left.UserID == right.UserID &&
  264: 		left.BillingSubjectUserID ==
  265: 			right.BillingSubjectUserID &&
  266: 		left.ProviderType == right.ProviderType &&
  267: 		left.ClientModel == right.ClientModel &&
  268: 		left.BillingModel == right.BillingModel &&
  269: 		left.InputTokens == right.InputTokens &&
  270: 		left.OutputTokens == right.OutputTokens &&
  271: 		left.AmountCents == right.AmountCents &&
  272: 		left.Currency == right.Currency &&
  273: 		left.Status == right.Status &&
  274: 		sameOptionalInt64(
  275: 			left.BillingResponseBalanceCents,
  276: 			right.BillingResponseBalanceCents,
  277: 		) &&
  278: 		left.BillingErrorCode == right.BillingErrorCode &&
  279: 		postgresAdminTime(left.CreatedAt).Equal(
  280: 			postgresAdminTime(right.CreatedAt),
  281: 		) &&
  282: 		samePostgresAdminTimePointer(
  283: 			left.ChargedAt,
  284: 			right.ChargedAt,
  285: 		) &&
  286: 		samePostgresAdminTimePointer(
  287: 			left.FailedAt,
  288: 			right.FailedAt,
  289: 		) &&
  290: 		postgresAdminTime(left.UpdatedAt).Equal(
  291: 			postgresAdminTime(right.UpdatedAt),
  292: 		)
  293: }
  294: 
  295: func samePostgresAdminTimePointer(
  296: 	left *time.Time,
  297: 	right *time.Time,
  298: ) bool {
  299: 	switch {
  300: 	case left == nil && right == nil:
  301: 		return true
  302: 	case left == nil || right == nil:
  303: 		return false
  304: 	default:
  305: 		return postgresAdminTime(*left).Equal(
  306: 			postgresAdminTime(*right),
  307: 		)
  308: 	}
  309: }
  310: 
  311: func sameAdminChargeSnapshot(
  312: 	left ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot,
  313: 	right ports.BillingChargeBatchSnapshot,
  314: ) bool {
  315: 	if !sameAdminBillingBatch(left.Batch, right.Batch) ||
  316: 		len(left.Allocations) != len(right.Allocations) ||
  317: 		len(left.ExpectedRecords) != len(right.ExpectedRecords) {
  318: 		return false
  319: 	}
  320: 	for index := range left.Allocations {
  321: 		leftAllocation := left.Allocations[index]
  322: 		rightAllocation := right.Allocations[index]
  323: 		if !sameAllocationCommand(
  324: 			leftAllocation,
  325: 			rightAllocation,
  326: 		) ||
  327: 			!postgresAdminTime(leftAllocation.CreatedAt).Equal(
  328: 				postgresAdminTime(
  329: 					rightAllocation.CreatedAt,
  330: 				),
  331: 			) ||
  332: 			!sameUsageRecord(
  333: 				left.ExpectedRecords[index],
  334: 				right.ExpectedRecords[index],
  335: 			) {
  336: 			return false
  337: 		}
  338: 	}
  339: 	return true
  340: }
  341: 
  342: func billingRetryAfterSuccess(
  343: 	before domain.BillingChargeBatch,
  344: 	success ports.UsageChargeSuccess,
  345: ) domain.BillingChargeBatch {
  346: 	after := before
  347: 	after.Status = domain.BillingChargeStatusSucceeded
  348: 	after.BillingResponseBalanceCents =
  349: 		success.BillingBalanceCents
  350: 	after.BillingErrorCode = ""
  351: 	chargedAt := success.ChargedAt
  352: 	after.ChargedAt = &chargedAt
  353: 	after.FailedAt = nil
  354: 	after.UpdatedAt = success.ChargedAt
  355: 	return after
  356: }
  357: 
  358: func billingRetryAfterFailure(
  359: 	before domain.BillingChargeBatch,
  360: 	errorCode string,
  361: 	failedAt time.Time,
  362: ) domain.BillingChargeBatch {
  363: 	after := before
  364: 	after.Status = domain.BillingChargeStatusFailed
  365: 	after.BillingResponseBalanceCents = nil
  366: 	after.BillingErrorCode = errorCode
  367: 	after.ChargedAt = nil
  368: 	after.FailedAt = &failedAt
  369: 	after.UpdatedAt = failedAt
  370: 	return after
  371: }
  372: 
  373: func canonicalBillingRetryAudit(
  374: 	audit domain.AuditContext,
  375: 	before domain.BillingChargeBatch,
  376: 	after domain.BillingChargeBatch,
  377: ) domain.AuditContext {
  378: 	result := audit
  379: 	result.BeforeState = adminBillingBatchState(before)
  380: 	result.AfterState = adminBillingBatchState(after)
  381: 	result.CreatedAt = postgresAdminTime(audit.CreatedAt)
  382: 	return result
  383: }
  384: 
  385: func canonicalBillingRetryAuditInput(
  386: 	audit domain.AuditContext,
  387: ) domain.AuditContext {
  388: 	result := audit
  389: 	result.BeforeState = canonicalBillingRetryAuditInputState(
  390: 		audit.BeforeState,
  391: 	)
  392: 	result.AfterState = canonicalBillingRetryAuditInputState(
  393: 		audit.AfterState,
  394: 	)
  395: 	result.CreatedAt = postgresAdminTime(audit.CreatedAt)
  396: 	return result
  397: }
  398: 
  399: func canonicalBillingRetryAuditInputState(
  400: 	state domain.AuditState,
  401: ) domain.AuditState {
  402: 	result := make(domain.AuditState, len(state))
  403: 	for key, value := range state {
  404: 		switch key {
  405: 		case "created_at", "updated_at":
  406: 			if typed, ok := value.(time.Time); ok {
  407: 				result[key] = postgresAdminTime(typed)
  408: 				continue
  409: 			}
  410: 		case "charged_at", "failed_at":
  411: 			switch typed := value.(type) {
  412: 			case *time.Time:
  413: 				result[key] =
  414: 					canonicalAdminRouteTimePointer(typed)
  415: 				continue
  416: 			case time.Time:
  417: 				canonical := postgresAdminTime(typed)
  418: 				result[key] = canonical
  419: 				continue
  420: 			case nil:
  421: 				result[key] = nil
  422: 				continue
  423: 			}
  424: 		}
  425: 		result[key] = value
  426: 	}
  427: 	return result
  428: }

   14: 
   15: func TestAPIKeyProvisioningStoreIntegration(t *testing.T) {
   16: 	dsn := os.Getenv("TOKENIO_TEST_DATABASE_DSN")
   17: 	if dsn == "" {
   18: 		t.Skip("TOKENIO_TEST_DATABASE_DSN is not set")
   19: 	}
   20: 
   21: 	ctx := t.Context()
   22: 	db, err := Open(ctx, dsn)
   23: 	if err != nil {
   24: 		t.Fatalf("Open: %v", err)
   25: 	}
   26: 	defer db.Close()
   27: 	if err := db.ApplyMigrations(ctx); err != nil {
   28: 		t.Fatalf("ApplyMigrations: %v", err)
   29: 	}
   30: 
   31: 	store, err := NewAPIKeyProvisioningStore(db)
   32: 	if err != nil {
   33: 		t.Fatal(err)
   34: 	}
   35: 
   36: 	suffix := strconv.FormatInt(time.Now().UnixNano(), 10)
   37: 	now := time.Now().UTC().Truncate(time.Microsecond)
   38: 
   39: 	firstExternalID := "billing-provisioning-" + suffix
   40: 	firstUserID := "provisioning-user-" + suffix
   41: 	firstKeyID := "provisioning-key-" + suffix
   42: 	firstProvisioningID := "provisioning-" + suffix
   43: 
   44: 	expiringExternalID := "billing-expiring-" + suffix
   45: 	expiringUserID := "expiring-user-" + suffix
   46: 	expiringKeyID := "expiring-key-" + suffix
   47: 	expiringProvisioningID := "expiring-provisioning-" + suffix
   48: 
   49: 	t.Cleanup(func() {
   50: 		_, _ = db.Exec(
   51: 			context.Background(),
   52: 			`
   53: DELETE FROM tokenio_api_key_provisionings
   54: WHERE external_billing_user_id IN ($1, $2)
   55: `,
   56: 			firstExternalID,
   57: 			expiringExternalID,
   58: 		)
   59: 		_, _ = db.Exec(
   60: 			context.Background(),
   61: 			"DELETE FROM tokenio_api_keys WHERE id IN ($1, $2)",
   62: 			firstKeyID,
   63: 			expiringKeyID,
   64: 		)
   65: 		_, _ = db.Exec(
   66: 			context.Background(),
   67: 			"DELETE FROM tokenio_users WHERE id IN ($1, $2)",
   68: 			firstUserID,
   69: 			expiringUserID,
   70: 		)
   71: 	})
   72: 
   73: 	factoryCalls := 0
   74: 	factory := provisioningMaterialFactoryFunc(
   75: 		func(
   76: 			_ context.Context,
   77: 			request ports.APIKeyProvisioningMaterialRequest,
   78: 		) (ports.APIKeyProvisioningMaterial, error) {
   79: 			factoryCalls++
   80: 			return ports.APIKeyProvisioningMaterial{
   81: 				APIKey: domain.APIKeyRecord{
   82: 					ID:        request.APIKeyID,
   83: 					UserID:    request.User.ID,
   84: 					Name:      request.KeyName,
   85: 					KeyHash:   "hash-" + request.APIKeyID,
   86: 					KeyPrefix: "sk_live_abcd...",
   87: 					Enabled:   true,
   88: 					CreatedAt: request.CreatedAt,
   89: 					UpdatedAt: request.CreatedAt,
   90: 				},
   91: 				EncryptedRawKey:      []byte("ciphertext-" + request.APIKeyID),
   92: 				EncryptionNonce:      []byte("nonce-" + request.APIKeyID),
   93: 				EncryptionKeyVersion: "v1",
   94: 			}, nil
   95: 		},
   96: 	)
   97: 
   98: 	firstRequest := provisioningRequestForTest(
   99: 		firstExternalID,
  100: 		firstUserID,
  101: 		firstKeyID,
  102: 		firstProvisioningID,
  103: 		"idem-"+suffix,
  104: 		now,
  105: 	)
  106: 	created, err := store.ProvisionAPIKey(
  107: 		ctx,
  108: 		firstRequest,
  109: 		factory,
  110: 	)
  111: 	if err != nil {
  112: 		t.Fatalf("ProvisionAPIKey: %v", err)
  113: 	}
  114: 	if created.Outcome != ports.APIKeyProvisioningOutcomeCreated ||
  115: 		created.Provisioning.Status !=
  116: 			domain.APIKeyProvisioningStatusPendingDelivery ||
  117: 		len(created.Provisioning.EncryptedRawKey) == 0 ||
  118: 		factoryCalls != 1 {
  119: 		t.Fatalf("created result = %+v, calls=%d", created, factoryCalls)
  120: 	}
  121: 
  122: 	replayed, err := store.ProvisionAPIKey(
  123: 		ctx,
  124: 		firstRequest,
  125: 		factory,
  126: 	)
  127: 	if err != nil {
  128: 		t.Fatalf("ProvisionAPIKey replay: %v", err)
  129: 	}
  130: 	if replayed.Outcome !=
  131: 		ports.APIKeyProvisioningOutcomeReplayedPending ||
  132: 		replayed.APIKey.ID != firstKeyID ||
  133: 		factoryCalls != 1 {
  134: 		t.Fatalf("replayed result = %+v, calls=%d", replayed, factoryCalls)
  135: 	}
  136: 
  137: 	conflicting := firstRequest
  138: 	conflicting.SourceReferenceHash = "different-source"
  139: 	if _, err := store.ProvisionAPIKey(
  140: 		ctx,
  141: 		conflicting,
  142: 		factory,
  143: 	); !errors.Is(err, ports.ErrStoreConflict) {
  144: 		t.Fatalf("conflicting replay error = %v", err)
  145: 	}
  146: 
  147: 	attemptedAt := now.Add(time.Minute)
  148: 	attempted, err := store.RecordAPIKeyDeliveryAttempt(
  149: 		ctx,
  150: 		firstProvisioningID,
  151: 		attemptedAt,
  152: 	)
  153: 	if err != nil {
  154: 		t.Fatalf("RecordAPIKeyDeliveryAttempt: %v", err)
  155: 	}
  156: 	if attempted.DeliveryAttempts != 1 {
  157: 		t.Fatalf("delivery attempts = %d", attempted.DeliveryAttempts)
  158: 	}
  159: 
  160: 	deliveredAt := now.Add(2 * time.Minute)
  161: 	delivered, err := store.ConfirmAPIKeyDelivery(
  162: 		ctx,
  163: 		firstProvisioningID,
  164: 		deliveredAt,
  165: 	)
  166: 	if err != nil {
  167: 		t.Fatalf("ConfirmAPIKeyDelivery: %v", err)
  168: 	}
  169: 	if delivered.Status !=
  170: 		domain.APIKeyProvisioningStatusDelivered ||
  171: 		len(delivered.EncryptedRawKey) != 0 ||
  172: 		len(delivered.EncryptionNonce) != 0 {
  173: 		t.Fatalf("delivered = %+v", delivered)
  174: 	}
  175: 
  176: 	repeatedConfirm, err := store.ConfirmAPIKeyDelivery(
  177: 		ctx,
  178: 		firstProvisioningID,
  179: 		deliveredAt.Add(time.Minute),
  180: 	)
  181: 	if err != nil {
  182: 		t.Fatalf("repeated confirm: %v", err)
  183: 	}
  184: 	if !sameProvisioning(repeatedConfirm, delivered) {
  185: 		t.Fatalf("repeated confirm changed state")
  186: 	}
  187: 
  188: 	deliveredReplay, err := store.ProvisionAPIKey(
  189: 		ctx,
  190: 		firstRequest,
  191: 		factory,
  192: 	)
  193: 	if err != nil {
  194: 		t.Fatalf("delivered replay: %v", err)
  195: 	}
  196: 	if deliveredReplay.Outcome !=
  197: 		ports.APIKeyProvisioningOutcomeReplayedDelivered {
  198: 		t.Fatalf("delivered replay = %+v", deliveredReplay)
  199: 	}
  200: 
  201: 	secondRequest := firstRequest
  202: 	secondRequest.IdempotencyKey = "idem-second-" + suffix
  203: 	secondRequest.ProvisioningID = "provisioning-second-" + suffix
  204: 	secondRequest.APIKeyID = "unused-key-" + suffix
  205: 	secondRequest.CreatedAt = now.Add(3 * time.Minute)
  206: 	secondRequest.ExpiresAt =
  207: 		secondRequest.CreatedAt.Add(time.Hour)
  208: 	already, err := store.ProvisionAPIKey(
  209: 		ctx,
  210: 		secondRequest,
  211: 		factory,
  212: 	)
  213: 	if err != nil {
  214: 		t.Fatalf("already provisioned: %v", err)
  215: 	}
  216: 	if already.Outcome !=
  217: 		ports.APIKeyProvisioningOutcomeAlreadyProvisioned ||
  218: 		already.APIKey.ID != firstKeyID ||
  219: 		already.Provisioning.ResultType !=
  220: 			domain.APIKeyProvisioningResultTypeAlreadyProvisioned ||
  221: 		factoryCalls != 1 {
  222: 		t.Fatalf("already result = %+v, calls=%d", already, factoryCalls)
  223: 	}
  224: 
  225: 	expiringRequest := provisioningRequestForTest(
  226: 		expiringExternalID,
  227: 		expiringUserID,
  228: 		expiringKeyID,
  229: 		expiringProvisioningID,
  230: 		"idem-expiring-"+suffix,
  231: 		now.Add(4*time.Minute),
  232: 	)
  233: 	expiringCreated, err := store.ProvisionAPIKey(
  234: 		ctx,
  235: 		expiringRequest,
  236: 		factory,
  237: 	)
  238: 	if err != nil {
  239: 		t.Fatalf("create expiring provisioning: %v", err)
  240: 	}
  241: 
  242: 	due, err := store.ListPendingAPIKeyProvisioningsDue(
  243: 		ctx,
  244: 		expiringRequest.ExpiresAt,
  245: 		10,
  246: 	)
  247: 	if err != nil {
  248: 		t.Fatalf("ListPendingAPIKeyProvisioningsDue: %v", err)
  249: 	}
  250: 	foundDue := false
  251: 	for _, item := range due {
  252: 		if item.ID == expiringProvisioningID {
  253: 			foundDue = true
  254: 		}
  255: 	}
  256: 	if !foundDue {
  257: 		t.Fatalf("expiring provisioning not listed: %+v", due)
  258: 	}
  259: 
  260: 	expired, err := store.ExpireAPIKeyProvisioning(
  261: 		ctx,
  262: 		expiringProvisioningID,
  263: 		expiringRequest.ExpiresAt,
  264: 	)
  265: 	if err != nil {
  266: 		t.Fatalf("ExpireAPIKeyProvisioning: %v", err)
  267: 	}
  268: 	if expired.Status !=
  269: 		domain.APIKeyProvisioningStatusExpired ||
  270: 		len(expired.EncryptedRawKey) != 0 ||
  271: 		len(expired.EncryptionNonce) != 0 {
  272: 		t.Fatalf("expired = %+v", expired)
  273: 	}
  274: 
  275: 	expiredKey, err := scanAPIKey(db.QueryRow(
  276: 		ctx,
  277: 		`
  278: SELECT
  279:     id,
  280:     user_id,
  281:     name,
  282:     key_hash,
  283:     key_prefix,
  284:     enabled,
  285:     created_at,
  286:     updated_at,
  287:     last_used_at,
  288:     revoked_at,
  289:     expires_at
  290: FROM tokenio_api_keys
  291: WHERE id = $1
  292: `,
  293: 		expiringCreated.APIKey.ID,
  294: 	))
  295: 	if err != nil {
  296: 		t.Fatalf("load expired key: %v", err)
  297: 	}
  298: 	if expiredKey.Enabled || expiredKey.RevokedAt == nil {
  299: 		t.Fatalf("expired key remains active: %+v", expiredKey)
  300: 	}
  301: 
  302: 	expiredReplay, err := store.ProvisionAPIKey(
  303: 		ctx,
  304: 		expiringRequest,
  305: 		factory,
  306: 	)
  307: 	if err != nil {
  308: 		t.Fatalf("expired replay: %v", err)
  309: 	}
  310: 	if expiredReplay.Outcome !=
  311: 		ports.APIKeyProvisioningOutcomeExpired {
  312: 		t.Fatalf("expired replay = %+v", expiredReplay)
  313: 	}
  314: }
  315: 
  316: func provisioningRequestForTest(
  317: 	externalBillingUserID string,
  318: 	userID string,
  319: 	apiKeyID string,
  320: 	provisioningID string,
  321: 	idempotencyKey string,
  322: 	createdAt time.Time,
  323: ) ports.APIKeyProvisioningRequest {
  324: 	return ports.APIKeyProvisioningRequest{
  325: 		IdempotencyKey:        idempotencyKey,
  326: 		SourceReferenceHash:   "source-" + idempotencyKey,
  327: 		ExternalBillingUserID: externalBillingUserID,
  328: 		NewUser: domain.User{
  329: 			ID:                    userID,
  330: 			ExternalBillingUserID: externalBillingUserID,
  331: 			Enabled:               true,
  332: 			CreatedAt:             createdAt,
  333: 			UpdatedAt:             createdAt,
  334: 		},
  335: 		ProvisioningID: provisioningID,
  336: 		APIKeyID:       apiKeyID,
  337: 		KeyName:        "Telegram payment key",
  338: 		CreatedAt:      createdAt,
  339: 		ExpiresAt:      createdAt.Add(time.Hour),
  340: 	}
  341: }

   20: func TestValidateProvisioningRecordLifecycle(t *testing.T) {
   21: 	now := time.Unix(100, 0).UTC()
   22: 	expiresAt := now.Add(time.Hour)
   23: 
   24: 	pending := domain.APIKeyProvisioning{
   25: 		ID:                    "prov-1",
   26: 		IdempotencyKey:        "idem-1",
   27: 		SourceReferenceHash:   "source-hash",
   28: 		ExternalBillingUserID: "billing-user-1",
   29: 		UserID:                "user-1",
   30: 		APIKeyID:              "key-1",
   31: 		ResultType:            domain.APIKeyProvisioningResultTypeKeyCreated,
   32: 		Status:                domain.APIKeyProvisioningStatusPendingDelivery,
   33: 		EncryptedRawKey:       []byte("ciphertext"),
   34: 		EncryptionNonce:       []byte("nonce"),
   35: 		EncryptionKeyVersion:  "v1",
   36: 		CreatedAt:             now,
   37: 		UpdatedAt:             now,
   38: 		ExpiresAt:             &expiresAt,
   39: 	}
   40: 	if err := validateProvisioningRecord(pending); err != nil {
   41: 		t.Fatalf("pending validation: %v", err)
   42: 	}
   43: 
   44: 	deliveredAt := now.Add(time.Minute)
   45: 	delivered := pending
   46: 	delivered.Status = domain.APIKeyProvisioningStatusDelivered
   47: 	delivered.EncryptedRawKey = nil
   48: 	delivered.EncryptionNonce = nil
   49: 	delivered.UpdatedAt = deliveredAt
   50: 	delivered.DeliveredAt = &deliveredAt
   51: 	if err := validateProvisioningRecord(delivered); err != nil {
   52: 		t.Fatalf("delivered validation: %v", err)
   53: 	}
   54: 
   55: 	expiredAt := expiresAt
   56: 	expired := pending
   57: 	expired.Status = domain.APIKeyProvisioningStatusExpired
   58: 	expired.EncryptedRawKey = nil
   59: 	expired.EncryptionNonce = nil
   60: 	expired.UpdatedAt = expiredAt
   61: 	expired.ExpiredAt = &expiredAt
   62: 	if err := validateProvisioningRecord(expired); err != nil {
   63: 		t.Fatalf("expired validation: %v", err)
   64: 	}
   65: }

FILE: internal/infrastructure/postgres/billing_session_store.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: cd19c9a2d8143761b61b8bff0db95e33f474fadf
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: package postgres
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"context"
    5: 	"errors"
    6: 
    7: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/domain"
    8: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/ports"
    9: 	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5"
   10: )
   11: 
   12: const billingSessionColumns = `
   13:     user_id,
   14:     billing_subject_user_id,
   15:     remote_balance_cents,
   16:     pending_amount_cents_cached,
   17:     currency,
   18:     fetched_at,
   19:     created_at,
   20:     updated_at
   21: `
   22: 
   23: const findBillingSessionSQL = `
   24: SELECT
   25: ` + billingSessionColumns + `
   26: FROM tokenio_billing_sessions
   27: WHERE user_id = $1
   28: `
   29: 
   30: const findBillingSessionForUpdateSQL = `
   31: SELECT
   32: ` + billingSessionColumns + `
   33: FROM tokenio_billing_sessions
   34: WHERE user_id = $1
   35: FOR UPDATE
   36: `
   37: 
   38: const insertBillingSessionSQL = `
   39: INSERT INTO tokenio_billing_sessions (
   40:     user_id,
   41:     billing_subject_user_id,
   42:     remote_balance_cents,
   43:     pending_amount_cents_cached,
   44:     currency,
   45:     fetched_at,
   46:     created_at,
   47:     updated_at
   48: )
   49: VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8)
   50: RETURNING
   51: ` + billingSessionColumns
   52: 
   53: const updateBillingSessionSQL = `
   54: UPDATE tokenio_billing_sessions
   55: SET
   56:     billing_subject_user_id = $2,
   57:     remote_balance_cents = $3,
   58:     pending_amount_cents_cached = $4,
   59:     currency = $5,
   60:     fetched_at = $6,
   61:     created_at = $7,
   62:     updated_at = $8
   63: WHERE user_id = $1
   64: RETURNING
   65: ` + billingSessionColumns
   66: 
   67: type BillingSessionStore struct {
   68: 	db *DB
   69: }
   70: 
   71: var _ ports.BillingSessionStore = (*BillingSessionStore)(nil)
   72: 
   73: func NewBillingSessionStore(
   74: 	db *DB,
   75: ) (*BillingSessionStore, error) {
   76: 	if db == nil || db.pool == nil {
   77: 		return nil, ErrInvalidDatabaseConfig
   78: 	}
   79: 	return &BillingSessionStore{db: db}, nil
   80: }
   81: 
   82: func (s *BillingSessionStore) FindBillingSessionByUserID(
   83: 	ctx context.Context,
   84: 	userID string,
   85: ) (*domain.BillingSession, error) {
   86: 	value, err := scanBillingSession(
   87: 		s.db.QueryRow(ctx, findBillingSessionSQL, userID),
   88: 	)
   89: 	if err != nil {
   90: 		return nil, err
   91: 	}
   92: 	return &value, nil
   93: }
   94: 
   95: func (s *BillingSessionStore) UpsertBillingSession(
   96: 	ctx context.Context,
   97: 	expected *domain.BillingSession,
   98: 	next domain.BillingSession,
   99: ) (domain.BillingSession, error) {
  100: 	if err := validateBillingSessionPersistence(next); err != nil {
  101: 		return domain.BillingSession{}, err
  102: 	}
  103: 
  104: 	if expected == nil {
  105: 		if !operationalTime(next.CreatedAt).Equal(
  106: 			operationalTime(next.UpdatedAt),
  107: 		) {
  108: 			return domain.BillingSession{},
  109: 				ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  110: 		}
  111: 	} else {
  112: 		if err := validateBillingSessionPersistence(
  113: 			*expected,
  114: 		); err != nil {
  115: 			return domain.BillingSession{}, err
  116: 		}
  117: 		if expected.UserID != next.UserID ||
  118: 			expected.BillingSubjectUserID !=
  119: 				next.BillingSubjectUserID ||
  120: 			expected.Currency != next.Currency ||
  121: 			!operationalTime(expected.CreatedAt).Equal(
  122: 				operationalTime(next.CreatedAt),
  123: 			) ||
  124: 			operationalTime(next.FetchedAt).Before(
  125: 				operationalTime(expected.FetchedAt),
  126: 			) ||
  127: 			!operationalTime(next.UpdatedAt).After(
  128: 				operationalTime(expected.UpdatedAt),
  129: 			) {
  130: 			return domain.BillingSession{},
  131: 				ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  132: 		}
  133: 	}
  134: 
  135: 	persistedNext := canonicalBillingSession(next)
  136: 	var result domain.BillingSession
  137: 
  138: 	err := InTx(
  139: 		ctx,
  140: 		s.db,
  141: 		pgx.TxOptions{IsoLevel: pgx.Serializable},
  142: 		func(tx pgx.Tx) error {
  143: 			if err := validateBillingSessionSubject(
  144: 				ctx,
  145: 				tx,
  146: 				persistedNext.UserID,
  147: 				persistedNext.BillingSubjectUserID,
  148: 			); err != nil {
  149: 				return err
  150: 			}
  151: 
  152: 			if expected == nil {
  153: 				_, err := scanBillingSession(tx.QueryRow(
  154: 					ctx,
  155: 					findBillingSessionForUpdateSQL,
  156: 					persistedNext.UserID,
  157: 				))
  158: 				switch {
  159: 				case err == nil:
  160: 					return ports.ErrStoreConflict
  161: 				case errors.Is(err, ports.ErrNotFound):
  162: 				default:
  163: 					return err
  164: 				}
  165: 
  166: 				value, err := scanBillingSession(tx.QueryRow(
  167: 					ctx,
  168: 					insertBillingSessionSQL,
  169: 					persistedNext.UserID,
  170: 					persistedNext.BillingSubjectUserID,
  171: 					persistedNext.RemoteBalanceCents,
  172: 					persistedNext.PendingAmountCentsCached,
  173: 					persistedNext.Currency,
  174: 					persistedNext.FetchedAt,
  175: 					persistedNext.CreatedAt,
  176: 					persistedNext.UpdatedAt,
  177: 				))
  178: 				if err != nil {
  179: 					return NormalizeError(err)
  180: 				}
  181: 				if !sameBillingSession(value, persistedNext) {
  182: 					return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  183: 				}
  184: 				result = value
  185: 				return nil
  186: 			}
  187: 
  188: 			current, err := scanBillingSession(tx.QueryRow(
  189: 				ctx,
  190: 				findBillingSessionForUpdateSQL,
  191: 				expected.UserID,
  192: 			))
  193: 			if err != nil {
  194: 				return err
  195: 			}
  196: 			if !sameBillingSession(current, *expected) {
  197: 				return ports.ErrStoreConflict
  198: 			}
  199: 
  200: 			value, err := scanBillingSession(tx.QueryRow(
  201: 				ctx,
  202: 				updateBillingSessionSQL,
  203: 				persistedNext.UserID,
  204: 				persistedNext.BillingSubjectUserID,
  205: 				persistedNext.RemoteBalanceCents,
  206: 				persistedNext.PendingAmountCentsCached,
  207: 				persistedNext.Currency,
  208: 				persistedNext.FetchedAt,
  209: 				persistedNext.CreatedAt,
  210: 				persistedNext.UpdatedAt,
  211: 			))
  212: 			if err != nil {
  213: 				return NormalizeError(err)
  214: 			}
  215: 			if !sameBillingSession(value, persistedNext) {
  216: 				return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  217: 			}
  218: 			result = value
  219: 			return nil
  220: 		},
  221: 	)
  222: 	if err != nil {
  223: 		return domain.BillingSession{}, err
  224: 	}
  225: 	return result, nil
  226: }
  227: 
  228: func validateBillingSessionSubject(
  229: 	ctx context.Context,
  230: 	tx pgx.Tx,
  231: 	userID string,
  232: 	billingSubjectUserID string,
  233: ) error {
  234: 	var persistedSubject string
  235: 	if err := tx.QueryRow(
  236: 		ctx,
  237: 		`
  238: SELECT external_billing_user_id
  239: FROM tokenio_users
  240: WHERE id = $1
  241: FOR KEY SHARE
  242: `,
  243: 		userID,
  244: 	).Scan(&persistedSubject); err != nil {
  245: 		return normalizeRegistryReadError(err)
  246: 	}
  247: 	if persistedSubject != billingSubjectUserID {
  248: 		return ports.ErrStoreConflict
  249: 	}
  250: 	return nil
  251: }

FILE: internal/infrastructure/postgres/llmrequest_atomic_reservation.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: be006f179292d81531b8ded6ecef03edd2d773e6
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1: package postgres
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"context"
    5: 	"fmt"
    6: 	"strings"
    7: 	"time"
    8: 	"unicode"
    9: 
   10: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/application/llmrequest"
   11: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/domain"
   12: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/ports"
   13: 	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5"
   14: )
   15: 
   16: type LLMRequestAtomicReservation struct {
   17: 	db    *DB
   18: 	clock ports.Clock
   19: }
   20: 
   21: var _ llmrequest.AtomicReservation = (*LLMRequestAtomicReservation)(nil)
   22: 
   23: func NewLLMRequestAtomicReservation(
   24: 	db *DB,
   25: 	clock ports.Clock,
   26: ) (*LLMRequestAtomicReservation, error) {
   27: 	if db == nil || db.pool == nil {
   28: 		return nil, ErrInvalidDatabaseConfig
   29: 	}
   30: 	if clock == nil {
   31: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf(
   32: 			"%w: nil atomic reservation clock",
   33: 			llmrequest.ErrDependencyRequired,
   34: 		)
   35: 	}
   36: 	return &LLMRequestAtomicReservation{
   37: 		db:    db,
   38: 		clock: clock,
   39: 	}, nil
   40: }
   41: 
   42: func (s *LLMRequestAtomicReservation) Reserve(
   43: 	ctx context.Context,
   44: 	input llmrequest.ReservationInput,
   45: ) (llmrequest.ReservationResult, error) {
   46: 	if s == nil || s.db == nil || s.db.pool == nil || s.clock == nil {
   47: 		return llmrequest.ReservationResult{}, ErrInvalidDatabaseConfig
   48: 	}
   49: 	if ctx == nil {
   50: 		return llmrequest.ReservationResult{}, fmt.Errorf(
   51: 			"%w: nil context",
   52: 			ports.ErrStoreContractViolation,
   53: 		)
   54: 	}
   55: 	if err := validateLLMRequestAtomicReservationInput(input); err != nil {
   56: 		return llmrequest.ReservationResult{}, err
   57: 	}
   58: 
   59: 	now := s.clock.Now()
   60: 	if now.IsZero() {
   61: 		return llmrequest.ReservationResult{}, fmt.Errorf(
   62: 			"%w: zero atomic reservation clock",
   63: 			ports.ErrStoreContractViolation,
   64: 		)
   65: 	}
   66: 	now = now.UTC().Truncate(time.Microsecond)
   67: 	record := llmRequestReservedUsageRecord(input, now)
   68: 
   69: 	var result llmrequest.ReservationResult
   70: 	err := InTx(
   71: 		ctx,
   72: 		s.db,
   73: 		pgx.TxOptions{},
   74: 		func(tx pgx.Tx) error {
   75: 			if _, err := tx.Exec(
   76: 				ctx,
   77: 				`
   78: SELECT pg_advisory_xact_lock(
   79:     hashtextextended('tokenio_usage_local_request:' || $1, 0)
   80: )
   81: `,
   82: 				input.LocalRequestID,
   83: 			); err != nil {
   84: 				return NormalizeError(err)
   85: 			}
   86: 
   87: 			var lockedUserID string
   88: 			if err := tx.QueryRow(
   89: 				ctx,
   90: 				`
   91: SELECT id
   92: FROM tokenio_users
   93: WHERE id = $1
   94: FOR UPDATE
   95: `,
   96: 				input.Principal.UserID,
   97: 			).Scan(&lockedUserID); err != nil {
   98: 				return normalizeRegistryReadError(err)
   99: 			}
  100: 			if lockedUserID != input.Principal.UserID {
  101: 				return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  102: 			}
  103: 
  104: 			_, err := scanUsageRecord(
  105: 				tx.QueryRow(
  106: 					ctx,
  107: 					findPricingFailedUsageSQL,
  108: 					input.Principal.UserID,
  109: 				),
  110: 			)
  111: 			switch {
  112: 			case err == nil:
  113: 				return llmrequest.ErrUnresolvedUsage
  114: 			case isStoreNotFound(err):
  115: 			default:
  116: 				return err
  117: 			}
  118: 
  119: 			existing, err := scanUsageRecord(
  120: 				tx.QueryRow(
  121: 					ctx,
  122: 					findUsageByLocalRequestIDSQL,
  123: 					input.LocalRequestID,
  124: 				),
  125: 			)
  126: 			switch {
  127: 			case err == nil:
  128: 				if !sameLLMRequestAtomicReservation(existing, input) {
  129: 					return llmrequest.ErrLocalRequestConflict
  130: 				}
  131: 				if existing.Status != domain.UsageStatusReserved {
  132: 					return classifyLLMRequestReservationStatus(
  133: 						existing.Status,
  134: 					)
  135: 				}
  136: 				result = llmrequest.ReservationResult{
  137: 					Disposition: llmrequest.
  138: 						ReservationDispositionAlreadyReserved,
  139: 					Usage: existing,
  140: 				}
  141: 				return nil
  142: 			case isStoreNotFound(err):
  143: 			default:
  144: 				return err
  145: 			}
  146: 
  147: 			idempotencyKey := llmRequestReservationIdempotencyKey(
  148: 				input.IdempotencyKey,
  149: 			)
  150: 			if idempotencyKey != "" {
  151: 				existing, err = scanUsageRecord(
  152: 					tx.QueryRow(
  153: 						ctx,
  154: 						findUsageByIdempotencySQL,
  155: 						input.Principal.UserID,
  156: 						string(input.EndpointKind),
  157: 						idempotencyKey,
  158: 					),
  159: 				)
  160: 				switch {
  161: 				case err == nil:
  162: 					return classifyLLMRequestReservationStatus(
  163: 						existing.Status,
  164: 					)
  165: 				case isStoreNotFound(err):
  166: 				default:
  167: 					return err
  168: 				}
  169: 			}
  170: 
  171: 			persistedReseller, err := scanReseller(tx.QueryRow(
  172: 				ctx,
  173: 				findResellerBalanceForUpdateSQL,
  174: 				input.Reseller.ID,
  175: 			))
  176: 			if err != nil {
  177: 				return err
  178: 			}
  179: 			if persistedReseller.ID != input.Reseller.ID ||
  180: 				persistedReseller.ID != input.Route.ResellerID ||
  181: 				persistedReseller.ProviderType !=
  182: 					input.Reseller.ProviderType ||
  183: 				persistedReseller.ProviderType !=
  184: 					input.Route.ProviderType {
  185: 				return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  186: 			}
  187: 			if !domain.CanReserveResellerBalance(
  188: 				persistedReseller,
  189: 				input.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents,
  190: 			) {
  191: 				return llmrequest.ErrResellerReserveUnavailable
  192: 			}
  193: 
  194: 			expectedReseller := persistedReseller
  195: 			if input.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents > 0 {
  196: 				expectedReseller.ReservedCents +=
  197: 					input.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents
  198: 				if now.After(expectedReseller.UpdatedAt) {
  199: 					expectedReseller.UpdatedAt = now
  200: 				}
  201: 
  202: 				persistedReseller, err = scanReseller(tx.QueryRow(
  203: 					ctx,
  204: 					updateResellerBalanceReserveSQL,
  205: 					input.Reseller.ID,
  206: 					expectedReseller.ReservedCents,
  207: 					now,
  208: 				))
  209: 				if err != nil {
  210: 					return err
  211: 				}
  212: 				if !sameResellerBalanceSnapshot(
  213: 					persistedReseller,
  214: 					expectedReseller,
  215: 				) {
  216: 					return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  217: 				}
  218: 			}
  219: 
  220: 			if _, err := tx.Exec(
  221: 				ctx,
  222: 				insertUsageRecordSQL,
  223: 				usageRecordNamedArgs(record),
  224: 			); err != nil {
  225: 				return NormalizeError(err)
  226: 			}
  227: 
  228: 			resellerCopy := persistedReseller
  229: 			result = llmrequest.ReservationResult{
  230: 				Disposition: llmrequest.ReservationDispositionCreated,
  231: 				Usage:       record,
  232: 				Reseller:    &resellerCopy,
  233: 			}
  234: 			return nil
  235: 		},
  236: 	)
  237: 	if err != nil {
  238: 		return llmrequest.ReservationResult{}, err
  239: 	}
  240: 	return result, nil
  241: }
  242: 
  243: func validateLLMRequestAtomicReservationInput(
  244: 	input llmrequest.ReservationInput,
  245: ) error {
  246: 	if !validLLMRequestAtomicReservationIdentifier(
  247: 		input.LocalRequestID,
  248: 	) ||
  249: 		!validLLMRequestAtomicReservationText(
  250: 			input.Principal.UserID,
  251: 		) ||
  252: 		!validLLMRequestAtomicReservationText(
  253: 			input.Principal.APIKeyID,
  254: 		) ||
  255: 		!validLLMRequestAtomicReservationText(
  256: 			input.Principal.BillingSubjectUserID,
  257: 		) ||
  258: 		input.APIFamily == "" ||
  259: 		input.EndpointKind == "" ||
  260: 		!validLLMRequestAtomicReservationText(input.ClientModel) ||
  261: 		!validLLMRequestAtomicReservationText(input.BillingModel) ||
  262: 		!validLLMRequestAtomicReservationText(input.Route.ID) ||
  263: 		!validLLMRequestAtomicReservationText(input.Reseller.ID) ||
  264: 		input.Route.ResellerID != input.Reseller.ID ||
  265: 		input.Route.ProviderType == "" ||
  266: 		input.Route.ProviderType != input.Reseller.ProviderType ||
  267: 		input.Route.APIFamily != input.APIFamily ||
  268: 		input.Route.EndpointKind != input.EndpointKind ||
  269: 		input.Route.ClientModel != input.ClientModel ||
  270: 		!input.Route.Enabled ||
  271: 		!input.Reseller.Enabled ||
  272: 		input.EstimatedClientAmountCents < 0 ||
  273: 		input.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents < 0 ||
  274: 		input.Currency != "RUB" ||
  275: 		!nonNegativeLLMRequestAtomicReservationUsage(
  276: 			input.EstimatedUsage,
  277: 		) {
  278: 		return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  279: 	}
  280: 	if input.IdempotencyKey != nil &&
  281: 		!validLLMRequestAtomicReservationText(
  282: 			*input.IdempotencyKey,
  283: 		) {
  284: 		return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  285: 	}
  286: 	return nil
  287: }
  288: 
  289: func llmRequestReservedUsageRecord(
  290: 	input llmrequest.ReservationInput,
  291: 	reservedAt time.Time,
  292: ) domain.UsageRecord {
  293: 	reservedAtCopy := reservedAt
  294: 	return domain.UsageRecord{
  295: 		LocalRequestID: input.LocalRequestID,
  296: 		IdempotencyKey: llmRequestReservationIdempotencyKey(
  297: 			input.IdempotencyKey,
  298: 		),
  299: 		UserID:             input.Principal.UserID,
  300: 		APIKeyID:           input.Principal.APIKeyID,
  301: 		APIFamily:          input.APIFamily,
  302: 		EndpointKind:       input.EndpointKind,
  303: 		ClientModel:        input.ClientModel,
  304: 		BillingModel:       input.BillingModel,
  305: 		SelectedRouteID:    input.Route.ID,
  306: 		SelectedResellerID: input.Reseller.ID,
  307: 		ProviderType:       input.Route.ProviderType,
  308: 		ProviderModel:      input.Route.ProviderModel,
  309: 		EstimatedUsage:     input.EstimatedUsage,
  310: 		EstimatedClientAmountCents: input.
  311: 			EstimatedClientAmountCents,
  312: 		EstimatedUpstreamCostCents: input.
  313: 			EstimatedUpstreamCostCents,
  314: 		Currency:          input.Currency,
  315: 		UsageCompleteness: "missing",
  316: 		Status:            domain.UsageStatusReserved,
  317: 		CreatedAt:         reservedAt,
  318: 		ReservedAt:        &reservedAtCopy,
  319: 		UpdatedAt:         reservedAt,
  320: 	}
  321: }
  322: 
  323: func sameLLMRequestAtomicReservation(
  324: 	existing domain.UsageRecord,
  325: 	input llmrequest.ReservationInput,
  326: ) bool {
  327: 	return existing.LocalRequestID == input.LocalRequestID &&
  328: 		existing.IdempotencyKey ==
  329: 			llmRequestReservationIdempotencyKey(
  330: 				input.IdempotencyKey,
  331: 			) &&
  332: 		existing.UserID == input.Principal.UserID &&
  333: 		existing.APIKeyID == input.Principal.APIKeyID &&
  334: 		existing.APIFamily == input.APIFamily &&
  335: 		existing.EndpointKind == input.EndpointKind &&
  336: 		existing.ClientModel == input.ClientModel &&
  337: 		existing.BillingModel == input.BillingModel &&
  338: 		existing.SelectedRouteID == input.Route.ID &&
  339: 		existing.SelectedResellerID == input.Reseller.ID &&
  340: 		existing.ProviderType == input.Route.ProviderType &&
  341: 		existing.ProviderModel == input.Route.ProviderModel &&
  342: 		existing.EstimatedUsage == input.EstimatedUsage &&
  343: 		existing.EstimatedClientAmountCents ==
  344: 			input.EstimatedClientAmountCents &&
  345: 		existing.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents ==
  346: 			input.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents &&
  347: 		existing.Currency == input.Currency
  348: }
  349: 
  350: func classifyLLMRequestReservationStatus(
  351: 	status domain.UsageStatus,
  352: ) error {
  353: 	switch status {
  354: 	case domain.UsageStatusReserved:
  355: 		return llmrequest.ErrRequestInProgress
  356: 	case domain.UsageStatusBillable,
  357: 		domain.UsageStatusPartiallyCharged,
  358: 		domain.UsageStatusCharged:
  359: 		return llmrequest.ErrIdempotencyReplayNotAvailable
  360: 	case domain.UsageStatusReleased,
  361: 		domain.UsageStatusFailed:
  362: 		return llmrequest.ErrIdempotencyKeyReused
  363: 	case domain.UsageStatusPricingFailed:
  364: 		return llmrequest.ErrUnresolvedUsage
  365: 	default:
  366: 		return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  367: 	}
  368: }
  369: 
  370: func llmRequestReservationIdempotencyKey(
  371: 	value *string,
  372: ) string {
  373: 	if value == nil {
  374: 		return ""
  375: 	}
  376: 	return *value
  377: }
  378: 
  379: func validLLMRequestAtomicReservationIdentifier(
  380: 	value string,
  381: ) bool {
  382: 	return strings.HasPrefix(value, "llmreq_") &&
  383: 		len(value) > len("llmreq_") &&
  384: 		validLLMRequestAtomicReservationText(value)
  385: }
  386: 
  387: func validLLMRequestAtomicReservationText(value string) bool {
  388: 	if strings.TrimSpace(value) == "" {
  389: 		return false
  390: 	}
  391: 	for _, current := range value {
  392: 		if unicode.IsControl(current) {
  393: 			return false
  394: 		}
  395: 	}
  396: 	return true
  397: }
  398: 
  399: func nonNegativeLLMRequestAtomicReservationUsage(
  400: 	value domain.TokenUsage,
  401: ) bool {
  402: 	return value.InputTokens >= 0 &&
  403: 		value.CachedInputTokens >= 0 &&
  404: 		value.OutputTokens >= 0 &&
  405: 		value.ReasoningTokens >= 0 &&
  406: 		value.ImageInputTokens >= 0 &&
  407: 		value.AudioInputTokens >= 0 &&
  408: 		value.AudioOutputTokens >= 0 &&
  409: 		value.FileInputTokens >= 0 &&
  410: 		value.VideoInputTokens >= 0 &&
  411: 		value.ImageGenerationUnits >= 0
  412: }
  413: 
  414: func isStoreNotFound(err error) bool {
  415: 	return err == ports.ErrNotFound
  416: }

FILE: internal/infrastructure/postgres/llmrequest_route_reservation_transfer.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: 6031a67243fc7929c0449a7732f7dd29beded1dd

    1: package postgres
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"context"
    5: 	"fmt"
    6: 	"reflect"
    7: 	"sort"
    8: 	"strings"
    9: 	"time"
   10: 
   11: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/application/llmrequest"
   12: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/domain"
   13: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/ports"
   14: 	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5"
   15: )
   16: 
   17: const findUsageForRouteTransferSQL = `
   18: SELECT
   19: ` + usageRecordColumns + `
   20: FROM tokenio_usage_records
   21: WHERE local_request_id = $1
   22: FOR UPDATE
   23: `
   24: 
   25: const findResellersForRouteTransferSQL = `
   26: SELECT
   27:     id,
   28:     name,
   29:     provider_type,
   30:     base_url,
   31:     api_key_env,
   32:     enabled,
   33:     balance_cents,
   34:     reserved_cents,
   35:     minimum_balance_cents,
   36:     created_at,
   37:     updated_at,
   38:     disabled_at
   39: FROM tokenio_resellers
   40: WHERE id = ANY($1::text[])
   41: ORDER BY id ASC
   42: FOR UPDATE
   43: `
   44: 
   45: const updateResellerReserveForRouteTransferSQL = `
   46: UPDATE tokenio_resellers
   47: SET
   48:     reserved_cents = $2,
   49:     updated_at = $3
   50: WHERE id = $1
   51: RETURNING
   52:     id,
   53:     name,
   54:     provider_type,
   55:     base_url,
   56:     api_key_env,
   57:     enabled,
   58:     balance_cents,
   59:     reserved_cents,
   60:     minimum_balance_cents,
   61:     created_at,
   62:     updated_at,
   63:     disabled_at
   64: `
   65: 
   66: type LLMRequestRouteReservationTransfer struct {
   67: 	db    *DB
   68: 	clock ports.Clock
   69: }
   70: 
   71: var _ llmrequest.RouteReservationTransfer = (*LLMRequestRouteReservationTransfer)(nil)
   72: 
   73: func NewLLMRequestRouteReservationTransfer(
   74: 	db *DB,
   75: 	clock ports.Clock,
   76: ) (*LLMRequestRouteReservationTransfer, error) {
   77: 	if db == nil || db.pool == nil {
   78: 		return nil, ErrInvalidDatabaseConfig
   79: 	}
   80: 	if clock == nil {
   81: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf(
   82: 			"%w: nil route reservation transfer clock",
   83: 			llmrequest.ErrDependencyRequired,
   84: 		)
   85: 	}
   86: 	return &LLMRequestRouteReservationTransfer{db: db, clock: clock}, nil
   87: }
   88: 
   89: func (s *LLMRequestRouteReservationTransfer) Transfer(
   90: 	ctx context.Context,
   91: 	input llmrequest.RouteReservationTransferInput,
   92: ) (llmrequest.RouteReservationTransferResult, error) {
   93: 	if s == nil || s.db == nil || s.db.pool == nil || s.clock == nil {
   94: 		return llmrequest.RouteReservationTransferResult{}, ErrInvalidDatabaseConfig
   95: 	}
   96: 	if ctx == nil {
   97: 		return llmrequest.RouteReservationTransferResult{},
   98: 			ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
   99: 	}
  100: 	if err := validateRouteReservationTransferInput(input); err != nil {
  101: 		return llmrequest.RouteReservationTransferResult{}, err
  102: 	}
  103: 
  104: 	now := s.clock.Now()
  105: 	if now.IsZero() || now.Location() != time.UTC {
  106: 		return llmrequest.RouteReservationTransferResult{},
  107: 			ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  108: 	}
  109: 	now = now.Truncate(time.Microsecond)
  110: 
  111: 	var result llmrequest.RouteReservationTransferResult
  112: 	err := InTx(ctx, s.db, pgx.TxOptions{}, func(tx pgx.Tx) error {
  113: 		current, err := scanUsageRecord(
  114: 			tx.QueryRow(
  115: 				ctx,
  116: 				findUsageForRouteTransferSQL,
  117: 				input.ExpectedUsage.LocalRequestID,
  118: 			),
  119: 		)
  120: 		if err != nil {
  121: 			return err
  122: 		}
  123: 
  124: 		targetUsage := routeTransferTargetUsage(
  125: 			input.ExpectedUsage,
  126: 			input.Target,
  127: 			now,
  128: 		)
  129: 		if routeTransferAlreadyApplied(current, targetUsage) {
  130: 			resellers, err := lockRouteTransferResellers(
  131: 				ctx,
  132: 				tx,
  133: 				input.ExpectedUsage.SelectedResellerID,
  134: 				input.Target.Reseller.ID,
  135: 			)
  136: 			if err != nil {
  137: 				return err
  138: 			}
  139: 			result = llmrequest.RouteReservationTransferResult{
  140: 				Usage:            current,
  141: 				ReleasedReseller: resellers[input.ExpectedUsage.SelectedResellerID],
  142: 				ReservedReseller: resellers[input.Target.Reseller.ID],
  143: 			}
  144: 			return nil
  145: 		}
  146: 		if !reflect.DeepEqual(current, input.ExpectedUsage) {
  147: 			return ports.ErrStoreConflict
  148: 		}
  149: 
  150: 		resellers, err := lockRouteTransferResellers(
  151: 			ctx,
  152: 			tx,
  153: 			current.SelectedResellerID,
  154: 			input.Target.Reseller.ID,
  155: 		)
  156: 		if err != nil {
  157: 			return err
  158: 		}
  159: 		previous := resellers[current.SelectedResellerID]
  160: 		target := resellers[input.Target.Reseller.ID]
  161: 		if err := validateRouteTransferResellers(
  162: 			previous,
  163: 			target,
  164: 			current,
  165: 			input.Target,
  166: 		); err != nil {
  167: 			return err
  168: 		}
  169: 
  170: 		released, reserved, err := applyRouteTransferBalances(
  171: 			ctx,
  172: 			tx,
  173: 			previous,
  174: 			target,
  175: 			current.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents,
  176: 			input.Target.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents,
  177: 			now,
  178: 		)
  179: 		if err != nil {
  180: 			return err
  181: 		}
  182: 
  183: 		args := usageRecordNamedArgs(targetUsage)
  184: 		args["lookup_local_request_id"] = current.LocalRequestID
  185: 		args["expected_status"] = string(domain.UsageStatusReserved)
  186: 		tag, err := tx.Exec(ctx, updateUsageRecordCASQL, args)
  187: 		if err != nil {
  188: 			return NormalizeError(err)
  189: 		}
  190: 		if tag.RowsAffected() != 1 {
  191: 			return ports.ErrStoreConflict
  192: 		}
  193: 
  194: 		persisted, err := scanUsageRecord(
  195: 			tx.QueryRow(
  196: 				ctx,
  197: 				findUsageForRouteTransferSQL,
  198: 				current.LocalRequestID,
  199: 			),
  200: 		)
  201: 		if err != nil {
  202: 			return err
  203: 		}
  204: 		if !reflect.DeepEqual(persisted, targetUsage) {
  205: 			return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  206: 		}
  207: 
  208: 		result = llmrequest.RouteReservationTransferResult{
  209: 			Usage:            persisted,
  210: 			ReleasedReseller: released,
  211: 			ReservedReseller: reserved,
  212: 		}
  213: 		return nil
  214: 	})
  215: 	if err != nil {
  216: 		return llmrequest.RouteReservationTransferResult{}, err
  217: 	}
  218: 	return result, nil
  219: }
  220: 
  221: func validateRouteReservationTransferInput(
  222: 	input llmrequest.RouteReservationTransferInput,
  223: ) error {
  224: 	expected := input.ExpectedUsage
  225: 	target := input.Target
  226: 	if strings.TrimSpace(expected.LocalRequestID) == "" ||
  227: 		expected.Status != domain.UsageStatusReserved ||
  228: 		strings.TrimSpace(expected.SelectedRouteID) == "" ||
  229: 		strings.TrimSpace(expected.SelectedResellerID) == "" ||
  230: 		expected.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents < 0 ||
  231: 		expected.Currency != "RUB" ||
  232: 		strings.TrimSpace(target.Route.ID) == "" ||
  233: 		strings.TrimSpace(target.Reseller.ID) == "" ||
  234: 		target.Route.ResellerID != target.Reseller.ID ||
  235: 		target.Route.ProviderType == "" ||
  236: 		target.Route.ProviderType != target.Reseller.ProviderType ||
  237: 		target.Route.APIFamily != expected.APIFamily ||
  238: 		target.Route.EndpointKind != expected.EndpointKind ||
  239: 		target.Route.ClientModel != expected.ClientModel ||
  240: 		!target.Route.Enabled ||
  241: 		!target.Reseller.Enabled ||
  242: 		strings.TrimSpace(target.BillingModel) == "" ||
  243: 		target.EstimatedClientAmountCents < 0 ||
  244: 		target.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents < 0 ||
  245: 		target.Currency != expected.Currency ||
  246: 		!nonNegativeLLMRequestAtomicReservationUsage(target.EstimatedUsage) {
  247: 		return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  248: 	}
  249: 	return nil
  250: }
  251: 
  252: func routeTransferTargetUsage(
  253: 	expected domain.UsageRecord,
  254: 	target llmrequest.RouteFallbackPlan,
  255: 	now time.Time,
  256: ) domain.UsageRecord {
  257: 	result := expected
  258: 	result.BillingModel = target.BillingModel
  259: 	result.SelectedRouteID = target.Route.ID
  260: 	result.SelectedResellerID = target.Reseller.ID
  261: 	result.ProviderType = target.Route.ProviderType
  262: 	result.ProviderModel = target.Route.ProviderModel
  263: 	result.EstimatedUsage = target.EstimatedUsage
  264: 	result.EstimatedClientAmountCents = target.EstimatedClientAmountCents
  265: 	result.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents = target.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents
  266: 	result.Currency = target.Currency
  267: 	result.UpdatedAt = now
  268: 	return result
  269: }
  270: 
  271: func routeTransferAlreadyApplied(
  272: 	current domain.UsageRecord,
  273: 	target domain.UsageRecord,
  274: ) bool {
  275: 	if current.Status != domain.UsageStatusReserved {
  276: 		return false
  277: 	}
  278: 	target.UpdatedAt = current.UpdatedAt
  279: 	return reflect.DeepEqual(current, target)
  280: }
  281: 
  282: func lockRouteTransferResellers(
  283: 	ctx context.Context,
  284: 	tx pgx.Tx,
  285: 	previousID string,
  286: 	targetID string,
  287: ) (map[string]domain.Reseller, error) {
  288: 	ids := []string{previousID}
  289: 	if targetID != previousID {
  290: 		ids = append(ids, targetID)
  291: 	}
  292: 	sort.Strings(ids)
  293: 
  294: 	rows, err := tx.Query(ctx, findResellersForRouteTransferSQL, ids)
  295: 	if err != nil {
  296: 		return nil, NormalizeError(err)
  297: 	}
  298: 	defer rows.Close()
  299: 
  300: 	result := make(map[string]domain.Reseller, len(ids))
  301: 	for rows.Next() {
  302: 		value, err := scanReseller(rows)
  303: 		if err != nil {
  304: 			return nil, err
  305: 		}
  306: 		if _, exists := result[value.ID]; exists {
  307: 			return nil, ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  308: 		}
  309: 		result[value.ID] = value
  310: 	}
  311: 	if err := rows.Err(); err != nil {
  312: 		return nil, NormalizeError(err)
  313: 	}
  314: 	if len(result) != len(ids) {
  315: 		return nil, ports.ErrStoreConflict
  316: 	}
  317: 	return result, nil
  318: }
  319: 
  320: func validateRouteTransferResellers(
  321: 	previous domain.Reseller,
  322: 	target domain.Reseller,
  323: 	current domain.UsageRecord,
  324: 	plan llmrequest.RouteFallbackPlan,
  325: ) error {
  326: 	if previous.ID != current.SelectedResellerID ||
  327: 		target.ID != plan.Reseller.ID ||
  328: 		target.ID != plan.Route.ResellerID ||
  329: 		target.ProviderType != plan.Route.ProviderType ||
  330: 		previous.ReservedCents < current.EstimatedUpstreamCostCents {
  331: 		return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  332: 	}
  333: 	return nil
  334: }
  335: 
  336: func applyRouteTransferBalances(
  337: 	ctx context.Context,
  338: 	tx pgx.Tx,
  339: 	previous domain.Reseller,
  340: 	target domain.Reseller,
  341: 	releaseCents int64,
  342: 	reserveCents int64,
  343: 	now time.Time,
  344: ) (domain.Reseller, domain.Reseller, error) {
  345: 	if previous.ID == target.ID {
  346: 		nextReserved := previous.ReservedCents - releaseCents
  347: 		candidate := previous
  348: 		candidate.ReservedCents = nextReserved
  349: 		if !domain.CanReserveResellerBalance(candidate, reserveCents) {
  350: 			return domain.Reseller{}, domain.Reseller{},
  351: 				llmrequest.ErrResellerReserveUnavailable
  352: 		}
  353: 		nextReserved += reserveCents
  354: 		updated, err := updateRouteTransferReseller(
  355: 			ctx,
  356: 			tx,
  357: 			previous.ID,
  358: 			nextReserved,
  359: 			now,
  360: 		)
  361: 		return updated, updated, err
  362: 	}
  363: 
  364: 	previousReserved := previous.ReservedCents - releaseCents
  365: 	if previousReserved < 0 {
  366: 		return domain.Reseller{}, domain.Reseller{},
  367: 			ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  368: 	}
  369: 	if !domain.CanReserveResellerBalance(target, reserveCents) {
  370: 		return domain.Reseller{}, domain.Reseller{},
  371: 			llmrequest.ErrResellerReserveUnavailable
  372: 	}
  373: 	targetReserved := target.ReservedCents + reserveCents
  374: 
  375: 	released, err := updateRouteTransferReseller(
  376: 		ctx,
  377: 		tx,
  378: 		previous.ID,
  379: 		previousReserved,
  380: 		now,
  381: 	)
  382: 	if err != nil {
  383: 		return domain.Reseller{}, domain.Reseller{}, err
  384: 	}
  385: 	reserved, err := updateRouteTransferReseller(
  386: 		ctx,
  387: 		tx,
  388: 		target.ID,
  389: 		targetReserved,
  390: 		now,
  391: 	)
  392: 	if err != nil {
  393: 		return domain.Reseller{}, domain.Reseller{}, err
  394: 	}
  395: 	return released, reserved, nil
  396: }
  397: 
  398: func updateRouteTransferReseller(
  399: 	ctx context.Context,
  400: 	tx pgx.Tx,
  401: 	resellerID string,
  402: 	reservedCents int64,
  403: 	now time.Time,
  404: ) (domain.Reseller, error) {
  405: 	if reservedCents < 0 {
  406: 		return domain.Reseller{}, ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  407: 	}
  408: 	value, err := scanReseller(
  409: 		tx.QueryRow(
  410: 			ctx,
  411: 			updateResellerReserveForRouteTransferSQL,
  412: 			resellerID,
  413: 			reservedCents,
  414: 			now,
  415: 		),
  416: 	)
  417: 	if err != nil {
  418: 		return domain.Reseller{}, err
  419: 	}
  420: 	if value.ID != resellerID ||
  421: 		value.ReservedCents != reservedCents {
  422: 		return domain.Reseller{}, ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  423: 	}
  424: 	return value, nil
  425: }

    8: func TestOperationalMigrationContainsCanonicalTablesAndIndexes(t *testing.T) {
    9: 	up := migrationFile(t, "000003_operational_admin_provisioning.up.sql")
   10: 
   11: 	required := []string{
   12: 		"CREATE TABLE tokenio_route_events",
   13: 		"CREATE TABLE tokenio_telegram_alerts",
   14: 		"CREATE TABLE tokenio_admin_audit_log",
   15: 		"CREATE TABLE tokenio_api_key_provisionings",
   16: 		"tokenio_route_events_route_idx",
   17: 		"tokenio_route_events_reseller_idx",
   18: 		"tokenio_route_events_request_idx",
   19: 		"tokenio_telegram_alerts_dedupe_idx",
   20: 		"tokenio_api_key_provisionings_idempotency_uq",
   21: 		"tokenio_api_key_provisionings_user_pending_uq",
   22: 		"tokenio_api_key_provisionings_external_billing_user_idx",
   23: 		"tokenio_api_key_provisionings_api_key_idx",
   24: 		"tokenio_api_key_provisionings_expiry_idx",
   25: 	}
   26: 	for _, fragment := range required {
   27: 		if !strings.Contains(up, fragment) {
   28: 			t.Errorf("operational migration missing %q", fragment)
   29: 		}
   30: 	}
   31: }
   32: 
   33: func TestOperationalMigrationEnforcesCanonicalStates(t *testing.T) {
   34: 	up := migrationFile(t, "000003_operational_admin_provisioning.up.sql")
   35: 
   36: 	required := []string{
   37: 		"'selected'",
   38: 		"'cooldown_set'",
   39: 		"'healthcheck_recovered'",
   40: 		"'balance_low'",
   41: 		"'pending'",
   42: 		"'sent'",
   43: 		"'failed'",
   44: 		"'suppressed'",
   45: 		"result_type IN ('key_created', 'already_provisioned')",
   46: 		"status IN ('pending_delivery', 'delivered', 'expired')",
   47: 		"CHECK (delivery_attempts >= 0)",
   48: 		"status = 'pending_delivery'",
   49: 		"result_type = 'key_created'",
   50: 		"encrypted_raw_key IS NOT NULL",
   51: 		"encryption_nonce IS NOT NULL",
   52: 		"encryption_key_version IS NOT NULL",
   53: 		"expires_at IS NOT NULL",
   54: 		"status IN ('delivered', 'expired')",
   55: 		"encrypted_raw_key IS NULL",
   56: 		"encryption_nonce IS NULL",
   57: 	}
   58: 	for _, fragment := range required {
   59: 		if !strings.Contains(up, fragment) {
   60: 			t.Errorf("operational migration missing state invariant %q", fragment)
   61: 		}
   62: 	}
   63: }
   64: 
   65: func TestOperationalMigrationDoesNotPersistForbiddenSecrets(t *testing.T) {
   66: 	up := migrationFile(t, "000003_operational_admin_provisioning.up.sql")
   67: 
   68: 	forbidden := []string{
   69: 		"raw_api_key TEXT",
   70: 		"reseller_api_key",
   71: 		"billing_jwt",
   72: 		"billing_service_token",
   73: 		"admin_token",
   74: 		"ON DELETE CASCADE",
   75: 	}
   76: 	for _, fragment := range forbidden {
   77: 		if strings.Contains(up, fragment) {
   78: 			t.Errorf("operational migration contains forbidden fragment %q", fragment)
   79: 		}
   80: 	}
   81: }
   82: 
   83: func TestOperationalDownMigrationDropsTablesInDependencyOrder(t *testing.T) {
   84: 	down := migrationFile(t, "000003_operational_admin_provisioning.down.sql")
   85: 	expected := []string{
   86: 		"DROP TABLE tokenio_api_key_provisionings;",
   87: 		"DROP TABLE tokenio_admin_audit_log;",
   88: 		"DROP TABLE tokenio_telegram_alerts;",
   89: 		"DROP TABLE tokenio_route_events;",
   90: 	}
   91: 
   92: 	position := -1
   93: 	for _, statement := range expected {
   94: 		next := strings.Index(down, statement)
   95: 		if next < 0 {
   96: 			t.Fatalf("down migration missing %q", statement)
   97: 		}
   98: 		if next <= position {
   99: 			t.Fatalf("down migration dependency order is invalid at %q", statement)
  100: 		}
  101: 		position = next
  102: 	}
  103: }

FILE: internal/infrastructure/postgres/operational_mapping.go
GIT_BLOB_SHA: 09b1327c2594ea8198e8eb03f9b6021616adf048

    1: package postgres
    2: 
    3: import (
    4: 	"bytes"
    5: 	"encoding/json"
    6: 	"errors"
    7: 	"io"
    8: 	"strings"
    9: 	"time"
   10: 
   11: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/domain"
   12: 	"github.com/bogachenko/tokenio-gateway/internal/ports"
   13: 	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgtype"
   14: )
   15: 
   16: type operationalRowScanner interface {
   17: 	Scan(dest ...any) error
   18: }
   19: 
   20: func operationalTime(value time.Time) time.Time {
   21: 	return value.UTC().Truncate(time.Microsecond)
   22: }
   23: 
   24: func operationalTimePointer(value *time.Time) *time.Time {
   25: 	if value == nil {
   26: 		return nil
   27: 	}
   28: 	canonical := operationalTime(*value)
   29: 	return &canonical
   30: }
   31: 
   32: func operationalTimeArg(value *time.Time) any {
   33: 	if value == nil {
   34: 		return nil
   35: 	}
   36: 	return operationalTime(*value)
   37: }
   38: 
   39: func sameOperationalTimePointer(
   40: 	left *time.Time,
   41: 	right *time.Time,
   42: ) bool {
   43: 	switch {
   44: 	case left == nil && right == nil:
   45: 		return true
   46: 	case left == nil || right == nil:
   47: 		return false
   48: 	default:
   49: 		return operationalTime(*left).Equal(
   50: 			operationalTime(*right),
   51: 		)
   52: 	}
   53: }
   54: 
   55: func isOperationalUTCTime(value time.Time) bool {
   56: 	return !value.IsZero() && value.Location() == time.UTC
   57: }
   58: 
   59: func validateOperationalPage(page ports.PageRequest) error {
   60: 	if page.Limit <= 0 || page.Offset < 0 {
   61: 		return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
   62: 	}
   63: 	return nil
   64: }
   65: 
   66: func validateOperationalWindow(
   67: 	from *time.Time,
   68: 	to *time.Time,
   69: ) error {
   70: 	if from != nil && !isOperationalUTCTime(*from) {
   71: 		return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
   72: 	}
   73: 	if to != nil && !isOperationalUTCTime(*to) {
   74: 		return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
   75: 	}
   76: 	if from != nil && to != nil && !from.Before(*to) {
   77: 		return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
   78: 	}
   79: 	return nil
   80: }
   81: 
   82: func scanBillingSession(
   83: 	row operationalRowScanner,
   84: ) (domain.BillingSession, error) {
   85: 	var value domain.BillingSession
   86: 	if err := row.Scan(
   87: 		&value.UserID,
   88: 		&value.BillingSubjectUserID,
   89: 		&value.RemoteBalanceCents,
   90: 		&value.PendingAmountCentsCached,
   91: 		&value.Currency,
   92: 		&value.FetchedAt,
   93: 		&value.CreatedAt,
   94: 		&value.UpdatedAt,
   95: 	); err != nil {
   96: 		return domain.BillingSession{},
   97: 			normalizeRegistryReadError(err)
   98: 	}
   99: 
  100: 	value.FetchedAt = operationalTime(value.FetchedAt)
  101: 	value.CreatedAt = operationalTime(value.CreatedAt)
  102: 	value.UpdatedAt = operationalTime(value.UpdatedAt)
  103: 	if err := validateBillingSessionPersistence(value); err != nil {
  104: 		return domain.BillingSession{}, err
  105: 	}
  106: 	return value, nil
  107: }
  108: 
  109: func validateBillingSessionPersistence(
  110: 	value domain.BillingSession,
  111: ) error {
  112: 	if value.UserID == "" ||
  113: 		value.BillingSubjectUserID == "" ||
  114: 		value.RemoteBalanceCents < 0 ||
  115: 		value.PendingAmountCentsCached < 0 ||
  116: 		value.Currency != "RUB" ||
  117: 		!isOperationalUTCTime(value.FetchedAt) ||
  118: 		!isOperationalUTCTime(value.CreatedAt) ||
  119: 		!isOperationalUTCTime(value.UpdatedAt) ||
  120: 		operationalTime(value.FetchedAt).Before(
  121: 			operationalTime(value.CreatedAt),
  122: 		) ||
  123: 		operationalTime(value.UpdatedAt).Before(
  124: 			operationalTime(value.FetchedAt),
  125: 		) {
  126: 		return ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  127: 	}
  128: 	return nil
  129: }
  130: 
  131: func canonicalBillingSession(
  132: 	value domain.BillingSession,
  133: ) domain.BillingSession {
  134: 	result := value
  135: 	result.FetchedAt = operationalTime(value.FetchedAt)
  136: 	result.CreatedAt = operationalTime(value.CreatedAt)
  137: 	result.UpdatedAt = operationalTime(value.UpdatedAt)
  138: 	return result
  139: }
  140: 
  141: func sameBillingSession(
  142: 	left domain.BillingSession,
  143: 	right domain.BillingSession,
  144: ) bool {
  145: 	return left.UserID == right.UserID &&
  146: 		left.BillingSubjectUserID ==
  147: 			right.BillingSubjectUserID &&
  148: 		left.RemoteBalanceCents == right.RemoteBalanceCents &&
  149: 		left.PendingAmountCentsCached ==
  150: 			right.PendingAmountCentsCached &&
  151: 		left.Currency == right.Currency &&
  152: 		operationalTime(left.FetchedAt).Equal(
  153: 			operationalTime(right.FetchedAt),
  154: 		) &&
  155: 		operationalTime(left.CreatedAt).Equal(
  156: 			operationalTime(right.CreatedAt),
  157: 		) &&
  158: 		operationalTime(left.UpdatedAt).Equal(
  159: 			operationalTime(right.UpdatedAt),
  160: 		)
  161: }
  162: 
  163: func encodeRouteEventMetadata(
  164: 	metadata domain.RouteEventMetadata,
  165: ) ([]byte, error) {
  166: 	if metadata == nil {
  167: 		metadata = domain.RouteEventMetadata{}
  168: 	}
  169: 	if containsOperationalSecret(metadata) {
  170: 		return nil, ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  171: 	}
  172: 	body, err := json.Marshal(metadata)
  173: 	if err != nil {
  174: 		return nil, ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  175: 	}
  176: 	if _, err := decodeRouteEventMetadata(body); err != nil {
  177: 		return nil, err
  178: 	}
  179: 	return body, nil
  180: }
  181: 
  182: func decodeRouteEventMetadata(
  183: 	raw []byte,
  184: ) (domain.RouteEventMetadata, error) {
  185: 	trimmed := bytes.TrimSpace(raw)
  186: 	if len(trimmed) < 2 ||
  187: 		trimmed[0] != '{' ||
  188: 		trimmed[len(trimmed)-1] != '}' {
  189: 		return nil, ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  190: 	}
  191: 
  192: 	var value domain.RouteEventMetadata
  193: 	decoder := json.NewDecoder(bytes.NewReader(trimmed))
  194: 	decoder.UseNumber()
  195: 	if err := decoder.Decode(&value); err != nil {
  196: 		return nil, ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  197: 	}
  198: 	if err := decoder.Decode(&struct{}{}); !errors.Is(err, io.EOF) {
  199: 		return nil, ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  200: 	}
  201: 	if value == nil {
  202: 		value = domain.RouteEventMetadata{}
  203: 	}
  204: 	if containsOperationalSecret(value) {
  205: 		return nil, ports.ErrStoreContractViolation
  206: 	}
  207: 	return value, nil
  208: }
  209: 
  210: func containsOperationalSecret(value any) bool {
  211: 	switch typed := value.(type) {
  212: 	case domain.RouteEventMetadata:
  213: 		return containsOperationalSecret(map[string]any(typed))
  214: 	case map[string]any:
  215: 		for key, child := range typed {
  216: 			switch strings.ToLower(key) {
  217: 			case
  218: 				"authorization",
  219: 				"api_key",
  220: 				"raw_api_key",
  221: 				"key_hash",
  222: 				"billing_jwt",
  223: 				"billing_service_token",
  224: 				"admin_token",
  225: 				"request_body",
  226: 				"response_body",
  227: 				"raw_body",
  228: 				"encrypted_raw_key",
  229: 				"encryption_nonce":
  230: 				return true
  231: 			}
  232: 			if containsOperationalSecret(child) {
  233: 				return true
  234: 			}
  235: 		}
  236: 	case []any:
  237: 		for _, child := range typed {
  238: 			if containsOperationalSecret(child) {
  239: 				return true
  240: 			}
  241: 		}
  242: 	}
  243: 	return false
  244: }
  245: 
  246: func validRouteEventType(value domain.RouteEventType) bool {
  247: 	switch value {
  248: 	case
  249: 		domain.RouteEventTypeSelected,
  250: 		domain.RouteEventTypeSkipped,
  251: 		domain.RouteEventTypeCooldownSet,
  252: 		domain.RouteEventTypeCooldownExpired,
  253: 		domain.RouteEventTypeRetry,
  254: 		domain.RouteEventTypeFailure,
  255: 		domain.RouteEventTypeSuccess,
  256: 		domain.RouteEventTypeHealthcheckFailed,
  257: 		domain.RouteEventTypeHealthcheckRecovered,
  258: 		domain.RouteEventTypeBalanceLow:
  259: 		return true
  260: 	default:
  261: 		return false
  262: 	}
  263: }
  264: 
  265: func validOperationalProviderType(
  266: 	value domain.ProviderType,
  267: ) bool {
  268: 	switch value {
  269: 	case
  270: 		domain.ProviderOpenAI,
  271: 		domain.ProviderOpenRouter,
  272: 		domain.ProviderTogether,
  273: 		domain.ProviderGroq,
  274: 		domain.ProviderOllama,
  275: 		domain.ProviderLMStudio,
  276: 		domain.ProviderVLLM,
  277: 		domain.ProviderGemini,
  278: 		domain.ProviderAnthropic,
  279: 		domain.ProviderHydra:
  280: 		return true
  281: 	default:
  282: 		return false
  283: 	}
  284: }
  285: 
  286: func validOperationalAPIFamily(value domain.APIFamily) bool {

  288: 	case
  289: 		domain.APIFamilyOpenAICompatible,

  294: 	default:

  296: 	}
  297: }
  298: 
  299: func validOperationalEndpointKind(
  300: 	value domain.EndpointKind,

  302: 	switch value {
  303: 	case
  304: 		domain.EndpointChat,
  305: 		domain.EndpointEmbeddings,

  307: 		return true
